authors_text: D. F. G. Coelho,R. J. Cintra,F. M. Bayer,S. Kulasekera,A. Madanayake,P. A. C. Martinez,T. L. T. Silveira,R. S. Oliveira,V. S. Dimitrov
title: Low-Complexity Loeffler DCT Approximations for Image and Video Coding
title_zh: 用于图像和视频编码的低复杂度 Loeffler DCT 近似
abstract: This paper introduced a matrix parametrization method based on the Loeffler discrete cosine transform (DCT) algorithm. As a result, a new class of eight-point DCT approximations was proposed, capable of unifying the mathematical formalism of several eight-point DCT approximations archived in the literature. Pareto-efficient DCT approximations are obtained through multicriteria optimization, where computational complexity, proximity, and coding performance are considered. Efficient approximations and their scaled 16- and 32-point versions are embedded into image and video encoders, including a JPEG-like codec and H.264/AVC and H.265/HEVC standards. Results are compared to the unmodified standard codecs. Efficient approximations are mapped and implemented on a Xilinx VLX240T FPGA and evaluated for area, speed, and power consumption.
summary: This paper introduced a matrix parametrization method based on the Loeffler discrete cosine transform (DCT) algorithm. As a result, a new class of eight-point DCT approximations was proposed, capable of unifying the mathematical formalism of several eight-point DCT approximations archived in the literature. Pareto-efficient DCT approximations are obtained through multicriteria optimization, where computational complexity, proximity, and coding performance are considered. Efficient approximations and their scaled 16- and 32-point versions are embedded into image and video encoders, including a JPEG-like codec and H.264/AVC and H.265/HEVC standards. Results are compared to the unmodified standard codecs. Efficient approximations are mapped and implemented on a Xilinx VLX240T FPGA and evaluated for area, speed, and power consumption.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于Loeffler离散余弦变换(DCT)算法的矩阵参数化方法。因此，提出了一类新的八点 DCT 近似，能够统一文献中几种八点 DCT 近似的数学形式。帕累托高效 DCT 近似是通过多标准优化获得的，其中考虑了计算复杂性、邻近性和编码性能。高效近似及其缩放的 16 点和 32 点版本被嵌入到图像和视频编码器中，包括类似 JPEG 的编解码器以及 H.264/AVC 和 H.265/HEVC 标准。将结果与未修改的标准编解码器进行比较。在 Xilinx VLX240T FPGA 上映射和实现高效近似，并评估面积、速度和功耗。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Loeffler离散余弦变换（DCT）算法的矩阵参数化方法，设计低复杂度八点DCT近似，并将其应用于图像和视频编码标准中。
AI.motivation: 传统DCT计算复杂度高，限制了实时编码性能，需寻找计算效率与编码质量平衡的近似方法。
AI.method: 通过矩阵参数化统一多种八点DCT近似形式，采用多目标优化获得帕累托最优解，并扩展至16/32点版本，嵌入JPEG、H.264/AVC和H.265/HEVC编码器。
AI.result: 近似算法在FPGA实现中表现出更优的面积、速度和功耗指标，且编码性能接近标准DCT。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保持编码质量的同时显著降低计算复杂度，为高效硬件实现提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Zheng Li,Yiming Huang,Yui-Pan Yau,Pan Hui,Lik-Hang Lee
title: Towards Reproducible Evaluations for Flying Drone Controllers in Virtual Environments
title_zh: 在虚拟环境中对飞行无人机控制器进行可重复的评估
abstract: Research attention on natural user interfaces (NUIs) for drone flights are rising. Nevertheless, NUIs are highly diversified, and primarily evaluated by different physical environments leading to hard-to-compare performance between such solutions. We propose a virtual environment, namely VRFlightSim, enabling comparative evaluations with enriched drone flight details to address this issue. We first replicated a state-of-the-art (SOTA) interface and designed two tasks (crossing and pointing) in our virtual environment. Then, two user studies with 13 participants demonstrate the necessity of VRFlightSim and further highlight the potential of open-data interface designs.
summary: Research attention on natural user interfaces (NUIs) for drone flights are rising. Nevertheless, NUIs are highly diversified, and primarily evaluated by different physical environments leading to hard-to-compare performance between such solutions. We propose a virtual environment, namely VRFlightSim, enabling comparative evaluations with enriched drone flight details to address this issue. We first replicated a state-of-the-art (SOTA) interface and designed two tasks (crossing and pointing) in our virtual environment. Then, two user studies with 13 participants demonstrate the necessity of VRFlightSim and further highlight the potential of open-data interface designs.
abstract_zh: 对无人机飞行自然用户界面（NUI）的研究关注度不断上升。然而，NUI 高度多样化，并且主要通过不同的物理环境进行评估，导致此类解决方案之间的性能难以比较。我们提出了一个虚拟环境，即 VRFlightSim，可以通过丰富的无人机飞行细节进行比较评估来解决这个问题。我们首先复制了最先进的 (SOTA) 界面，并在虚拟环境中设计了两个任务（交叉和指向）。然后，两项涉及 13 名参与者的用户研究证明了 VRFlightSim 的必要性，并进一步凸显了开放数据接口设计的潜力。

AI.tldr: 开发VRFlightSim虚拟环境以实现无人机控制器的可重复评估，解决现有方法因物理环境差异导致的评估结果不可比问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机控制界面评估依赖不同物理环境，导致结果难以比较，需统一虚拟环境进行标准化评估。
AI.method: 构建VRFlightSim虚拟环境，复制现有先进接口，设计穿越和指向任务，开展两次用户研究验证有效性。
AI.result: 用户研究验证了VRFlightSim的必要性，并显示开放数据接口设计在提升评估可比性方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 虚拟环境能有效提升无人机控制器评估的可重复性与可比性，推动标准化和开放数据接口设计的发展。

authors_text: Xinjie Yao,Ji Zhang,Jean Oh
title: RCA: Ride Comfort-Aware Visual Navigation via Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: RCA：通过自我监督学习实现乘坐舒适感知视觉导航
abstract: Under shared autonomy, wheelchair users expect vehicles to provide safe and comfortable rides while following users high-level navigation plans. To find such a path, vehicles negotiate with different terrains and assess their traversal difficulty. Most prior works model surroundings either through geometric representations or semantic classifications, which do not reflect perceived motion intensity and ride comfort in downstream navigation tasks. We propose to model ride comfort explicitly in traversability analysis using proprioceptive sensing. We develop a self-supervised learning framework to predict traversability costmap from first-person-view images by leveraging vehicle states as training signals. Our approach estimates how the vehicle would feel if traversing over based on terrain appearances. We then show our navigation system provides human-preferred ride comfort through robot experiments together with a human evaluation study.
summary: Under shared autonomy, wheelchair users expect vehicles to provide safe and comfortable rides while following users high-level navigation plans. To find such a path, vehicles negotiate with different terrains and assess their traversal difficulty. Most prior works model surroundings either through geometric representations or semantic classifications, which do not reflect perceived motion intensity and ride comfort in downstream navigation tasks. We propose to model ride comfort explicitly in traversability analysis using proprioceptive sensing. We develop a self-supervised learning framework to predict traversability costmap from first-person-view images by leveraging vehicle states as training signals. Our approach estimates how the vehicle would feel if traversing over based on terrain appearances. We then show our navigation system provides human-preferred ride comfort through robot experiments together with a human evaluation study.
abstract_zh: 在共享自主下，轮椅用户希望车辆能够提供安全舒适的乘坐体验，同时遵循用户的高级导航计划。为了找到这样的路径，车辆需要适应不同的地形并评估其穿越难度。大多数先前的工作通过几何表示或语义分类来建模周围环境，这不能反映下游导航任务中感知的运动强度和乘坐舒适度。我们建议使用本体感觉传感在可穿越性分析中明确地模拟乘坐舒适度。我们开发了一个自我监督的学习框架，通过利用车辆状态作为训练信号，从第一人称视角图像预测可遍历性成本图。我们的方法根据地形外观来估计车辆穿越时的感觉。然后，我们通过机器人实验和人类评估研究来展示我们的导航系统提供人类首选的乘坐舒适度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的视觉导航方法，通过显式建模乘坐舒适度提升轮椅用户的自动驾驶体验。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过几何或语义分类建模环境，未能反映地形对乘坐舒适度的影响，导致导航路径无法满足用户舒适性需求。
AI.method: 开发自监督学习框架，利用车辆状态作为训练信号，从第一人称视角图像预测可穿越性成本图，量化地形对乘坐舒适度的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明该导航系统在机器人测试和人类评估中均能提供符合用户偏好的舒适性表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模乘坐舒适度并结合自监督学习，本文为共享自主驾驶场景提供了更符合人体工学的导航解决方案。

We develop a self-supervised learning framework to predict traversability costmap from first-person-view images by leveraging vehicle states as training signals. Our approach estimates how the vehicle would feel if traversing over based on terrain appearances. We then show our navigation system provides human-preferred ride comfort through robot experiments together with a human evaluation study. 在共享自主下，轮椅用户希望车辆能够提供安全舒适的乘坐体验，同时遵循用户的高级导航计划。为了找到这样的路径，车辆需要适应不同的地形并评估其穿越难度。大多数先前的工作通过几何表示或语义分类来建模周围环境，这不能反映下游导航任务中感知的运动强度和乘坐舒适度。我们建议使用本体感觉传感在可穿越性分析中明确地模拟乘坐舒适度。我们开发了一个自我监督的学习框架，通过利用车辆状态作为训练信号，从第一人称视角图像预测可遍历性成本图。我们的方法根据地形外观来估计车辆穿越时的感觉。然后，我们通过机器人实验和人类评估研究来展示我们的导航系统提供人类首选的乘坐舒适度。 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的视觉导航方法，通过显式建模乘坐舒适度提升轮椅用户的自动驾驶体验。 Xinjie Yao,Ji Zhang,Jean Oh cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Xinyu Fu,Yitong Yin,Chaodong Zheng
title: Locally-iterative $(Δ+1)$-Coloring in Sublinear (in $Δ$) Rounds
title_zh: 次线性（以 $Δ$ 为单位）回合中的局部迭代 $(Δ+1)$-着色
abstract: Distributed graph coloring is one of the most extensively studied problems in distributed computing. There is a canonical family of distributed graph coloring algorithms known as the locally-iterative coloring algorithms, first formalized in the seminal work of [Szegedy and Vishwanathan, STOC'93]. In such algorithms, every vertex iteratively updates its own color according to a predetermined function of the current coloring of its local neighborhood. Due to the simplicity and naturalness of its framework, locally-iterative coloring algorithms are of great significance both in theory and practice. In this paper, we give a locally-iterative $(Δ+1)$-coloring algorithm with $O(Δ^{3/4}\logΔ)+\log^*n$ running time. This is the first locally-iterative $(Δ+1)$-coloring algorithm with sublinear-in-$Δ$ running time, and answers the main open question raised in a recent breakthrough [Barenboim, Elkin, and Goldberg, JACM'21]. A key component of our algorithm is a locally-iterative procedure that transforms an $O(Δ^2)$-coloring to a $(Δ+O(Δ^{3/4}\logΔ))$-coloring in $o(Δ)$ time. Inside this procedure we work on special proper colorings that encode (arb)defective colorings, and reduce the number of used colors quadratically in a locally-iterative fashion. As a main application of our result, we also give a self-stabilizing distributed algorithm for $(Δ+1)$-coloring with $O(Δ^{3/4}\logΔ)+\log^*n$ stabilization time. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first self-stabilizing algorithm for $(Δ+1)$-coloring with sublinear-in-$Δ$ stabilization time.

abstract_zh: 分布式图着色是分布式计算中研究最广泛的问题之一。有一个规范的分布式图着色算法系列，称为局部迭代着色算法，首先在 [Szegedy 和 Vishwanathan, STOC'93] 的开创性工作中正式化。在此类算法中，每个顶点根据其局部邻域的当前着色的预定函数迭代地更新其自身的颜色。由于其框架的简单性和自然性，局部迭代着色算法在理论和实践上都具有重要意义。在本文中，我们给出了一种局部迭代的 $(Δ+1)$ 着色算法，运行时间为 $O(Δ^{3/4}\logΔ)+\log^*n$。这是第一个局部迭代 $(Δ+1)$ 着色算法，运行时间为 $Δ$ 亚线性，并回答了最近突破中提出的主要开放问题 [Barenboim、Elkin 和 Goldberg，JACM'21]。我们算法的一个关键组成部分是一个局部迭代过程，它可以在 $o(Δ)$ 时间内将 $O(Δ^2)$ 着色转换为 $(Δ+O(Δ^{3/4}\logΔ))$ 着色。在此过程中，我们研究特殊的正确着色，对（任意）缺陷着色进行编码，并以局部迭代方式二次减少使用的颜色数量。作为我们结果的主要应用，我们还给出了一种用于 $(Δ+1)$ 着色的自稳定分布式算法，稳定时间为 $O(Δ^{3/4}\logΔ)+\log^*n$。据我们所知，这是第一个用于 $(Δ+1)$ 着色的自稳定算法，其稳定时间为 $Δ$ 亚线性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种局部迭代的(Δ+1)-着色算法，其运行时间在Δ的亚线性范围内。
AI.motivation: 分布式图着色是分布式计算中的核心问题，局部迭代算法因其简洁性和实用性备受关注。此前的算法时间复杂度为O(Δ)，无法满足对亚线性时间的需求。
AI.method: 通过设计一种局部迭代过程，将O(Δ²)着色转换为(Δ+O(Δ³⁄⁴ logΔ))着色，并利用缺陷着色编码技术实现颜色数的二次缩减。
AI.result: 首次实现亚线性时间复杂度的局部迭代(Δ+1)-着色算法，时间复杂度为O(Δ³⁄⁴ logΔ)+log*n，并提供了首个亚线性稳定时间的自稳定算法。
AI.conclusion: 解决了长期存在的开放性问题，为分布式图着色提供了更高效的算法框架与自稳定方案。

authors_text: Itsuki Ueda,Yoshihiro Fukuhara,Hirokatsu Kataoka,Hiroaki Aizawa,Hidehiko Shishido,Itaru Kitahara
title: Neural Density-Distance Fields
title_zh: 神经密度-距离场
abstract: The success of neural fields for 3D vision tasks is now indisputable. Following this trend, several methods aiming for visual localization (e.g., SLAM) have been proposed to estimate distance or density fields using neural fields. However, it is difficult to achieve high localization performance by only density fields-based methods such as Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) since they do not provide density gradient in most empty regions. On the other hand, distance field-based methods such as Neural Implicit Surface (NeuS) have limitations in objects' surface shapes. This paper proposes Neural Density-Distance Field (NeDDF), a novel 3D representation that reciprocally constrains the distance and density fields. We extend distance field formulation to shapes with no explicit boundary surface, such as fur or smoke, which enable explicit conversion from distance field to density field. Consistent distance and density fields realized by explicit conversion enable both robustness to initial values and high-quality registration. Furthermore, the consistency between fields allows fast convergence from sparse point clouds. Experiments show that NeDDF can achieve high localization performance while providing comparable results to NeRF on novel view synthesis. The code is available at https://github.com/ueda0319/neddf.
summary: The success of neural fields for 3D vision tasks is now indisputable. Following this trend, several methods aiming for visual localization (e.g., SLAM) have been proposed to estimate distance or density fields using neural fields. However, it is difficult to achieve high localization performance by only density fields-based methods such as Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) since they do not provide density gradient in most empty regions. On the other hand, distance field-based methods such as Neural Implicit Surface (NeuS) have limitations in objects' surface shapes. This paper proposes Neural Density-Distance Field (NeDDF), a novel 3D representation that reciprocally constrains the distance and density fields. We extend distance field formulation to shapes with no explicit boundary surface, such as fur or smoke, which enable explicit conversion from distance field to density field. Consistent distance and density fields realized by explicit conversion enable both robustness to initial values and high-quality registration. Furthermore, the consistency between fields allows fast convergence from sparse point clouds. Experiments show that NeDDF can achieve high localization performance while providing comparable results to NeRF on novel view synthesis. The code is available at https://github.com/ueda0319/neddf.
abstract_zh: 神经场在 3D 视觉任务中的成功现在是无可争议的。遵循这一趋势，人们提出了几种旨在视觉定位的方法（例如 SLAM），以使用神经场来估计距离或密度场。然而，仅通过基于密度场的方法（例如神经辐射场（NeRF））很难实现高定位性能，因为它们在大多数空区域中不提供密度梯度。另一方面，基于距离场的方法（例如神经隐式表面（NeuS））在对象表面形状方面存在局限性。本文提出了神经密度距离场 (NeDDF)，这是一种相互约束距离场和密度场的新型 3D 表示形式。我们将距离场公式扩展到没有明确边界表面的形状，例如毛皮或烟雾，这使得可以从距离场到密度场的显式转换。通过显式转换实现一致的距离和密度场，可实现对初始值的鲁棒性和高质量配准。此外，场之间的一致性允许稀疏点云的快速收敛。实验表明，NeDDF 可以实现较高的定位性能，同时在新视图合成方面提供与 NeRF 相当的结果。代码可在 https://github.com/ueda0319/neddf 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为NeDDF的新颖3D表示方法，通过相互约束距离场和密度场来提升视觉定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于密度场的方法（如NeRF）在空区域缺乏密度梯度，而基于距离场的方法（如NeuS）难以处理复杂表面形状，导致定位性能受限。
AI.method: 扩展距离场公式以处理无显式边界表面（如毛发或烟雾），通过显式转换实现距离场与密度场的一致性，从而提升鲁棒性和稀疏点云收敛速度。
AI.result: 实验表明，NeDDF在定位任务中表现优异，且在新视角合成任务中效果可与NeRF媲美。
AI.conclusion: NeDDF通过整合距离场与密度场的优势，有效解决了现有方法的局限性，为3D视觉任务提供了更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Yunjie Peng,Saihui Hou,Chunshui Cao,Xu Liu,Yongzhen Huang,Zhiqiang He
title: Deep Learning-based Occluded Person Re-identification: A Survey
title_zh: 基于深度学习的被遮挡人重新识别：一项调查
comment: The paper is under consideration at IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
comments: The paper is under consideration at IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
abstract: Occluded person re-identification (Re-ID) aims at addressing the occlusion problem when retrieving the person of interest across multiple cameras. With the promotion of deep learning technology and the increasing demand for intelligent video surveillance, the frequent occlusion in real-world applications has made occluded person Re-ID draw considerable interest from researchers. A large number of occluded person Re-ID methods have been proposed while there are few surveys that focus on occlusion. To fill this gap and help boost future research, this paper provides a systematic survey of occluded person Re-ID. Through an in-depth analysis of the occlusion in person Re-ID, most existing methods are found to only consider part of the problems brought by occlusion. Therefore, we review occlusion-related person Re-ID methods from the perspective of issues and solutions. We summarize four issues caused by occlusion in person Re-ID, i.e., position misalignment, scale misalignment, noisy information, and missing information. The occlusion-related methods addressing different issues are then categorized and introduced accordingly. After that, we summarize and compare the performance of recent occluded person Re-ID methods on four popular datasets: Partial-ReID, Partial-iLIDS, Occluded-ReID, and Occluded-DukeMTMC. Finally, we provide insights on promising future research directions.

Finally, we provide insights on promising future research directions.
abstract_zh: 被遮挡人员重新识别（Re-ID）旨在解决跨多个摄像机检索感兴趣的人时的遮挡问题。随着深度学习技术的推广和智能视频监控需求的不断增加，现实应用中频繁出现的遮挡现象使得遮挡行人Re-ID引起了研究人员的极大兴趣。已经提出了大量的遮挡行人重识别方法，但关注遮挡的调查却很少。为了填补这一空白并帮助推动未来的研究，本文对被遮挡人员重新识别进行了系统调查。通过对行人Re-ID中遮挡问题的深入分析，发现现有方法大多只考虑了遮挡带来的部分问题。因此，我们从问题和解决方案的角度回顾与遮挡相关的行人重识别方法。我们总结了行人重识别中遮挡引起的四个问题，即位置错位、尺度错位、噪声信息和信息缺失。然后对针对不同问题的遮挡相关方法进行相应的分类和介绍。之后，我们总结并比较了最近的遮挡行人重识别方法在四个流行数据集上的性能：Partial-ReID、Partial-iLIDS、Occlusion-ReID 和 Occlusion-DukeMTMC。最后，我们提供了对未来有前景的研究方向的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了基于深度学习的遮挡行人重识别方法，分析了遮挡带来的问题，并分类比较了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅部分解决遮挡问题，缺乏系统综述，需填补这一空白以推动未来研究。
AI.method: 分析遮挡问题，总结四个关键问题（位置错位、尺度错位、噪声信息、信息缺失），分类介绍相关方法，并在四个数据集上比较性能。
AI.result: 总结并比较了近期方法在Partial-ReID、Partial-iLIDS、Occluded-ReID和Occluded-DukeMTMC四个数据集上的表现。
AI.conclusion: 指出现有方法的不足，并提出未来研究方向，如更鲁棒的模型设计和跨数据集泛化能力提升。

authors_text: Yinghui Xing,Shuyuan Yang,Song Wang,Yan Zhang,Yanning Zhang
title: PC-GANs: Progressive Compensation Generative Adversarial Networks for Pan-sharpening
title_zh: PC-GAN：用于全色锐化的渐进补偿生成对抗网络
abstract: The fusion of multispectral and panchromatic images is always dubbed pansharpening. Most of the available deep learning-based pan-sharpening methods sharpen the multispectral images through a one-step scheme, which strongly depends on the reconstruction ability of the network. However, remote sensing images always have large variations, as a result, these one-step methods are vulnerable to the error accumulation and thus incapable of preserving spatial details as well as the spectral information. In this paper, we propose a novel two-step model for pan-sharpening that sharpens the MS image through the progressive compensation of the spatial and spectral information. Firstly, a deep multiscale guided generative adversarial network is used to preliminarily enhance the spatial resolution of the MS image. Starting from the pre-sharpened MS image in the coarse domain, our approach then progressively refines the spatial and spectral residuals over a couple of generative adversarial networks (GANs) that have reverse architectures. The whole model is composed of triple GANs, and based on the specific architecture, a joint compensation loss function is designed to enable the triple GANs to be trained simultaneously. Moreover, the spatial-spectral residual compensation structure proposed in this paper can be extended to other pan-sharpening methods to further enhance their fusion results. Extensive experiments are performed on different datasets and the results demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our proposed method.
summary: The fusion of multispectral and panchromatic images is always dubbed pansharpening. Most of the available deep learning-based pan-sharpening methods sharpen the multispectral images through a one-step scheme, which strongly depends on the reconstruction ability of the network. However, remote sensing images always have large variations, as a result, these one-step methods are vulnerable to the error accumulation and thus incapable of preserving spatial details as well as the spectral information. In this paper, we propose a novel two-step model for pan-sharpening that sharpens the MS image through the progressive compensation of the spatial and spectral information. Firstly, a deep multiscale guided generative adversarial network is used to preliminarily enhance the spatial resolution of the MS image. Starting from the pre-sharpened MS image in the coarse domain, our approach then progressively refines the spatial and spectral residuals over a couple of generative adversarial networks (GANs) that have reverse architectures. The whole model is composed of triple GANs, and based on the specific architecture, a joint compensation loss function is designed to enable the triple GANs to be trained simultaneously. Moreover, the spatial-spectral residual compensation structure proposed in this paper can be extended to other pan-sharpening methods to further enhance their fusion results. Extensive experiments are performed on different datasets and the results demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 多光谱和全色图像的融合始终被称为全色锐化。大多数可用的基于深度学习的全色锐化方法通过一步方案来锐化多光谱图像，这在很大程度上取决于网络的重建能力。然而，遥感图像总是存在较大的变化，因此这些一步法很容易受到误差累积的影响，从而无法保留空间细节以及光谱信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的全色锐化两步模型，通过空间和光谱信息的渐进补偿来锐化 MS 图像。首先，使用深度多尺度引导生成对抗网络来初步增强MS图像的空间分辨率。从粗域中的预锐化 MS 图像开始，我们的方法逐渐细化几个具有反向架构的生成对抗网络 (GAN) 上的空间和光谱残差。整个模型由三重GAN组成，基于特定架构，设计了联合补偿损失函数，使得三重GAN能够同时训练。此外，本文提出的空间光谱残差补偿结构可以扩展到其他全色锐化方法，以进一步增强其融合效果。在不同的数据集上进行了大量的实验，结果证明了我们提出的方法的有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（PC-GANs）的渐进补偿方法，用于多光谱与全色图像融合（ pansharpening ），通过分步补偿空间和光谱信息提升融合效果。
AI.motivation: 现有单步深度学习 pansharpening 方法因依赖网络重构能力，在处理遥感图像大尺度变化时易出现误差累积，导致空间细节和光谱信息丢失。
AI.method: 设计两阶段模型：首先使用深度多尺度引导 GAN 粗略提升多光谱图像分辨率，再通过反向架构的三组 GAN 逐步补偿空间-光谱残差，并引入联合补偿损失函数实现同步训练。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，该方法在保持光谱保真度和空间细节方面优于现有方法，且具有良好的扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 渐进补偿框架有效解决了 pansharpening 中的误差累积问题，提出的空间-光谱残差补偿结构可迁移至其他融合方法中提升性能。

authors_text: Huihui Fang,Fei Li,Huazhu Fu,Junde Wu,Xiulan Zhang,Yanwu Xu
title: Dataset and Evaluation algorithm design for GOALS Challenge
title_zh: GOALS Challenge 数据集和评估算法设计
abstract: Glaucoma causes irreversible vision loss due to damage to the optic nerve, and there is no cure for glaucoma.OCT imaging modality is an essential technique for assessing glaucomatous damage since it aids in quantifying fundus structures. To promote the research of AI technology in the field of OCT-assisted diagnosis of glaucoma, we held a Glaucoma OCT Analysis and Layer Segmentation (GOALS) Challenge in conjunction with the International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI) 2022 to provide data and corresponding annotations for researchers studying layer segmentation from OCT images and the classification of glaucoma. This paper describes the released 300 circumpapillary OCT images, the baselines of the two sub-tasks, and the evaluation methodology. The GOALS Challenge is accessible at https://aistudio.baidu.com/aistudio/competition/detail/230.
summary: Glaucoma causes irreversible vision loss due to damage to the optic nerve, and there is no cure for glaucoma.OCT imaging modality is an essential technique for assessing glaucomatous damage since it aids in quantifying fundus structures. To promote the research of AI technology in the field of OCT-assisted diagnosis of glaucoma, we held a Glaucoma OCT Analysis and Layer Segmentation (GOALS) Challenge in conjunction with the International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI) 2022 to provide data and corresponding annotations for researchers studying layer segmentation from OCT images and the classification of glaucoma. This paper describes the released 300 circumpapillary OCT images, the baselines of the two sub-tasks, and the evaluation methodology. The GOALS Challenge is accessible at https://aistudio.baidu.com/aistudio/competition/detail/230.
abstract_zh: 青光眼由于视神经损伤而导致不可逆的视力丧失，并且青光眼无法治愈。OCT 成像模式是评估青光眼损伤的重要技术，因为它有助于量化眼底结构。为推动人工智能技术在青光眼 OCT 辅助诊断领域的研究，我们联合 2022 年医学图像计算和计算机辅助干预国际会议（MICCAI）举办了青光眼 OCT 分析和图层分割（GOALS）挑战赛，为研究 OCT 图像图层分割和青光眼分类的研究人员提供数据和相应注释。本文描述了已发布的 300 张环乳头 OCT 图像、两个子任务的基线以及评估方法。目标挑战赛可通过 https://aistudio.baidu.com/aistudio/competition/detail/230 访问。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了GOALS挑战赛的数据集和评估算法设计，旨在推动基于OCT图像的青光眼人工智能诊断研究。
AI.motivation: 青光眼导致不可逆视力损伤且无治愈方法，OCT成像对评估视网膜结构至关重要，但需更多AI技术支持。通过举办挑战赛提供数据和标注，促进相关研究。
AI.method: 发布300张环视盘OCT图像，设定两个子任务的基线（层分割与青光眼分类），设计评估方法并公开挑战赛平台。
AI.result: 成功构建了包含标注数据的OCT图像数据集，明确了评估标准，为研究人员提供了实验基准和竞赛平台。
AI.conclusion: GOALS挑战赛通过提供高质量数据和评估体系，有效推动了青光眼AI诊断技术的发展，为后续研究奠定了基础。

authors_text: Seung Yeon Shin,Sungwon Lee,Ronald M. Summers
title: Graph-Based Small Bowel Path Tracking with Cylindrical Constraints
title_zh: 具有圆柱形约束的基于图的小肠路径跟踪
comment: Published in: 2022 IEEE 19th International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI)
comments: Published in: 2022 IEEE 19th International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI)
abstract: We present a new graph-based method for small bowel path tracking based on cylindrical constraints. A distinctive characteristic of the small bowel compared to other organs is the contact between parts of itself along its course, which makes the path tracking difficult together with the indistinct appearance of the wall. It causes the tracked path to easily cross over the walls when relying on low-level features like the wall detection. To circumvent this, a series of cylinders that are fitted along the course of the small bowel are used to guide the tracking to more reliable directions. It is implemented as soft constraints using a new cost function. The proposed method is evaluated against ground-truth paths that are all connected from start to end of the small bowel for 10 abdominal CT scans. The proposed method showed clear improvements compared to the baseline method in tracking the path without making an error. Improvements of 6.6% and 17.0%, in terms of the tracked length, were observed for two different settings related to the small bowel segmentation.
summary: We present a new graph-based method for small bowel path tracking based on cylindrical constraints. A distinctive characteristic of the small bowel compared to other organs is the contact between parts of itself along its course, which makes the path tracking difficult together with the indistinct appearance of the wall. It causes the tracked path to easily cross over the walls when relying on low-level features like the wall detection. To circumvent this, a series of cylinders that are fitted along the course of the small bowel are used to guide the tracking to more reliable directions. It is implemented as soft constraints using a new cost function. The proposed method is evaluated against ground-truth paths that are all connected from start to end of the small bowel for 10 abdominal CT scans. The proposed method showed clear improvements compared to the baseline method in tracking the path without making an error. Improvements of 6.6% and 17.0%, in terms of the tracked length, were observed for two different settings related to the small bowel segmentation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于圆柱约束的新的基于图的小肠路径跟踪方法。与其他器官相比，小肠的一个显着特征是沿其走向的小肠各部分之间的接触，这使得路径追踪变得困难，并且壁的外观模糊。当依赖墙壁检测等低级功能时，它会导致跟踪路径轻松跨越墙壁。为了避免这种情况，沿着小肠的路线安装了一系列圆柱体，用于引导跟踪到更可靠的方向。它使用新的成本函数作为软约束来实现。所提出的方法根据 10 次腹部 CT 扫描从小肠起点到终点全部连接的真实路径进行评估。与基线方法相比，所提出的方法在跟踪路径方面显示出明显的改进而不会出错。对于与小肠分割相关的两种不同设置，观察到跟踪长度分别提高了 6.6% 和 17.0%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图的小肠路径跟踪方法，利用圆柱约束提高跟踪准确性。
AI.motivation: 小肠的自接触特性及壁部模糊性导致传统基于低级特征的跟踪方法易产生误差，需更可靠的约束机制。
AI.method: 通过沿小肠路径拟合圆柱体作为软约束，结合新成本函数引导跟踪方向，避免路径穿过壁部。
AI.result: 在10例腹部CT扫描中，该方法在两种分割设置下分别提升跟踪长度6.6%和17.0%，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 圆柱约束有效解决了小肠路径跟踪难题，验证了方法在复杂解剖结构中的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Hao Wang,Guosheng Lin,Steven C. H. Hoi,Chunyan Miao
title: Paired Cross-Modal Data Augmentation for Fine-Grained Image-to-Text Retrieval
title_zh: 用于细粒度图像到文本检索的配对跨模态数据增强
abstract: This paper investigates an open research problem of generating text-image pairs to improve the training of fine-grained image-to-text cross-modal retrieval task, and proposes a novel framework for paired data augmentation by uncovering the hidden semantic information of StyleGAN2 model. Specifically, we first train a StyleGAN2 model on the given dataset. We then project the real images back to the latent space of StyleGAN2 to obtain the latent codes. To make the generated images manipulatable, we further introduce a latent space alignment module to learn the alignment between StyleGAN2 latent codes and the corresponding textual caption features. When we do online paired data augmentation, we first generate augmented text through random token replacement, then pass the augmented text into the latent space alignment module to output the latent codes, which are finally fed to StyleGAN2 to generate the augmented images. We evaluate the efficacy of our augmented data approach on two public cross-modal retrieval datasets, in which the promising experimental results demonstrate the augmented text-image pair data can be trained together with the original data to boost the image-to-text cross-modal retrieval performance.
summary: This paper investigates an open research problem of generating text-image pairs to improve the training of fine-grained image-to-text cross-modal retrieval task, and proposes a novel framework for paired data augmentation by uncovering the hidden semantic information of StyleGAN2 model. Specifically, we first train a StyleGAN2 model on the given dataset. We then project the real images back to the latent space of StyleGAN2 to obtain the latent codes. To make the generated images manipulatable, we further introduce a latent space alignment module to learn the alignment between StyleGAN2 latent codes and the corresponding textual caption features. When we do online paired data augmentation, we first generate augmented text through random token replacement, then pass the augmented text into the latent space alignment module to output the latent codes, which are finally fed to StyleGAN2 to generate the augmented images. We evaluate the efficacy of our augmented data approach on two public cross-modal retrieval datasets, in which the promising experimental results demonstrate the augmented text-image pair data can be trained together with the original data to boost the image-to-text cross-modal retrieval performance.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了生成文本图像对的开放研究问题，以改进细粒度图像到文本跨模态检索任务的训练，并通过揭示 StyleGAN2 模型的隐藏语义信息，提出了一种用于成对数据增强的新框架。具体来说，我们首先在给定的数据集上训练 StyleGAN2 模型。然后，我们将真实图像投影回 StyleGAN2 的潜在空间以获得潜在代码。为了使生成的图像可操作，我们进一步引入了潜在空间对齐模块来学习 StyleGAN2 潜在代码和相应的文本标题特征之间的对齐。当我们进行在线配对数据增强时，我们首先通过随机标记替换生成增强文本，然后将增强文本传递到潜在空间对齐模块以输出潜在代码，最后将其馈送到 StyleGAN2 以生成增强图像。我们评估了我们的增强数据方法在两个公共跨模态检索数据集上的有效性，其中有希望的实验结果表明增强的文本图像对数据可以与原始数据一起训练，以提高图像到文本的跨模态检索性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于StyleGAN2模型的配对跨模态数据增强方法，用于提升细粒度图像到文本的检索性能。
AI.motivation: 当前细粒度图像到文本的跨模态检索任务面临数据不足和语义对齐困难的问题，生成高质量的文本-图像对可以有效提升模型性能。
AI.method: 首先在给定数据集上训练StyleGAN2模型，然后将真实图像投影到StyleGAN2的潜在空间以获得潜在编码。通过引入潜在空间对齐模块，学习StyleGAN2潜在编码与文本描述特征之间的对齐关系。在在线数据增强过程中，通过随机替换文本中的token生成增强文本，并通过潜在空间对齐模块生成潜在编码，最终输入StyleGAN2生成增强图像。
AI.result: 在两个公开的跨模态检索数据集上进行了实验，结果表明增强的文本-图像对数据可以与原始数据一起训练，从而提升图像到文本的跨模态检索性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于StyleGAN2的配对数据增强方法能够有效生成高质量的文本-图像对，从而提升细粒度跨模态检索任务的性能。

ai_content_json.method: 首先在给定数据集上训练StyleGAN2模型，然后将真实图像投影到StyleGAN2的潜在空间以获得潜在编码。通过引入潜在空间对齐模块，学习StyleGAN2潜在编码与文本描述特征之间的对齐关系。在在线数据增强过程中，通过随机替换文本中的token生成增强文本，并通过潜在空间对齐模块生成潜在编码，最终输入StyleGAN2生成增强图像。
ai_content_json.result: 在两个公开的跨模态检索数据集上进行了实验，结果表明增强的文本-图像对数据可以与原始数据一起训练，从而提升图像到文本的跨模态检索性能。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 本文提出的基于StyleGAN2的配对数据增强方法能够有效生成高质量的文本-图像对，从而提升细粒度跨模态检索任务的性能。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于StyleGAN2模型的配对跨模态数据增强方法，用于提升细粒度图像到文本的检索性能。
motivation: 当前细粒度图像到文本的跨模态检索任务面临数据不足和语义对齐困难的问题，生成高质量的文本-图像对可以有效提升模型性能。
method: 首先在给定数据集上训练StyleGAN2模型，然后将真实图像投影到StyleGAN2的潜在空间以获得潜在编码。通过引入潜在空间对齐模块，学习StyleGAN2潜在编码与文本描述特征之间的对齐关系。在在线数据增强过程中，通过随机替换文本中的token生成增强文本，并通过潜在空间对齐模块生成潜在编码，最终输入StyleGAN2生成增强图像。
result: 在两个公开的跨模态检索数据集上进行了实验，结果表明增强的文本-图像对数据可以与原始数据一起训练，从而提升图像到文本的跨模态检索性能。

search_text: Paired Cross-Modal Data Augmentation for Fine-Grained Image-to-Text Retrieval 用于细粒度图像到文本检索的配对跨模态数据增强 This paper investigates an open research problem of generating text-image pairs to improve the training of fine-grained image-to-text cross-modal retrieval task, and proposes a novel framework for paired data augmentation by uncovering the hidden semantic information of StyleGAN2 model. Specifically, we first train a StyleGAN2 model on the given dataset. We then project the real images back to the latent space of StyleGAN2 to obtain the latent codes. To make the generated images manipulatable, we further introduce a latent space alignment module to learn the alignment between StyleGAN2 latent codes and the corresponding textual caption features. When we do online paired data augmentation, we first generate augmented text through random token replacement, then pass the augmented text into the latent space alignment module to output the latent codes, which are finally fed to StyleGAN2 to generate the augmented images. We evaluate the efficacy of our augmented data approach on two public cross-modal retrieval datasets, in which the promising experimental results demonstrate the augmented text-image pair data can be trained together with the original data to boost the image-to-text cross-modal retrieval performance. 本文研究了生成文本图像对的开放研究问题，以改进细粒度图像到文本跨模态检索任务的训练，并通过揭示 StyleGAN2 模型的隐藏语义信息，提出了一种用于成对数据增强的新框架。具体来说，我们首先在给定的数据集上训练 StyleGAN2 模型。然后，我们将真实图像投影回 StyleGAN2 的潜在空间以获得潜在代码。为了使生成的图像可操作，我们进一步引入了潜在空间对齐模块来学习 StyleGAN2 潜在代码和相应的文本标题特征之间的对齐。当我们进行在线配对数据增强时，我们首先通过随机标记替换生成增强文本，然后将增强文本传递到潜在空间对齐模块以输出潜在代码，最后将其馈送到 StyleGAN2 以生成增强图像。我们评估了我们的增强数据方法在两个公共跨模态检索数据集上的有效性，其中有希望的实验结果表明增强的文本图像对数据可以与原始数据一起训练，以提高图像到文本的跨模态检索性能。 本文提出了一种基于StyleGAN2模型的配对跨模态数据增强方法，用于提升细粒度图像到文本的检索性能。 Hao Wang,Guosheng Lin,Steven C. H. Hoi,Chunyan Miao cs.CV

authors_text: Hao Wang,Wenhao Shen,Guosheng Lin,Steven C. H. Hoi,Chunyan Miao
title: 3D Cartoon Face Generation with Controllable Expressions from a Single GAN Image
title_zh: 利用单个 GAN 图像的可控表情生成 3D 卡通人脸
abstract: In this paper, we investigate an open research task of generating 3D cartoon face shapes from single 2D GAN generated human faces and without 3D supervision, where we can also manipulate the facial expressions of the 3D shapes. To this end, we discover the semantic meanings of StyleGAN latent space, such that we are able to produce face images of various expressions, poses, and lighting conditions by controlling the latent codes. Specifically, we first finetune the pretrained StyleGAN face model on the cartoon datasets. By feeding the same latent codes to face and cartoon generation models, we aim to realize the translation from 2D human face images to cartoon styled avatars. We then discover semantic directions of the GAN latent space, in an attempt to change the facial expressions while preserving the original identity. As we do not have any 3D annotations for cartoon faces, we manipulate the latent codes to generate images with different poses and lighting conditions, such that we can reconstruct the 3D cartoon face shapes. We validate the efficacy of our method on three cartoon datasets qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: In this paper, we investigate an open research task of generating 3D cartoon face shapes from single 2D GAN generated human faces and without 3D supervision, where we can also manipulate the facial expressions of the 3D shapes. To this end, we discover the semantic meanings of StyleGAN latent space, such that we are able to produce face images of various expressions, poses, and lighting conditions by controlling the latent codes. Specifically, we first finetune the pretrained StyleGAN face model on the cartoon datasets. By feeding the same latent codes to face and cartoon generation models, we aim to realize the translation from 2D human face images to cartoon styled avatars. We then discover semantic directions of the GAN latent space, in an attempt to change the facial expressions while preserving the original identity. As we do not have any 3D annotations for cartoon faces, we manipulate the latent codes to generate images with different poses and lighting conditions, such that we can reconstruct the 3D cartoon face shapes. We validate the efficacy of our method on three cartoon datasets qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了一项开放研究任务，即在没有 3D 监督的情况下，从单个 2D GAN 生成的人脸生成 3D 卡通人脸形状，其中我们还可以操纵 3D 形状的面部表情。为此，我们发现了 StyleGAN 潜在空间的语义，这样我们就能够通过控制潜在代码来生成各种表情、姿势和光照条件的人脸图像。具体来说，我们首先在卡通数据集上微调预训练的 StyleGAN 面部模型。通过将相同的潜在代码输入到人脸和卡通生成模型中，我们的目标是实现从 2D 人脸图像到卡通风格头像的转换。然后，我们发现 GAN 潜在空间的语义方向，试图在保留原始身份的同时改变面部表情。由于我们没有任何卡通面孔的 3D 注释，因此我们操纵潜在代码来生成具有不同姿势和光照条件的图像，这样我们就可以重建 3D 卡通面孔形状。我们定性和定量地验证了我们的方法在三个卡通数据集上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从单张GAN生成的2D人脸图像生成可控制表情的3D卡通人脸的方法，无需3D监督。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏在无3D标注情况下生成具有可控表情的3D卡通人脸的有效方法，且需解决从2D到3D的风格迁移问题。
AI.method: 通过微调预训练StyleGAN模型适应卡通数据集，利用共享潜在码实现2D人脸到卡通形象的转换，并探索潜在空间语义方向以控制表情，结合姿态和光照变化重建3D形状。
AI.result: 在三个卡通数据集上定性和定量验证了方法的有效性，成功生成具有可控表情的3D卡通人脸。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需3D标注即可生成具有可控表情的3D卡通人脸，为相关领域提供了新思路。

authors_text: Simon Odense,Kamal Gupta,William G. Macready
title: Neural-Guided RuntimePrediction of Planners for Improved Motion and Task Planning with Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 规划器的神经引导运行时预测，通过图神经网络改进运动和任务规划
comment: 8 pages; To appear in proceedings of 2022 IROS, Kyoto Japan
comments: 8 pages; To appear in proceedings of 2022 IROS, Kyoto Japan
abstract: The past decade has amply demonstrated the remarkable functionality that can be realized by learning complex input/output relationships. Algorithmically, one of the most important and opaque relationships is that between a problem's structure and an effective solution method. Here, we quantitatively connect the structure of a planning problem to the performance of a given sampling-based motion planning (SBMP) algorithm. We demonstrate that the geometric relationships of motion planning problems can be well captured by graph neural networks (GNNs) to predict SBMP runtime. By using an algorithm portfolio we show that GNN predictions of runtime on particular problems can be leveraged to accelerate online motion planning in both navigation and manipulation tasks. Moreover, the problem-to-runtime map can be inverted to identify subproblems easier to solve by particular SBMPs. We provide a motivating example of how this knowledge may be used to improve integrated task and motion planning on simulated examples. These successes rely on the relational structure of GNNs to capture scalable generalization from low-dimensional navigation tasks to high degree-of-freedom manipulation tasks in 3d environments.
summary: The past decade has amply demonstrated the remarkable functionality that can be realized by learning complex input/output relationships. Algorithmically, one of the most important and opaque relationships is that between a problem's structure and an effective solution method. Here, we quantitatively connect the structure of a planning problem to the performance of a given sampling-based motion planning (SBMP) algorithm. We demonstrate that the geometric relationships of motion planning problems can be well captured by graph neural networks (GNNs) to predict SBMP runtime. By using an algorithm portfolio we show that GNN predictions of runtime on particular problems can be leveraged to accelerate online motion planning in both navigation and manipulation tasks. Moreover, the problem-to-runtime map can be inverted to identify subproblems easier to solve by particular SBMPs. We provide a motivating example of how this knowledge may be used to improve integrated task and motion planning on simulated examples. These successes rely on the relational structure of GNNs to capture scalable generalization from low-dimensional navigation tasks to high degree-of-freedom manipulation tasks in 3d environments.
abstract_zh: The past decade has amply demonstrated the remarkable functionality that can be realized by learning complex input/output relationships. Algorithmically, one of the most important and opaque relationships is that between a problem's structure and an effective solution method.在这里，我们定量地将规划问题的结构与给定的基于采样的运动规划（SBMP）算法的性能联系起来。我们证明了图神经网络（GNN）可以很好地捕获运动规划问题的几何关系来预测 SBMP 运行时间。通过使用算法组合，我们表明可以利用 GNN 对特定问题的运行时间预测来加速导航和操作任务中的在线运动规划。 Moreover, the problem-to-runtime map can be inverted to identify subproblems easier to solve by particular SBMPs.我们提供了一个激励性的示例，说明如何使用这些知识来改进模拟示例的集成任务和运动规划。这些成功依赖于 GNN 的关系结构来捕获从低维导航任务到 3D 环境中高自由度操作任务的可扩展泛化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用图神经网络（GNN）预测采样型运动规划算法（SBMP）的运行时间，以优化任务和运动规划的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统运动规划算法难以根据问题结构动态选择最优方法，导致效率低下。需建立问题结构与算法性能的量化关联以提升规划效率。
AI.method: 通过图神经网络捕捉运动规划问题的几何关系，构建问题结构到SBMP运行时间的映射模型，并结合算法组合策略加速在线规划。
AI.result: 实验表明GNN能准确预测SBMP运行时间，有效加速导航与操作任务；通过逆向映射可识别适合特定算法的子问题，提升集成任务规划性能。
AI.conclusion: 图神经网络的结构化表示能力使其能从低维导航任务泛化到高自由度的3D操作场景，为智能规划系统提供新的优化方向。

These successes rely on the relational structure of GNNs to capture scalable generalization from low-dimensional navigation tasks to high degree-of-freedom manipulation tasks in 3d environments. Algorithmically, one of the most important and opaque relationships is that between a problem's structure and an effective solution method.在这里，我们定量地将规划问题的结构与给定的基于采样的运动规划（SBMP）算法的性能联系起来。我们证明了图神经网络（GNN）可以很好地捕获运动规划问题的几何关系来预测 SBMP 运行时间。通过使用算法组合，我们表明可以利用 GNN 对特定问题的运行时间预测来加速导航和操作任务中的在线运动规划。 Moreover, the problem-to-runtime map can be inverted to identify subproblems easier to solve by particular SBMPs.我们提供了一个激励性的示例，说明如何使用这些知识来改进模拟示例的集成任务和运动规划。这些成功依赖于 GNN 的关系结构来捕获从低维导航任务到 3D 环境中高自由度操作任务的可扩展泛化。 本文提出利用图神经网络（GNN）预测采样型运动规划算法（SBMP）的运行时间，以优化任务和运动规划的效率。 Simon Odense,Kamal Gupta,William G. Macready cs.RO

authors_text: Wenhao Luo,Wen Sun,Ashish Kapoor
title: Sample-efficient Safe Learning for Online Nonlinear Control with Control Barrier Functions
title_zh: 具有控制屏障函数的在线非线性控制的样本高效安全学习
comment: The 15th International Workshop on the Algorithmic Foundations of Robotics (WAFR 2022)
comments: The 15th International Workshop on the Algorithmic Foundations of Robotics (WAFR 2022)
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) and continuous nonlinear control have been successfully deployed in multiple domains of complicated sequential decision-making tasks. However, given the exploration nature of the learning process and the presence of model uncertainty, it is challenging to apply them to safety-critical control tasks due to the lack of safety guarantee. On the other hand, while combining control-theoretical approaches with learning algorithms has shown promise in safe RL applications, the sample efficiency of safe data collection process for control is not well addressed. In this paper, we propose a \emph{provably} sample efficient episodic safe learning framework for online control tasks that leverages safe exploration and exploitation in an unknown, nonlinear dynamical system. In particular, the framework 1) extends control barrier functions (CBFs) in a stochastic setting to achieve provable high-probability safety under uncertainty during model learning and 2) integrates an optimism-based exploration strategy to efficiently guide the safe exploration process with learned dynamics for \emph{near optimal} control performance. We provide formal analysis on the episodic regret bound against the optimal controller and probabilistic safety with theoretical guarantees. Simulation results are provided to demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed algorithm.
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) and continuous nonlinear control have been successfully deployed in multiple domains of complicated sequential decision-making tasks. However, given the exploration nature of the learning process and the presence of model uncertainty, it is challenging to apply them to safety-critical control tasks due to the lack of safety guarantee. On the other hand, while combining control-theoretical approaches with learning algorithms has shown promise in safe RL applications, the sample efficiency of safe data collection process for control is not well addressed. In this paper, we propose a \emph{provably} sample efficient episodic safe learning framework for online control tasks that leverages safe exploration and exploitation in an unknown, nonlinear dynamical system. In particular, the framework 1) extends control barrier functions (CBFs) in a stochastic setting to achieve provable high-probability safety under uncertainty during model learning and 2) integrates an optimism-based exploration strategy to efficiently guide the safe exploration process with learned dynamics for \emph{near optimal} control performance. We provide formal analysis on the episodic regret bound against the optimal controller and probabilistic safety with theoretical guarantees. Simulation results are provided to demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed algorithm.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）和连续非线性控制已成功应用于复杂顺序决策任务的多个领域。然而，考虑到学习过程的探索性质和模型不确定性的存在，由于缺乏安全保证，将它们应用于安全关键控制任务具有挑战性。另一方面，虽然将控制理论方法与学习算法相结合在安全强化学习应用中显示出前景，但用于控制的安全数据收集过程的样本效率尚未得到很好的解决。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于在线控制任务的\emph{可证明}样本高效情景安全学习框架，该框架利用未知的非线性动力系统中的安全探索和利用。特别是，该框架 1）在随机环境中扩展了控制障碍函数（CBF），以在模型学习过程中在不确定性下实现可证明的高概率安全性；2）集成了基于乐观的探索策略，以有效地指导安全探索过程和学习动态，以实现\ emph {接近最优}控制性能。我们对最优控制器的情景遗憾约束和概率安全性进行了形式化分析，并提供了理论保证。仿真结果证明了该算法的有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于控制屏障函数（CBFs）的在线非线性控制安全学习框架，旨在解决强化学习在安全关键任务中样本效率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在安全关键控制任务中因探索过程和模型不确定性难以保证安全性，且现有安全学习方法在样本效率方面存在不足。
AI.method: 通过扩展控制屏障函数至随机设置以实现高概率安全保证，并结合乐观探索策略，在未知非线性系统中实现安全探索与近似最优控制性能。
AI.result: 理论分析了回合制遗憾界与概率安全保证，并通过仿真验证了算法的有效性和效率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为在线非线性控制提供了兼具样本效率与安全性的理论保证，推动了安全强化学习的实际应用。

authors_text: Alef Iury Siqueira Ferreira,Gustavo dos Reis Oliveira
title: Domain Specific Wav2vec 2.0 Fine-tuning For The SE&R 2022 Challenge
title_zh: 针对 SE&R 2022 挑战的特定领域 Wav2vec 2.0 微调
comment: Proceedings of the First Workshop on Automatic Speech Recognition for Spontaneous and Prepared Speech & Speech Emotion Recognition in Portuguese (SE&R 2022), co-located with PROPOR 2022
comments: Proceedings of the First Workshop on Automatic Speech Recognition for Spontaneous and Prepared Speech & Speech Emotion Recognition in Portuguese (SE&R 2022), co-located with PROPOR 2022
abstract: This paper presents our efforts to build a robust ASR model for the shared task Automatic Speech Recognition for spontaneous and prepared speech & Speech Emotion Recognition in Portuguese (SE&R 2022). The goal of the challenge is to advance the ASR research for the Portuguese language, considering prepared and spontaneous speech in different dialects. Our method consist on fine-tuning an ASR model in a domain-specific approach, applying gain normalization and selective noise insertion. The proposed method improved over the strong baseline provided on the test set in 3 of the 4 tracks available
summary: This paper presents our efforts to build a robust ASR model for the shared task Automatic Speech Recognition for spontaneous and prepared speech & Speech Emotion Recognition in Portuguese (SE&R 2022). The goal of the challenge is to advance the ASR research for the Portuguese language, considering prepared and spontaneous speech in different dialects. Our method consist on fine-tuning an ASR model in a domain-specific approach, applying gain normalization and selective noise insertion. The proposed method improved over the strong baseline provided on the test set in 3 of the 4 tracks available
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们为自发和准备语音的自动语音识别以及葡萄牙语语音情感识别共享任务（SE&R 2022）构建强大的 ASR 模型所做的努力。该挑战的目标是推进葡萄牙语的 ASR 研究，考虑不同方言的准备好的和自发的语音。我们的方法包括以特定领域的方法微调 ASR 模型、应用增益归一化和选择性噪声插入。所提出的方法改进了在 4 个可用轨道中的 3 个测试集上提供的强基线

AI.tldr: 本文针对SE&R 2022挑战赛，提出基于领域自适应的Wav2vec 2.0模型微调方法，以提升葡萄牙语自发与准备语音的语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 挑战赛旨在推动葡萄牙语ASR研究，需处理不同方言的准备与自发语音，而通用模型在特定领域表现不足，需领域自适应方法优化。
AI.method: 采用Wav2vec 2.0模型进行领域微调，结合增益归一化与选择性噪声插入技术增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在四个赛道中，所提方法在三个赛道上超越了提供的强基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 领域自适应微调结合数据增强技术有效提升了ASR性能，为葡萄牙语多场景语音识别提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Helena Liz,Javier Huertas-Tato,Manuel Sánchez-Montañés,Javier Del Ser,David Camacho
title: Deep learning for understanding multilabel imbalanced Chest X-ray datasets
title_zh: 用于理解多标签不平衡胸部 X 射线数据集的深度学习
abstract: Over the last few years, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have dominated the field of computer vision thanks to their ability to extract features and their outstanding performance in classification problems, for example in the automatic analysis of X-rays. Unfortunately, these neural networks are considered black-box algorithms, i.e. it is impossible to understand how the algorithm has achieved the final result. To apply these algorithms in different fields and test how the methodology works, we need to use eXplainable AI techniques. Most of the work in the medical field focuses on binary or multiclass classification problems. However, in many real-life situations, such as chest X-rays, radiological signs of different diseases can appear at the same time. This gives rise to what is known as "multilabel classification problems". A disadvantage of these tasks is class imbalance, i.e. different labels do not have the same number of samples. The main contribution of this paper is a Deep Learning methodology for imbalanced, multilabel chest X-ray datasets. It establishes a baseline for the currently underutilised PadChest dataset and a new eXplainable AI technique based on heatmaps. This technique also includes probabilities and inter-model matching. The results of our system are promising, especially considering the number of labels used. Furthermore, the heatmaps match the expected areas, i.e. they mark the areas that an expert would use to make the decision.
summary: Over the last few years, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have dominated the field of computer vision thanks to their ability to extract features and their outstanding performance in classification problems, for example in the automatic analysis of X-rays. Unfortunately, these neural networks are considered black-box algorithms, i.e. it is impossible to understand how the algorithm has achieved the final result. To apply these algorithms in different fields and test how the methodology works, we need to use eXplainable AI techniques. Most of the work in the medical field focuses on binary or multiclass classification problems. However, in many real-life situations, such as chest X-rays, radiological signs of different diseases can appear at the same time. This gives rise to what is known as "multilabel classification problems". A disadvantage of these tasks is class imbalance, i.e. different labels do not have the same number of samples. The main contribution of this paper is a Deep Learning methodology for imbalanced, multilabel chest X-ray datasets. It establishes a baseline for the currently underutilised PadChest dataset and a new eXplainable AI technique based on heatmaps. This technique also includes probabilities and inter-model matching. The results of our system are promising, especially considering the number of labels used. Furthermore, the heatmaps match the expected areas, i.e. they mark the areas that an expert would use to make the decision.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，卷积神经网络（CNN）凭借其提取特征的能力以及在分类问题（例如 X 射线自动分析）中的出色表现，在计算机视觉领域占据主导地位。不幸的是，这些神经网络被认为是黑盒算法，即无法理解算法是如何实现最终结果的。为了将这些算法应用到不同的领域并测试该方法的工作原理，我们需要使用可解释的人工智能技术。医学领域的大部分工作都集中在二元或多类分类问题上。然而，在许多现实生活中，例如胸部X光检查，不同疾病的放射学体征可能会同时出现。这引起了所谓的“多标签分类问题”。这些任务的缺点是类别不平衡，即不同的标签没有相同数量的样本。本文的主要贡献是针对不平衡、多标签胸部 X 射线数据集的深度学习方法。它为当前未充分利用的 PadChest 数据集和基于热图的新 eXplainable AI 技术建立了基线。该技术还包括概率和模型间匹配。我们系统的结果是有希望的，特别是考虑到使用的标签数量。此外，热图与预期区域相匹配，即它们标记了专家将用来做出决策的区域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度学习方法，用于处理多标签不平衡的胸部X光数据集，并结合可解释AI技术进行分析。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络在医学图像分析中存在黑箱问题，而胸部X光数据常面临多标签不平衡挑战，现有研究对此关注不足。
AI.method: 基于热力图的可解释AI技术，结合概率计算与模型间匹配，建立多标签不平衡数据集的深度学习基线方法。
AI.result: 系统在多标签分类任务中表现良好，热力图与专家预期的病变区域高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理不平衡多标签医学影像数据提供了有效框架，并为PadChest数据集建立了基准。

search_text: Deep learning for understanding multilabel imbalanced Chest X-ray datasets 用于理解多标签不平衡胸部 X 射线数据集的深度学习 Over the last few years, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have dominated the field of computer vision thanks to their ability to extract features and their outstanding performance in classification problems, for example in the automatic analysis of X-rays. Unfortunately, these neural networks are considered black-box algorithms, i.e. it is impossible to understand how the algorithm has achieved the final result. To apply these algorithms in different fields and test how the methodology works, we need to use eXplainable AI techniques. Most of the work in the medical field focuses on binary or multiclass classification problems. However, in many real-life situations, such as chest X-rays, radiological signs of different diseases can appear at the same time. This gives rise to what is known as "multilabel classification problems". A disadvantage of these tasks is class imbalance, i.e. different labels do not have the same number of samples. The main contribution of this paper is a Deep Learning methodology for imbalanced, multilabel chest X-ray datasets. It establishes a baseline for the currently underutilised PadChest dataset and a new eXplainable AI technique based on heatmaps. This technique also includes probabilities and inter-model matching. The results of our system are promising, especially considering the number of labels used. Furthermore, the heatmaps match the expected areas, i.e. they mark the areas that an expert would use to make the decision. 在过去的几年里，卷积神经网络（CNN）凭借其提取特征的能力以及在分类问题（例如 X 射线自动分析）中的出色表现，在计算机视觉领域占据主导地位。不幸的是，这些神经网络被认为是黑盒算法，即无法理解算法是如何实现最终结果的。为了将这些算法应用到不同的领域并测试该方法的工作原理，我们需要使用可解释的人工智能技术。医学领域的大部分工作都集中在二元或多类分类问题上。然而，在许多现实生活中，例如胸部X光检查，不同疾病的放射学体征可能会同时出现。这引起了所谓的“多标签分类问题”。这些任务的缺点是类别不平衡，即不同的标签没有相同数量的样本。本文的主要贡献是针对不平衡、多标签胸部 X 射线数据集的深度学习方法。它为当前未充分利用的 PadChest 数据集和基于热图的新 eXplainable AI 技术建立了基线。该技术还包括概率和模型间匹配。我们系统的结果是有希望的，特别是考虑到使用的标签数量。此外，热图与预期区域相匹配，即它们标记了专家将用来做出决策的区域。 本文提出一种深度学习方法，用于处理多标签不平衡的胸部X光数据集，并结合可解释AI技术进行分析。 Helena Liz,Javier Huertas-Tato,Manuel Sánchez-Montañés,Javier Del Ser,David Camacho eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Piotr Mironowicz
title: Entangled Rendezvous: A Possible Application of Bell Non-Locality For Mobile Agents on Networks
title_zh: 纠缠交会：贝尔非局域性在网络上移动代理的可能应用
comment: 12 pages; open for collaboration on experiment
comments: 12 pages; open for collaboration on experiment
abstract: Rendezvous is an old problem of assuring that two or more parties, initially separated, not knowing the position of each other, and not allowed to communicate, meet without pre-agreement on the meeting point. This problem has been extensively studied in classical computer science and has vivid importance to modern applications like coordinating a fleet of drones in an enemy's territory. Quantum non-locality, like Bell inequality violation, has shown that in many cases quantum entanglement allows for improved coordination of two separated parties compared to classical sources. The non-signaling correlations in many cases even strengthened such phenomena. In this work, we analyze, how Bell non-locality can be used by asymmetric location-aware agents trying to rendezvous on a finite network with a limited number of steps. We provide the optimal solution to this problem for both agents using quantum resources, and agents with only ``classical'' computing power. Our results show that for cubic graphs and cycles it is possible to gain an advantage by allowing the agents to use assistance of entangled quantum states.
summary: Rendezvous is an old problem of assuring that two or more parties, initially separated, not knowing the position of each other, and not allowed to communicate, meet without pre-agreement on the meeting point. This problem has been extensively studied in classical computer science and has vivid importance to modern applications like coordinating a fleet of drones in an enemy's territory. Quantum non-locality, like Bell inequality violation, has shown that in many cases quantum entanglement allows for improved coordination of two separated parties compared to classical sources. The non-signaling correlations in many cases even strengthened such phenomena. In this work, we analyze, how Bell non-locality can be used by asymmetric location-aware agents trying to rendezvous on a finite network with a limited number of steps. We provide the optimal solution to this problem for both agents using quantum resources, and agents with only ``classical'' computing power. Our results show that for cubic graphs and cycles it is possible to gain an advantage by allowing the agents to use assistance of entangled quantum states.
abstract_zh: 会合是一个老问题，即确保两个或多个最初分开、不知道彼此的位置且不允许沟通的各方在没有预先约定会面点的情况下会面。这个问题在经典计算机科学中得到了广泛的研究，并且对于协调敌方领土上的无人机机队等现代应用具有非常重要的意义。量子非局域性，如贝尔不等式违反，已经表明，在许多情况下，与经典来源相比，量子纠缠可以改善两个分离方的协调。在许多情况下，非信号相关性甚至强化了这种现象。在这项工作中，我们分析了非对称位置感知代理如何使用贝尔非局域性来试图以有限的步骤在有限网络上会合。我们为使用量子资源的代理和仅具有“经典”计算能力的代理提供了该问题的最佳解决方案。我们的结果表明，对于立方图和循环，可以通过允许代理使用纠缠量子态的辅助来获得优势。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何利用贝尔非定域性帮助网络中的移动智能体实现会合，比较了量子资源与经典计算方法的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 在无法通信的场景下，移动智能体（如无人机）需要自主会合，而量子非定域性可能提供超越经典方法的协调优势。
AI.method: 通过分析有限网络中异步定位智能体的会合问题，提出基于贝尔非定域性的量子方案，并与经典方案进行对比优化。
AI.result: 在立方图和环形网络中，使用量子纠缠态的智能体相比经典方法可获得会合效率优势。
AI.conclusion: 量子资源能增强特定网络结构下的会合性能，为量子增强型分布式系统提供了潜在应用方向。

authors_text: Oleg Mazonka
title: Modular Multiplication without Carry Propagation (Algorithm Description)
title_zh: 无进位传播的模乘法（算法描述）
comment: Algorithm for Carry-Save modular multiplication. The follow up hardware paper based on the described algorithm is published in ICCAD 2022
comments: Algorithm for Carry-Save modular multiplication. The follow up hardware paper based on the described algorithm is published in ICCAD 2022
abstract: This paper describes a sufficiently simple modular multiplication algorithm, which uses only carry-save addition with bit inspection Boolean logic and without number comparison or carry propagation.
summary: This paper describes a sufficiently simple modular multiplication algorithm, which uses only carry-save addition with bit inspection Boolean logic and without number comparison or carry propagation.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了一种足够简单的模乘算法，该算法仅使用带有位检查布尔逻辑的进位保存加法，并且没有数字比较或进位传播。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需进位传播的模乘算法，仅使用带保存加法和位检查布尔逻辑
AI.motivation: 传统模乘算法依赖进位传播或比较操作，导致效率低下，需设计更高效且简单的算法
AI.method: 采用带保存加法与位检查布尔逻辑，消除进位传播及数字比较步骤
AI.result: 实现高效模乘，适用于需快速运算的场景，如密码学
AI.conclusion: 该算法简化了硬件实现，提升了模乘运算效率，为相关应用提供新方案

authors_text: Diego Ayala,Danilo Chavez,Leopoldo Altamirano Robles
title: Low Cost Embedded Vision System For Location And Tracking Of A Color Object
title_zh: 用于定位和跟踪颜色物体的低成本嵌入式视觉系统
comment: ef:Computer Vision and Image Processing. CVIP 2021
comments: ef:Computer Vision and Image Processing. CVIP 2021
abstract: This paper describes the development of an embedded vision system for detection, location, and tracking of a color object; it makes use of a single 32-bit microprocessor to acquire image data, process, and perform actions according to the interpreted data. The system is intended for applications that need to make use of artificial vision for detection, location and tracking of a color object and its objective is to have achieve at reduced terms of size, power consumption, and cost.
summary: This paper describes the development of an embedded vision system for detection, location, and tracking of a color object; it makes use of a single 32-bit microprocessor to acquire image data, process, and perform actions according to the interpreted data. The system is intended for applications that need to make use of artificial vision for detection, location and tracking of a color object and its objective is to have achieve at reduced terms of size, power consumption, and cost.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了用于检测、定位和跟踪彩色物体的嵌入式视觉系统的开发；它利用单个 32 位微处理器来获取图像数据、处理数据并根据解释的数据执行操作。该系统适用于需要利用人工视觉来检测、定位和跟踪彩色物体的应用，其目标是在减小尺寸、功耗和成本的情况下实现。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种低成本嵌入式视觉系统，用于检测、定位和跟踪彩色物体。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉系统存在成本高、功耗大或复杂度高的问题，需提供一种经济高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用单片32位微处理器实现图像采集、处理及实时跟踪，优化算法以降低功耗和成本。
AI.result: 成功构建出满足尺寸、功耗和成本要求的系统，可有效检测并跟踪指定彩色物体。
AI.conclusion: 该系统在保持性能的同时显著降低了硬件成本，适用于需要视觉检测的嵌入式场景。

tldr: 本文开发了一种低成本嵌入式视觉系统，用于检测、定位和跟踪彩色物体。
motivation: 现有视觉系统存在成本高、功耗大或复杂度高的问题，需提供一种经济高效的解决方案。
method: 采用单片32位微处理器实现图像采集、处理及实时跟踪，优化算法以降低功耗和成本。
result: 成功构建出满足尺寸、功耗和成本要求的系统，可有效检测并跟踪指定彩色物体。
conclusion: 该系统在保持性能的同时显著降低了硬件成本，适用于需要视觉检测的嵌入式场景。
search_text: Low Cost Embedded Vision System For Location And Tracking Of A Color Object 用于定位和跟踪颜色物体的低成本嵌入式视觉系统 This paper describes the development of an embedded vision system for detection, location, and tracking of a color object; it makes use of a single 32-bit microprocessor to acquire image data, process, and perform actions according to the interpreted data. The system is intended for applications that need to make use of artificial vision for detection, location and tracking of a color object and its objective is to have achieve at reduced terms of size, power consumption, and cost. 本文介绍了用于检测、定位和跟踪彩色物体的嵌入式视觉系统的开发；它利用单个 32 位微处理器来获取图像数据、处理数据并根据解释的数据执行操作。该系统适用于需要利用人工视觉来检测、定位和跟踪彩色物体的应用，其目标是在减小尺寸、功耗和成本的情况下实现。 本文开发了一种低成本嵌入式视觉系统，用于检测、定位和跟踪彩色物体。 Diego Ayala,Danilo Chavez,Leopoldo Altamirano Robles cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Shikib Mehri,Yasemin Altun,Maxine Eskenazi
title: LAD: Language Models as Data for Zero-Shot Dialog
title_zh: LAD：语言模型作为零样本对话的数据
comment: Accepted as a long paper to SIGDial 2022
comments: Accepted as a long paper to SIGDial 2022
abstract: To facilitate zero-shot generalization in taskoriented dialog, this paper proposes Language Models as Data (LAD). LAD is a paradigm for creating diverse and accurate synthetic data which conveys the necessary structural constraints and can be used to train a downstream neural dialog model. LAD leverages GPT-3 to induce linguistic diversity. LAD achieves significant performance gains in zero-shot settings on intent prediction (+15%), slot filling (+31.4 F-1) and next action prediction (+11 F1). Furthermore, an interactive human evaluation shows that training with LAD is competitive with training on human dialogs. LAD is open-sourced, with the code and data available at https://github.com/Shikib/lad.
summary: To facilitate zero-shot generalization in taskoriented dialog, this paper proposes Language Models as Data (LAD). LAD is a paradigm for creating diverse and accurate synthetic data which conveys the necessary structural constraints and can be used to train a downstream neural dialog model. LAD leverages GPT-3 to induce linguistic diversity. LAD achieves significant performance gains in zero-shot settings on intent prediction (+15%), slot filling (+31.4 F-1) and next action prediction (+11 F1). Furthermore, an interactive human evaluation shows that training with LAD is competitive with training on human dialogs. LAD is open-sourced, with the code and data available at https://github.com/Shikib/lad.
abstract_zh: 为了促进面向任务的对话中的零样本泛化，本文提出了语言模型即数据（LAD）。 LAD 是创建多样化且准确的合成数据的范例，它传达必要的结构约束，并可用于训练下游神经对话模型。 LAD 利用 GPT-3 来引入语言多样性。 LAD 在意图预测 (+15%)、槽填充 (+31.4 F-1) 和下一个动作预测 (+11 F1) 的零样本设置中实现了显着的性能提升。此外，交互式人类评估表明，LAD 训练与人类对话训练相比具有竞争力。 LAD 是开源的，代码和数据可在 https://github.com/Shikib/lad 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LAD方法，利用语言模型生成合成数据以提升零样本对话系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统对话系统依赖大量标注数据，难以适应零样本场景。LAD旨在通过合成数据减少对标注数据的依赖，提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: LAD利用GPT-3生成符合任务导向对话结构的合成数据，作为下游神经对话模型的训练数据。
AI.result: 在零样本设置下，LAD在意图识别（+15%）、槽位填充（+31.4 F-1）和动作预测（+11 F1）上显著优于基线，且人类评估显示其效果接近人类对话训练。
AI.conclusion: LAD通过语言模型生成高质量合成数据，有效提升零样本对话性能，且代码数据已开源。

authors_text: Semih Barutcu,Aggelos K. Katsaggelos,Doğa Gürsoy
title: A Deep Generative Approach to Oversampling in Ptychography
title_zh: Ptychography 中过采样的深度生成方法
abstract: Ptychography is a well-studied phase imaging method that makes non-invasive imaging possible at a nanometer scale. It has developed into a mainstream technique with various applications across a range of areas such as material science or the defense industry. One major drawback of ptychography is the long data acquisition time due to the high overlap requirement between adjacent illumination areas to achieve a reasonable reconstruction. Traditional approaches with reduced overlap between scanning areas result in reconstructions with artifacts. In this paper, we propose complementing sparsely acquired or undersampled data with data sampled from a deep generative network to satisfy the oversampling requirement in ptychography. Because the deep generative network is pre-trained and its output can be computed as we collect data, the experimental data and the time to acquire the data can be reduced. We validate the method by presenting the reconstruction quality compared to the previously proposed and traditional approaches and comment on the strengths and drawbacks of the proposed approach.
summary: Ptychography is a well-studied phase imaging method that makes non-invasive imaging possible at a nanometer scale. It has developed into a mainstream technique with various applications across a range of areas such as material science or the defense industry. One major drawback of ptychography is the long data acquisition time due to the high overlap requirement between adjacent illumination areas to achieve a reasonable reconstruction. Traditional approaches with reduced overlap between scanning areas result in reconstructions with artifacts. In this paper, we propose complementing sparsely acquired or undersampled data with data sampled from a deep generative network to satisfy the oversampling requirement in ptychography. Because the deep generative network is pre-trained and its output can be computed as we collect data, the experimental data and the time to acquire the data can be reduced. We validate the method by presenting the reconstruction quality compared to the previously proposed and traditional approaches and comment on the strengths and drawbacks of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: Ptychography 是一种经过充分研究的相位成像方法，使纳米级的非侵入性成像成为可能。它已发展成为一种主流技术，在材料科学或国防工业等一系列领域具有广泛的应用。叠印术的一个主要缺点是由于相邻照明区域之间的重叠要求较高以实现合理的重建，因此数据采集时间较长。传统方法减少了扫描区域之间的重叠，导致重建时出现伪影。在本文中，我们建议用从深度生成网络采样的数据来补充稀疏获取或欠采样的数据，以满足叠层摄影术中的过采样要求。由于深度生成网络是预先训练的，并且可以在收集数据时计算其输出，因此可以减少实验数据和获取数据的时间。我们通过与先前提出的传统方法相比呈现重建质量来验证该方法，并对所提出的方法的优点和缺点进行评论。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度生成网络的方法，用于解决ptychography成像中因数据欠采样导致的重建质量下降问题。
AI.motivation: Ptychography成像需要高重叠扫描区域以保证重建质量，但导致数据采集时间过长；传统低重叠方法会产生伪影，亟需更高效的采样策略。
AI.method: 利用预训练的深度生成网络生成补充数据，与实际采集的稀疏数据结合，满足ptychography的过采样需求，同时减少实验数据量和采集时间。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在重建质量上优于传统方法，有效减少了数据采集时间，但生成数据的质量依赖于网络训练效果。
AI.conclusion: 深度生成模型能有效缓解ptychography的过采样问题，在保证重建质量的同时提升效率，但需平衡生成数据与真实数据的融合效果。

search_text: A Deep Generative Approach to Oversampling in Ptychography Ptychography 中过采样的深度生成方法 Ptychography is a well-studied phase imaging method that makes non-invasive imaging possible at a nanometer scale. It has developed into a mainstream technique with various applications across a range of areas such as material science or the defense industry. One major drawback of ptychography is the long data acquisition time due to the high overlap requirement between adjacent illumination areas to achieve a reasonable reconstruction. Traditional approaches with reduced overlap between scanning areas result in reconstructions with artifacts. In this paper, we propose complementing sparsely acquired or undersampled data with data sampled from a deep generative network to satisfy the oversampling requirement in ptychography. Because the deep generative network is pre-trained and its output can be computed as we collect data, the experimental data and the time to acquire the data can be reduced. We validate the method by presenting the reconstruction quality compared to the previously proposed and traditional approaches and comment on the strengths and drawbacks of the proposed approach. Katsaggelos,Doğa Gürsoy eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.SP

authors_text: Terrence Sejnowski
title: Large Language Models and the Reverse Turing Test
title_zh: 大型语言模型和反向图灵测试
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been transformative. They are pre-trained foundational models that are self-supervised and can be adapted with fine tuning to a wide range of natural language tasks, each of which previously would have required a separate network model. This is one step closer to the extraordinary versatility of human language. GPT-3 and more recently LaMDA can carry on dialogs with humans on many topics after minimal priming with a few examples. However, there has been a wide range of reactions and debate on whether these LLMs understand what they are saying or exhibit signs of intelligence. This high variance is exhibited in three interviews with LLMs reaching wildly different conclusions. A new possibility was uncovered that could explain this divergence. What appears to be intelligence in LLMs may in fact be a mirror that reflects the intelligence of the interviewer, a remarkable twist that could be considered a Reverse Turing Test. If so, then by studying interviews we may be learning more about the intelligence and beliefs of the interviewer than the intelligence of the LLMs. As LLMs become more capable they may transform the way we interact with machines and how they interact with each other. Increasingly, LLMs are being coupled with sensorimotor devices. LLMs can talk the talk, but can they walk the walk? A road map for achieving artificial general autonomy is outlined with seven major improvements inspired by brain systems. LLMs could be used to uncover new insights into brain function by downloading brain data during natural behaviors.
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been transformative. They are pre-trained foundational models that are self-supervised and can be adapted with fine tuning to a wide range of natural language tasks, each of which previously would have required a separate network model. This is one step closer to the extraordinary versatility of human language. GPT-3 and more recently LaMDA can carry on dialogs with humans on many topics after minimal priming with a few examples. However, there has been a wide range of reactions and debate on whether these LLMs understand what they are saying or exhibit signs of intelligence. This high variance is exhibited in three interviews with LLMs reaching wildly different conclusions. A new possibility was uncovered that could explain this divergence. What appears to be intelligence in LLMs may in fact be a mirror that reflects the intelligence of the interviewer, a remarkable twist that could be considered a Reverse Turing Test. If so, then by studying interviews we may be learning more about the intelligence and beliefs of the interviewer than the intelligence of the LLMs. As LLMs become more capable they may transform the way we interact with machines and how they interact with each other. Increasingly, LLMs are being coupled with sensorimotor devices. LLMs can talk the talk, but can they walk the walk? A road map for achieving artificial general autonomy is outlined with seven major improvements inspired by brain systems. LLMs could be used to uncover new insights into brain function by downloading brain data during natural behaviors.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 具有变革性。它们是预先训练的基础模型，是自我监督的，可以通过微调来适应各种自然语言任务，而以前的每个任务都需要单独的网络模型。这距离人类语言非凡的多功能性又近了一步。 GPT-3 和最近的 LaMDA 可以在用几个例子进行最少的启动后就许多主题与人类进行对话。然而，对于这些法学硕士是否理解他们所说的或表现出智力的迹象，存在着广泛的反应和争论。这种巨大的差异在对法学硕士的三场采访中得到了体现，得出了截然不同的结论。 A new possibility was uncovered that could explain this divergence.法学硕士中看似智力的东西实际上可能是一面反映面试官智力的镜子，这是一个显着的扭曲，可以被视为反向图灵测试。如果是这样，那么通过研究面试，我们可能会更多地了解面试官的智力和信念，而不是法学硕士的智力。随着法学硕士变得更加有能力，他们可能会改变我们与机器交互的方式以及它们彼此交互的方式。法学硕士越来越多地与感觉运动设备相结合。法学硕士可以说说而已，但他们能付诸行动吗？概述了实现人工普遍自治的路线图，其中包括受大脑系统启发的七项重大改进。法学硕士可以通过下载自然行为过程中的大脑数据来发现对大脑功能的新见解。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大型语言模型（LLMs）在对话中的表现，并提出了一种反向图灵测试的概念，认为模型看似展现的智能可能反映了提问者的智能。
AI.motivation: 针对LLMs是否真正具备理解能力的争议，本文旨在通过分析对话案例揭示LLMs智能表现的潜在来源，并重新审视人机交互的本质。
AI.method: 通过分析LLMs与人类的对话案例，结合对现有模型能力的观察，提出反向图灵测试的假设，并探讨实现人工通用自主性的技术路线。
AI.result: 发现LLMs的智能表现可能映射提问者的认知水平，提出包含七项脑系统启发的改进方案，以推动LLMs向自主性发展。
AI.conclusion: LLMs的智能表现需结合人类认知重新评估，未来需通过脑数据研究与技术迭代实现更高级的自主性，同时深化对人类智能的理解。

search_text: Large Language Models and the Reverse Turing Test 大型语言模型和反向图灵测试 Large Language Models (LLMs) have been transformative. They are pre-trained foundational models that are self-supervised and can be adapted with fine tuning to a wide range of natural language tasks, each of which previously would have required a separate network model. This is one step closer to the extraordinary versatility of human language. GPT-3 and more recently LaMDA can carry on dialogs with humans on many topics after minimal priming with a few examples. However, there has been a wide range of reactions and debate on whether these LLMs understand what they are saying or exhibit signs of intelligence. This high variance is exhibited in three interviews with LLMs reaching wildly different conclusions. A new possibility was uncovered that could explain this divergence. What appears to be intelligence in LLMs may in fact be a mirror that reflects the intelligence of the interviewer, a remarkable twist that could be considered a Reverse Turing Test. If so, then by studying interviews we may be learning more about the intelligence and beliefs of the interviewer than the intelligence of the LLMs. As LLMs become more capable they may transform the way we interact with machines and how they interact with each other. Increasingly, LLMs are being coupled with sensorimotor devices. LLMs can talk the talk, but can they walk the walk? A road map for achieving artificial general autonomy is outlined with seven major improvements inspired by brain systems. LLMs could be used to uncover new insights into brain function by downloading brain data during natural behaviors. 大型语言模型 (LLM) 具有变革性。它们是预先训练的基础模型，是自我监督的，可以通过微调来适应各种自然语言任务，而以前的每个任务都需要单独的网络模型。这距离人类语言非凡的多功能性又近了一步。 GPT-3 和最近的 LaMDA 可以在用几个例子进行最少的启动后就许多主题与人类进行对话。然而，对于这些法学硕士是否理解他们所说的或表现出智力的迹象，存在着广泛的反应和争论。这种巨大的差异在对法学硕士的三场采访中得到了体现，得出了截然不同的结论。 A new possibility was uncovered that could explain this divergence.法学硕士中看似智力的东西实际上可能是一面反映面试官智力的镜子，这是一个显着的扭曲，可以被视为反向图灵测试。如果是这样，那么通过研究面试，我们可能会更多地了解面试官的智力和信念，而不是法学硕士的智力。随着法学硕士变得更加有能力，他们可能会改变我们与机器交互的方式以及它们彼此交互的方式。法学硕士越来越多地与感觉运动设备相结合。法学硕士可以说说而已，但他们能付诸行动吗？概述了实现人工普遍自治的路线图，其中包括受大脑系统启发的七项重大改进。法学硕士可以通过下载自然行为过程中的大脑数据来发现对大脑功能的新见解。 本文探讨了大型语言模型（LLMs）在对话中的表现，并提出了一种反向图灵测试的概念，认为模型看似展现的智能可能反映了提问者的智能。 Terrence Sejnowski cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xing Nie,Bolin Ni,Jianlong Chang,Gaomeng Meng,Chunlei Huo,Zhaoxiang Zhang,Shiming Xiang,Qi Tian,Chunhong Pan
title: Pro-tuning: Unified Prompt Tuning for Vision Tasks
title_zh: 亲调：视觉任务统一提示调优
abstract: In computer vision, fine-tuning is the de-facto approach to leverage pre-trained vision models to perform downstream tasks. However, deploying it in practice is quite challenging, due to adopting parameter inefficient global update and heavily relying on high-quality downstream data. Recently, prompt-based learning, which adds a task-relevant prompt to adapt the downstream tasks to pre-trained models, has drastically boosted the performance of many natural language downstream tasks. In this work, we extend this notable transfer ability benefited from prompt into vision models as an alternative to fine-tuning. To this end, we propose parameter-efficient Prompt tuning (Pro-tuning) to adapt frozen vision models to various downstream vision tasks. The key to Pro-tuning is prompt-based tuning, i.e., learning task-specific vision prompts for downstream input images with the pre-trained model frozen. By only training a few additional parameters, it can work on diverse CNN-based and Transformer-based architectures. Extensive experiments evidence that Pro-tuning outperforms fine-tuning in a broad range of vision tasks and scenarios, including image classification (generic objects, class imbalance, image corruption, adversarial robustness, and out-of-distribution generalization), and dense prediction tasks such as object detection and semantic segmentation.
summary: In computer vision, fine-tuning is the de-facto approach to leverage pre-trained vision models to perform downstream tasks. However, deploying it in practice is quite challenging, due to adopting parameter inefficient global update and heavily relying on high-quality downstream data. Recently, prompt-based learning, which adds a task-relevant prompt to adapt the downstream tasks to pre-trained models, has drastically boosted the performance of many natural language downstream tasks. In this work, we extend this notable transfer ability benefited from prompt into vision models as an alternative to fine-tuning. To this end, we propose parameter-efficient Prompt tuning (Pro-tuning) to adapt frozen vision models to various downstream vision tasks. The key to Pro-tuning is prompt-based tuning, i.e., learning task-specific vision prompts for downstream input images with the pre-trained model frozen. By only training a few additional parameters, it can work on diverse CNN-based and Transformer-based architectures. Extensive experiments evidence that Pro-tuning outperforms fine-tuning in a broad range of vision tasks and scenarios, including image classification (generic objects, class imbalance, image corruption, adversarial robustness, and out-of-distribution generalization), and dense prediction tasks such as object detection and semantic segmentation.
abstract_zh: 在计算机视觉中，微调是利用预先训练的视觉模型来执行下游任务的事实上的方法。然而，由于采用参数低效的全局更新以及严重依赖高质量的下游数据，在实践中部署它相当具有挑战性。最近，基于提示的学习添加了与任务相关的提示，以使下游任务适应预先训练的模型，极大地提高了许多自然语言下游任务的性能。在这项工作中，我们将这种得益于提示的显着迁移能力扩展到视觉模型中，作为微调的替代方案。为此，我们提出了参数高效的提示调整（Pro-tuning），以使冻结视觉模型适应各种下游视觉任务。预调优的关键是基于提示的调优，即在冻结预训练模型的情况下，学习针对下游输入图像的特定任务视觉提示。只需训练一些额外参数，它就可以在各种基于 CNN 和基于 Transformer 的架构上工作。大量实验证明，在广泛的视觉任务和场景中，预调优优于微调，包括图像分类（通用对象、类不平衡、图像损坏、对抗鲁棒性和分布外泛化）以及对象检测和语义分割等密集预测任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Pro-tuning的参数高效提示调优方法，用于替代传统微调策略，使冻结的预训练视觉模型适应多种下游视觉任务。
AI.motivation: 传统微调存在参数效率低、依赖高质量下游数据的问题，而提示学习在自然语言处理中表现出色，因此需将提示机制扩展至视觉领域以提升模型适应性。
AI.method: 通过冻结预训练视觉模型，仅学习任务相关的少量视觉提示参数，适配CNN和Transformer架构，实现参数高效的模型调优。
AI.result: 在图像分类（含类别不平衡、对抗鲁棒性等场景）及密集预测任务（目标检测、语义分割）中，Pro-tuning均优于传统微调方法。
AI.conclusion: Pro-tuning验证了提示学习在视觉任务中的有效性，为参数高效且数据依赖性低的模型适配提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sezen Lim,Tina Walber,Christoph Schaefer,Lena Riehl
title: Webcam Eye Tracking: Study Conduction and Acceptance of Remote Tests with Gaze Analysis
title_zh: 网络摄像头眼动追踪：通过注视分析研究远程测试的实施和接受
abstract: Webcam eye tracking for the collection of gaze data in the context of user studies is convenient - it can be used in remote tests where participants do not need special hardware. The approach has strong limitations, especially regarding the motion-free nature of the test persons during data recording and the quality of the gaze data obtained. Our study with 52 participants shows that usable eye tracking data can be obtained with commercially available webcams in a remote setting. However, a high drop off rate must be considered, which is why we recommend a high over-recruitment of 150%. We also show that the acceptance of the approach by the study participants is high despite the given limitations.
summary: Webcam eye tracking for the collection of gaze data in the context of user studies is convenient - it can be used in remote tests where participants do not need special hardware. The approach has strong limitations, especially regarding the motion-free nature of the test persons during data recording and the quality of the gaze data obtained. Our study with 52 participants shows that usable eye tracking data can be obtained with commercially available webcams in a remote setting. However, a high drop off rate must be considered, which is why we recommend a high over-recruitment of 150%. We also show that the acceptance of the approach by the study participants is high despite the given limitations.
abstract_zh: 在用户研究的背景下收集注视数据的网络摄像头眼动追踪非常方便——它可以用于参与者不需要特殊硬件的远程测试。该方法具有很大的局限性，特别是在数据记录期间测试人员的自由运动性质以及所获得的注视数据的质量方面。我们对 52 名参与者进行的研究表明，可以通过商用网络摄像头在远程环境中获得可用的眼动追踪数据。然而，必须考虑高流失率，这就是为什么我们建议高超额招聘 150%。我们还表明，尽管存在一定的局限性，但研究参与者对该方法的接受度很高。

AI.tldr: 研究在远程测试中使用网络摄像头进行眼动追踪的可行性及参与者接受度
AI.motivation: 传统眼动设备成本高且需专用硬件，远程测试需便捷方案
AI.method: 使用商业网络摄像头收集52名参与者的远程眼动数据，评估数据可用性及接受度
AI.result: 成功获取可用眼动数据，参与者接受度高，但需150%过招募以应对高脱落率
AI.conclusion: 网络摄像头眼动追踪在远程测试中可行，但需应对技术限制和高脱落率
