search_text: Webcam Eye Tracking: Study Conduction and Acceptance of Remote Tests with Gaze Analysis 网络摄像头眼动追踪：通过注视分析研究远程测试的实施和接受 Webcam eye tracking for the collection of gaze data in the context of user studies is convenient - it can be used in remote tests where participants do not need special hardware. The approach has strong limitations, especially regarding the motion-free nature of the test persons during data recording and the quality of the gaze data obtained. Our study with 52 participants shows that usable eye tracking data can be obtained with commercially available webcams in a remote setting. However, a high drop off rate must be considered, which is why we recommend a high over-recruitment of 150%. We also show that the acceptance of the approach by the study participants is high despite the given limitations. 在用户研究的背景下收集注视数据的网络摄像头眼动追踪非常方便——它可以用于参与者不需要特殊硬件的远程测试。该方法具有很大的局限性，特别是在数据记录期间测试人员的自由运动性质以及所获得的注视数据的质量方面。我们对 52 名参与者进行的研究表明，可以通过商用网络摄像头在远程环境中获得可用的眼动追踪数据。然而，必须考虑高流失率，这就是为什么我们建议高超额招聘 150%。我们还表明，尽管存在一定的局限性，但研究参与者对该方法的接受度很高。 研究在远程测试中使用网络摄像头进行眼动追踪的可行性及参与者接受度 Sezen Lim,Tina Walber,Christoph Schaefer,Lena Riehl cs.HC

authors_text: Corban Rivera,Chace Ashcraft,Alexander New,James Schmidt,Gautam Vallabha
title: Latent Properties of Lifelong Learning Systems
title_zh: 终身学习系统的潜在属性
comment: Accepted at 1st Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs) Workshop Track, 2022
comments: Accepted at 1st Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs) Workshop Track, 2022
abstract: Creating artificial intelligence (AI) systems capable of demonstrating lifelong learning is a fundamental challenge, and many approaches and metrics have been proposed to analyze algorithmic properties. However, for existing lifelong learning metrics, algorithmic contributions are confounded by task and scenario structure. To mitigate this issue, we introduce an algorithm-agnostic explainable surrogate-modeling approach to estimate latent properties of lifelong learning algorithms. We validate the approach for estimating these properties via experiments on synthetic data. To validate the structure of the surrogate model, we analyze real performance data from a collection of popular lifelong learning approaches and baselines adapted for lifelong classification and lifelong reinforcement learning.
summary: Creating artificial intelligence (AI) systems capable of demonstrating lifelong learning is a fundamental challenge, and many approaches and metrics have been proposed to analyze algorithmic properties. However, for existing lifelong learning metrics, algorithmic contributions are confounded by task and scenario structure. To mitigate this issue, we introduce an algorithm-agnostic explainable surrogate-modeling approach to estimate latent properties of lifelong learning algorithms. We validate the approach for estimating these properties via experiments on synthetic data. To validate the structure of the surrogate model, we analyze real performance data from a collection of popular lifelong learning approaches and baselines adapted for lifelong classification and lifelong reinforcement learning.
abstract_zh: 创建能够展示终身学习的人工智能 (AI) 系统是一项根本挑战，人们提出了许多方法和指标来分析算法属性。然而，对于现有的终身学习指标，算法的贡献受到任务和场景结构的影响。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入了一种与算法无关的可解释代理建模方法来估计终身学习算法的潜在属性。我们通过合成数据实验验证了估计这些属性的方法。为了验证替代模型的结构，我们分析了一系列流行的终身学习方法和适用于终身分类和终身强化学习的基线的真实表现数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种算法无关的可解释代理模型方法，用于估计终身学习系统的潜在属性，并通过合成数据和真实数据验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有终身学习评估指标无法分离算法贡献与任务/场景结构的影响，导致分析结果存在混淆。
AI.method: 设计算法无关的代理模型框架，通过合成数据实验验证属性估计能力，并用真实分类/强化学习数据验证模型结构合理性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效估计终身学习算法的潜在属性，代理模型结构与实际性能数据具有显著相关性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为分析终身学习系统提供了新的评估工具，可帮助更清晰地理解算法本质特性与场景因素的独立影响。

authors_text: Aveena Kottwani,Ayush Kumar
title: Eye Gaze Estimation Model Analysis
title_zh: 眼睛注视估计模型分析
comment: 7 pages, 14 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1805.04771 by other authors
comments: 7 pages, 14 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1805.04771 by other authors
abstract: We explore techniques for eye gaze estimation using machine learning. Eye gaze estimation is a common problem for various behavior analysis and human-computer interfaces. The purpose of this work is to discuss various model types for eye gaze estimation and present the results from predicting gaze direction using eye landmarks in unconstrained settings. In unconstrained real-world settings, feature-based and model-based methods are outperformed by recent appearance-based methods due to factors like illumination changes and other visual artifacts. We discuss a learning-based method for eye region landmark localization trained exclusively on synthetic data. We discuss how to use detected landmarks as input to iterative model-fitting and lightweight learning-based gaze estimation methods and how to use the model for person-independent and personalized gaze estimations.
summary: We explore techniques for eye gaze estimation using machine learning. Eye gaze estimation is a common problem for various behavior analysis and human-computer interfaces. The purpose of this work is to discuss various model types for eye gaze estimation and present the results from predicting gaze direction using eye landmarks in unconstrained settings. In unconstrained real-world settings, feature-based and model-based methods are outperformed by recent appearance-based methods due to factors like illumination changes and other visual artifacts. We discuss a learning-based method for eye region landmark localization trained exclusively on synthetic data. We discuss how to use detected landmarks as input to iterative model-fitting and lightweight learning-based gaze estimation methods and how to use the model for person-independent and personalized gaze estimations.
abstract_zh: 我们探索使用机器学习进行眼睛注视估计的技术。眼睛注视估计是各种行为分析和人机界面的常见问题。这项工作的目的是讨论用于眼睛注视估计的各种模型类型，并展示在无约束设置中使用眼睛标志预测注视方向的结果。在不受约束的现实环境中，由于光照变化和其他视觉伪影等因素，基于特征和基于模型的方法的性能优于最近基于外观的方法。我们讨论了一种基于学习的方法，用于仅在合成数据上训练的眼部区域地标定位。我们讨论如何使用检测到的地标作为迭代模型拟合和基于轻量级学习的注视估计方法的输入，以及如何使用该模型进行独立于人的个性化注视估计。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了多种眼动估计模型在非受限环境下的应用，分析了基于合成数据训练的模型及地标检测方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 为解决非受限环境下光照变化和视觉干扰导致的传统眼动估计方法性能下降的问题，需探索更鲁棒的模型方案。
AI.method: 采用基于合成数据训练的深度学习模型进行眼区地标定位，结合迭代模型拟合和轻量级学习方法，实现非受限环境下的眼动估计。
AI.result: 实验表明，在非受限环境下，基于外观的方法优于传统特征和模型方法，且使用合成数据训练的模型在个性化和非个性化估计中均表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 本文结论指出，基于外观的深度学习方法结合合成数据训练和迭代模型拟合能有效提升非受限环境下眼动估计的准确性，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Taicheng Guo,Lu Yu,Basem Shihada,Xiangliang Zhang
title: Few-shot News Recommendation via Cross-lingual Transfer
title_zh: 跨语言传输的少镜头新闻推荐
abstract: The cold-start problem has been commonly recognized in recommendation systems and studied by following a general idea to leverage the abundant interaction records of warm users to infer the preference of cold users. However, the performance of these solutions is limited by the amount of records available from warm users to use. Thus, building a recommendation system based on few interaction records from a few users still remains a challenging problem for unpopular or early-stage recommendation platforms. This paper focuses on solving the few-shot recommendation problem for news recommendation based on two observations. First, news at different platforms (even in different languages) may share similar topics. Second, the user preference over these topics is transferable across different platforms. Therefore, we propose to solve the few-shot news recommendation problem by transferring the user-news preference from a many-shot source domain to a few-shot target domain. To bridge two domains that are even in different languages and without any overlapping users and news, we propose a novel unsupervised cross-lingual transfer model as the news encoder that aligns semantically similar news in two domains. A user encoder is constructed on top of the aligned news encoding and transfers the user preference from the source to target domain. Experimental results on two real-world news recommendation datasets show the superior performance of our proposed method on addressing few-shot news recommendation, comparing to the baselines.
summary: The cold-start problem has been commonly recognized in recommendation systems and studied by following a general idea to leverage the abundant interaction records of warm users to infer the preference of cold users. However, the performance of these solutions is limited by the amount of records available from warm users to use. Thus, building a recommendation system based on few interaction records from a few users still remains a challenging problem for unpopular or early-stage recommendation platforms. This paper focuses on solving the few-shot recommendation problem for news recommendation based on two observations. First, news at different platforms (even in different languages) may share similar topics. Second, the user preference over these topics is transferable across different platforms. Therefore, we propose to solve the few-shot news recommendation problem by transferring the user-news preference from a many-shot source domain to a few-shot target domain. To bridge two domains that are even in different languages and without any overlapping users and news, we propose a novel unsupervised cross-lingual transfer model as the news encoder that aligns semantically similar news in two domains. A user encoder is constructed on top of the aligned news encoding and transfers the user preference from the source to target domain. Experimental results on two real-world news recommendation datasets show the superior performance of our proposed method on addressing few-shot news recommendation, comparing to the baselines.
abstract_zh: 冷启动问题在推荐系统中已得到普遍认识，并通过遵循利用热用户丰富的交互记录来推断冷用户的偏好的总体思路进行研究。然而，这些解决方案的性能受到热用户可用的记录量的限制。因此，对于不受欢迎或处于早期阶段的推荐平台来说，基于少数用户的少量交互记录构建推荐系统仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。本文重点基于两个观察来解决新闻推荐的小样本推荐问题。首先，不同平台（甚至不同语言）的新闻可能有相似的主题。其次，用户对这些主题的偏好可以跨不同平台转移。因此，我们建议通过将用户新闻偏好从多镜头源域转移到少镜头目标域来解决少镜头新闻推荐问题。为了桥接两个不同语言的领域，并且没有任何重叠的用户和新闻，我们提出了一种新颖的无监督跨语言传输模型作为新闻编码器，可以在两个领域中对齐语义相似的新闻。用户编码器构建在对齐的新闻编码之上，并将用户偏好从源域传输到目标域。两个现实世界新闻推荐数据集的实验结果表明，与基线相比，我们提出的方法在解决少样本新闻推荐方面具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于跨语言迁移的少样本新闻推荐方法，解决冷启动问题。
AI.motivation: 传统推荐系统依赖大量用户交互数据，但冷启动场景下数据不足导致性能受限，需利用跨平台/跨语言的新闻语义和用户偏好可迁移性。
AI.method: 构建无监督跨语言迁移模型对齐多语言新闻语义，通过用户编码器迁移源领域到目标领域的用户偏好。
AI.result: 在两个真实新闻数据集上实验验证，所提方法在少样本场景下优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言迁移有效提升少样本新闻推荐性能，验证了新闻语义可对齐性和用户偏好可迁移性的价值。

ai_content.result: 在两个真实新闻数据集上实验验证，所提方法在少样本场景下优于基线模型。
ai_content.conclusion: 跨语言迁移有效提升少样本新闻推荐性能，验证了新闻语义可对齐性和用户偏好可迁移性的价值。

search_text: Few-shot News Recommendation via Cross-lingual Transfer 跨语言传输的少镜头新闻推荐 The cold-start problem has been commonly recognized in recommendation systems and studied by following a general idea to leverage the abundant interaction records of warm users to infer the preference of cold users. However, the performance of these solutions is limited by the amount of records available from warm users to use. Thus, building a recommendation system based on few interaction records from a few users still remains a challenging problem for unpopular or early-stage recommendation platforms. This paper focuses on solving the few-shot recommendation problem for news recommendation based on two observations. First, news at different platforms (even in different languages) may share similar topics. Second, the user preference over these topics is transferable across different platforms. Therefore, we propose to solve the few-shot news recommendation problem by transferring the user-news preference from a many-shot source domain to a few-shot target domain. To bridge two domains that are even in different languages and without any overlapping users and news, we propose a novel unsupervised cross-lingual transfer model as the news encoder that aligns semantically similar news in two domains. A user encoder is constructed on top of the aligned news encoding and transfers the user preference from the source to target domain. Experimental results on two real-world news recommendation datasets show the superior performance of our proposed method on addressing few-shot news recommendation, comparing to the baselines. 冷启动问题在推荐系统中已得到普遍认识，并通过遵循利用热用户丰富的交互记录来推断冷用户的偏好的总体思路进行研究。然而，这些解决方案的性能受到热用户可用的记录量的限制。因此，对于不受欢迎或处于早期阶段的推荐平台来说，基于少数用户的少量交互记录构建推荐系统仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。本文重点基于两个观察来解决新闻推荐的小样本推荐问题。首先，不同平台（甚至不同语言）的新闻可能有相似的主题。其次，用户对这些主题的偏好可以跨不同平台转移。因此，我们建议通过将用户新闻偏好从多镜头源域转移到少镜头目标域来解决少镜头新闻推荐问题。为了桥接两个不同语言的领域，并且没有任何重叠的用户和新闻，我们提出了一种新颖的无监督跨语言传输模型作为新闻编码器，可以在两个领域中对齐语义相似的新闻。用户编码器构建在对齐的新闻编码之上，并将用户偏好从源域传输到目标域。两个现实世界新闻推荐数据集的实验结果表明，与基线相比，我们提出的方法在解决少样本新闻推荐方面具有优越的性能。 本文提出一种基于跨语言迁移的少样本新闻推荐方法，解决冷启动问题。 Taicheng Guo,Lu Yu,Basem Shihada,Xiangliang Zhang cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Meng Liu,Tamal K. Dey,David F. Gleich
title: Topological structure of complex predictions
title_zh: 复杂预测的拓扑结构
abstract: Complex prediction models such as deep learning are the output from fitting machine learning, neural networks, or AI models to a set of training data. These are now standard tools in science. A key challenge with the current generation of models is that they are highly parameterized, which makes describing and interpreting the prediction strategies difficult. We use topological data analysis to transform these complex prediction models into pictures representing a topological view. The result is a map of the predictions that enables inspection. The methods scale up to large datasets across different domains and enable us to detect labeling errors in training data, understand generalization in image classification, and inspect predictions of likely pathogenic mutations in the BRCA1 gene.
summary: Complex prediction models such as deep learning are the output from fitting machine learning, neural networks, or AI models to a set of training data. These are now standard tools in science. A key challenge with the current generation of models is that they are highly parameterized, which makes describing and interpreting the prediction strategies difficult. We use topological data analysis to transform these complex prediction models into pictures representing a topological view. The result is a map of the predictions that enables inspection. The methods scale up to large datasets across different domains and enable us to detect labeling errors in training data, understand generalization in image classification, and inspect predictions of likely pathogenic mutations in the BRCA1 gene.
abstract_zh: 深度学习等复杂的预测模型是将机器学习、神经网络或人工智能模型拟合到一组训练数据的输出。这些现在已成为科学的标准工具。当前一代模型的一个关键挑战是它们高度参数化，这使得描述和解释预测策略变得困难。我们使用拓扑数据分析将这些复杂的预测模型转换为代表拓扑视图的图片。结果是可以进行检查的预测图。这些方法扩展到不同领域的大型数据集，使我们能够检测训练数据中的标签错误，了解图像分类的泛化，并检查 BRCA1 基因中可能致病突变的预测。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用拓扑数据分析方法，将复杂预测模型转化为可解释的拓扑视图，以解决深度学习等模型参数过多导致的预测策略难以描述和解释的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前复杂预测模型（如深度学习）高度参数化，导致其预测策略难以描述和解释，亟需有效方法进行模型可视化和预测结果检验。
AI.method: 采用拓扑数据分析技术，将机器学习模型的预测结果转化为拓扑结构图像，生成可直观分析的预测地图。
AI.result: 方法可扩展至多领域大规模数据集，成功检测训练数据标签错误、解析图像分类泛化能力，并分析BRCA1基因致病突变预测。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑数据分析为复杂模型提供了有效的可视化和解释工具，有助于提升模型可信度及数据质量检验，具有跨领域应用潜力。

authors_text: Meghanath Macha Y,Sriram Ravindran,Deepak Pai,Anish Narang,Vijay Srivastava
title: Multiple Attribute Fairness: Application to Fraud Detection
title_zh: 多属性公平性：在欺诈检测中的应用
abstract: We propose a fairness measure relaxing the equality conditions in the popular equal odds fairness regime for classification. We design an iterative, model-agnostic, grid-based heuristic that calibrates the outcomes per sensitive attribute value to conform to the measure. The heuristic is designed to handle high arity attribute values and performs a per attribute sanitization of outcomes across different protected attribute values. We also extend our heuristic for multiple attributes. Highlighting our motivating application, fraud detection, we show that the proposed heuristic is able to achieve fairness across multiple values of a single protected attribute, multiple protected attributes. When compared to current fairness techniques, that focus on two groups, we achieve comparable performance across several public data sets.
summary: We propose a fairness measure relaxing the equality conditions in the popular equal odds fairness regime for classification. We design an iterative, model-agnostic, grid-based heuristic that calibrates the outcomes per sensitive attribute value to conform to the measure. The heuristic is designed to handle high arity attribute values and performs a per attribute sanitization of outcomes across different protected attribute values. We also extend our heuristic for multiple attributes. Highlighting our motivating application, fraud detection, we show that the proposed heuristic is able to achieve fairness across multiple values of a single protected attribute, multiple protected attributes. When compared to current fairness techniques, that focus on two groups, we achieve comparable performance across several public data sets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种公平措施，放宽了流行的等赔率公平制度中的平等条件以进行分类。我们设计了一种迭代的、与模型无关的、基于网格的启发式方法，可以校准每个敏感属性值的结果以符合度量标准。该启发式设计用于处理高数量属性值，并对不同受保护属性值的结果执行按属性清理。我们还扩展了针对多个属性的启发式方法。强调我们的激励应用程序欺诈检测，我们表明所提出的启发式能够在单个受保护属性、多个受保护属性的多个值之间实现公平性。与当前关注两组的公平技术相比，我们在多个公共数据集上实现了可比较的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多属性公平性方法，并应用于欺诈检测，以实现跨多个敏感属性值的公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性技术主要针对两组，无法有效处理多属性值和多个敏感属性，需改进以实现更全面的公平性。
AI.method: 设计迭代、模型无关的网格启发式算法，校准每个敏感属性值的输出结果，并扩展至多属性处理。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上，该方法在保持公平性的同时，性能与现有技术相当。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效实现多属性公平性，在欺诈检测中表现良好，为多属性公平性问题提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Yuxiang Wang,You Zhang,Zhiyao Duan,Mark Bocko
title: Predicting Global HRTFs From Scanned Head Geometry Using Deep Learning and Compact Representations
title_zh: 使用深度学习和紧凑表示从扫描头部几何形状预测全局 HRTF
abstract: In the growing field of virtual auditory display, personalized head-related transfer functions (HRTFs) play a vital role in establishing an accurate sound image for mixed and augmented reality applications. In this work, we propose an HRTF personalization method employing convolutional neural networks (CNN) to predict a subject HRTFs for all directions from their scanned head geometry. To ease the training of the CNN models, we propose novel pre-processing methods for both the head scans and HRTF data to achieve compact representations. For the head scan, we use truncated spherical cap harmonic (SCH) coefficients to represent the pinna area, which is important in the acoustic scattering process. For the HRTF data, we use truncated spherical harmonic (SH) coefficients to represent the HRTF magnitudes and onsets. One CNN model is trained to predict the SH coefficients of the HRTF magnitudes from the SCH coefficients of the scanned ear geometry and other anthropometric measurements of the head. The other CNN model is trained to predict SH coefficients of the HRTF onsets from only the anthropometric measurements of the ear, head, and torso. Combining the magnitude and onset predictions, our method is able to predict the complete and global HRTF data. A leave-one-out validation with the log-spectral distortion (LSD) metric is used for objective evaluation. The results show a decent LSD level at both spatial \& temporal dimensions compared to the ground-truth HRTFs and a lower LSD than the boundary element method (BEM) simulation of HRTFs that the database provides. The localization simulation results with an auditory model are also consistent with the objective evaluation metrics, showing the localization responses with our predicted HRTFs are significantly better than with the BEM-calculated ones.
summary: In the growing field of virtual auditory display, personalized head-related transfer functions (HRTFs) play a vital role in establishing an accurate sound image for mixed and augmented reality applications. In this work, we propose an HRTF personalization method employing convolutional neural networks (CNN) to predict a subject HRTFs for all directions from their scanned head geometry. To ease the training of the CNN models, we propose novel pre-processing methods for both the head scans and HRTF data to achieve compact representations. For the head scan, we use truncated spherical cap harmonic (SCH) coefficients to represent the pinna area, which is important in the acoustic scattering process. For the HRTF data, we use truncated spherical harmonic (SH) coefficients to represent the HRTF magnitudes and onsets. One CNN model is trained to predict the SH coefficients of the HRTF magnitudes from the SCH coefficients of the scanned ear geometry and other anthropometric measurements of the head. The other CNN model is trained to predict SH coefficients of the HRTF onsets from only the anthropometric measurements of the ear, head, and torso. Combining the magnitude and onset predictions, our method is able to predict the complete and global HRTF data. A leave-one-out validation with the log-spectral distortion (LSD) metric is used for objective evaluation. The results show a decent LSD level at both spatial \& temporal dimensions compared to the ground-truth HRTFs and a lower LSD than the boundary element method (BEM) simulation of HRTFs that the database provides. The localization simulation results with an auditory model are also consistent with the objective evaluation metrics, showing the localization responses with our predicted HRTFs are significantly better than with the BEM-calculated ones.
abstract_zh: 在不断发展的虚拟听觉显示领域，个性化头部相关传输函数 (HRTF) 在为混合现实和增强现实应用建立准确的声像方面发挥着至关重要的作用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种 HRTF 个性化方法，采用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 从扫描的头部几何形状预测受试者所有方向的 HRTF。为了简化 CNN 模型的训练，我们针对头部扫描和 HRTF 数据提出了新颖的预处理方法，以实现紧凑的表示。对于头部扫描，我们使用截断球冠谐波（SCH）系数来表示耳廓区域，这在声学散射过程中很重要。对于 HRTF 数据，我们使用截断球谐 (SH) 系数来表示 HRTF 幅度和起始点。训练一种 CNN 模型，根据扫描的耳朵几何结构的 SCH 系数和头部的其他人体测量数据来预测 HRTF 幅度的 SH 系数。另一个 CNN 模型经过训练，仅根据耳朵、头部和躯干的人体测量数据来预测 HRTF 起始点的 SH 系数。结合震级和起始预测，我们的方法能够预测完整的全局 HRTF 数据。使用对数谱失真 (LSD) 度量的留一验证用于客观评估。结果显示，与真实 HRTF 相比，在空间和时间维度上都有不错的 LSD 水平，并且比数据库提供的 HRTF 的边界元法 (BEM) 模拟更低的 LSD。听觉模型的定位模拟结果也与客观评估指标一致，表明我们预测的 HRTF 的定位响应明显优于 BEM 计算的定位响应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习和紧凑表示的方法，通过扫描的头部几何数据预测全局个性化HRTF。
AI.motivation: 个性化HRTF对虚拟现实和增强现实中的声像定位至关重要，但传统方法如边界元法计算成本高且依赖大量数据，需探索更高效的预测方案。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络（CNN），通过截断球面帽谐波（SCH）表示耳廓几何，截断球面谐波（SH）表示HRTF幅度与起始时间，训练两个独立CNN模型分别预测幅度和起始时间并组合输出完整HRTF。
AI.result: 在LSD指标上优于BEM模拟结果，且定位模拟显示预测HRTF的定位性能显著优于BEM方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过紧凑表示与深度学习有效预测HRTF，在计算效率和定位精度上优于传统方法，为虚拟听觉显示提供新思路。

search_text: Predicting Global HRTFs From Scanned Head Geometry Using Deep Learning and Compact Representations 使用深度学习和紧凑表示从扫描头部几何形状预测全局 HRTF In the growing field of virtual auditory display, personalized head-related transfer functions (HRTFs) play a vital role in establishing an accurate sound image for mixed and augmented reality applications. In this work, we propose an HRTF personalization method employing convolutional neural networks (CNN) to predict a subject HRTFs for all directions from their scanned head geometry. To ease the training of the CNN models, we propose novel pre-processing methods for both the head scans and HRTF data to achieve compact representations. For the head scan, we use truncated spherical cap harmonic (SCH) coefficients to represent the pinna area, which is important in the acoustic scattering process. For the HRTF data, we use truncated spherical harmonic (SH) coefficients to represent the HRTF magnitudes and onsets. One CNN model is trained to predict the SH coefficients of the HRTF magnitudes from the SCH coefficients of the scanned ear geometry and other anthropometric measurements of the head. The other CNN model is trained to predict SH coefficients of the HRTF onsets from only the anthropometric measurements of the ear, head, and torso. Combining the magnitude and onset predictions, our method is able to predict the complete and global HRTF data. A leave-one-out validation with the log-spectral distortion (LSD) metric is used for objective evaluation. The results show a decent LSD level at both spatial \& temporal dimensions compared to the ground-truth HRTFs and a lower LSD than the boundary element method (BEM) simulation of HRTFs that the database provides. The localization simulation results with an auditory model are also consistent with the objective evaluation metrics, showing the localization responses with our predicted HRTFs are significantly better than with the BEM-calculated ones. 在不断发展的虚拟听觉显示领域，个性化头部相关传输函数 (HRTF) 在为混合现实和增强现实应用建立准确的声像方面发挥着至关重要的作用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种 HRTF 个性化方法，采用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 从扫描的头部几何形状预测受试者所有方向的 HRTF。为了简化 CNN 模型的训练，我们针对头部扫描和 HRTF 数据提出了新颖的预处理方法，以实现紧凑的表示。对于头部扫描，我们使用截断球冠谐波（SCH）系数来表示耳廓区域，这在声学散射过程中很重要。对于 HRTF 数据，我们使用截断球谐 (SH) 系数来表示 HRTF 幅度和起始点。训练一种 CNN 模型，根据扫描的耳朵几何结构的 SCH 系数和头部的其他人体测量数据来预测 HRTF 幅度的 SH 系数。另一个 CNN 模型经过训练，仅根据耳朵、头部和躯干的人体测量数据来预测 HRTF 起始点的 SH 系数。结合震级和起始预测，我们的方法能够预测完整的全局 HRTF 数据。使用对数谱失真 (LSD) 度量的留一验证用于客观评估。结果显示，与真实 HRTF 相比，在空间和时间维度上都有不错的 LSD 水平，并且比数据库提供的 HRTF 的边界元法 (BEM) 模拟更低的 LSD。听觉模型的定位模拟结果也与客观评估指标一致，表明我们预测的 HRTF 的定位响应明显优于 BEM 计算的定位响应。 本文提出一种基于深度学习和紧凑表示的方法，通过扫描的头部几何数据预测全局个性化HRTF。 Yuxiang Wang,You Zhang,Zhiyao Duan,Mark Bocko eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Tianqi Guo,Yin Wang,Luis Solorio,Jan P. Allebach
title: Training a universal instance segmentation network for live cell images of various cell types and imaging modalities
title_zh: 为各种细胞类型和成像方式的活细胞图像训练通用实例分割网络
comment: A summary report of participation in the 6th Cell Tracking Challenge (CTC) at IEEE ISBI 2021
comments: A summary report of participation in the 6th Cell Tracking Challenge (CTC) at IEEE ISBI 2021
abstract: We share our recent findings in an attempt to train a universal segmentation network for various cell types and imaging modalities. Our method was built on the generalized U-Net architecture, which allows the evaluation of each component individually. We modified the traditional binary training targets to include three classes for direct instance segmentation. Detailed experiments were performed regarding training schemes, training settings, network backbones, and individual modules on the segmentation performance. Our proposed training scheme draws minibatches in turn from each dataset, and the gradients are accumulated before an optimization step. We found that the key to training a universal network is all-time supervision on all datasets, and it is necessary to sample each dataset in an unbiased way. Our experiments also suggest that there might exist common features to define cell boundaries across cell types and imaging modalities, which could allow application of trained models to totally unseen datasets. A few training tricks can further boost the segmentation performance, including uneven class weights in the cross-entropy loss function, well-designed learning rate scheduler, larger image crops for contextual information, and additional loss terms for unbalanced classes. We also found that segmentation performance can benefit from group normalization layer and Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling module, thanks to their more reliable statistics estimation and improved semantic understanding, respectively. We participated in the 6th Cell Tracking Challenge (CTC) held at IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI) 2021 using one of the developed variants. Our method was evaluated as the best runner up during the initial submission for the primary track, and also secured the 3rd place in an additional round of competition in preparation for the summary publication.
summary: We share our recent findings in an attempt to train a universal segmentation network for various cell types and imaging modalities. Our method was built on the generalized U-Net architecture, which allows the evaluation of each component individually. We modified the traditional binary training targets to include three classes for direct instance segmentation. Detailed experiments were performed regarding training schemes, training settings, network backbones, and individual modules on the segmentation performance. Our proposed training scheme draws minibatches in turn from each dataset, and the gradients are accumulated before an optimization step. We found that the key to training a universal network is all-time supervision on all datasets, and it is necessary to sample each dataset in an unbiased way. Our experiments also suggest that there might exist common features to define cell boundaries across cell types and imaging modalities, which could allow application of trained models to totally unseen datasets. A few training tricks can further boost the segmentation performance, including uneven class weights in the cross-entropy loss function, well-designed learning rate scheduler, larger image crops for contextual information, and additional loss terms for unbalanced classes. We also found that segmentation performance can benefit from group normalization layer and Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling module, thanks to their more reliable statistics estimation and improved semantic understanding, respectively. We participated in the 6th Cell Tracking Challenge (CTC) held at IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI) 2021 using one of the developed variants. Our method was evaluated as the best runner up during the initial submission for the primary track, and also secured the 3rd place in an additional round of competition in preparation for the summary publication.
abstract_zh: 我们分享我们最近的发现，试图为各种细胞类型和成像方式训练通用分割网络。我们的方法建立在通用 U-Net 架构之上，该架构允许单独评估每个组件。我们修改了传统的二进制训练目标，以包括用于直接实例分割的三个类别。对训练方案、训练设置、网络主干和分割性能的各个模块进行了详细的实验。我们提出的训练方案依次从每个数据集中提取小批量，并在优化步骤之前累积梯度。我们发现训练通用网络的关键是对所有数据集的全天候监督，并且有必要以无偏的方式对每个数据集进行采样。我们的实验还表明，可能存在共同的特征来定义跨细胞类型和成像方式的细胞边界，这可以允许将经过训练的模型应用于完全不可见的数据集。一些训练技巧可以进一步提高分割性能，包括交叉熵损失函数中不均匀的类权重、精心设计的学习率调度程序、上下文信息的更大图像裁剪以及不平衡类的附加损失项。我们还发现，分段性能可以受益于组归一化层和 Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling 模块，这分别归功于它们更可靠的统计估计和改进的语义理解。我们使用其中一种开发的变体参加了 2021 年 IEEE 国际生物医学成像研讨会 (ISBI) 举办的第六届细胞追踪挑战赛 (CTC)。我们的方法在初级赛道的初次提交中被评为最佳亚军，并且在为摘要发布做准备的额外一轮比赛中获得了第三名。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在训练一个能够处理多种细胞类型和成像模式的通用实例分割网络。
AI.motivation: 现有分割模型通常针对特定细胞类型或成像模式训练，缺乏跨数据集的泛化能力，需开发统一框架以提升效率和适用性。
AI.method: 基于通用U-Net架构，引入三类分割目标，采用分数据集轮流采样与梯度累积训练策略，并优化损失函数权重、学习率调度及网络模块设计。
AI.result: 在ISBI 2021细胞追踪挑战赛中获主赛道亚军及附加赛季军，验证了模型在未见数据集上的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过全数据集监督与无偏采样策略，结合特定训练技巧，可有效提升通用分割网络性能，为跨类型细胞图像分析提供可行方案。

search_text: Training a universal instance segmentation network for live cell images of various cell types and imaging modalities 为各种细胞类型和成像方式的活细胞图像训练通用实例分割网络 We share our recent findings in an attempt to train a universal segmentation network for various cell types and imaging modalities. We also found that segmentation performance can benefit from group normalization layer and Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling module, thanks to their more reliable statistics estimation and improved semantic understanding, respectively. authors_text: Diego Ayala,Daniel Durini,Jose Rangel-Magdaleno
title: Aztec curve: proposal for a new space-filling curve
title_zh: 阿兹特克曲线：新空间填充曲线的提案
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 7th Brazilian Technology Symposium BTSym21, 2021
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 7th Brazilian Technology Symposium BTSym21, 2021
abstract: Different space-filling curves (SFCs) are briefly reviewed in this paper, and a new one is proposed. A century has passed between the inception of this kind of curves, since then they have been found useful in computer science, particularly in data storage and indexing due to their clustering properties, being Hilbert curve the most well-known member of the family of fractals. The proposed Aztec curve, with similar characteristics to the Hilbert's curve, is introduced in this paper, accompanied by a grammatical description for its construction. It yields the possibility of creating bi-dimensional clusters, not available for Hilbert nor Peano curves. Additional to this, a case of application on the scope of Compressed Sensing is implemented, in which the use of Hilbert curve is contrasted with Aztec curve, having a similar performance, and positioning the Aztec curve as viable and a new alternative for future exploitation on applications that make use of SFC's.
summary: Different space-filling curves (SFCs) are briefly reviewed in this paper, and a new one is proposed. A century has passed between the inception of this kind of curves, since then they have been found useful in computer science, particularly in data storage and indexing due to their clustering properties, being Hilbert curve the most well-known member of the family of fractals. The proposed Aztec curve, with similar characteristics to the Hilbert's curve, is introduced in this paper, accompanied by a grammatical description for its construction. It yields the possibility of creating bi-dimensional clusters, not available for Hilbert nor Peano curves. Additional to this, a case of application on the scope of Compressed Sensing is implemented, in which the use of Hilbert curve is contrasted with Aztec curve, having a similar performance, and positioning the Aztec curve as viable and a new alternative for future exploitation on applications that make use of SFC's.
abstract_zh: 本文简要回顾了不同的空间填充曲线（SFC），并提出了一种新的空间填充曲线。这种曲线的出现已经过去了一个世纪，从那时起，它们被发现在计算机科学中很有用，特别是由于它们的聚类特性，在数据存储和索引方面很有用，希尔伯特曲线是分形家族中最著名的成员。本文介绍了所提出的阿兹特克曲线，其特征与希尔伯特曲线相似，并对其构造进行了语法描述。它提供了创建二维簇的可能性，这对于希尔伯特曲线或皮亚诺曲线来说是不可用的。除此之外，还实现了压缩感知范围的应用案例，其中希尔伯特曲线的使用与阿兹特克曲线进行了对比，具有相似的性能，并将阿兹特克曲线定位为可行的，并且是未来在使用 SFC 的应用中开发的新替代方案。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的空间填充曲线——Aztec曲线，并展示其在压缩感知中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有空间填充曲线（如Hilbert曲线）在数据存储和索引中应用广泛，但存在无法生成二维聚类的局限性，需探索新的曲线结构以提升性能。
AI.method: 通过语法描述构建Aztec曲线的结构，并在压缩感知场景下与Hilbert曲线进行性能对比实验。
AI.result: Aztec曲线在压缩感知应用中表现出与Hilbert曲线相当的性能，验证了其作为新型空间填充曲线的可行性。
AI.conclusion: Aztec曲线作为一种新型空间填充曲线，具备生成二维聚类的能力，为未来数据存储、压缩感知等领域提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Lianghao Xia,Chao Huang,Chuxu Zhang
title: Self-Supervised Hypergraph Transformer for Recommender Systems
title_zh: 用于推荐系统的自监督超图变压器
comment: This paper has been published as a full paper at the KDD research track 2022
comments: This paper has been published as a full paper at the KDD research track 2022
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have been shown as promising solutions for collaborative filtering (CF) with the modeling of user-item interaction graphs. The key idea of existing GNN-based recommender systems is to recursively perform the message passing along the user-item interaction edge for refining the encoded embeddings. Despite their effectiveness, however, most of the current recommendation models rely on sufficient and high-quality training data, such that the learned representations can well capture accurate user preference. User behavior data in many practical recommendation scenarios is often noisy and exhibits skewed distribution, which may result in suboptimal representation performance in GNN-based models. In this paper, we propose SHT, a novel Self-Supervised Hypergraph Transformer framework (SHT) which augments user representations by exploring the global collaborative relationships in an explicit way. Specifically, we first empower the graph neural CF paradigm to maintain global collaborative effects among users and items with a hypergraph transformer network. With the distilled global context, a cross-view generative self-supervised learning component is proposed for data augmentation over the user-item interaction graph, so as to enhance the robustness of recommender systems. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SHT can significantly improve the performance over various state-of-the-art baselines. Further ablation studies show the superior representation ability of our SHT recommendation framework in alleviating the data sparsity and noise issues. The source code and evaluation datasets are available at: https://github.com/akaxlh/SHT.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have been shown as promising solutions for collaborative filtering (CF) with the modeling of user-item interaction graphs. The key idea of existing GNN-based recommender systems is to recursively perform the message passing along the user-item interaction edge for refining the encoded embeddings. Despite their effectiveness, however, most of the current recommendation models rely on sufficient and high-quality training data, such that the learned representations can well capture accurate user preference. User behavior data in many practical recommendation scenarios is often noisy and exhibits skewed distribution, which may result in suboptimal representation performance in GNN-based models. In this paper, we propose SHT, a novel Self-Supervised Hypergraph Transformer framework (SHT) which augments user representations by exploring the global collaborative relationships in an explicit way. Specifically, we first empower the graph neural CF paradigm to maintain global collaborative effects among users and items with a hypergraph transformer network. With the distilled global context, a cross-view generative self-supervised learning component is proposed for data augmentation over the user-item interaction graph, so as to enhance the robustness of recommender systems. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SHT can significantly improve the performance over various state-of-the-art baselines. Further ablation studies show the superior representation ability of our SHT recommendation framework in alleviating the data sparsity and noise issues. The source code and evaluation datasets are available at: https://github.com/akaxlh/SHT.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已被证明是通过用户-项目交互图建模进行协作过滤（CF）的有前途的解决方案。现有基于 GNN 的推荐系统的关键思想是递归地执行沿着用户-项目交互边缘传递的消息，以细化编码的嵌入。然而，尽管它们很有效，但当前的大多数推荐模型都依赖于充足且高质量的训练数据，使得学习到的表示可以很好地捕获准确的用户偏好。许多实际推荐场景中的用户行为数据通常是有噪声的并且表现出偏态分布，这可能导致基于 GNN 的模型的表示性能不理想。在本文中，我们提出了 SHT，一种新颖的自监督超图转换器框架（SHT），它通过以显式方式探索全局协作关系来增强用户表示。具体来说，我们首先赋予图神经 CF 范式以通过超图转换器网络维持用户和项目之间的全局协作效果。通过提炼的全局上下文，提出了一种跨视图生成自监督学习组件，用于用户-项目交互图上的数据增强，从而增强推荐系统的鲁棒性。大量实验表明，SHT 可以显着提高各种最先进基线的性能。进一步的消融研究表明，我们的 SHT 推荐框架在缓解数据稀疏和噪声问题方面具有卓越的表示能力。源代码和评估数据集可从以下网址获取：https://github.com/akaxlh/SHT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督超图Transformer框架（SHT），用于改进推荐系统中用户-物品交互图的表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图神经网络（GNN）的推荐系统依赖高质量数据，但实际场景中用户行为数据常存在噪声和分布偏斜问题，导致表示性能下降。
AI.method: 通过超图Transformer网络显式建模全局协作关系，并引入跨视图生成式自监督学习组件进行数据增强，提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明SHT在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，且在缓解数据稀疏性和噪声问题上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: SHT框架通过全局协作建模与自监督学习有效提升了推荐系统在实际数据场景下的性能。

authors_text: Stuart Thiel,Larry Thiel,Gregory Butler
title: Implementing the Diverting Fast Radix Algorithm
title_zh: 实现转移快速基数算法
abstract: This paper presents ThielSort, a practical implementation of the Diverting Fast Radix (DFR) Algorithm. The theoretical improvements over classical radix sorts are outlined and implementation details are specified to demonstrate that the algorithm is competitive with the state of the art. The effectiveness of this implementation of the DFR algorithm is shown by considering a variety of standard distributions of data and input sizes.
summary: This paper presents ThielSort, a practical implementation of the Diverting Fast Radix (DFR) Algorithm. The theoretical improvements over classical radix sorts are outlined and implementation details are specified to demonstrate that the algorithm is competitive with the state of the art. The effectiveness of this implementation of the DFR algorithm is shown by considering a variety of standard distributions of data and input sizes.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 ThielSort，这是转向快速基数 (DFR) 算法的实际实现。概述了相对于经典基数排序的理论改进，并指定了实现细节，以证明该算法与现有技术相比具有竞争力。通过考虑数据和输入大小的各种标准分布，显示了 DFR 算法的这种实现的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ThielSort，实现DFR算法，并验证其在不同数据分布下的有效性。
AI.motivation: 展示DFR算法在实际应用中的竞争力，弥补理论改进与实际应用间的差距。
AI.method: 通过实现DFR算法的具体细节，并在不同数据分布和输入规模下进行测试。
AI.result: ThielSort在多种数据分布和输入规模下表现出与现有技术相当的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: DFR算法的实现是可行且有效的，具有实际应用价值。

The theoretical improvements over classical radix sorts are outlined and implementation details are specified to demonstrate that the algorithm is competitive with the state of the art. authors_text: Yang Zou,Jongheon Jeong,Latha Pemula,Dongqing Zhang,Onkar Dabeer
title: SPot-the-Difference Self-Supervised Pre-training for Anomaly Detection and Segmentation
title_zh: 用于异常检测和分割的 SPot-the-Difference 自监督预训练
comment: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision 2022
comments: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision 2022
abstract: Visual anomaly detection is commonly used in industrial quality inspection. In this paper, we present a new dataset as well as a new self-supervised learning method for ImageNet pre-training to improve anomaly detection and segmentation in 1-class and 2-class 5/10/high-shot training setups. We release the Visual Anomaly (VisA) Dataset consisting of 10,821 high-resolution color images (9,621 normal and 1,200 anomalous samples) covering 12 objects in 3 domains, making it the largest industrial anomaly detection dataset to date. Both image and pixel-level labels are provided. We also propose a new self-supervised framework - SPot-the-difference (SPD) - which can regularize contrastive self-supervised pre-training, such as SimSiam, MoCo and SimCLR, to be more suitable for anomaly detection tasks. Our experiments on VisA and MVTec-AD dataset show that SPD consistently improves these contrastive pre-training baselines and even the supervised pre-training. For example, SPD improves Area Under the Precision-Recall curve (AU-PR) for anomaly segmentation by 5.9% and 6.8% over SimSiam and supervised pre-training respectively in the 2-class high-shot regime. We open-source the project at http://github.com/amazon-research/spot-diff .

Both image and pixel-level labels are provided. We also propose a new self-supervised framework - SPot-the-difference (SPD) - which can regularize contrastive self-supervised pre-training, such as SimSiam, MoCo and SimCLR, to be more suitable for anomaly detection tasks. Our experiments on VisA and MVTec-AD dataset show that SPD consistently improves these contrastive pre-training baselines and even the supervised pre-training. For example, SPD improves Area Under the Precision-Recall curve (AU-PR) for anomaly segmentation by 5.9% and 6.8% over SimSiam and supervised pre-training respectively in the 2-class high-shot regime. We open-source the project at http://github.com/amazon-research/spot-diff .
abstract_zh: 视觉异常检测常用于工业质量检测。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的数据集以及一种用于 ImageNet 预训练的新的自监督学习方法，以改进 1 类和 2 类 5/10/高镜头训练设置中的异常检测和分割。我们发布了视觉异常 (VisA) 数据集，由 10,821 个高分辨率彩色图像（9,621 个正常样本和 1,200 个异常样本）组成，涵盖 3 个领域的 12 个对象，使其成为迄今为止最大的工业异常检测数据集。提供图像和像素级标签。我们还提出了一种新的自监督框架 - SPot-the-difference (SPD) - 它可以规范对比自监督预训练，例如 SimSiam、MoCo 和 SimCLR，以更适合异常检测任务。我们在 VisA 和 MVTec-AD 数据集上的实验表明，SPD 持续改进了这些对比预训练基线，甚至是监督预训练。例如，在 2 类高样本情况下，SPD 比 SimSiam 和监督预训练分别将异常分割的精确率-召回率曲线下面积 (AU-PR) 提高了 5.9% 和 6.8%。我们在 http://github.com/amazon-research/spot-diff 开源该项目。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的自监督预训练方法SPD和工业级异常检测数据集VisA，以提升工业场景下的异常检测与分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在工业场景中面对小样本或高样本量时检测效果有限，需更适应异常检测任务的预训练策略。
AI.method: 提出SPot-the-difference（SPD）框架，通过差异正则化改进对比学习（如SimSiam/MoCo/SimCLR），并构建包含10,821张高分辨率图像的VisA数据集。
AI.result: 在VisA和MVTec-AD数据集上，SPD使异常分割的AU-PR指标相比SimSiam和监督预训练分别提升5.9%和6.8%。
AI.conclusion: SPD方法有效提升对比预训练模型在工业异常检测任务中的性能，且项目已开源。

authors_text: Sateesh Kumar,Jonathan Zamora,Nicklas Hansen,Rishabh Jangir,Xiaolong Wang
title: Graph Inverse Reinforcement Learning from Diverse Videos
title_zh: 来自不同视频的图逆强化学习
abstract: Research on Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) from third-person videos has shown encouraging results on removing the need for manual reward design for robotic tasks. However, most prior works are still limited by training from a relatively restricted domain of videos. In this paper, we argue that the true potential of third-person IRL lies in increasing the diversity of videos for better scaling. To learn a reward function from diverse videos, we propose to perform graph abstraction on the videos followed by temporal matching in the graph space to measure the task progress. Our insight is that a task can be described by entity interactions that form a graph, and this graph abstraction can help remove irrelevant information such as textures, resulting in more robust reward functions. We evaluate our approach, GraphIRL, on cross-embodiment learning in X-MAGICAL and learning from human demonstrations for real-robot manipulation. We show significant improvements in robustness to diverse video demonstrations over previous approaches, and even achieve better results than manual reward design on a real robot pushing task. Videos are available at https://sateeshkumar21.github.io/GraphIRL .
summary: Research on Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) from third-person videos has shown encouraging results on removing the need for manual reward design for robotic tasks. However, most prior works are still limited by training from a relatively restricted domain of videos. In this paper, we argue that the true potential of third-person IRL lies in increasing the diversity of videos for better scaling. To learn a reward function from diverse videos, we propose to perform graph abstraction on the videos followed by temporal matching in the graph space to measure the task progress. Our insight is that a task can be described by entity interactions that form a graph, and this graph abstraction can help remove irrelevant information such as textures, resulting in more robust reward functions. We evaluate our approach, GraphIRL, on cross-embodiment learning in X-MAGICAL and learning from human demonstrations for real-robot manipulation. We show significant improvements in robustness to diverse video demonstrations over previous approaches, and even achieve better results than manual reward design on a real robot pushing task. Videos are available at https://sateeshkumar21.github.io/GraphIRL .
abstract_zh: 对第三人称视频的逆强化学习（IRL）的研究显示出令人鼓舞的结果，在消除机器人任务的手动奖励设计方面取得了令人鼓舞的结果。然而，大多数先前的工作仍然受到相对受限的视频领域的训练的限制。在本文中，我们认为第三人称现实生活的真正潜力在于增加视频的多样性以实现更好的扩展。为了从不同的视频中学习奖励函数，我们建议对视频进行图形抽象，然后在图形空间中进行时间匹配以衡量任务进度。我们的见解是，任务可以通过形成图的实体交互来描述，并且该图抽象可以帮助删除不相关的信息（例如纹理），从而产生更强大的奖励函数。我们评估了我们的方法 GraphIRL 在 X-MAGICAL 中的跨实体学习以及从人类演示中学习以进行真实的机器人操作。与以前的方法相比，我们对各种视频演示的鲁棒性有了显着的改进，甚至在真实的机器人推动任务上取得了比手动奖励设计更好的结果。视频可在 https://sateeshkumar21.github.io/GraphIRL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多样化视频的图逆强化学习方法（GraphIRL），通过图抽象和时序匹配学习更鲁棒的奖励函数。
AI.motivation: 现有基于第三人称视频的逆强化学习方法受限于视频领域多样性不足，难以适应复杂任务。
AI.method: 对视频进行图抽象提取实体交互关系，通过图空间时序匹配衡量任务进展，去除纹理等无关信息。
AI.result: 在跨形态学习和真实机器人操作任务中表现更优，甚至超越人工设计奖励函数的实测效果。
AI.conclusion: 图抽象方法能有效提升从多样化视频中学习奖励函数的鲁棒性与泛化能力。

authors_text: Hongyu Shen,Jinoh Oh,Shuai Zhao,Guoyin Wang,Tara Taghavi,Sungjin Lee
title: Learning Personalized Representations using Graph Convolutional Network
title_zh: 使用图卷积网络学习个性化表示
abstract: Generating representations that precisely reflect customers' behavior is an important task for providing personalized skill routing experience in Alexa. Currently, Dynamic Routing (DR) team, which is responsible for routing Alexa traffic to providers or skills, relies on two features to be served as personal signals: absolute traffic count and normalized traffic count of every skill usage per customer. Neither of them considers the network based structure for interactions between customers and skills, which contain richer information for customer preferences. In this work, we first build a heterogeneous edge attributed graph based customers' past interactions with the invoked skills, in which the user requests (utterances) are modeled as edges. Then we propose a graph convolutional network(GCN) based model, namely Personalized Dynamic Routing Feature Encoder(PDRFE), that generates personalized customer representations learned from the built graph. Compared with existing models, PDRFE is able to further capture contextual information in the graph convolutional function. The performance of our proposed model is evaluated by a downstream task, defect prediction, that predicts the defect label from the learned embeddings of customers and their triggered skills. We observe up to 41% improvements on the cross entropy metric for our proposed models compared to the baselines.
summary: Generating representations that precisely reflect customers' behavior is an important task for providing personalized skill routing experience in Alexa. Currently, Dynamic Routing (DR) team, which is responsible for routing Alexa traffic to providers or skills, relies on two features to be served as personal signals: absolute traffic count and normalized traffic count of every skill usage per customer. Neither of them considers the network based structure for interactions between customers and skills, which contain richer information for customer preferences. In this work, we first build a heterogeneous edge attributed graph based customers' past interactions with the invoked skills, in which the user requests (utterances) are modeled as edges. Then we propose a graph convolutional network(GCN) based model, namely Personalized Dynamic Routing Feature Encoder(PDRFE), that generates personalized customer representations learned from the built graph. Compared with existing models, PDRFE is able to further capture contextual information in the graph convolutional function. The performance of our proposed model is evaluated by a downstream task, defect prediction, that predicts the defect label from the learned embeddings of customers and their triggered skills. We observe up to 41% improvements on the cross entropy metric for our proposed models compared to the baselines.
abstract_zh: 生成准确反映客户行为的表示是在 Alexa 中提供个性化技能路由体验的一项重要任务。目前，负责将 Alexa 流量路由到提供商或技能的动态路由 (DR) 团队依赖两个功能作为个人信号：绝对流量计数和每个客户的每种技能使用的标准化流量计数。他们都没有考虑客户和技能之间交互的基于网络的结构，其中包含更丰富的客户偏好信息。在这项工作中，我们首先构建一个基于客户过去与调用技能的交互的异构边缘属性图，其中用户请求（话语）被建模为边缘。然后，我们提出了一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的模型，即个性化动态路由特征编码器（PDRFE），它生成从构建的图中学习的个性化客户表示。与现有模型相比，PDRFE能够进一步捕获图卷积函数中的上下文信息。我们提出的模型的性能通过下游任务（缺陷预测）进行评估，该任务根据学习到的客户嵌入及其触发的技能来预测缺陷标签。与基线相比，我们观察到我们提出的模型的交叉熵度量提高了 41%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的模型PDRFE，通过构建用户与技能交互的异构边属性图，生成更精确的个性化客户表示，以提升Alexa动态路由任务的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有动态路由系统仅依赖绝对流量计数和归一化流量计数作为用户特征，未能利用用户与技能之间复杂的网络交互结构，导致客户偏好信息表达不充分。
AI.method: 构建以用户请求（语句）为边的异构边属性图，设计基于图卷积网络的PDRFE模型，通过图卷积函数捕捉节点（用户）的上下文信息，生成个性化客户嵌入表示。
AI.result: 在缺陷预测任务中，PDRFE模型的交叉熵指标相比基线模型提升最高达41%。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模用户-技能交互图结构并引入图卷积网络，能够更有效捕捉客户行为的上下文信息，显著提升下游任务性能。

search_text: Learning Personalized Representations using Graph Convolutional Network 使用图卷积网络学习个性化表示 Generating representations that precisely reflect customers' behavior is an important task for providing personalized skill routing experience in Alexa. Currently, Dynamic Routing (DR) team, which is responsible for routing Alexa traffic to providers or skills, relies on two features to be served as personal signals: absolute traffic count and normalized traffic count of every skill usage per customer. Neither of them considers the network based structure for interactions between customers and skills, which contain richer information for customer preferences. In this work, we first build a heterogeneous edge attributed graph based customers' past interactions with the invoked skills, in which the user requests (utterances) are modeled as edges. Then we propose a graph convolutional network(GCN) based model, namely Personalized Dynamic Routing Feature Encoder(PDRFE), that generates personalized customer representations learned from the built graph. Compared with existing models, PDRFE is able to further capture contextual information in the graph convolutional function. The performance of our proposed model is evaluated by a downstream task, defect prediction, that predicts the defect label from the learned embeddings of customers and their triggered skills. We observe up to 41% improvements on the cross entropy metric for our proposed models compared to the baselines. 生成准确反映客户行为的表示是在 Alexa 中提供个性化技能路由体验的一项重要任务。目前，负责将 Alexa 流量路由到提供商或技能的动态路由 (DR) 团队依赖两个功能作为个人信号：绝对流量计数和每个客户的每种技能使用的标准化流量计数。他们都没有考虑客户和技能之间交互的基于网络的结构，其中包含更丰富的客户偏好信息。在这项工作中，我们首先构建一个基于客户过去与调用技能的交互的异构边缘属性图，其中用户请求（话语）被建模为边缘。然后，我们提出了一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的模型，即个性化动态路由特征编码器（PDRFE），它生成从构建的图中学习的个性化客户表示。与现有模型相比，PDRFE能够进一步捕获图卷积函数中的上下文信息。我们提出的模型的性能通过下游任务（缺陷预测）进行评估，该任务根据学习到的客户嵌入及其触发的技能来预测缺陷标签。与基线相比，我们观察到我们提出的模型的交叉熵度量提高了 41%。 本文提出一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的模型PDRFE，通过构建用户与技能交互的异构边属性图，生成更精确的个性化客户表示，以提升Alexa动态路由任务的效果。 Hongyu Shen,Jinoh Oh,Shuai Zhao,Guoyin Wang,Tara Taghavi,Sungjin Lee cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Tiffany J. Callahan,Adrianne L. Stefanski,Jin-Dong Kim,William A. Baumgartner Jr.,Jordan M. Wyrwa,Lawrence E. Hunter
title: Knowledge-Driven Mechanistic Enrichment of the Preeclampsia Ignorome
title_zh: 先兆子痫忽视的知识驱动机制丰富
comment: Preprint of an article submitted for consideration in Pacific Symposium on Biocomputing ©2022 copyright World Scientific Publishing Company https://psb.stanford.edu/
comments: Preprint of an article submitted for consideration in Pacific Symposium on Biocomputing ©2022 copyright World Scientific Publishing Company https://psb.stanford.edu/
abstract: Preeclampsia is a leading cause of maternal and fetal morbidity and mortality. Currently, the only definitive treatment of preeclampsia is delivery of the placenta, which is central to the pathogenesis of the disease. Transcriptional profiling of human placenta from pregnancies complicated by preeclampsia has been extensively performed to identify differentially expressed genes (DEGs). The decisions to investigate DEGs experimentally are biased by many factors, causing many DEGs to remain uninvestigated. A set of DEGs which are associated with a disease experimentally, but which have no known association to the disease in the literature are known as the ignorome. Preeclampsia has an extensive body of scientific literature, a large pool of DEG data, and only one definitive treatment. Tools facilitating knowledge-based analyses, which are capable of combining disparate data from many sources in order to suggest underlying mechanisms of action, may be a valuable resource to support discovery and improve our understanding of this disease. In this work we demonstrate how a biomedical knowledge graph (KG) can be used to identify novel preeclampsia molecular mechanisms. Existing open source biomedical resources and publicly available high-throughput transcriptional profiling data were used to identify and annotate the function of currently uninvestigated preeclampsia-associated DEGs. Experimentally investigated genes associated with preeclampsia were identified from PubMed abstracts using text-mining methodologies. The relative complement of the text-mined- and meta-analysis-derived lists were identified as the uninvestigated preeclampsia-associated DEGs (n=445), i.e., the preeclampsia ignorome. Using the KG to investigate relevant DEGs revealed 53 novel clinically relevant and biologically actionable mechanistic associations.
summary: Preeclampsia is a leading cause of maternal and fetal morbidity and mortality. Currently, the only definitive treatment of preeclampsia is delivery of the placenta, which is central to the pathogenesis of the disease. Transcriptional profiling of human placenta from pregnancies complicated by preeclampsia has been extensively performed to identify differentially expressed genes (DEGs). The decisions to investigate DEGs experimentally are biased by many factors, causing many DEGs to remain uninvestigated. A set of DEGs which are associated with a disease experimentally, but which have no known association to the disease in the literature are known as the ignorome. Preeclampsia has an extensive body of scientific literature, a large pool of DEG data, and only one definitive treatment. Tools facilitating knowledge-based analyses, which are capable of combining disparate data from many sources in order to suggest underlying mechanisms of action, may be a valuable resource to support discovery and improve our understanding of this disease. In this work we demonstrate how a biomedical knowledge graph (KG) can be used to identify novel preeclampsia molecular mechanisms. Existing open source biomedical resources and publicly available high-throughput transcriptional profiling data were used to identify and annotate the function of currently uninvestigated preeclampsia-associated DEGs. Experimentally investigated genes associated with preeclampsia were identified from PubMed abstracts using text-mining methodologies. The relative complement of the text-mined- and meta-analysis-derived lists were identified as the uninvestigated preeclampsia-associated DEGs (n=445), i.e., the preeclampsia ignorome. Using the KG to investigate relevant DEGs revealed 53 novel clinically relevant and biologically actionable mechanistic associations.
abstract_zh: 先兆子痫是孕产妇和胎儿发病和死亡的主要原因。目前，先兆子痫唯一确定的治疗方法是胎盘分娩，这对于该疾病的发病机制至关重要。已广泛对妊娠合并先兆子痫的人胎盘进行转录分析，以鉴定差异表达基因 (DEG)。对 DEG 进行实验研究的决定受到许多因素的影响，导致许多 DEG 仍未得到研究。一组在实验上与疾病相关但在文献中与该疾病没有已知关联的 DEG 被称为忽略组。先兆子痫有大量的科学文献、大量的 DEG 数据，并且只有一种确定的治疗方法。促进基于知识的分析的工具能够结合来自许多来源的不同数据，以提出潜在的作用机制，可能是支持发现和提高我们对这种疾病的理解的宝贵资源。在这项工作中，我们演示了如何使用生物医学知识图（KG）来识别新的先兆子痫分子机制。现有的开源生物医学资源和公开的高通量转录分析数据被用来识别和注释当前未研究的先兆子痫相关 DEG 的功能。使用文本挖掘方法从 PubMed 摘要中鉴定出经过实验研究的与先兆子痫相关的基因。文本挖掘和荟萃分析得出的列表的相对补充被确定为未经调查的先兆子痫相关 DEG (n=445)，即先兆子痫忽略组。使用 KG 调查相关 DEG 揭示了 53 个新颖的临床相关且生物学上可操作的机制关联。

AI.tldr: 本文利用生物医学知识图谱识别子痫前期未被研究的差异表达基因（DEGs）中的新型分子机制。
AI.motivation: 子痫前期缺乏有效治疗手段，现有研究因偏差导致大量DEGs未被深入探究，需通过知识驱动方法挖掘潜在机制。
AI.method: 整合公开生物医学资源、转录组数据及文献挖掘结果，构建知识图谱分析未被验证的DEGs（即子痫前期ignorome），揭示其潜在机制。
AI.result: 识别出53个具有临床意义和生物学作用的新型子痫前期分子机制关联。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱方法可有效补充传统研究不足，为子痫前期机制研究提供新方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文利用生物医学知识图谱识别子痫前期未被研究的差异表达基因（DEGs）中的新型分子机制。

authors_text: Tianyu Wang,Mandar M. Sohoni,Logan G. Wright,Martin M. Stein,Shi-Yuan Ma,Tatsuhiro Onodera,Maxwell G. Anderson,Peter L. McMahon
title: Image sensing with multilayer, nonlinear optical neural networks
title_zh: 使用多层非线性光学神经网络进行图像传感
abstract: Optical imaging is commonly used for both scientific and technological applications across industry and academia. In image sensing, a measurement, such as of an object's position, is performed by computational analysis of a digitized image. An emerging image-sensing paradigm breaks this delineation between data collection and analysis by designing optical components to perform not imaging, but encoding. By optically encoding images into a compressed, low-dimensional latent space suitable for efficient post-analysis, these image sensors can operate with fewer pixels and fewer photons, allowing higher-throughput, lower-latency operation. Optical neural networks (ONNs) offer a platform for processing data in the analog, optical domain. ONN-based sensors have however been limited to linear processing, but nonlinearity is a prerequisite for depth, and multilayer NNs significantly outperform shallow NNs on many tasks. Here, we realize a multilayer ONN pre-processor for image sensing, using a commercial image intensifier as a parallel optoelectronic, optical-to-optical nonlinear activation function. We demonstrate that the nonlinear ONN pre-processor can achieve compression ratios of up to 800:1 while still enabling high accuracy across several representative computer-vision tasks, including machine-vision benchmarks, flow-cytometry image classification, and identification of objects in real scenes. In all cases we find that the ONN's nonlinearity and depth allowed it to outperform a purely linear ONN encoder. Although our experiments are specialized to ONN sensors for incoherent-light images, alternative ONN platforms should facilitate a range of ONN sensors. These ONN sensors may surpass conventional sensors by pre-processing optical information in spatial, temporal, and/or spectral dimensions, potentially with coherent and quantum qualities, all natively in the optical domain.
summary: Optical imaging is commonly used for both scientific and technological applications across industry and academia. In image sensing, a measurement, such as of an object's position, is performed by computational analysis of a digitized image. An emerging image-sensing paradigm breaks this delineation between data collection and analysis by designing optical components to perform not imaging, but encoding. By optically encoding images into a compressed, low-dimensional latent space suitable for efficient post-analysis, these image sensors can operate with fewer pixels and fewer photons, allowing higher-throughput, lower-latency operation. Optical neural networks (ONNs) offer a platform for processing data in the analog, optical domain. ONN-based sensors have however been limited to linear processing, but nonlinearity is a prerequisite for depth, and multilayer NNs significantly outperform shallow NNs on many tasks. Here, we realize a multilayer ONN pre-processor for image sensing, using a commercial image intensifier as a parallel optoelectronic, optical-to-optical nonlinear activation function. We demonstrate that the nonlinear ONN pre-processor can achieve compression ratios of up to 800:1 while still enabling high accuracy across several representative computer-vision tasks, including machine-vision benchmarks, flow-cytometry image classification, and identification of objects in real scenes. In all cases we find that the ONN's nonlinearity and depth allowed it to outperform a purely linear ONN encoder. Although our experiments are specialized to ONN sensors for incoherent-light images, alternative ONN platforms should facilitate a range of ONN sensors. These ONN sensors may surpass conventional sensors by pre-processing optical information in spatial, temporal, and/or spectral dimensions, potentially with coherent and quantum qualities, all natively in the optical domain.
abstract_zh: 光学成像通常用于工业界和学术界的科学和技术应用。在图像传感中，诸如物体位置的测量是通过数字化图像的计算分析来执行的。新兴的图像传感范例通过设计光学组件来执行编码而不是成像，从而打破了数据收集和分析之间的界限。通过将图像光学编码到适合高效后期分析的压缩低维潜在空间中，这些图像传感器可以使用更少的像素和更少的光子进行操作，从而实现更高吞吐量、更低延迟的操作。光神经网络 (ONN) 提供了一个处理模拟光域数据的平台。然而，基于 ONN 的传感器仅限于线性处理，但非线性是深度的先决条件，并且多层神经网络在许多任务上显着优于浅层神经网络。在这里，我们实现了用于图像传感的多层 ONN 预处理器，使用商用图像增强器作为并行光电、光到光非线性激活函数。我们证明，非线性 ONN 预处理器可以实现高达 800:1 的压缩比，同时仍然能够在多个代表性计算机视觉任务中实现高精度，包括机器视觉基准、流式细胞术图像分类和真实场景中的对象识别。在所有情况下，我们发现 ONN 的非线性和深度使其优于纯线性 ONN 编码器。尽管我们的实验专门针对非相干光图像的 ONN 传感器，但替代 ONN 平台应该可以支持一系列 ONN 传感器。这些 ONN 传感器可能会通过在空间、时间和/或光谱维度上预处理光学信息来超越传统传感器，并可能具有相干和量子质量，所有这些都原生在光域中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多层非线性光学神经网络（ONN）的图像传感预处理器，通过光学编码实现高效图像压缩与高精度识别。
AI.motivation: 传统图像传感依赖数字化分析，存在像素和光子数量需求高的问题。现有ONN传感器仅支持线性处理，缺乏深度学习所需的非线性特性，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 利用商用图像增强器作为光学非线性激活函数，构建多层ONN预处理器，实现图像在光学域的压缩编码与特征提取。
AI.result: 在800:1压缩比下，该非线性ONN在机器视觉基准测试、流式细胞术图像分类及真实场景目标识别任务中均优于线性ONN，准确率保持高位。
AI.conclusion: 非线性多层ONN传感器通过光学域预处理，可在空间、时间及光谱维度超越传统传感器，未来可拓展至相干光与量子光学领域。

search_text: Image sensing with multilayer, nonlinear optical neural networks 使用多层非线性光学神经网络进行图像传感 Optical imaging is commonly used for both scientific and technological applications across industry and academia. In image sensing, a measurement, such as of an object's position, is performed by computational analysis of a digitized image. An emerging image-sensing paradigm breaks this delineation between data collection and analysis by designing optical components to perform not imaging, but encoding. By optically encoding images into a compressed, low-dimensional latent space suitable for efficient post-analysis, these image sensors can operate with fewer pixels and fewer photons, allowing higher-throughput, lower-latency operation. Optical neural networks (ONNs) offer a platform for processing data in the analog, optical domain. ONN-based sensors have however been limited to linear processing, but nonlinearity is a prerequisite for depth, and multilayer NNs significantly outperform shallow NNs on many tasks. Here, we realize a multilayer ONN pre-processor for image sensing, using a commercial image intensifier as a parallel optoelectronic, optical-to-optical nonlinear activation function. We demonstrate that the nonlinear ONN pre-processor can achieve compression ratios of up to 800:1 while still enabling high accuracy across several representative computer-vision tasks, including machine-vision benchmarks, flow-cytometry image classification, and identification of objects in real scenes. In all cases we find that the ONN's nonlinearity and depth allowed it to outperform a purely linear ONN encoder. Although our experiments are specialized to ONN sensors for incoherent-light images, alternative ONN platforms should facilitate a range of ONN sensors. These ONN sensors may surpass conventional sensors by pre-processing optical information in spatial, temporal, and/or spectral dimensions, potentially with coherent and quantum qualities, all natively in the optical domain. 光学成像通常用于工业界和学术界的科学和技术应用。在图像传感中，诸如物体位置的测量是通过数字化图像的计算分析来执行的。新兴的图像传感范例通过设计光学组件来执行编码而不是成像，从而打破了数据收集和分析之间的界限。通过将图像光学编码到适合高效后期分析的压缩低维潜在空间中，这些图像传感器可以使用更少的像素和更少的光子进行操作，从而实现更高吞吐量、更低延迟的操作。光神经网络 (ONN) 提供了一个处理模拟光域数据的平台。然而，基于 ONN 的传感器仅限于线性处理，但非线性是深度的先决条件，并且多层神经网络在许多任务上显着优于浅层神经网络。在这里，我们实现了用于图像传感的多层 ONN 预处理器，使用商用图像增强器作为并行光电、光到光非线性激活函数。我们证明，非线性 ONN 预处理器可以实现高达 800:1 的压缩比，同时仍然能够在多个代表性计算机视觉任务中实现高精度，包括机器视觉基准、流式细胞术图像分类和真实场景中的对象识别。在所有情况下，我们发现 ONN 的非线性和深度使其优于纯线性 ONN 编码器。尽管我们的实验专门针对非相干光图像的 ONN 传感器，但替代 ONN 平台应该可以支持一系列 ONN 传感器。这些 ONN 传感器可能会通过在空间、时间和/或光谱维度上预处理光学信息来超越传统传感器，并可能具有相干和量子质量，所有这些都原生在光域中。 本文提出一种基于多层非线性光学神经网络（ONN）的图像传感预处理器，通过光学编码实现高效图像压缩与高精度识别。 Tianyu Wang,Mandar M. Sohoni,Logan G. Wright,Martin M. Stein,Shi-Yuan Ma,Tatsuhiro Onodera,Maxwell G. Anderson,Peter L. McMahon physics.optics,cs.ET,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiaoming Zhao,Zhizhen Zhao,Alexander G. Schwing
title: Initialization and Alignment for Adversarial Texture Optimization
title_zh: 对抗性纹理优化的初始化和对齐
abstract: While recovery of geometry from image and video data has received a lot of attention in computer vision, methods to capture the texture for a given geometry are less mature. Specifically, classical methods for texture generation often assume clean geometry and reasonably well-aligned image data. While very recent methods, e.g., adversarial texture optimization, better handle lower-quality data obtained from hand-held devices, we find them to still struggle frequently. To improve robustness, particularly of recent adversarial texture optimization, we develop an explicit initialization and an alignment procedure. It deals with complex geometry due to a robust mapping of the geometry to the texture map and a hard-assignment-based initialization. It deals with misalignment of geometry and images by integrating fast image-alignment into the texture refinement optimization. We demonstrate efficacy of our texture generation on a dataset of 11 scenes with a total of 2807 frames, observing 7.8% and 11.1% relative improvements regarding perceptual and sharpness measurements.
summary: While recovery of geometry from image and video data has received a lot of attention in computer vision, methods to capture the texture for a given geometry are less mature. Specifically, classical methods for texture generation often assume clean geometry and reasonably well-aligned image data. While very recent methods, e.g., adversarial texture optimization, better handle lower-quality data obtained from hand-held devices, we find them to still struggle frequently. To improve robustness, particularly of recent adversarial texture optimization, we develop an explicit initialization and an alignment procedure. It deals with complex geometry due to a robust mapping of the geometry to the texture map and a hard-assignment-based initialization. It deals with misalignment of geometry and images by integrating fast image-alignment into the texture refinement optimization. We demonstrate efficacy of our texture generation on a dataset of 11 scenes with a total of 2807 frames, observing 7.8% and 11.1% relative improvements regarding perceptual and sharpness measurements.
abstract_zh: 虽然从图像和视频数据恢复几何图形在计算机视觉领域受到了广泛关注，但捕获给定几何图形纹理的方法还不太成熟。具体来说，纹理生成的经典方法通常假设干净的几何形状和合理对齐的图像数据。虽然最近的方法（例如对抗性纹理优化）可以更好地处理从手持设备获得的低质量数据，但我们发现它们仍然经常陷入困境。为了提高鲁棒性，特别是最近的对抗性纹理优化，我们开发了显式初始化和对齐程序。由于几何图形到纹理图的稳健映射以及基于硬分配的初始化，它可以处理复杂的几何图形。它通过将快速图像对齐集成到纹理细化优化中来处理几何和图像的错位。我们在包含 11 个场景、总共 2807 帧的数据集上展示了纹理生成的功效，观察到感知和清晰度测量方面相对提高了 7.8% 和 11.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进对抗纹理优化方法的初始化与对齐技术，以提升复杂几何和图像对齐场景下的纹理生成鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 经典纹理生成方法依赖高质量几何和对齐图像，而现有对抗纹理优化在处理低质量数据时仍存在鲁棒性不足的问题。
AI.method: 通过鲁棒几何到纹理映射与硬分配初始化处理复杂几何，结合快速图像对齐技术优化纹理 refinement 过程。
AI.result: 在包含2807帧的11场景数据集上，感知质量提升7.8%，锐度指标提升11.1%。
AI.conclusion: 显式初始化与对齐策略有效增强了对抗纹理优化在复杂几何和图像失配场景下的性能表现。

authors_text: Sheng-Yu Wang,David Bau,Jun-Yan Zhu
title: Rewriting Geometric Rules of a GAN
title_zh: 重写 GAN 的几何规则
abstract: Deep generative models make visual content creation more accessible to novice users by automating the synthesis of diverse, realistic content based on a collected dataset. However, the current machine learning approaches miss a key element of the creative process -- the ability to synthesize things that go far beyond the data distribution and everyday experience. To begin to address this issue, we enable a user to "warp" a given model by editing just a handful of original model outputs with desired geometric changes. Our method applies a low-rank update to a single model layer to reconstruct edited examples. Furthermore, to combat overfitting, we propose a latent space augmentation method based on style-mixing. Our method allows a user to create a model that synthesizes endless objects with defined geometric changes, enabling the creation of a new generative model without the burden of curating a large-scale dataset. We also demonstrate that edited models can be composed to achieve aggregated effects, and we present an interactive interface to enable users to create new models through composition. Empirical measurements on multiple test cases suggest the advantage of our method against recent GAN fine-tuning methods. Finally, we showcase several applications using the edited models, including latent space interpolation and image editing.
summary: Deep generative models make visual content creation more accessible to novice users by automating the synthesis of diverse, realistic content based on a collected dataset. However, the current machine learning approaches miss a key element of the creative process -- the ability to synthesize things that go far beyond the data distribution and everyday experience. To begin to address this issue, we enable a user to "warp" a given model by editing just a handful of original model outputs with desired geometric changes. Our method applies a low-rank update to a single model layer to reconstruct edited examples. Furthermore, to combat overfitting, we propose a latent space augmentation method based on style-mixing. Our method allows a user to create a model that synthesizes endless objects with defined geometric changes, enabling the creation of a new generative model without the burden of curating a large-scale dataset. We also demonstrate that edited models can be composed to achieve aggregated effects, and we present an interactive interface to enable users to create new models through composition. Empirical measurements on multiple test cases suggest the advantage of our method against recent GAN fine-tuning methods. Finally, we showcase several applications using the edited models, including latent space interpolation and image editing.
abstract_zh: 深度生成模型通过基于收集的数据集自动合成多样化、真实的内容，使新手用户更容易创建视觉内容。然而，当前的机器学习方法忽略了创意过程的一个关键要素——综合远远超出数据分布和日常经验的事物的能力。为了开始解决这个问题，我们允许用户通过编辑少数具有所需几何变化的原始模型输出来“扭曲”给定模型。我们的方法对单个模型层应用低秩更新来重建编辑后的示例。此外，为了防止过度拟合，我们提出了一种基于风格混合的潜在空间增强方法。我们的方法允许用户创建一个模型，该模型可以合成具有定义的几何变化的无尽对象，从而能够创建新的生成模型，而无需管理大型数据集的负担。我们还演示了编辑后的模型可以组合以实现聚合效果，并且我们提供了一个交互式界面，使用户能够通过组合创建新模型。对多个测试用例的经验测量表明，我们的方法相对于最近的 GAN 微调方法具有优势。最后，我们展示了使用编辑后的模型的几个应用程序，包括潜在空间插值和图像编辑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过编辑GAN模型的几何规则，生成超出原始数据分布的新内容的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN模型难以生成超出训练数据分布和日常经验的视觉内容，缺乏对几何规则的灵活控制能力。
AI.method: 通过低秩更新单层模型实现几何修改，结合风格混合的潜在空间增强方法防止过拟合，并提供交互式界面支持模型组合。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法优于近期GAN微调技术，成功应用于潜在空间插值、图像编辑等场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法使用户无需大规模数据集即可创建具有定制几何特性的生成模型，具有灵活性和实用性。

search_text: Rewriting Geometric Rules of a GAN 重写 GAN 的几何规则 Deep generative models make visual content creation more accessible to novice users by automating the synthesis of diverse, realistic content based on a collected dataset. However, the current machine learning approaches miss a key element of the creative process -- the ability to synthesize things that go far beyond the data distribution and everyday experience. To begin to address this issue, we enable a user to "warp" a given model by editing just a handful of original model outputs with desired geometric changes. Our method applies a low-rank update to a single model layer to reconstruct edited examples. Furthermore, to combat overfitting, we propose a latent space augmentation method based on style-mixing. Our method allows a user to create a model that synthesizes endless objects with defined geometric changes, enabling the creation of a new generative model without the burden of curating a large-scale dataset. We also demonstrate that edited models can be composed to achieve aggregated effects, and we present an interactive interface to enable users to create new models through composition. Empirical measurements on multiple test cases suggest the advantage of our method against recent GAN fine-tuning methods. Finally, we showcase several applications using the edited models, including latent space interpolation and image editing. 深度生成模型通过基于收集的数据集自动合成多样化、真实的内容，使新手用户更容易创建视觉内容。然而，当前的机器学习方法忽略了创意过程的一个关键要素——综合远远超出数据分布和日常经验的事物的能力。为了开始解决这个问题，我们允许用户通过编辑少数具有所需几何变化的原始模型输出来“扭曲”给定模型。我们的方法对单个模型层应用低秩更新来重建编辑后的示例。此外，为了防止过度拟合，我们提出了一种基于风格混合的潜在空间增强方法。我们的方法允许用户创建一个模型，该模型可以合成具有定义的几何变化的无尽对象，从而能够创建新的生成模型，而无需管理大型数据集的负担。我们还演示了编辑后的模型可以组合以实现聚合效果，并且我们提供了一个交互式界面，使用户能够通过组合创建新模型。对多个测试用例的经验测量表明，我们的方法相对于最近的 GAN 微调方法具有优势。最后，我们展示了使用编辑后的模型的几个应用程序，包括潜在空间插值和图像编辑。 本文提出一种通过编辑GAN模型的几何规则，生成超出原始数据分布的新内容的方法。 Sheng-Yu Wang,David Bau,Jun-Yan Zhu cs.CV

authors_text: Vitor Guizilini,Igor Vasiljevic,Jiading Fang,Rares Ambrus,Greg Shakhnarovich,Matthew Walter,Adrien Gaidon
title: Depth Field Networks for Generalizable Multi-view Scene Representation
title_zh: 用于泛化多视图场景表示的深度场网络
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/tri-define
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/tri-define
abstract: Modern 3D computer vision leverages learning to boost geometric reasoning, mapping image data to classical structures such as cost volumes or epipolar constraints to improve matching. These architectures are specialized according to the particular problem, and thus require significant task-specific tuning, often leading to poor domain generalization performance. Recently, generalist Transformer architectures have achieved impressive results in tasks such as optical flow and depth estimation by encoding geometric priors as inputs rather than as enforced constraints. In this paper, we extend this idea and propose to learn an implicit, multi-view consistent scene representation, introducing a series of 3D data augmentation techniques as a geometric inductive prior to increase view diversity. We also show that introducing view synthesis as an auxiliary task further improves depth estimation. Our Depth Field Networks (DeFiNe) achieve state-of-the-art results in stereo and video depth estimation without explicit geometric constraints, and improve on zero-shot domain generalization by a wide margin.
summary: Modern 3D computer vision leverages learning to boost geometric reasoning, mapping image data to classical structures such as cost volumes or epipolar constraints to improve matching. These architectures are specialized according to the particular problem, and thus require significant task-specific tuning, often leading to poor domain generalization performance. Recently, generalist Transformer architectures have achieved impressive results in tasks such as optical flow and depth estimation by encoding geometric priors as inputs rather than as enforced constraints. In this paper, we extend this idea and propose to learn an implicit, multi-view consistent scene representation, introducing a series of 3D data augmentation techniques as a geometric inductive prior to increase view diversity. We also show that introducing view synthesis as an auxiliary task further improves depth estimation. Our Depth Field Networks (DeFiNe) achieve state-of-the-art results in stereo and video depth estimation without explicit geometric constraints, and improve on zero-shot domain generalization by a wide margin.
abstract_zh: 现代 3D 计算机视觉利用学习来促进几何推理，将图像数据映射到成本量或极线约束等经典结构，以改进匹配。这些架构根据特定问题进行专门化，因此需要大量的特定于任务的调整，通常会导致域泛化性能较差。最近，通才 Transformer 架构通过将几何先验编码为输入而不是强制约束，在光流和深度估计等任务中取得了令人印象深刻的结果。在本文中，我们扩展了这个想法，并提出学习隐式的、多视图一致的场景表示，引入一系列 3D 数据增强技术作为几何归纳先验，以增加视图多样性。 We also show that introducing view synthesis as an auxiliary task further improves depth estimation.我们的深度场网络（DeFiNe）在没有明确几何约束的情况下在立体和视频深度估计方面取得了最先进的结果，并大幅提高了零样本域泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出深度场网络（DeFiNe），通过学习隐式的多视角一致场景表示，提升立体和视频深度估计的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有3D视觉方法依赖特定任务的几何约束，导致领域泛化性能不足；通用Transformer架构通过编码几何先验可提升性能，但需进一步优化多视角一致性。
AI.method: 引入3D数据增强技术作为几何归纳先验以增加视角多样性，并将视角合成作为辅助任务，构建无需显式几何约束的深度场网络。
AI.result: 在立体和视频深度估计任务中达到SOTA性能，零样本领域泛化能力显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过隐式场景表示与多视角增强，DeFiNe实现了更通用、鲁棒的深度估计框架，为多视角几何学习提供新思路。

These architectures are specialized according to the particular problem, and thus require significant task-specific tuning, often leading to poor domain generalization performance.
