In this paper, we extend this idea and propose to learn an implicit, multi-view consistent scene representation, introducing a series of 3D data augmentation techniques as a geometric inductive prior to increase view diversity. We also show that introducing view synthesis as an auxiliary task further improves depth estimation. Our Depth Field Networks (DeFiNe) achieve state-of-the-art results in stereo and video depth estimation without explicit geometric constraints, and improve on zero-shot domain generalization by a wide margin. 现代 3D 计算机视觉利用学习来促进几何推理，将图像数据映射到成本量或极线约束等经典结构，以改进匹配。这些架构根据特定问题进行专门化，因此需要大量的特定于任务的调整，通常会导致域泛化性能较差。最近，通才 Transformer 架构通过将几何先验编码为输入而不是强制约束，在光流和深度估计等任务中取得了令人印象深刻的结果。在本文中，我们扩展了这个想法，并提出学习隐式的、多视图一致的场景表示，引入一系列 3D 数据增强技术作为几何归纳先验，以增加视图多样性。 We also show that introducing view synthesis as an auxiliary task further improves depth estimation.我们的深度场网络（DeFiNe）在没有明确几何约束的情况下在立体和视频深度估计方面取得了最先进的结果，并大幅提高了零样本域泛化能力。 本文提出深度场网络（DeFiNe），通过学习隐式的多视角一致场景表示，提升立体和视频深度估计的泛化能力。 Vitor Guizilini,Igor Vasiljevic,Jiading Fang,Rares Ambrus,Greg Shakhnarovich,Matthew Walter,Adrien Gaidon cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yongming Rao,Wenliang Zhao,Yansong Tang,Jie Zhou,Ser-Nam Lim,Jiwen Lu
title: HorNet: Efficient High-Order Spatial Interactions with Recursive Gated Convolutions
title_zh: HorNet：通过递归门控卷积实现高效的高阶空间交互
abstract: Recent progress in vision Transformers exhibits great success in various tasks driven by the new spatial modeling mechanism based on dot-product self-attention. In this paper, we show that the key ingredients behind the vision Transformers, namely input-adaptive, long-range and high-order spatial interactions, can also be efficiently implemented with a convolution-based framework. We present the Recursive Gated Convolution ($\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv) that performs high-order spatial interactions with gated convolutions and recursive designs. The new operation is highly flexible and customizable, which is compatible with various variants of convolution and extends the two-order interactions in self-attention to arbitrary orders without introducing significant extra computation. $\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv can serve as a plug-and-play module to improve various vision Transformers and convolution-based models. Based on the operation, we construct a new family of generic vision backbones named HorNet. Extensive experiments on ImageNet classification, COCO object detection and ADE20K semantic segmentation show HorNet outperform Swin Transformers and ConvNeXt by a significant margin with similar overall architecture and training configurations. HorNet also shows favorable scalability to more training data and larger model sizes. Apart from the effectiveness in visual encoders, we also show $\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv can be applied to task-specific decoders and consistently improve dense prediction performance with less computation. Our results demonstrate that $\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv can be a new basic module for visual modeling that effectively combines the merits of both vision Transformers and CNNs. Code is available at https://github.com/raoyongming/HorNet
summary: Recent progress in vision Transformers exhibits great success in various tasks driven by the new spatial modeling mechanism based on dot-product self-attention. In this paper, we show that the key ingredients behind the vision Transformers, namely input-adaptive, long-range and high-order spatial interactions, can also be efficiently implemented with a convolution-based framework. We present the Recursive Gated Convolution ($\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv) that performs high-order spatial interactions with gated convolutions and recursive designs. The new operation is highly flexible and customizable, which is compatible with various variants of convolution and extends the two-order interactions in self-attention to arbitrary orders without introducing significant extra computation. $\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv can serve as a plug-and-play module to improve various vision Transformers and convolution-based models. Based on the operation, we construct a new family of generic vision backbones named HorNet. Extensive experiments on ImageNet classification, COCO object detection and ADE20K semantic segmentation show HorNet outperform Swin Transformers and ConvNeXt by a significant margin with similar overall architecture and training configurations. HorNet also shows favorable scalability to more training data and larger model sizes. Apart from the effectiveness in visual encoders, we also show $\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv can be applied to task-specific decoders and consistently improve dense prediction performance with less computation. Our results demonstrate that $\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv can be a new basic module for visual modeling that effectively combines the merits of both vision Transformers and CNNs. Code is available at https://github.com/raoyongming/HorNet
abstract_zh: 视觉 Transformers 的最新进展在基于点积自注意力的新空间建模机制驱动的各种任务中取得了巨大成功。在本文中，我们展示了视觉 Transformer 背后的关键要素，即输入自适应、远程和高阶空间交互，也可以通过基于卷积的框架有效实现。我们提出了递归门控卷积 ($\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv)，它通过门控卷积和递归设计执行高阶空间交互。新操作具有高度灵活性和可定制性，它与卷积的各种变体兼容，并将自注意力中的二阶交互扩​​展到任意阶，而无需引入大量额外计算。 $\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv 可以作为即插即用模块来改进各种视觉 Transformer 和基于卷积的模型。基于该操作，我们构建了一个新的通用视觉主干系列，名为 HorNet。针对 ImageNet 分类、​​COCO 对象检测和 ADE20K 语义分割的大量实验表明，HorNet 在具有相似的整体架构和训练配置的情况下明显优于 Swin Transformers 和 ConvNeXt。 HorNet 还对更多训练数据和更大的模型尺寸表现出了良好的可扩展性。除了视觉编码器的有效性之外，我们还表明 $\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv 可以应用于特定于任务的解码器，并以更少的计算持续提高密集预测性能。我们的结果表明 $\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv 可以成为视觉建模的新基本模块，它有效地结合了视觉 Transformer 和 CNN 的优点。代码可在 https://github.com/raoyongming/HorNet 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出HorNet模型，通过递归门控卷积（g^nConv）实现高效的高阶空间交互，结合视觉Transformer与CNN的优势。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer虽在长距离依赖建模上表现优异，但计算成本高；传统CNN在高阶空间交互上存在局限，需探索更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 设计递归门控卷积（g^nConv），通过门控机制与递归结构实现任意阶高阶空间交互，构建HorNet模型家族作为通用视觉主干网络。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类、COCO检测和ADE20K分割任务中，HorNet相较Swin Transformer和ConvNeXt取得显著性能提升，且具备更好的可扩展性与计算效率。
AI.conclusion: g^nConv成功融合Transformer与CNN优势，为视觉建模提供高效基础模块，验证了高阶空间交互在卷积框架中的可行性。

conclusion: g^nConv成功融合Transformer与CNN优势，为视觉建模提供高效基础模块，验证了高阶空间交互在卷积框架中的可行性。
search_text: HorNet: Efficient High-Order Spatial Interactions with Recursive Gated Convolutions HorNet：通过递归门控卷积实现高效的高阶空间交互 Recent progress in vision Transformers exhibits great success in various tasks driven by the new spatial modeling mechanism based on dot-product self-attention. In this paper, we show that the key ingredients behind the vision Transformers, namely input-adaptive, long-range and high-order spatial interactions, can also be efficiently implemented with a convolution-based framework. We present the Recursive Gated Convolution ($\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv) that performs high-order spatial interactions with gated convolutions and recursive designs. The new operation is highly flexible and customizable, which is compatible with various variants of convolution and extends the two-order interactions in self-attention to arbitrary orders without introducing significant extra computation. $\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv can serve as a plug-and-play module to improve various vision Transformers and convolution-based models. Based on the operation, we construct a new family of generic vision backbones named HorNet. Extensive experiments on ImageNet classification, COCO object detection and ADE20K semantic segmentation show HorNet outperform Swin Transformers and ConvNeXt by a significant margin with similar overall architecture and training configurations. HorNet also shows favorable scalability to more training data and larger model sizes. Apart from the effectiveness in visual encoders, we also show $\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv can be applied to task-specific decoders and consistently improve dense prediction performance with less computation. Our results demonstrate that $\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv can be a new basic module for visual modeling that effectively combines the merits of both vision Transformers and CNNs. Code is available at https://github.com/raoyongming/HorNet 视觉 Transformers 的最新进展在基于点积自注意力的新空间建模机制驱动的各种任务中取得了巨大成功。在本文中，我们展示了视觉 Transformer 背后的关键要素，即输入自适应、远程和高阶空间交互，也可以通过基于卷积的框架有效实现。我们提出了递归门控卷积 ($\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv)，它通过门控卷积和递归设计执行高阶空间交互。新操作具有高度灵活性和可定制性，它与卷积的各种变体兼容，并将自注意力中的二阶交互扩​​展到任意阶，而无需引入大量额外计算。 $\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv 可以作为即插即用模块来改进各种视觉 Transformer 和基于卷积的模型。基于该操作，我们构建了一个新的通用视觉主干系列，名为 HorNet。针对 ImageNet 分类、​​COCO 对象检测和 ADE20K 语义分割的大量实验表明，HorNet 在具有相似的整体架构和训练配置的情况下明显优于 Swin Transformers 和 ConvNeXt。 HorNet 还对更多训练数据和更大的模型尺寸表现出了良好的可扩展性。除了视觉编码器的有效性之外，我们还表明 $\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv 可以应用于特定于任务的解码器，并以更少的计算持续提高密集预测性能。我们的结果表明 $\textit{g}^\textit{n}$Conv 可以成为视觉建模的新基本模块，它有效地结合了视觉 Transformer 和 CNN 的优点。代码可在 https://github.com/raoyongming/HorNet 获取 本文提出HorNet模型，通过递归门控卷积（g^nConv）实现高效的高阶空间交互，结合视觉Transformer与CNN的优势。 Yongming Rao,Wenliang Zhao,Yansong Tang,Jie Zhou,Ser-Nam Lim,Jiwen Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Georgios Pavlakos,Ethan Weber,Matthew Tancik,Angjoo Kanazawa
title: The One Where They Reconstructed 3D Humans and Environments in TV Shows
title_zh: 他们在电视节目中重建 3D 人物和环境
abstract: TV shows depict a wide variety of human behaviors and have been studied extensively for their potential to be a rich source of data for many applications. However, the majority of the existing work focuses on 2D recognition tasks. In this paper, we make the observation that there is a certain persistence in TV shows, i.e., repetition of the environments and the humans, which makes possible the 3D reconstruction of this content. Building on this insight, we propose an automatic approach that operates on an entire season of a TV show and aggregates information in 3D; we build a 3D model of the environment, compute camera information, static 3D scene structure and body scale information. Then, we demonstrate how this information acts as rich 3D context that can guide and improve the recovery of 3D human pose and position in these environments. Moreover, we show that reasoning about humans and their environment in 3D enables a broad range of downstream applications: re-identification, gaze estimation, cinematography and image editing. We apply our approach on environments from seven iconic TV shows and perform an extensive evaluation of the proposed system.
summary: TV shows depict a wide variety of human behaviors and have been studied extensively for their potential to be a rich source of data for many applications. However, the majority of the existing work focuses on 2D recognition tasks. In this paper, we make the observation that there is a certain persistence in TV shows, i.e., repetition of the environments and the humans, which makes possible the 3D reconstruction of this content. Building on this insight, we propose an automatic approach that operates on an entire season of a TV show and aggregates information in 3D; we build a 3D model of the environment, compute camera information, static 3D scene structure and body scale information. Then, we demonstrate how this information acts as rich 3D context that can guide and improve the recovery of 3D human pose and position in these environments. Moreover, we show that reasoning about humans and their environment in 3D enables a broad range of downstream applications: re-identification, gaze estimation, cinematography and image editing. We apply our approach on environments from seven iconic TV shows and perform an extensive evaluation of the proposed system.
abstract_zh: 电视节目描绘了各种各样的人类行为，并且因其成为许多应用的丰富数据源的潜力而被广泛研究。然而，现有的大部分工作都集中在 2D 识别任务上。在本文中，我们观察到电视节目中存在一定的持久性，即环境和人类的重复，这使得该内容的 3D 重建成为可能。基于这一见解，我们提出了一种自动方法，可对电视节目的整个季节进行操作并聚合 3D 信息；我们构建环境的 3D 模型，计算摄像机信息、静态 3D 场景结构和身体比例信息。然后，我们演示这些信息如何作为丰富的 3D 上下文来指导和改进这些环境中 3D 人体姿势和位置的恢复。此外，我们还表明，以 3D 方式推理人类及其环境可以实现广泛的下游应用：重新识别、注视估计、电影摄影和图像编辑。我们将我们的方法应用于七个标志性电视节目的环境，并对提议的系统进行了广泛的评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从电视剧中重建3D人类和环境的方法，利用场景和人物的重复性特征进行3D建模。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于2D识别任务，而电视剧中环境与人物的重复性为3D重建提供了可能性，可提升姿态估计等下游应用效果。
AI.method: 通过处理整季电视剧，聚合3D信息构建环境模型，计算相机参数、静态场景结构及人体尺度，并利用这些信息指导3D人体姿态和位置恢复。
AI.result: 在七部经典电视剧环境中验证了方法有效性，系统评估显示其能显著提升3D重建精度及下游任务表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过挖掘电视剧的重复性特征，实现了高质量的3D重建，为影视内容分析与编辑提供了新工具。

authors_text: Chongyi Li,Chunle Guo,Ruicheng Feng,Shangchen Zhou,Chen Change Loy
title: CuDi: Curve Distillation for Efficient and Controllable Exposure Adjustment
title_zh: CuDi：曲线蒸馏，实现高效可控的曝光调整
abstract: We present Curve Distillation, CuDi, for efficient and controllable exposure adjustment without the requirement of paired or unpaired data during training. Our method inherits the zero-reference learning and curve-based framework from an effective low-light image enhancement method, Zero-DCE, with further speed up in its inference speed, reduction in its model size, and extension to controllable exposure adjustment. The improved inference speed and lightweight model are achieved through novel curve distillation that approximates the time-consuming iterative operation in the conventional curve-based framework by high-order curve's tangent line. The controllable exposure adjustment is made possible with a new self-supervised spatial exposure control loss that constrains the exposure levels of different spatial regions of the output to be close to the brightness distribution of an exposure map serving as an input condition. Different from most existing methods that can only correct either underexposed or overexposed photos, our approach corrects both underexposed and overexposed photos with a single model. Notably, our approach can additionally adjust the exposure levels of a photo globally or locally with the guidance of an input condition exposure map, which can be pre-defined or manually set in the inference stage. Through extensive experiments, we show that our method is appealing for its fast, robust, and flexible performance, outperforming state-of-the-art methods in real scenes. Project page: https://li-chongyi.github.io/CuDi_files/.
summary: We present Curve Distillation, CuDi, for efficient and controllable exposure adjustment without the requirement of paired or unpaired data during training. Our method inherits the zero-reference learning and curve-based framework from an effective low-light image enhancement method, Zero-DCE, with further speed up in its inference speed, reduction in its model size, and extension to controllable exposure adjustment. The improved inference speed and lightweight model are achieved through novel curve distillation that approximates the time-consuming iterative operation in the conventional curve-based framework by high-order curve's tangent line. The controllable exposure adjustment is made possible with a new self-supervised spatial exposure control loss that constrains the exposure levels of different spatial regions of the output to be close to the brightness distribution of an exposure map serving as an input condition. Different from most existing methods that can only correct either underexposed or overexposed photos, our approach corrects both underexposed and overexposed photos with a single model. Notably, our approach can additionally adjust the exposure levels of a photo globally or locally with the guidance of an input condition exposure map, which can be pre-defined or manually set in the inference stage. Through extensive experiments, we show that our method is appealing for its fast, robust, and flexible performance, outperforming state-of-the-art methods in real scenes. Project page: https://li-chongyi.github.io/CuDi_files/.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了曲线蒸馏（CuDi），用于高效且可控的曝光调整，而无需在训练期间使用配对或不配对的数据。我们的方法继承了有效的低光图像增强方法 Zero-DCE 的零参考学习和基于曲线的框架，进一步加快了推理速度，减小了模型尺寸，并扩展到可控曝光调整。通过新颖的曲线蒸馏实现了推理速度的提高和轻量级模型，该曲线蒸馏通过高阶曲线的切线来近似传统基于曲线的框架中耗时的迭代操作。通过新的自监督空间曝光控制损失使可控曝光调整成为可能，该损失将输出的不同空间区域的曝光水平限制为接近用作输入条件的曝光图的亮度分布。与大多数只能校正曝光不足或曝光过度的照片的现有方法不同，我们的方法可以使用单个模型校正曝光不足和曝光过度的照片。值得注意的是，我们的方法还可以在输入条件曝光图的指导下全局或局部调整照片的曝光级别，该输入条件曝光图可以在推理阶段预先定义或手动设置。通过大量的实验，我们表明我们的方法因其快速、稳健和灵活的性能而具有吸引力，在实际场景中优于最先进的方法。项目页面：https://li-chongyi.github.io/CuDi_files/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CuDi方法，实现无需配对数据的高效可控曝光调整。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需依赖配对数据或仅能修正单一曝光问题，且模型效率不足。
AI.method: 基于Zero-DCE框架，通过曲线蒸馏加速推理并减小模型，引入自监督空间曝光控制损失实现可控调整。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在真实场景中优于现有技术，兼具快速、鲁棒与灵活性。
AI.conclusion: CuDi为单模型同时处理欠曝/过曝问题提供高效可控解决方案，适用于实际应用。

authors_text: Michaël Ramamonjisoa,Sinisa Stekovic,Vincent Lepetit
title: MonteBoxFinder: Detecting and Filtering Primitives to Fit a Noisy Point Cloud
title_zh: MonteBoxFinder：检测和过滤基元以适应噪声点云
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2022. Project page: https://michaelramamonjisoa.github.io/projects/MonteBoxFinder, Code: https://github.com/MichaelRamamonjisoa/MonteBoxFinder
comments: Accepted at ECCV 2022. Project page: https://michaelramamonjisoa.github.io/projects/MonteBoxFinder, Code: https://github.com/MichaelRamamonjisoa/MonteBoxFinder
abstract: We present MonteBoxFinder, a method that, given a noisy input point cloud, fits cuboids to the input scene. Our primary contribution is a discrete optimization algorithm that, from a dense set of initially detected cuboids, is able to efficiently filter good boxes from the noisy ones. Inspired by recent applications of MCTS to scene understanding problems, we develop a stochastic algorithm that is, by design, more efficient for our task. Indeed, the quality of a fit for a cuboid arrangement is invariant to the order in which the cuboids are added into the scene. We develop several search baselines for our problem and demonstrate, on the ScanNet dataset, that our approach is more efficient and precise. Finally, we strongly believe that our core algorithm is very general and that it could be extended to many other problems in 3D scene understanding.
summary: We present MonteBoxFinder, a method that, given a noisy input point cloud, fits cuboids to the input scene. Our primary contribution is a discrete optimization algorithm that, from a dense set of initially detected cuboids, is able to efficiently filter good boxes from the noisy ones. Inspired by recent applications of MCTS to scene understanding problems, we develop a stochastic algorithm that is, by design, more efficient for our task. Indeed, the quality of a fit for a cuboid arrangement is invariant to the order in which the cuboids are added into the scene. We develop several search baselines for our problem and demonstrate, on the ScanNet dataset, that our approach is more efficient and precise. Finally, we strongly believe that our core algorithm is very general and that it could be extended to many other problems in 3D scene understanding.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 MonteBoxFinder，这是一种在给定噪声输入点云的情况下将长方体拟合到输入场景的方法。我们的主要贡献是一种离散优化算法，该算法能够从一组密集的初始检测到的长方体中有效地从嘈杂的长方体中过滤出好的框。受 MCTS 最近在场景理解问题中的应用的启发，我们开发了一种随机算法，该算法在设计上对我们的任务更有效。事实上，长方体排列的拟合质量对于长方体添加到场景中的顺序是不变的。我们针对我们的问题开发了多个搜索基线，并在 ScanNet 数据集上证明我们的方法更加高效和精确。最后，我们坚信我们的核心算法非常通用，可以扩展到 3D 场景理解中的许多其他问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MonteBoxFinder方法，从噪声点云中高效拟合立方体结构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在噪声点云中检测立方体时效率不足，需设计更高效的优化算法以应对复杂场景。
AI.method: 基于蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）的随机优化算法，通过离散优化过滤噪声立方体，利用拟合质量与添加顺序无关的特性提升效率。
AI.result: 在ScanNet数据集上验证，相比基线方法效率和精度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 核心算法具有通用性，可扩展至其他3D场景理解任务。

authors_text: Ilias Diakonikolas,Daniel M. Kane,Pasin Manurangsi,Lisheng Ren
title: Cryptographic Hardness of Learning Halfspaces with Massart Noise
title_zh: 使用 Massart 噪声学习半空间的密码学硬度
abstract: We study the complexity of PAC learning halfspaces in the presence of Massart noise. In this problem, we are given i.i.d. labeled examples $(\mathbf{x}, y) \in \mathbb{R}^N \times \{ \pm 1\}$, where the distribution of $\mathbf{x}$ is arbitrary and the label $y$ is a Massart corruption of $f(\mathbf{x})$, for an unknown halfspace $f: \mathbb{R}^N \to \{ \pm 1\}$, with flipping probability $η(\mathbf{x}) \leq η< 1/2$. The goal of the learner is to compute a hypothesis with small 0-1 error. Our main result is the first computational hardness result for this learning problem. Specifically, assuming the (widely believed) subexponential-time hardness of the Learning with Errors (LWE) problem, we show that no polynomial-time Massart halfspace learner can achieve error better than $Ω(η)$, even if the optimal 0-1 error is small, namely $\mathrm{OPT} = 2^{-\log^{c} (N)}$ for any universal constant $c \in (0, 1)$. Prior work had provided qualitatively similar evidence of hardness in the Statistical Query model. Our computational hardness result essentially resolves the polynomial PAC learnability of Massart halfspaces, by showing that known efficient learning algorithms for the problem are nearly best possible.
summary: We study the complexity of PAC learning halfspaces in the presence of Massart noise. In this problem, we are given i.i.d. labeled examples $(\mathbf{x}, y) \in \mathbb{R}^N \times \{ \pm 1\}$, where the distribution of $\mathbf{x}$ is arbitrary and the label $y$ is a Massart corruption of $f(\mathbf{x})$, for an unknown halfspace $f: \mathbb{R}^N \to \{ \pm 1\}$, with flipping probability $η(\mathbf{x}) \leq η< 1/2$. The goal of the learner is to compute a hypothesis with small 0-1 error. Our main result is the first computational hardness result for this learning problem. Specifically, assuming the (widely believed) subexponential-time hardness of the Learning with Errors (LWE) problem, we show that no polynomial-time Massart halfspace learner can achieve error better than $Ω(η)$, even if the optimal 0-1 error is small, namely $\mathrm{OPT} = 2^{-\log^{c} (N)}$ for any universal constant $c \in (0, 1)$. Prior work had provided qualitatively similar evidence of hardness in the Statistical Query model. Our computational hardness result essentially resolves the polynomial PAC learnability of Massart halfspaces, by showing that known efficient learning algorithms for the problem are nearly best possible.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了存在 Massart 噪声的情况下 PAC 学习半空间的复杂性。在这个问题中，我们给出独立同分布。标记示例 $(\mathbf{x}, y) \in \mathbb{R}^N \times \{ \pm 1\}$，其中 $\mathbf{x}$ 的分布是任意的，标签 $y$ 是 $f(\mathbf{x})$ 的 Massart 损坏，对于未知的半空间 $f：\mathbb{R}^N \to \{ \pm 1\}$，具有翻转概率$η(\mathbf{x}) \leq η< 1/2$。学习器的目标是计算具有较小 0-1 误差的假设。我们的主要结果是这个学习问题的第一个计算难度结果。具体来说，假设（广泛认为的）带误差学习 (LWE) 问题的次指数时间难度，我们表明，即使最佳 0-1 误差很小，即对于任何通用常数 $c \in (0, 1)$，$\mathrm{OPT} = 2^{-\log^{c} (N)}$，多项式时间 Massart 半空间学习器都无法实现比 $Ω(η)$ 更好的误差。先前的工作在统计查询模型中提供了类似的定性证据。我们的计算难度结果本质上解决了 Massart 半空间的多项式 PAC 可学习性问题，表明该问题的已知有效学习算法几乎是最好的。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在Massart噪声存在下PAC学习半空间的计算复杂性，并证明了其计算硬度。
AI.motivation: 理解在噪声环境下学习半空间的计算难度，对于机器学习理论和密码学安全假设的交叉研究具有重要意义。此前工作仅在统计查询模型中证明了类似硬度，但未涉及计算复杂性。
AI.method: 基于Learning with Errors (LWE)问题的子指数时间硬度假设，通过归约方法证明若存在多项式时间学习算法，则可破解LWE问题。
AI.result: 在LWE假设下，任何多项式时间算法都无法将错误率降至Ω(η)以下，即使最优错误率极小（如OPT=2^{-log^c N}）。
AI.conclusion: 已知的高效学习算法已接近最优，Massart半空间的PAC可学习性问题在计算上被本质解决。

In this problem, we are given i.i.d. labeled examples $(\mathbf{x}, y) \in \mathbb{R}^N \times \{ \pm 1\}$, where the distribution of $\mathbf{x}$ is arbitrary and the label $y$ is a Massart corruption of $f(\mathbf{x})$, for an unknown halfspace $f: \mathbb{R}^N \to \{ \pm 1\}$, with flipping probability $η(\mathbf{x}) \leq η< 1/2$. The goal of the learner is to compute a hypothesis with small 0-1 error. Our main result is the first computational hardness result for this learning problem. Prior work had provided qualitatively similar evidence of hardness in the Statistical Query model. Our computational hardness result essentially resolves the polynomial PAC learnability of Massart halfspaces, by showing that known efficient learning algorithms for the problem are nearly best possible. 我们研究了存在 Massart 噪声的情况下 PAC 学习半空间的复杂性。在这个问题中，我们给出独立同分布。标记示例 $(\mathbf{x}, y) \in \mathbb{R}^N \times \{ \pm 1\}$，其中 $\mathbf{x}$ 的分布是任意的，标签 $y$ 是 $f(\mathbf{x})$ 的 Massart 损坏，对于未知的半空间 $f：\mathbb{R}^N \to \{ \pm 1\}$，具有翻转概率$η(\mathbf{x}) \leq η< 1/2$。学习器的目标是计算具有较小 0-1 误差的假设。我们的主要结果是这个学习问题的第一个计算难度结果。具体来说，假设（广泛认为的）带误差学习 (LWE) 问题的次指数时间难度，我们表明，即使最佳 0-1 误差很小，即对于任何通用常数 $c \in (0, 1)$，$\mathrm{OPT} = 2^{-\log^{c} (N)}$，多项式时间 Massart 半空间学习器都无法实现比 $Ω(η)$ 更好的误差。先前的工作在统计查询模型中提供了类似的定性证据。我们的计算难度结果本质上解决了 Massart 半空间的多项式 PAC 可学习性问题，表明该问题的已知有效学习算法几乎是最好的。 该论文研究了在Massart噪声存在下PAC学习半空间的计算复杂性，并证明了其计算硬度。 Ilias Diakonikolas,Daniel M. authors_text: Nikita Gabdullin
title: Combining human parsing with analytical feature extraction and ranking schemes for high-generalization person reidentification
title_zh: 将人体解析与分析特征提取和排序方案相结合，以实现高泛化人员重新识别
abstract: Person reidentification (re-ID) has been receiving increasing attention in recent years due to its importance for both science and society. Machine learning and particularly Deep Learning (DL) has become the main re-id tool that allowed researches to achieve unprecedented accuracy levels on benchmark datasets. However, there is a known problem of poor generalization of DL models. That is, models trained to achieve high accuracy on one dataset perform poorly on other ones and require re-training. To address this issue, we present a model without trainable parameters which shows great potential for high generalization. It combines a fully analytical feature extraction and similarity ranking scheme with DL-based human parsing used to obtain the initial subregion classification. We show that such combination to a high extent eliminates the drawbacks of existing analytical methods. We use interpretable color and texture features which have human-readable similarity measures associated with them. To verify the proposed method we conduct experiments on Market1501 and CUHK03 datasets achieving competitive rank-1 accuracy comparable with that of DL-models. Most importantly we show that our method achieves 63.9% and 93.5% rank-1 cross-domain accuracy when applied to transfer learning tasks. It is significantly higher than previously reported 30-50% transfer accuracy. We discuss the potential ways of adding new features to further improve the model. We also show the advantage of interpretable features for constructing human-generated queries from verbal description to conduct search without a query image.
summary: Person reidentification (re-ID) has been receiving increasing attention in recent years due to its importance for both science and society. Machine learning and particularly Deep Learning (DL) has become the main re-id tool that allowed researches to achieve unprecedented accuracy levels on benchmark datasets. However, there is a known problem of poor generalization of DL models. That is, models trained to achieve high accuracy on one dataset perform poorly on other ones and require re-training. To address this issue, we present a model without trainable parameters which shows great potential for high generalization. It combines a fully analytical feature extraction and similarity ranking scheme with DL-based human parsing used to obtain the initial subregion classification. We show that such combination to a high extent eliminates the drawbacks of existing analytical methods. We use interpretable color and texture features which have human-readable similarity measures associated with them. To verify the proposed method we conduct experiments on Market1501 and CUHK03 datasets achieving competitive rank-1 accuracy comparable with that of DL-models. Most importantly we show that our method achieves 63.9% and 93.5% rank-1 cross-domain accuracy when applied to transfer learning tasks. It is significantly higher than previously reported 30-50% transfer accuracy. We discuss the potential ways of adding new features to further improve the model. We also show the advantage of interpretable features for constructing human-generated queries from verbal description to conduct search without a query image.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人员重新识别（re-ID）由于其对科学和社会的重要性而受到越来越多的关注。机器学习，特别是深度学习 (DL) 已成为主要的重新识别工具，使研究人员能够在基准数据集上达到前所未有的准确性水平。然而，深度学习模型存在一个已知的泛化性差的问题。也就是说，经过训练以在一个数据集上实现高精度的模型在其他数据集上表现不佳，需要重新训练。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个没有可训练参数的模型，该模型显示出高度泛化的巨大潜力。它将完全分析的特征提取和相似性排序方案与基于深度学习的人体解析相结合，用于获得初始子区域分类。我们证明这种组合在很大程度上消除了现有分析方法的缺点。我们使用可解释的颜色和纹理特征，这些特征具有与之相关的人类可读的相似性度量。为了验证所提出的方法，我们在 Market1501 和 CUHK03 数据集上进行了实验，实现了与 DL 模型相当的竞争性排名 1 精度。最重要的是，我们表明，当应用于迁移学习任务时，我们的方法实现了 63.9% 和 93.5% 的 1 级跨域准确率。它明显高于之前报道的 30-50% 的传输精度。我们讨论添加新功能以进一步改进模型的潜在方法。我们还展示了可解释特征的优势，可以从口头描述构建人类生成的查询，从而在没有查询图像的情况下进行搜索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练参数的行人重识别模型，结合深度学习人体解析与可解释特征分析方法，解决深度学习模型泛化能力差的问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习虽在行人重识别任务中取得高准确率，但模型泛化能力不足，跨数据集表现差且需频繁重训练，亟需更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 融合深度学习人体解析获取初始子区域分类，结合可解释的颜色/纹理特征分析与相似性排序方案，构建无训练参数的分析性模型。
AI.result: 在Market1501和CUHK03数据集上达到与深度学习模型相当的准确率，跨域任务中rank-1准确率达63.9%和93.5%，显著优于传统30-50%水平，并验证了可解释特征在构建文本查询中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合解析与分析性特征有效克服深度学习泛化缺陷，跨域性能突出，未来可通过扩展特征类型进一步优化模型。

search_text: Combining human parsing with analytical feature extraction and ranking schemes for high-generalization person reidentification 将人体解析与分析特征提取和排序方案相结合，以实现高泛化人员重新识别 Person reidentification (re-ID) has been receiving increasing attention in recent years due to its importance for both science and society. Machine learning and particularly Deep Learning (DL) has become the main re-id tool that allowed researches to achieve unprecedented accuracy levels on benchmark datasets. However, there is a known problem of poor generalization of DL models. That is, models trained to achieve high accuracy on one dataset perform poorly on other ones and require re-training. To address this issue, we present a model without trainable parameters which shows great potential for high generalization. It combines a fully analytical feature extraction and similarity ranking scheme with DL-based human parsing used to obtain the initial subregion classification. We show that such combination to a high extent eliminates the drawbacks of existing analytical methods. We use interpretable color and texture features which have human-readable similarity measures associated with them. To verify the proposed method we conduct experiments on Market1501 and CUHK03 datasets achieving competitive rank-1 accuracy comparable with that of DL-models. Most importantly we show that our method achieves 63.9% and 93.5% rank-1 cross-domain accuracy when applied to transfer learning tasks. It is significantly higher than previously reported 30-50% transfer accuracy. We discuss the potential ways of adding new features to further improve the model. We also show the advantage of interpretable features for constructing human-generated queries from verbal description to conduct search without a query image. 近年来，人员重新识别（re-ID）由于其对科学和社会的重要性而受到越来越多的关注。机器学习，特别是深度学习 (DL) 已成为主要的重新识别工具，使研究人员能够在基准数据集上达到前所未有的准确性水平。然而，深度学习模型存在一个已知的泛化性差的问题。也就是说，经过训练以在一个数据集上实现高精度的模型在其他数据集上表现不佳，需要重新训练。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个没有可训练参数的模型，该模型显示出高度泛化的巨大潜力。它将完全分析的特征提取和相似性排序方案与基于深度学习的人体解析相结合，用于获得初始子区域分类。我们证明这种组合在很大程度上消除了现有分析方法的缺点。我们使用可解释的颜色和纹理特征，这些特征具有与之相关的人类可读的相似性度量。为了验证所提出的方法，我们在 Market1501 和 CUHK03 数据集上进行了实验，实现了与 DL 模型相当的竞争性排名 1 精度。最重要的是，我们表明，当应用于迁移学习任务时，我们的方法实现了 63.9% 和 93.5% 的 1 级跨域准确率。它明显高于之前报道的 30-50% 的传输精度。我们讨论添加新功能以进一步改进模型的潜在方法。我们还展示了可解释特征的优势，可以从口头描述构建人类生成的查询，从而在没有查询图像的情况下进行搜索。 本文提出一种无需训练参数的行人重识别模型，结合深度学习人体解析与可解释特征分析方法，解决深度学习模型泛化能力差的问题。 Nikita Gabdullin cs.CV

authors_text: Hanxiao Zhang,Xiao Gu,Minghui Zhang,Weihao Yu,Liang Chen,Zhexin Wang,Feng Yao,Yun Gu,Guang-Zhong Yang
title: Re-thinking and Re-labeling LIDC-IDRI for Robust Pulmonary Cancer Prediction
title_zh: 重新思考和重新标记 LIDC-IDRI 以实现稳健的肺癌预测
abstract: The LIDC-IDRI database is the most popular benchmark for lung cancer prediction. However, with subjective assessment from radiologists, nodules in LIDC may have entirely different malignancy annotations from the pathological ground truth, introducing label assignment errors and subsequent supervision bias during training. The LIDC database thus requires more objective labels for learning-based cancer prediction. Based on an extra small dataset containing 180 nodules diagnosed by pathological examination, we propose to re-label LIDC data to mitigate the effect of original annotation bias verified on this robust benchmark. We demonstrate in this paper that providing new labels by similar nodule retrieval based on metric learning would be an effective re-labeling strategy. Training on these re-labeled LIDC nodules leads to improved model performance, which is enhanced when new labels of uncertain nodules are added. We further infer that re-labeling LIDC is current an expedient way for robust lung cancer prediction while building a large pathological-proven nodule database provides the long-term solution.
summary: The LIDC-IDRI database is the most popular benchmark for lung cancer prediction. However, with subjective assessment from radiologists, nodules in LIDC may have entirely different malignancy annotations from the pathological ground truth, introducing label assignment errors and subsequent supervision bias during training. The LIDC database thus requires more objective labels for learning-based cancer prediction. Based on an extra small dataset containing 180 nodules diagnosed by pathological examination, we propose to re-label LIDC data to mitigate the effect of original annotation bias verified on this robust benchmark. We demonstrate in this paper that providing new labels by similar nodule retrieval based on metric learning would be an effective re-labeling strategy. Training on these re-labeled LIDC nodules leads to improved model performance, which is enhanced when new labels of uncertain nodules are added. We further infer that re-labeling LIDC is current an expedient way for robust lung cancer prediction while building a large pathological-proven nodule database provides the long-term solution.
abstract_zh: LIDC-IDRI 数据库是最流行的肺癌预测基准。然而，根据放射科医生的主观评估，LIDC 中的结节可能具有与病理基础事实完全不同的恶性注释，从而在训练期间引入标签分配错误和随后的监督偏差。因此，LIDC 数据库需要更客观的标签来进行基于学习的癌症预测。基于包含通过病理检查诊断的 180 个结节的超小数据集，我们建议重新标记 LIDC 数据，以减轻在此稳健基准上验证的原始注释偏差的影响。我们在本文中证明，通过基于度量学习的相似结节检索来提供新标签将是一种有效的重新标记策略。对这些重新标记的 LIDC 结节进行训练可以提高模型性能，当添加不确定结节的新标签时，模型性能会得到增强。我们进一步推断，重新标记 LIDC 是目前稳健预测肺癌的一种便捷方法，而建立大型经病理证实的结节数据库则提供了长期解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过重新标注LIDC-IDRI数据库中的肺结节标签，减少主观标注偏差，提升肺癌预测模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: LIDC-IDRI数据库的肺结节恶性标签存在放射科医生主观评估与病理结果不一致的问题，导致训练时出现标签偏差和监督偏差。
AI.method: 基于180个病理确诊结节的小数据集，采用度量学习进行相似结节检索，并通过该方法为LIDC数据重新分配更客观的标签。
AI.result: 重新标注后的LIDC数据训练模型性能显著提升，尤其在添加不确定结节的新标签后效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 重新标注LIDC是当前实现鲁棒肺癌预测的可行方案，而构建大规模病理验证的结节数据库才是长期根本解决方案。

authors_text: Amirhossein Saba,Carlo Gigli,Ahmed B. Ayoub,Demetri Psaltis
title: Physics-informed neural networks for diffraction tomography
title_zh: 用于衍射断层扫描的物理信息神经网络
abstract: We propose a physics-informed neural network as the forward model for tomographic reconstructions of biological samples. We demonstrate that by training this network with the Helmholtz equation as a physical loss, we can predict the scattered field accurately. It will be shown that a pretrained network can be fine-tuned for different samples and used for solving the scattering problem much faster than other numerical solutions. We evaluate our methodology with numerical and experimental results. Our physics-informed neural networks can be generalized for any forward and inverse scattering problem.
summary: We propose a physics-informed neural network as the forward model for tomographic reconstructions of biological samples. We demonstrate that by training this network with the Helmholtz equation as a physical loss, we can predict the scattered field accurately. It will be shown that a pretrained network can be fine-tuned for different samples and used for solving the scattering problem much faster than other numerical solutions. We evaluate our methodology with numerical and experimental results. Our physics-informed neural networks can be generalized for any forward and inverse scattering problem.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于物理的神经网络作为生物样本断层扫描重建的正向模型。我们证明，通过使用亥姆霍兹方程作为物理损失来训练该网络，我们可以准确地预测散射场。结果表明，预训练网络可以针对不同样本进行微调，并比其他数值解决方案更快地解决散射问题。我们用数值和实验结果评估我们的方法。我们的基于物理的神经网络可以推广到任何前向和逆向散射问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理信息的神经网络作为生物样本断层成像的正向模型，通过Helmholtz方程作为物理损失函数提高散射场预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统数值方法计算耗时且难以处理复杂散射问题，需结合物理定律与深度学习提升成像效率与精度。
AI.method: 设计物理信息神经网络，将Helmholtz方程嵌入损失函数训练模型，并通过预训练网络微调适应不同样本。
AI.result: 数值与实验结果验证了方法有效性，网络求解速度显著优于传统数值方法，且适用于多种散射问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为正向和逆散射问题提供了通用解决方案，展示了物理信息神经网络在成像领域的广泛应用潜力。

It will be shown that a pretrained network can be fine-tuned for different samples and used for solving the scattering problem much faster than other numerical solutions. Our physics-informed neural networks can be generalized for any forward and inverse scattering problem. 我们提出了一种基于物理的神经网络作为生物样本断层扫描重建的正向模型。我们证明，通过使用亥姆霍兹方程作为物理损失来训练该网络，我们可以准确地预测散射场。结果表明，预训练网络可以针对不同样本进行微调，并比其他数值解决方案更快地解决散射问题。我们用数值和实验结果评估我们的方法。我们的基于物理的神经网络可以推广到任何前向和逆向散射问题。 本文提出了一种基于物理信息的神经网络作为生物样本断层成像的正向模型，通过Helmholtz方程作为物理损失函数提高散射场预测的准确性。 Amirhossein Saba,Carlo Gigli,Ahmed B. Ayoub,Demetri Psaltis physics.optics,cs.AI,cs.CE

authors_text: Chufeng Tang,Lingxi Xie,Xiaopeng Zhang,Xiaolin Hu,Qi Tian
title: Visual Recognition by Request
title_zh: 根据要求进行视觉识别
abstract: Humans have the ability of recognizing visual semantics in an unlimited granularity, but existing visual recognition algorithms cannot achieve this goal. In this paper, we establish a new paradigm named visual recognition by request (ViRReq) to bridge the gap. The key lies in decomposing visual recognition into atomic tasks named requests and leveraging a knowledge base, a hierarchical and text-based dictionary, to assist task definition. ViRReq allows for (i) learning complicated whole-part hierarchies from highly incomplete annotations and (ii) inserting new concepts with minimal efforts. We also establish a solid baseline by integrating language-driven recognition into recent semantic and instance segmentation methods, and demonstrate its flexible recognition ability on CPP and ADE20K, two datasets with hierarchical whole-part annotations.
summary: Humans have the ability of recognizing visual semantics in an unlimited granularity, but existing visual recognition algorithms cannot achieve this goal. In this paper, we establish a new paradigm named visual recognition by request (ViRReq) to bridge the gap. The key lies in decomposing visual recognition into atomic tasks named requests and leveraging a knowledge base, a hierarchical and text-based dictionary, to assist task definition. ViRReq allows for (i) learning complicated whole-part hierarchies from highly incomplete annotations and (ii) inserting new concepts with minimal efforts. We also establish a solid baseline by integrating language-driven recognition into recent semantic and instance segmentation methods, and demonstrate its flexible recognition ability on CPP and ADE20K, two datasets with hierarchical whole-part annotations.
abstract_zh: 人类具有无限粒度识别视觉语义的能力，但现有的视觉识别算法无法实现这一目标。在本文中，我们建立了一种名为视觉识别请求（ViRReq）的新范式来弥补这一差距。关键在于将视觉识别分解为名为请求的原子任务，并利用知识库、分层和基于文本的字典来辅助任务定义。 ViRReq 允许 (i) 从高度不完整的注释中学习复杂的整体层次结构，以及 (ii) 以最小的努力插入新概念。我们还通过将语言驱动的识别集成到最新的语义和实例分割方法中，建立了坚实的基线，并在 CPP 和 ADE20K 这两个具有分层整体注释的数据集上展示了其灵活的识别能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ViRReq的新范式，通过分解视觉识别任务为原子请求并结合知识库，实现更灵活的视觉语义识别。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉识别算法无法像人类一样实现无限粒度的视觉语义理解，需解决复杂层次结构学习和新概念快速插入的问题。
AI.method: 将视觉识别分解为原子任务（请求），利用分层文本知识库定义任务，并整合语言驱动识别到语义分割方法中。
AI.result: 在CPP和ADE20K数据集上验证了方法的有效性，展示了从不完整标注学习层次结构及新增概念的能力。
AI.conclusion: ViRReq通过任务分解和知识库辅助，提升了视觉识别的灵活性和扩展性，为未来研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Nafise Rezaei,Roozbeh Rajabi,Abouzar Estebsari
title: Electricity Price Forecasting Model based on Gated Recurrent Units
title_zh: 基于门控循环单元的电价预测模型
abstract: The participation of consumers and producers in demand response programs has increased in smart grids, which reduces investment and operation costs of power systems. Also, with the advent of renewable energy sources, the electricity market is becoming more complex and unpredictable. To effectively implement demand response programs, forecasting the future price of electricity is very crucial for producers in the electricity market. Electricity prices are very volatile and change under the influence of various factors such as temperature, wind speed, rainfall, intensity of commercial and daily activities, etc. Therefore, considering the influencing factors as dependent variables can increase the accuracy of the forecast. In this paper, a model for electricity price forecasting is presented based on Gated Recurrent Units. The electrical load consumption is considered as an input variable in this model. Noise in electricity price seriously reduces the efficiency and effectiveness of analysis. Therefore, an adaptive noise reducer is integrated into the model for noise reduction. The SAEs are then used to extract features from the de-noised electricity price. Finally, the de-noised features are fed into the GRU to train predictor. Results on real dataset shows that the proposed methodology can perform effectively in prediction of electricity price.
summary: The participation of consumers and producers in demand response programs has increased in smart grids, which reduces investment and operation costs of power systems. Also, with the advent of renewable energy sources, the electricity market is becoming more complex and unpredictable. To effectively implement demand response programs, forecasting the future price of electricity is very crucial for producers in the electricity market. Electricity prices are very volatile and change under the influence of various factors such as temperature, wind speed, rainfall, intensity of commercial and daily activities, etc. Therefore, considering the influencing factors as dependent variables can increase the accuracy of the forecast. In this paper, a model for electricity price forecasting is presented based on Gated Recurrent Units. The electrical load consumption is considered as an input variable in this model. Noise in electricity price seriously reduces the efficiency and effectiveness of analysis. Therefore, an adaptive noise reducer is integrated into the model for noise reduction. The SAEs are then used to extract features from the de-noised electricity price. Finally, the de-noised features are fed into the GRU to train predictor. Results on real dataset shows that the proposed methodology can perform effectively in prediction of electricity price.
abstract_zh: 智能电网中消费者和生产者对需求响应计划的参与有所增加，从而降低了电力系统的投资和运营成本。此外，随着可再生能源的出现，电力市场变得更加复杂和不可预测。为了有效实施需求响应计划，预测未来电价对于电力市场的生产商来说非常重要。电价波动很大，受气温、风速、降雨量、商业和日常活动强度等多种因素的影响而发生变化。因此，将影响因素考虑为因变量可以提高预测的准确性。本文提出了一种基于门控循环单元的电价预测模型。电力负载消耗被视为该模型中的输入变量。电价的噪音严重降低了分析的效率和效果。因此，模型中集成了自适应降噪器来实现降噪。然后使用 SAE 从去噪电价中提取特征。最后，将去噪后的特征输入 GRU 来训练预测器。真实数据集的结果表明，所提出的方法可以有效地预测电价。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于门控循环单元（GRU）的电力价格预测模型，通过集成噪声消除和特征提取技术提高预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 智能电网中需求响应计划的参与度提高以及可再生能源的引入使电力市场更加复杂，准确预测电价对降低系统成本和优化需求响应至关重要。
AI.method: 以电力负荷消耗为输入变量，结合自适应噪声消除器进行降噪处理，利用堆叠自动编码器（SAEs）提取去噪后的电价特征，最终通过GRU网络训练预测模型。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法在电价预测任务中表现出较高的预测效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过集成噪声消除、特征提取与GRU模型，能够有效提升电价预测的精度和稳定性，为电力市场决策提供支持。

authors_text: Ombretta Strafforello,Vanathi Rajasekart,Osman S. Kayhan,Oana Inel,Jan van Gemert
title: Humans disagree with the IoU for measuring object detector localization error
title_zh: 人类不同意用 IoU 来测量物体检测器定位误差
comment: Published at ICIP 2022. Ombretta Strafforello, Vanathi Rajasekart, Osman S. Kayhan and Oana Inel contributed equally to this work
comments: Published at ICIP 2022. Ombretta Strafforello, Vanathi Rajasekart, Osman S. Kayhan and Oana Inel contributed equally to this work
abstract: The localization quality of automatic object detectors is typically evaluated by the Intersection over Union (IoU) score. In this work, we show that humans have a different view on localization quality. To evaluate this, we conduct a survey with more than 70 participants. Results show that for localization errors with the exact same IoU score, humans might not consider that these errors are equal, and express a preference. Our work is the first to evaluate IoU with humans and makes it clear that relying on IoU scores alone to evaluate localization errors might not be sufficient.
summary: The localization quality of automatic object detectors is typically evaluated by the Intersection over Union (IoU) score. In this work, we show that humans have a different view on localization quality. To evaluate this, we conduct a survey with more than 70 participants. Results show that for localization errors with the exact same IoU score, humans might not consider that these errors are equal, and express a preference. Our work is the first to evaluate IoU with humans and makes it clear that relying on IoU scores alone to evaluate localization errors might not be sufficient.
abstract_zh: 自动目标检测器的定位质量通常通过并交交集 (IoU) 分数来评估。在这项工作中，我们表明人类对本地化质量有不同的看法。为了评估这一点，我们对 70 多名参与者进行了一项调查。结果表明，对于 IoU 分数完全相同的定位错误，人类可能不会认为这些错误是相等的，并表达偏好。我们的工作是第一个与人类评估 IoU 的工作，并清楚地表明仅依靠 IoU 分数来评估定位错误可能是不够的。

AI.tldr: 本文指出人类认为IoU（交并比）指标不足以准确评估目标检测器的定位误差。
AI.motivation: 当前目标检测领域普遍使用IoU作为定位质量评估标准，但缺乏对人类感知与算法评价一致性的验证。
AI.method: 通过70余名参与者的调查实验，对比人类对相同IoU分数下不同定位误差的主观判断差异。
AI.result: 实验表明，人类对相同IoU值的定位误差存在显著偏好差异，证明IoU无法完全反映实际定位质量。
AI.conclusion: 单纯依赖IoU指标评估定位误差存在局限性，需结合人类感知特性改进评价体系。

tldr: 本文指出人类认为IoU（交并比）指标不足以准确评估目标检测器的定位误差。
motivation: 当前目标检测领域普遍使用IoU作为定位质量评估标准，但缺乏对人类感知与算法评价一致性的验证。
method: 通过70余名参与者的调查实验，对比人类对相同IoU分数下不同定位误差的主观判断差异。

search_text: Humans disagree with the IoU for measuring object detector localization error 人类不同意用 IoU 来测量物体检测器定位误差 The localization quality of automatic object detectors is typically evaluated by the Intersection over Union (IoU) score. In this work, we show that humans have a different view on localization quality. To evaluate this, we conduct a survey with more than 70 participants. Results show that for localization errors with the exact same IoU score, humans might not consider that these errors are equal, and express a preference. Our work is the first to evaluate IoU with humans and makes it clear that relying on IoU scores alone to evaluate localization errors might not be sufficient. 自动目标检测器的定位质量通常通过并交交集 (IoU) 分数来评估。在这项工作中，我们表明人类对本地化质量有不同的看法。为了评估这一点，我们对 70 多名参与者进行了一项调查。结果表明，对于 IoU 分数完全相同的定位错误，人类可能不会认为这些错误是相等的，并表达偏好。我们的工作是第一个与人类评估 IoU 的工作，并清楚地表明仅依靠 IoU 分数来评估定位错误可能是不够的。 本文指出人类认为IoU（交并比）指标不足以准确评估目标检测器的定位误差。 Ombretta Strafforello,Vanathi Rajasekart,Osman S. Kayhan,Oana Inel,Jan van Gemert cs.CV,cs.HC

authors_text: Liad Erez,Tal Lancewicki,Uri Sherman,Tomer Koren,Yishay Mansour
title: Regret Minimization and Convergence to Equilibria in General-sum Markov Games
title_zh: 总和马尔可夫博弈中的遗憾最小化与均衡收敛
abstract: An abundance of recent impossibility results establish that regret minimization in Markov games with adversarial opponents is both statistically and computationally intractable. Nevertheless, none of these results preclude the possibility of regret minimization under the assumption that all parties adopt the same learning procedure. In this work, we present the first (to our knowledge) algorithm for learning in general-sum Markov games that provides sublinear regret guarantees when executed by all agents. The bounds we obtain are for swap regret, and thus, along the way, imply convergence to a correlated equilibrium. Our algorithm is decentralized, computationally efficient, and does not require any communication between agents. Our key observation is that online learning via policy optimization in Markov games essentially reduces to a form of weighted regret minimization, with unknown weights determined by the path length of the agents' policy sequence. Consequently, controlling the path length leads to weighted regret objectives for which sufficiently adaptive algorithms provide sublinear regret guarantees.
summary: An abundance of recent impossibility results establish that regret minimization in Markov games with adversarial opponents is both statistically and computationally intractable. Nevertheless, none of these results preclude the possibility of regret minimization under the assumption that all parties adopt the same learning procedure. In this work, we present the first (to our knowledge) algorithm for learning in general-sum Markov games that provides sublinear regret guarantees when executed by all agents. The bounds we obtain are for swap regret, and thus, along the way, imply convergence to a correlated equilibrium. Our algorithm is decentralized, computationally efficient, and does not require any communication between agents. Our key observation is that online learning via policy optimization in Markov games essentially reduces to a form of weighted regret minimization, with unknown weights determined by the path length of the agents' policy sequence. Consequently, controlling the path length leads to weighted regret objectives for which sufficiently adaptive algorithms provide sublinear regret guarantees.
abstract_zh: 最近大量的不可能结果表明，在与对手的马尔可夫博弈中，遗憾最小化在统计上和计算上都是难以解决的。然而，在假设所有各方都采用相同的学习程序的情况下，这些结果都不能排除将遗憾最小化的可能性。在这项工作中，我们提出了第一个（据我们所知）用于一般和马尔可夫游戏学习的算法，该算法在所有代理执行时提供次线性后悔保证。我们获得的界限是交换后悔的，因此，一路走来，意味着收敛到相关均衡。我们的算法是去中心化的，计算效率高，并且不需要代理之间的任何通信。我们的主要观察是，通过马尔可夫博弈中的策略优化进行在线学习本质上简化为一种加权后悔最小化的形式，其中未知权重由代理策略序列的路径长度决定。因此，控制路径长度会导致加权遗憾目标，充分自适应的算法为此提供了次线性遗憾保证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于广义马尔可夫博弈的分布式算法，在所有智能体采用相同学习策略时实现次线性遗憾，并收敛至相关均衡。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明对抗性对手下的马尔可夫博弈难以实现遗憾最小化，但未排除智能体采用相同学习策略的可能性，因此需探索该场景下的可行算法。
AI.method: 通过将策略优化转化为加权遗憾最小化问题，结合路径长度控制，设计无需通信的去中心化算法以实现次线性遗憾保证。
AI.result: 获得次线性swap遗憾界，证明算法收敛至相关均衡，且具备计算高效性和无需通信的特性。
AI.conclusion: 首次在相同学习策略假设下实现广义马尔可夫博弈的次线性遗憾保证，为多智能体强化学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Pradip Pramanick,Chayan Sarkar,Sayan Paul,Ruddra dev Roychoudhury,Brojeshwar Bhowmick
title: DoRO: Disambiguation of referred object for embodied agents
title_zh: DoRO：消除实体代理所指对象的歧义
comment: Accepted in IEEE Robotics & Automation Letters (RA-L)
comments: Accepted in IEEE Robotics & Automation Letters (RA-L)
abstract: Robotic task instructions often involve a referred object that the robot must locate (ground) within the environment. While task intent understanding is an essential part of natural language understanding, less effort is made to resolve ambiguity that may arise while grounding the task. Existing works use vision-based task grounding and ambiguity detection, suitable for a fixed view and a static robot. However, the problem magnifies for a mobile robot, where the ideal view is not known beforehand. Moreover, a single view may not be sufficient to locate all the object instances in the given area, which leads to inaccurate ambiguity detection. Human intervention is helpful only if the robot can convey the kind of ambiguity it is facing. In this article, we present DoRO (Disambiguation of Referred Object), a system that can help an embodied agent to disambiguate the referred object by raising a suitable query whenever required. Given an area where the intended object is, DoRO finds all the instances of the object by aggregating observations from multiple views while exploring & scanning the area. It then raises a suitable query using the information from the grounded object instances. Experiments conducted with the AI2Thor simulator show that DoRO not only detects the ambiguity more accurately but also raises verbose queries with more accurate information from the visual-language grounding.
summary: Robotic task instructions often involve a referred object that the robot must locate (ground) within the environment. While task intent understanding is an essential part of natural language understanding, less effort is made to resolve ambiguity that may arise while grounding the task. Existing works use vision-based task grounding and ambiguity detection, suitable for a fixed view and a static robot. However, the problem magnifies for a mobile robot, where the ideal view is not known beforehand. Moreover, a single view may not be sufficient to locate all the object instances in the given area, which leads to inaccurate ambiguity detection. Human intervention is helpful only if the robot can convey the kind of ambiguity it is facing. In this article, we present DoRO (Disambiguation of Referred Object), a system that can help an embodied agent to disambiguate the referred object by raising a suitable query whenever required. Given an area where the intended object is, DoRO finds all the instances of the object by aggregating observations from multiple views while exploring & scanning the area. It then raises a suitable query using the information from the grounded object instances. Experiments conducted with the AI2Thor simulator show that DoRO not only detects the ambiguity more accurately but also raises verbose queries with more accurate information from the visual-language grounding.
abstract_zh: 机器人任务指令通常涉及机器人必须在环境中定位（地面）的参考对象。虽然任务意图理解是自然语言理解的重要组成部分，但解决任务落地时可能出现的歧义的努力却较少。现有作品使用基于视觉的任务基础和模糊性检测，适用于固定视图和静态机器人。然而，对于移动机器人来说，这个问题会更加严重，因为事先并不知道理想的视图。此外，单个视图可能不足以定位给定区域中的所有对象实例，这导致模糊性检测不准确。只有当机器人能够传达它所面临的模糊性时，人工干预才有帮助。在本文中，我们提出了 DoRO（引用对象消歧），这是一个可以帮助实体代理通过在需要时提出合适的查询来消除引用对象歧义的系统。给定目标对象所在的区域，DoRO 在探索和扫描该区域时通过聚合多个视图的观察结果来找到该对象的所有实例。然后，它使用来自接地对象实例的信息提出合适的查询。使用 AI2Thor 模拟器进行的实验表明，DoRO 不仅可以更准确地检测歧义，而且还可以通过来自视觉语言基础的更准确信息提出详细查询。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DoRO系统，帮助具身智能体通过多视角观察和生成查询来解决任务指令中提及对象的歧义问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在固定视角和静态机器人上有效，但移动机器人因无法预知最佳视角且单视角难以定位所有对象，导致歧义检测不准确，且缺乏有效的人机交互机制。
AI.method: DoRO通过探索目标区域并聚合多视角观测数据，定位所有对象实例，再基于视觉-语言对齐信息生成具体查询以消除歧义。
AI.result: 在AI2Thor仿真中，DoRO相比现有方法显著提升了歧义检测准确率，并生成了包含更精确信息的详细查询。
AI.conclusion: DoRO为移动机器人提供了动态环境下的对象歧义消解方案，通过多视角感知与查询生成增强了任务执行的准确性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出DoRO系统，帮助具身智能体通过多视角观察和生成查询来解决任务指令中提及对象的歧义问题。

ai_content.result: 在AI2Thor仿真中，DoRO相比现有方法显著提升了歧义检测准确率，并生成了包含更精确信息的详细查询。

abstract: Exemplar-free Class-incremental Learning (CIL) is a challenging problem because rehearsing data from previous phases is strictly prohibited, causing catastrophic forgetting of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). In this paper, we present iVoro, a holistic framework for CIL, derived from computational geometry. We found Voronoi Diagram (VD), a classical model for space subdivision, is especially powerful for solving the CIL problem, because VD itself can be constructed favorably in an incremental manner -- the newly added sites (classes) will only affect the proximate classes, making the non-contiguous classes hardly forgettable. Further, in order to find a better set of centers for VD construction, we colligate DNN with VD using Power Diagram and show that the VD structure can be optimized by integrating local DNN models using a divide-and-conquer algorithm. Moreover, our VD construction is not restricted to the deep feature space, but is also applicable to multiple intermediate feature spaces, promoting VD to be multi-centered VD (CIVD) that efficiently captures multi-grained features from DNN. Importantly, iVoro is also capable of handling uncertainty-aware test-time Voronoi cell assignment and has exhibited high correlations between geometric uncertainty and predictive accuracy (up to ~0.9). Putting everything together, iVoro achieves up to 25.26%, 37.09%, and 33.21% improvements on CIFAR-100, TinyImageNet, and ImageNet-Subset, respectively, compared to the state-of-the-art non-exemplar CIL approaches. In conclusion, iVoro enables highly accurate, privacy-preserving, and geometrically interpretable CIL that is particularly useful when cross-phase data sharing is forbidden, e.g. in medical applications. Our code is available at https://machunwei.github.io/ivoro.

abstract_zh: 无样本类增量学习（CIL）是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为严格禁止排练前一阶段的数据，从而导致深度神经网络（DNN）的灾难性遗忘。在本文中，我们提出了 iVoro，这是一个源自计算几何的 CIL 整体框架。我们发现Voronoi图（VD）作为空间细分的经典模型，对于解决CIL问题特别有效，因为VD本身可以以增量方式有利地构造——新添加的站点（类）只会影响最接近的类，使得不连续的类很难被遗忘。此外，为了找到一组更好的 VD 构建中心，我们使用 Power 图将 DNN 与 VD 结合起来，并表明可以通过使用分而治之算法集成局部 DNN 模型来优化 VD 结构。此外，我们的VD构造不仅限于深层特征空间，还适用于多个中间特征空间，将VD提升为多中心VD（CIVD），可以有效地从DNN中捕获多粒度特征。重要的是，iVoro 还能够处理不确定性感知测试时间 Voronoi 单元分配，并表现出几何不确定性和预测准确性之间的高度相关性（高达 ~0.9）。综上所述，与最先进的非示例 CIL 方法相比，iVoro 在 CIFAR-100、TinyImageNet 和 ImageNet-Subset 上分别实现了高达 25.26%、37.09% 和 33.21% 的改进。总之，iVoro 实现了高度准确、隐私保护和几何可解释的 CIL，这在禁止跨阶段数据共享时特别有用，例如在医疗应用中。我们的代码可在 https://mahunwei.github.io/ivoro 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于计算几何的全新框架iVoro，用于解决无需示例的类别增量学习（CIL）问题，通过Voronoi图（VD）的增量构建有效防止灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 传统CIL方法因禁止复用旧数据导致灾难性遗忘，而Voronoi图的增量特性可使新增类别仅影响邻近区域，从而保留非连续类别的记忆，为隐私敏感场景（如医疗）提供解决方案。
AI.method: 将深度神经网络（DNN）与Voronoi图结合，通过Power图优化VD结构，采用分治算法整合局部模型，并扩展至多中间特征空间形成多中心VD（CIVD），同时引入不确定性感知的测试时单元分配机制。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100、TinyImageNet和ImageNet-Subset数据集上，iVoro分别较现有最优非示例CIL方法提升25.26%、37.09%和33.21%，几何不确定性与预测准确率相关性高达~0.9。
AI.conclusion: iVoro实现了高精度、隐私保护且几何可解释的CIL，尤其适用于跨阶段数据共享受限的场景，代码已开源。

Moreover, our VD construction is not restricted to the deep feature space, but is also applicable to multiple intermediate feature spaces, promoting VD to be multi-centered VD (CIVD) that efficiently captures multi-grained features from DNN. Importantly, iVoro is also capable of handling uncertainty-aware test-time Voronoi cell assignment and has exhibited high correlations between geometric uncertainty and predictive accuracy (up to ~0.9). authors_text: Xiaoqian Wu,Yong-Lu Li,Xinpeng Liu,Junyi Zhang,Yuzhe Wu,Cewu Lu
title: Mining Cross-Person Cues for Body-Part Interactiveness Learning in HOI Detection
title_zh: 在 HOI 检测中挖掘身体部位交互学习的跨人线索
abstract: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection plays a crucial role in activity understanding. Though significant progress has been made, interactiveness learning remains a challenging problem in HOI detection: existing methods usually generate redundant negative H-O pair proposals and fail to effectively extract interactive pairs. Though interactiveness has been studied in both whole body- and part- level and facilitates the H-O pairing, previous works only focus on the target person once (i.e., in a local perspective) and overlook the information of the other persons. In this paper, we argue that comparing body-parts of multi-person simultaneously can afford us more useful and supplementary interactiveness cues. That said, to learn body-part interactiveness from a global perspective: when classifying a target person's body-part interactiveness, visual cues are explored not only from herself/himself but also from other persons in the image. We construct body-part saliency maps based on self-attention to mine cross-person informative cues and learn the holistic relationships between all the body-parts. We evaluate the proposed method on widely-used benchmarks HICO-DET and V-COCO. With our new perspective, the holistic global-local body-part interactiveness learning achieves significant improvements over state-of-the-art. Our code is available at https://github.com/enlighten0707/Body-Part-Map-for-Interactiveness.

Though significant progress has been made, interactiveness learning remains a challenging problem in HOI detection: existing methods usually generate redundant negative H-O pair proposals and fail to effectively extract interactive pairs. We evaluate the proposed method on widely-used benchmarks HICO-DET and V-COCO. With our new perspective, the holistic global-local body-part interactiveness learning achieves significant improvements over state-of-the-art. Our code is available at https://github.com/enlighten0707/Body-Part-Map-for-Interactiveness.
abstract_zh: 人机交互（HOI）检测在活动理解中起着至关重要的作用。尽管已经取得了重大进展，但交互性学习仍然是 HOI 检测中的一个具有挑战性的问题：现有方法通常会生成冗余的负 H-O 对提案，并且无法有效地提取交互对。虽然交互性已经在全身和局部层面进行了研究，并促进了 H-O 配对，但以前的工作只关注目标人一次（即，从局部角度），而忽略了其他人的信息。在本文中，我们认为同时比较多人的身体部位可以为我们提供更有用和补充的交互线索。也就是说，要从全局角度学习身体部位交互性：在对目标人的身体部位交互性进行分类时，不仅会从她自己身上探索视觉线索，还会从图像中的其他人身上探索视觉线索。我们基于自我关注构建身体部位显着性图，以挖掘跨人信息线索并学习所有身体部位之间的整体关系。我们在广泛使用的基准 HICO-DET 和 V-COCO 上评估了所提出的方法。凭借我们的新视角，整体的全球局部身体部位交互学习比最先进的技术取得了显着的进步。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/enlighten0707/Body-Part-Map-for-Interactiveness。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种通过挖掘跨人物身体部位交互线索来提升人类-物体交互（HOI）检测中交互性学习的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在HOI检测中仅从局部视角关注目标人物，忽略其他人物信息，导致交互对提取效果不佳，且生成大量冗余负样本。
AI.method: 基于自注意力机制构建身体部位显著性图，挖掘跨人物交互线索，并通过全局-局部联合学习建模所有身体部位的关联关系。
AI.result: 在HICO-DET和V-COCO基准测试中显著超越现有最优方法，验证了跨人物全局视角的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 从全局视角同时考虑多人物身体部位交互信息，能有效提升交互性学习性能，为HOI检测提供新思路。

We evaluate the proposed method on widely-used benchmarks HICO-DET and V-COCO. With our new perspective, the holistic global-local body-part interactiveness learning achieves significant improvements over state-of-the-art. Our code is available at https://github.com/enlighten0707/Body-Part-Map-for-Interactiveness. 人机交互（HOI）检测在活动理解中起着至关重要的作用。尽管已经取得了重大进展，但交互性学习仍然是 HOI 检测中的一个具有挑战性的问题：现有方法通常会生成冗余的负 H-O 对提案，并且无法有效地提取交互对。虽然交互性已经在全身和局部层面进行了研究，并促进了 H-O 配对，但以前的工作只关注目标人一次（即，从局部角度），而忽略了其他人的信息。在本文中，我们认为同时比较多人的身体部位可以为我们提供更有用和补充的交互线索。也就是说，要从全局角度学习身体部位交互性：在对目标人的身体部位交互性进行分类时，不仅会从她自己身上探索视觉线索，还会从图像中的其他人身上探索视觉线索。我们基于自我关注构建身体部位显着性图，以挖掘跨人信息线索并学习所有身体部位之间的整体关系。我们在广泛使用的基准 HICO-DET 和 V-COCO 上评估了所提出的方法。凭借我们的新视角，整体的全球局部身体部位交互学习比最先进的技术取得了显着的进步。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/enlighten0707/Body-Part-Map-for-Interactiveness。 该论文提出一种通过挖掘跨人物身体部位交互线索来提升人类-物体交互（HOI）检测中交互性学习的新方法。 Xiaoqian Wu,Yong-Lu Li,Xinpeng Liu,Junyi Zhang,Yuzhe Wu,Cewu Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Rushi Jiao,Yichi Zhang,Le Ding,Rong Cai,Jicong Zhang
title: Learning with Limited Annotations: A Survey on Deep Semi-Supervised Learning for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 有限注释学习：医学图像分割深度半监督学习调查
abstract: Medical image segmentation is a fundamental and critical step in many image-guided clinical approaches. Recent success of deep learning-based segmentation methods usually relies on a large amount of labeled data, which is particularly difficult and costly to obtain especially in the medical imaging domain where only experts can provide reliable and accurate annotations. Semi-supervised learning has emerged as an appealing strategy and been widely applied to medical image segmentation tasks to train deep models with limited annotations. In this paper, we present a comprehensive review of recently proposed semi-supervised learning methods for medical image segmentation and summarized both the technical novelties and empirical results. Furthermore, we analyze and discuss the limitations and several unsolved problems of existing approaches. We hope this review could inspire the research community to explore solutions for this challenge and further promote the developments in medical image segmentation field.
summary: Medical image segmentation is a fundamental and critical step in many image-guided clinical approaches. Recent success of deep learning-based segmentation methods usually relies on a large amount of labeled data, which is particularly difficult and costly to obtain especially in the medical imaging domain where only experts can provide reliable and accurate annotations. Semi-supervised learning has emerged as an appealing strategy and been widely applied to medical image segmentation tasks to train deep models with limited annotations. In this paper, we present a comprehensive review of recently proposed semi-supervised learning methods for medical image segmentation and summarized both the technical novelties and empirical results. Furthermore, we analyze and discuss the limitations and several unsolved problems of existing approaches. We hope this review could inspire the research community to explore solutions for this challenge and further promote the developments in medical image segmentation field.
abstract_zh: 医学图像分割是许多图像引导临床方法中的基础和关键步骤。最近基于深度学习的分割方法的成功通常依赖于大量的标记数据，而获得这些数据特别困难且成本高昂，特别是在只有专家才能提供可靠且准确的注释的医学成像领域。半监督学习已成为一种有吸引力的策略，并广泛应用于医学图像分割任务，以训练具有有限注释的深度模型。在本文中，我们对最近提出的医学图像分割半监督学习方法进行了全面回顾，并总结了技术新颖性和实证结果。此外，我们分析和讨论了现有方法的局限性和几个未解决的问题。我们希望这篇综述能够激励研究界探索应对这一挑战的解决方案，并进一步促进医学图像分割领域的发展。

AI.tldr: 综述深度半监督学习在医学图像分割中的方法，总结技术创新与实验结果，并分析现有方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割依赖大量标注数据，但获取成本高且困难，半监督学习能有效利用有限标注数据，成为解决该问题的关键策略。
AI.method: 系统回顾和分类近期提出的半监督学习方法，分析其技术细节与实验结果，并讨论其局限性。
AI.result: 总结了半监督方法的技术创新与实验结果，指出现有方法的局限性及未解决的问题，如模型鲁棒性和泛化能力不足。
AI.conclusion: 希望激发研究社区探索更有效的半监督学习方法，以解决医学图像分割中数据标注不足的挑战，推动该领域进一步发展。

authors_text: Valerio Carruba,Safwan Aljbaae,Gabriel Caritá,Rita Cassia Domingos,Bruno Martins
title: Optimization of Artificial Neural Networks models applied to the identification of images of asteroids' resonant arguments
title_zh: 应用于小行星共振图像识别的人工神经网络模型的优化
comment: 15 pages, 13 figures, 3 tables. Accepted for publication at Celestial Mechanics and Dynamical Astronomy
comments: 15 pages, 13 figures, 3 tables. Accepted for publication at Celestial Mechanics and Dynamical Astronomy
abstract: The asteroidal main belt is crossed by a web of mean-motion and secular resonances, that occur when there is a commensurability between fundamental frequencies of the asteroids and planets. Traditionally, these objects were identified by visual inspection of the time evolution of their resonant argument, which is a combination of orbital elements of the asteroid and the perturbing planet(s). Since the population of asteroids affected by these resonances is, in some cases, of the order of several thousand, this has become a taxing task for a human observer. Recent works used Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) models to perform such task automatically. In this work, we compare the outcome of such models with those of some of the most advanced and publicly available CNN architectures, like the VGG, Inception and ResNet. The performance of such models is first tested and optimized for overfitting issues, using validation sets and a series of regularization techniques like data augmentation, dropout, and batch normalization. The three best-performing models were then used to predict the labels of larger testing databases containing thousands of images. The VGG model, with and without regularizations, proved to be the most efficient method to predict labels of large datasets. Since the Vera C. Rubin observatory is likely to discover up to four million new asteroids in the next few years, the use of these models might become quite valuable to identify populations of resonant minor bodies.
summary: The asteroidal main belt is crossed by a web of mean-motion and secular resonances, that occur when there is a commensurability between fundamental frequencies of the asteroids and planets. Traditionally, these objects were identified by visual inspection of the time evolution of their resonant argument, which is a combination of orbital elements of the asteroid and the perturbing planet(s). Since the population of asteroids affected by these resonances is, in some cases, of the order of several thousand, this has become a taxing task for a human observer. Recent works used Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) models to perform such task automatically. In this work, we compare the outcome of such models with those of some of the most advanced and publicly available CNN architectures, like the VGG, Inception and ResNet. The performance of such models is first tested and optimized for overfitting issues, using validation sets and a series of regularization techniques like data augmentation, dropout, and batch normalization. The three best-performing models were then used to predict the labels of larger testing databases containing thousands of images. The VGG model, with and without regularizations, proved to be the most efficient method to predict labels of large datasets. Since the Vera C. Rubin observatory is likely to discover up to four million new asteroids in the next few years, the use of these models might become quite valuable to identify populations of resonant minor bodies.
abstract_zh: 小行星主带穿过平均运动和长期共振网络，当小行星和行星的基本频率之间存在可通约性时就会发生这种情况。传统上，这些物体是通过目视检查其共振论证的时间演化来识别的，共振论证是小行星和扰动行星的轨道元素的组合。由于在某些情况下，受这些共振影响的小行星数量约为数千个，因此这对于人类观察者来说已成为一项艰巨的任务。最近的工作使用卷积神经网络（CNN）模型来自动执行此类任务。在这项工作中，我们将此类模型的结果与一些最先进且公开可用的 CNN 架构（例如 VGG、Inception 和 ResNet）的结果进行了比较。首先使用验证集和一系列正则化技术（例如数据增强、丢失和批量归一化）对此类模型的性能进行测试和针对过度拟合问题进行优化。然后，使用三个性能最佳的模型来预测包含数千张图像的大型测试数据库的标签。无论有没有正则化，VGG 模型都被证明是预测大型数据集标签的最有效方法。由于维拉·C·鲁宾天文台可能在未来几年内发现多达 400 万颗新小行星，因此使用这些模型对于识别共振小天体种群可能非常有价值。

AI.tldr: 本文通过优化人工神经网络模型，用于自动识别小行星共振参数图像，替代传统人工分析方法。
AI.motivation: 传统人工分析小行星共振参数效率低下，面对数以千计的天体时负担过重，需自动化方法提高识别效率。
AI.method: 比较VGG、Inception和ResNet等先进CNN架构，利用验证集及数据增强、dropout、批量归一化等技术优化模型性能。
AI.result: VGG模型（含/不含正则化）在预测大规模数据集标签时表现最优，准确率显著高于其他架构。
AI.conclusion: 随着新小行星数量激增，优化后的神经网络模型将成为识别共振天体的关键工具，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Songjie Yang,Baojuan Liu,Zhiqin Hong,Zhongpei Zhang
title: Bayesian Optimization-Based Beam Alignment for MmWave MIMO Communication Systems
title_zh: 用于毫米波 MIMO 通信系统的基于贝叶斯优化的波束对准
abstract: Due to the very narrow beam used in millimeter wave communication (mmWave), beam alignment (BA) is a critical issue. In this work, we investigate the issue of mmWave BA and present a novel beam alignment scheme on the basis of a machine learning strategy, Bayesian optimization (BO). In this context, we consider the beam alignment issue to be a black box function and then use BO to find the possible optimal beam pair. During the BA procedure, this strategy exploits information from the measured beam pairs to predict the best beam pair. In addition, we suggest a novel BO algorithm based on the gradient boosting regression tree model. The simulation results demonstrate the spectral efficiency performance of our proposed schemes for BA using three different surrogate models. They also demonstrate that the proposed schemes can achieve spectral efficiency with a small overhead when compared to the orthogonal match pursuit (OMP) algorithm and the Thompson sampling-based multi-armed bandit (TS-MAB) method.
summary: Due to the very narrow beam used in millimeter wave communication (mmWave), beam alignment (BA) is a critical issue. In this work, we investigate the issue of mmWave BA and present a novel beam alignment scheme on the basis of a machine learning strategy, Bayesian optimization (BO). In this context, we consider the beam alignment issue to be a black box function and then use BO to find the possible optimal beam pair. During the BA procedure, this strategy exploits information from the measured beam pairs to predict the best beam pair. In addition, we suggest a novel BO algorithm based on the gradient boosting regression tree model. The simulation results demonstrate the spectral efficiency performance of our proposed schemes for BA using three different surrogate models. They also demonstrate that the proposed schemes can achieve spectral efficiency with a small overhead when compared to the orthogonal match pursuit (OMP) algorithm and the Thompson sampling-based multi-armed bandit (TS-MAB) method.
abstract_zh: 由于毫米波通信 (mmWave) 中使用的光束非常窄，因此光束对准 (BA) 是一个关键问题。在这项工作中，我们研究了毫米波 BA 问题，并提出了一种基于机器学习策略贝叶斯优化 (BO) 的新型波束对准方案。在这种情况下，我们将光束对准问题视为黑盒函数，然后使用 BO 来找到可能的最佳光束对。在 BA 过程中，该策略利用测量的光束对的信息来预测最佳光束对。此外，我们提出了一种基于梯度提升回归树模型的新颖的 BO 算法。仿真结果证明了我们提出的使用三种不同替代模型的 BA 方案的频谱效率性能。他们还证明，与正交匹配追踪（OMP）算法和基于汤普森采样的多臂老虎机（TS-MAB）方法相比，所提出的方案可以以较小的开销实现频谱效率。

AI.tldr: 本文针对毫米波通信中的波束对齐问题，提出基于贝叶斯优化的新型波束对齐方案。
AI.motivation: 毫米波通信因波束狭窄导致波束对齐难度大，传统方法效率不足，需更优算法降低开销并提升性能。
AI.method: 将波束对齐建模为黑箱函数，采用贝叶斯优化框架结合梯度提升回归树模型优化搜索策略。
AI.result: 仿真表明，所提方案在频谱效率上优于OMP和TS-MAB方法，且显著降低系统开销。
AI.conclusion: 基于贝叶斯优化的波束对齐方法在低开销下实现高效通信，为毫米波MIMO系统提供有效解决方案。

search_text: Bayesian Optimization-Based Beam Alignment for MmWave MIMO Communication Systems 用于毫米波 MIMO 通信系统的基于贝叶斯优化的波束对准 Due to the very narrow beam used in millimeter wave communication (mmWave), beam alignment (BA) is a critical issue. In this work, we investigate the issue of mmWave BA and present a novel beam alignment scheme on the basis of a machine learning strategy, Bayesian optimization (BO). In this context, we consider the beam alignment issue to be a black box function and then use BO to find the possible optimal beam pair. During the BA procedure, this strategy exploits information from the measured beam pairs to predict the best beam pair. In addition, we suggest a novel BO algorithm based on the gradient boosting regression tree model. The simulation results demonstrate the spectral efficiency performance of our proposed schemes for BA using three different surrogate models. They also demonstrate that the proposed schemes can achieve spectral efficiency with a small overhead when compared to the orthogonal match pursuit (OMP) algorithm and the Thompson sampling-based multi-armed bandit (TS-MAB) method. 由于毫米波通信 (mmWave) 中使用的光束非常窄，因此光束对准 (BA) 是一个关键问题。在这项工作中，我们研究了毫米波 BA 问题，并提出了一种基于机器学习策略贝叶斯优化 (BO) 的新型波束对准方案。在这种情况下，我们将光束对准问题视为黑盒函数，然后使用 BO 来找到可能的最佳光束对。在 BA 过程中，该策略利用测量的光束对的信息来预测最佳光束对。此外，我们提出了一种基于梯度提升回归树模型的新颖的 BO 算法。仿真结果证明了我们提出的使用三种不同替代模型的 BA 方案的频谱效率性能。他们还证明，与正交匹配追踪（OMP）算法和基于汤普森采样的多臂老虎机（TS-MAB）方法相比，所提出的方案可以以较小的开销实现频谱效率。 本文针对毫米波通信中的波束对齐问题，提出基于贝叶斯优化的新型波束对齐方案。 Songjie Yang,Baojuan Liu,Zhiqin Hong,Zhongpei Zhang eess.SP,cs.AI

authors_text: Gongjie Zhang,Zhipeng Luo,Jiaxing Huang,Shijian Lu,Eric P. Xing
title: Semantic-Aligned Matching for Enhanced DETR Convergence and Multi-Scale Feature Fusion
title_zh: 用于增强 DETR 收敛和多尺度特征融合的语义对齐匹配
abstract: The recently proposed DEtection TRansformer (DETR) has established a fully end-to-end paradigm for object detection. However, DETR suffers from slow training convergence, which hinders its applicability to various detection tasks. We observe that DETR's slow convergence is largely attributed to the difficulty in matching object queries to relevant regions due to the unaligned semantics between object queries and encoded image features. With this observation, we design Semantic-Aligned-Matching DETR++ (SAM-DETR++) to accelerate DETR's convergence and improve detection performance. The core of SAM-DETR++ is a plug-and-play module that projects object queries and encoded image features into the same feature embedding space, where each object query can be easily matched to relevant regions with similar semantics. Besides, SAM-DETR++ searches for multiple representative keypoints and exploits their features for semantic-aligned matching with enhanced representation capacity. Furthermore, SAM-DETR++ can effectively fuse multi-scale features in a coarse-to-fine manner on the basis of the designed semantic-aligned matching. Extensive experiments show that the proposed SAM-DETR++ achieves superior convergence speed and competitive detection accuracy. Additionally, as a plug-and-play method, SAM-DETR++ can complement existing DETR convergence solutions with even better performance, achieving 44.8% AP with merely 12 training epochs and 49.1% AP with 50 training epochs on COCO val2017 with ResNet-50. Codes are available at https://github.com/ZhangGongjie/SAM-DETR .
summary: The recently proposed DEtection TRansformer (DETR) has established a fully end-to-end paradigm for object detection. However, DETR suffers from slow training convergence, which hinders its applicability to various detection tasks. We observe that DETR's slow convergence is largely attributed to the difficulty in matching object queries to relevant regions due to the unaligned semantics between object queries and encoded image features. With this observation, we design Semantic-Aligned-Matching DETR++ (SAM-DETR++) to accelerate DETR's convergence and improve detection performance. The core of SAM-DETR++ is a plug-and-play module that projects object queries and encoded image features into the same feature embedding space, where each object query can be easily matched to relevant regions with similar semantics. Besides, SAM-DETR++ searches for multiple representative keypoints and exploits their features for semantic-aligned matching with enhanced representation capacity. Furthermore, SAM-DETR++ can effectively fuse multi-scale features in a coarse-to-fine manner on the basis of the designed semantic-aligned matching. Extensive experiments show that the proposed SAM-DETR++ achieves superior convergence speed and competitive detection accuracy. Additionally, as a plug-and-play method, SAM-DETR++ can complement existing DETR convergence solutions with even better performance, achieving 44.8% AP with merely 12 training epochs and 49.1% AP with 50 training epochs on COCO val2017 with ResNet-50. Codes are available at https://github.com/ZhangGongjie/SAM-DETR .
abstract_zh: 最近提出的 DEtection TRansformer (DETR) 为目标检测建立了完全端到端的范例。然而，DETR 的训练收敛速度慢，这阻碍了其对各种检测任务的适用性。我们观察到，DETR 收敛缓慢很大程度上归因于由于对象查询和编码图像特征之间的语义不一致而难以将对象查询与相关区域匹配。根据这一观察，我们设计了语义对齐匹配 DETR++（SAM-DETR++）来加速 DETR 的收敛并提高检测性能。 SAM-DETR++的核心是一个即插即用模块，它将对象查询和编码图像特征投影到相同的特征嵌入空间中，其中每个对象查询可以轻松地与具有相似语义的相关区域匹配。此外，SAM-DETR++ 搜索多个代表性关键点，并利用其特征进行语义对齐匹配，并增强表示能力。此外，SAM-DETR++可以在设计的语义对齐匹配的基础上，以由粗到细的方式有效地融合多尺度特征。大量实验表明，所提出的 SAM-DETR++ 实现了优异的收敛速度和有竞争力的检测精度。此外，作为一种即插即用的方法，SAM-DETR++ 可以以更好的性能补充现有的 DETR 收敛解决方案，在使用 ResNet-50 的 COCO val2017 上仅用 12 个训练周期即可实现 44.8% 的 AP，通过 50 个训练周期实现 49.1% 的 AP。代码可在 https://github.com/ZhangGongjie/SAM-DETR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAM-DETR++方法，通过语义对齐匹配加速DETR收敛并提升多尺度特征融合效果。
AI.motivation: DETR存在训练收敛速度慢的问题，主要原因是物体查询与图像特征语义未对齐导致匹配困难。
AI.method: 设计可插拔的语义对齐模块，将物体查询与图像特征投影到统一嵌入空间，并利用多尺度关键点特征增强匹配能力。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上，使用ResNet-50仅需12个训练周期即可达到44.8% AP，50周期达49.1% AP。
AI.conclusion: SAM-DETR++有效解决了DETR收敛问题，同时提升检测精度，可与现有方法兼容增强性能。

authors_text: Meng Li,Shangyin Gao,Yihui Feng,Yibo Shi,Jing Wang
title: Content-oriented learned image compression
title_zh: 面向内容的学习图像压缩
abstract: In recent years, with the development of deep neural networks, end-to-end optimized image compression has made significant progress and exceeded the classic methods in terms of rate-distortion performance. However, most learning-based image compression methods are unlabeled and do not consider image semantics or content when optimizing the model. In fact, human eyes have different sensitivities to different content, so the image content also needs to be considered. In this paper, we propose a content-oriented image compression method, which handles different kinds of image contents with different strategies. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method achieves competitive subjective results compared with state-of-the-art end-to-end learned image compression methods or classic methods.
summary: In recent years, with the development of deep neural networks, end-to-end optimized image compression has made significant progress and exceeded the classic methods in terms of rate-distortion performance. However, most learning-based image compression methods are unlabeled and do not consider image semantics or content when optimizing the model. In fact, human eyes have different sensitivities to different content, so the image content also needs to be considered. In this paper, we propose a content-oriented image compression method, which handles different kinds of image contents with different strategies. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method achieves competitive subjective results compared with state-of-the-art end-to-end learned image compression methods or classic methods.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着深度神经网络的发展，端到端优化图像压缩取得了重大进展，在率失真性能方面超越了经典方法。然而，大多数基于学习的图像压缩方法都是无标签的，并且在优化模型时不考虑图像语义或内容。事实上，人眼对不同的内容有不同的敏感度，因此图像内容也需要考虑。在本文中，我们提出了一种面向内容的图像压缩方法，该方法用不同的策略处理不同类型的图像内容。大量的实验表明，与最先进的端到端学习图像压缩方法或经典方法相比，所提出的方法取得了有竞争力的主观结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向内容的图像压缩方法，通过针对不同图像内容采用不同策略优化压缩效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的图像压缩方法未考虑图像语义和内容差异，而人眼对不同内容的敏感度不同，需在压缩中加以区分。
AI.method: 设计内容感知的压缩策略，根据图像内容特征动态调整编码与解码过程中的参数和处理方式。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在主观视觉质量上与最先进的端到端压缩方法及经典方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 考虑图像内容差异的压缩方法能更有效平衡压缩率与画质，为后续研究提供新方向。
