authors_text: Ákos Utasi
title: PEA: Improving the Performance of ReLU Networks for Free by Using Progressive Ensemble Activations
title_zh: PEA：通过使用渐进式集成激活免费提高 ReLU 网络的性能
comment: Published in Efficient Deep Learning for Computer Vision (ECV) CVPR Workshop 2022
comments: Published in Efficient Deep Learning for Computer Vision (ECV) CVPR Workshop 2022
abstract: In recent years novel activation functions have been proposed to improve the performance of neural networks, and they show superior performance compared to the ReLU counterpart. However, there are environments, where the availability of complex activations is limited, and usually only the ReLU is supported. In this paper we propose methods that can be used to improve the performance of ReLU networks by using these efficient novel activations during model training. More specifically, we propose ensemble activations that are composed of the ReLU and one of these novel activations. Furthermore, the coefficients of the ensemble are neither fixed nor learned, but are progressively updated during the training process in a way that by the end of the training only the ReLU activations remain active in the network and the other activations can be removed. This means that in inference time the network contains ReLU activations only. We perform extensive evaluations on the ImageNet classification task using various compact network architectures and various novel activation functions. Results show 0.2-0.8% top-1 accuracy gain, which confirms the applicability of the proposed methods. Furthermore, we demonstrate the proposed methods on semantic segmentation and we boost the performance of a compact segmentation network by 0.34% mIOU on the Cityscapes dataset.
summary: In recent years novel activation functions have been proposed to improve the performance of neural networks, and they show superior performance compared to the ReLU counterpart. However, there are environments, where the availability of complex activations is limited, and usually only the ReLU is supported. In this paper we propose methods that can be used to improve the performance of ReLU networks by using these efficient novel activations during model training. More specifically, we propose ensemble activations that are composed of the ReLU and one of these novel activations. Furthermore, the coefficients of the ensemble are neither fixed nor learned, but are progressively updated during the training process in a way that by the end of the training only the ReLU activations remain active in the network and the other activations can be removed. This means that in inference time the network contains ReLU activations only. We perform extensive evaluations on the ImageNet classification task using various compact network architectures and various novel activation functions. Results show 0.2-0.8% top-1 accuracy gain, which confirms the applicability of the proposed methods. Furthermore, we demonstrate the proposed methods on semantic segmentation and we boost the performance of a compact segmentation network by 0.34% mIOU on the Cityscapes dataset.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们提出了新的激活函数来提高神经网络的性能，并且与 ReLU 对应函数相比，它们表现出了更优越的性能。然而，在某些环境中，复杂激活的可用性受到限制，并且通常仅支持 ReLU。在本文中，我们提出了通过在模型训练期间使用这些有效的新颖激活来提高 ReLU 网络性能的方法。更具体地说，我们提出了由 ReLU 和这些新颖的激活之一组成的集成激活。此外，集成的系数既不是固定的，也不是学习的，而是在训练过程中逐步更新，在训练结束时，只有 ReLU 激活在网络中保持活动状态，而其他激活可以被删除。这意味着在推理时间内网络仅包含 ReLU 激活。我们使用各种紧凑的网络架构和各种新颖的激活函数对 ImageNet 分类任务进行广泛的评估。结果显示 top-1 精度增益为 0.2-0.8%，这证实了所提出方法的适用性。此外，我们展示了所提出的语义分割方法，并且在 Cityscapes 数据集上将紧凑分割网络的性能提高了 0.34% mIOU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PEA的方法，通过在训练过程中使用新型激活函数与ReLU的渐进式集成激活，提升ReLU网络的性能，同时保持推理阶段仅使用ReLU。
AI.motivation: 尽管新型激活函数在性能上优于ReLU，但在某些环境中仅支持ReLU。本文旨在通过训练时引入其他激活函数，最终在推理时回归到ReLU，以兼顾性能与兼容性。
AI.method: 提出渐进式集成激活（PEA），在训练中动态组合ReLU与新型激活函数，通过逐步调整系数，使训练结束时仅保留ReLU，确保推理阶段无需额外激活函数。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类任务中，使用多种紧凑网络架构和新型激活函数，实现0.2-0.8%的top-1准确率提升；在Cityscapes数据集上，分割网络mIOU提升0.34%。
AI.conclusion: PEA方法无需修改网络结构或增加推理复杂度，即可有效提升ReLU网络性能，验证了其在实际应用中的可行性。

search_text: PEA: Improving the Performance of ReLU Networks for Free by Using Progressive Ensemble Activations PEA：通过使用渐进式集成激活免费提高 ReLU 网络的性能 In recent years novel activation functions have been proposed to improve the performance of neural networks, and they show superior performance compared to the ReLU counterpart. However, there are environments, where the availability of complex activations is limited, and usually only the ReLU is supported. In this paper we propose methods that can be used to improve the performance of ReLU networks by using these efficient novel activations during model training. More specifically, we propose ensemble activations that are composed of the ReLU and one of these novel activations. Furthermore, the coefficients of the ensemble are neither fixed nor learned, but are progressively updated during the training process in a way that by the end of the training only the ReLU activations remain active in the network and the other activations can be removed. This means that in inference time the network contains ReLU activations only. We perform extensive evaluations on the ImageNet classification task using various compact network architectures and various novel activation functions. Results show 0.2-0.8% top-1 accuracy gain, which confirms the applicability of the proposed methods. Furthermore, we demonstrate the proposed methods on semantic segmentation and we boost the performance of a compact segmentation network by 0.34% mIOU on the Cityscapes dataset. 近年来，人们提出了新的激活函数来提高神经网络的性能，并且与 ReLU 对应函数相比，它们表现出了更优越的性能。然而，在某些环境中，复杂激活的可用性受到限制，并且通常仅支持 ReLU。在本文中，我们提出了通过在模型训练期间使用这些有效的新颖激活来提高 ReLU 网络性能的方法。更具体地说，我们提出了由 ReLU 和这些新颖的激活之一组成的集成激活。此外，集成的系数既不是固定的，也不是学习的，而是在训练过程中逐步更新，在训练结束时，只有 ReLU 激活在网络中保持活动状态，而其他激活可以被删除。这意味着在推理时间内网络仅包含 ReLU 激活。我们使用各种紧凑的网络架构和各种新颖的激活函数对 ImageNet 分类任务进行广泛的评估。结果显示 top-1 精度增益为 0.2-0.8%，这证实了所提出方法的适用性。此外，我们展示了所提出的语义分割方法，并且在 Cityscapes 数据集上将紧凑分割网络的性能提高了 0.34% mIOU。 本文提出了一种名为PEA的方法，通过在训练过程中使用新型激活函数与ReLU的渐进式集成激活，提升ReLU网络的性能，同时保持推理阶段仅使用ReLU。 Ákos Utasi cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Chenning Li,Li Liu,Zhichao Cao,Mi Zhang
title: WiVelo: Fine-grained Walking Velocity Estimation for Wi-Fi Passive Tracking
title_zh: WiVelo：用于 Wi-Fi 被动跟踪的细粒度步行速度估计
abstract: Passive human tracking via Wi-Fi has been researched broadly in the past decade. Besides straight-forward anchor point localization, velocity is another vital sign adopted by the existing approaches to infer user trajectory. However, state-of-the-art Wi-Fi velocity estimation relies on Doppler-Frequency-Shift (DFS) which suffers from the inevitable signal noise incurring unbounded velocity errors, further degrading the tracking accuracy. In this paper, we present WiVelo\footnote{Code\&datasets are available at \textit{https://github.com/liecn/WiVelo\_SECON22}} that explores new spatial-temporal signal correlation features observed from different antennas to achieve accurate velocity estimation. First, we use subcarrier shift distribution (SSD) extracted from channel state information (CSI) to define two correlation features for direction and speed estimation, separately. Then, we design a mesh model calculated by the antennas' locations to enable a fine-grained velocity estimation with bounded direction error. Finally, with the continuously estimated velocity, we develop an end-to-end trajectory recovery algorithm to mitigate velocity outliers with the property of walking velocity continuity. We implement WiVelo on commodity Wi-Fi hardware and extensively evaluate its tracking accuracy in various environments. The experimental results show our median and 90\% tracking errors are 0.47~m and 1.06~m, which are half and a quarter of state-of-the-arts.
summary: Passive human tracking via Wi-Fi has been researched broadly in the past decade. Besides straight-forward anchor point localization, velocity is another vital sign adopted by the existing approaches to infer user trajectory. However, state-of-the-art Wi-Fi velocity estimation relies on Doppler-Frequency-Shift (DFS) which suffers from the inevitable signal noise incurring unbounded velocity errors, further degrading the tracking accuracy. In this paper, we present WiVelo\footnote{Code\&datasets are available at \textit{https://github.com/liecn/WiVelo\_SECON22}} that explores new spatial-temporal signal correlation features observed from different antennas to achieve accurate velocity estimation. First, we use subcarrier shift distribution (SSD) extracted from channel state information (CSI) to define two correlation features for direction and speed estimation, separately. Then, we design a mesh model calculated by the antennas' locations to enable a fine-grained velocity estimation with bounded direction error. Finally, with the continuously estimated velocity, we develop an end-to-end trajectory recovery algorithm to mitigate velocity outliers with the property of walking velocity continuity. We implement WiVelo on commodity Wi-Fi hardware and extensively evaluate its tracking accuracy in various environments. The experimental results show our median and 90\% tracking errors are 0.47~m and 1.06~m, which are half and a quarter of state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年里，通过 Wi-Fi 进行的被动人体跟踪得到了广泛的研究。除了直接的锚点定位之外，速度是现有方法推断用户轨迹所采用的另一个重要标志。然而，最先进的 Wi-Fi 速度估计依赖于多普勒频移 (DFS)，它不可避免地会受到信号噪声的影响，从而导致无限的速度误差，从而进一步降低跟踪精度。在本文中，我们提出了 WiVelo\footnote{代码\&数据集可在 \textit{https://github.com/liecn/WiVelo\_SECON22}} 获取，探索从不同天线观察到的新时空信号相关特征，以实现准确的速度估计。首先，我们使用从信道状态信息（CSI）中提取的子载波移位分布（SSD）来分别定义用于方向和速度估计的两个相关特征。然后，我们设计了一个根据天线位置计算的网格模型，以实现具有有限方向误差的细粒度速度估计。最后，通过连续估计的速度，我们开发了一种端到端轨迹恢复算法，以通过行走速度连续性的特性来减轻速度异常值。我们在商用 Wi-Fi 硬件上实施 WiVelo，并广泛评估其在各种环境中的跟踪准确性。实验结果表明，我们的中值和 90% 跟踪误差分别为 0.47~m 和 1.06~m，分别是最先进技术的一半和四分之一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Wi-Fi的精细步速估计方法WiVelo，用于提高被动跟踪的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的Wi-Fi速度估计方法依赖于多普勒频移，但受信号噪声影响，存在速度误差大、跟踪精度低的问题。
AI.method: 本文通过提取子载波偏移分布（SSD）定义方向和速度估计的两个相关特征，并设计基于天线位置的网格模型，实现细粒度速度估计。同时，开发了端到端的轨迹恢复算法，以消除速度异常值。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，本文方法的中位数和90%跟踪误差分别为0.47米和1.06米，是现有方法的一半和四分之一。
AI.conclusion: WiVelo通过利用空间-时间信号相关特征，有效提高了Wi-Fi被动跟踪的精度，具有重要的实际应用价值。

authors_text: Radu Alexandru Rosu,Shunsuke Saito,Ziyan Wang,Chenglei Wu,Sven Behnke,Giljoo Nam
title: Neural Strands: Learning Hair Geometry and Appearance from Multi-View Images
title_zh: 神经链：从多视图图像中学习头发几何形状和外观
abstract: We present Neural Strands, a novel learning framework for modeling accurate hair geometry and appearance from multi-view image inputs. The learned hair model can be rendered in real-time from any viewpoint with high-fidelity view-dependent effects. Our model achieves intuitive shape and style control unlike volumetric counterparts. To enable these properties, we propose a novel hair representation based on a neural scalp texture that encodes the geometry and appearance of individual strands at each texel location. Furthermore, we introduce a novel neural rendering framework based on rasterization of the learned hair strands. Our neural rendering is strand-accurate and anti-aliased, making the rendering view-consistent and photorealistic. Combining appearance with a multi-view geometric prior, we enable, for the first time, the joint learning of appearance and explicit hair geometry from a multi-view setup. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach in terms of fidelity and efficiency for various hairstyles.
summary: We present Neural Strands, a novel learning framework for modeling accurate hair geometry and appearance from multi-view image inputs. The learned hair model can be rendered in real-time from any viewpoint with high-fidelity view-dependent effects. Our model achieves intuitive shape and style control unlike volumetric counterparts. To enable these properties, we propose a novel hair representation based on a neural scalp texture that encodes the geometry and appearance of individual strands at each texel location. Furthermore, we introduce a novel neural rendering framework based on rasterization of the learned hair strands. Our neural rendering is strand-accurate and anti-aliased, making the rendering view-consistent and photorealistic. Combining appearance with a multi-view geometric prior, we enable, for the first time, the joint learning of appearance and explicit hair geometry from a multi-view setup. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach in terms of fidelity and efficiency for various hairstyles.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Neural Strands，这是一种新颖的学习框架，用于根据多视图图像输入对精确的头发几何形状和外观进行建模。学习到的头发模型可以从任何视角实时渲染，并具有高保真视图相关效果。与体积模型不同，我们的模型实现了直观的形状和样式控制。为了实现这些属性，我们提出了一种基于神经头皮纹理的新型头发表示，该神经头皮纹理对每个纹素位置处各股的几何形状和外观进行编码。此外，我们引入了一种基于学习发丝光栅化的新型神经渲染框架。我们的神经渲染是线精确且抗锯齿的，使渲染视图一致且逼真。将外观与多视图几何先验相结合，我们首次实现了从多视图设置中联合学习外观和显式头发几何形状。我们展示了我们的方法在各种发型的保真度和效率方面的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Neural Strands框架，通过多视角图像学习头发的几何形状和外观表示，并实现高质量实时渲染。
AI.motivation: 传统体积模型难以实现头发形状与风格的直观控制，且多视角几何先验与外观联合学习尚未被有效解决。
AI.method: 基于神经头皮纹理编码单根发丝的几何与外观信息，结合 strand-accurate 抗锯齿渲染框架，首次实现多视角下外观与显式几何的联合学习。
AI.result: 在多种发型上验证了方法在保真度与效率上的优势，渲染结果具有视角一致性与照片级真实感。
AI.conclusion: Neural Strands通过创新表示与渲染方法，突破了传统头发建模的局限性，为多视角几何外观联合学习提供了新范式。

ai_content_json.method: 基于神经头皮纹理编码单根发丝的几何与外观信息，结合 strand-accurate 抗锯齿渲染框架，首次实现多视角下外观与显式几何的联合学习。
ai_content_json.result: 在多种发型上验证了方法在保真度与效率上的优势，渲染结果具有视角一致性与照片级真实感。
ai_content_json.conclusion: Neural Strands通过创新表示与渲染方法，突破了传统头发建模的局限性，为多视角几何外观联合学习提供了新范式。

tldr: 本文提出Neural Strands框架，通过多视角图像学习头发的几何形状和外观表示，并实现高质量实时渲染。
motivation: 传统体积模型难以实现头发形状与风格的直观控制，且多视角几何先验与外观联合学习尚未被有效解决。
method: 基于神经头皮纹理编码单根发丝的几何与外观信息，结合 strand-accurate 抗锯齿渲染框架，首次实现多视角下外观与显式几何的联合学习。
result: 在多种发型上验证了方法在保真度与效率上的优势，渲染结果具有视角一致性与照片级真实感。
conclusion: Neural Strands通过创新表示与渲染方法，突破了传统头发建模的局限性，为多视角几何外观联合学习提供了新范式。
search_text: Neural Strands: Learning Hair Geometry and Appearance from Multi-View Images 神经链：从多视图图像中学习头发几何形状和外观 We present Neural Strands, a novel learning framework for modeling accurate hair geometry and appearance from multi-view image inputs. The learned hair model can be rendered in real-time from any viewpoint with high-fidelity view-dependent effects. Our model achieves intuitive shape and style control unlike volumetric counterparts. To enable these properties, we propose a novel hair representation based on a neural scalp texture that encodes the geometry and appearance of individual strands at each texel location. Furthermore, we introduce a novel neural rendering framework based on rasterization of the learned hair strands. Our neural rendering is strand-accurate and anti-aliased, making the rendering view-consistent and photorealistic. Combining appearance with a multi-view geometric prior, we enable, for the first time, the joint learning of appearance and explicit hair geometry from a multi-view setup. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach in terms of fidelity and efficiency for various hairstyles. 我们提出了 Neural Strands，这是一种新颖的学习框架，用于根据多视图图像输入对精确的头发几何形状和外观进行建模。学习到的头发模型可以从任何视角实时渲染，并具有高保真视图相关效果。与体积模型不同，我们的模型实现了直观的形状和样式控制。为了实现这些属性，我们提出了一种基于神经头皮纹理的新型头发表示，该神经头皮纹理对每个纹素位置处各股的几何形状和外观进行编码。此外，我们引入了一种基于学习发丝光栅化的新型神经渲染框架。我们的神经渲染是线精确且抗锯齿的，使渲染视图一致且逼真。将外观与多视图几何先验相结合，我们首次实现了从多视图设置中联合学习外观和显式头发几何形状。我们展示了我们的方法在各种发型的保真度和效率方面的功效。 本文提出Neural Strands框架，通过多视角图像学习头发的几何形状和外观表示，并实现高质量实时渲染。 Radu Alexandru Rosu,Shunsuke Saito,Ziyan Wang,Chenglei Wu,Sven Behnke,Giljoo Nam cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Miguel Ángel Muñoz-Bañón,Jan-Hendrik Pauls,Haohao Hu,Christoph Stiller,Francisco A. Candelas,Fernando Torres
title: Robust Self-Tuning Data Association for Geo-Referencing Using Lane Markings
title_zh: 使用车道标记进行地理参考的鲁棒自调整数据关联
comment: The paper was published in the journal "IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters" (RA-L)
comments: The paper was published in the journal "IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters" (RA-L)
abstract: Localization in aerial imagery-based maps offers many advantages, such as global consistency, geo-referenced maps, and the availability of publicly accessible data. However, the landmarks that can be observed from both aerial imagery and on-board sensors is limited. This leads to ambiguities or aliasing during the data association. Building upon a highly informative representation (that allows efficient data association), this paper presents a complete pipeline for resolving these ambiguities. Its core is a robust self-tuning data association that adapts the search area depending on the entropy of the measurements. Additionally, to smooth the final result, we adjust the information matrix for the associated data as a function of the relative transform produced by the data association process. We evaluate our method on real data from urban and rural scenarios around the city of Karlsruhe in Germany. We compare state-of-the-art outlier mitigation methods with our self-tuning approach, demonstrating a considerable improvement, especially for outer-urban scenarios.
summary: Localization in aerial imagery-based maps offers many advantages, such as global consistency, geo-referenced maps, and the availability of publicly accessible data. However, the landmarks that can be observed from both aerial imagery and on-board sensors is limited. This leads to ambiguities or aliasing during the data association. Building upon a highly informative representation (that allows efficient data association), this paper presents a complete pipeline for resolving these ambiguities. Its core is a robust self-tuning data association that adapts the search area depending on the entropy of the measurements. Additionally, to smooth the final result, we adjust the information matrix for the associated data as a function of the relative transform produced by the data association process. We evaluate our method on real data from urban and rural scenarios around the city of Karlsruhe in Germany. We compare state-of-the-art outlier mitigation methods with our self-tuning approach, demonstrating a considerable improvement, especially for outer-urban scenarios.
abstract_zh: 基于航空图像的地图的定位具有许多优势，例如全球一致性、地理参考地图以及可公开访问的数据的可用性。然而，通过航空图像和机载传感器可以观察到的地标是有限的。这会导致数据关联期间出现歧义或混叠。基于信息丰富的表示（允许有效的数据关联），本文提出了解决这些歧义的完整管道。其核心是强大的自调整数据关联，可根据测量的熵来调整搜索区域。此外，为了平滑最终结果，我们根据数据关联过程产生的相对变换来调整关联数据的信息矩阵。我们根据德国卡尔斯鲁厄市周围城乡场景的真实数据评估我们的方法。我们将最先进的异常值缓解方法与我们的自调整方法进行了比较，证明了显着的改进，特别是对于外城区场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于车道标记的鲁棒自适应数据关联方法，用于解决航拍图像与车载传感器在地理定位中的数据关联歧义问题。
AI.motivation: 航拍图像与车载传感器可观察的地标有限，导致数据关联时出现歧义或混叠，现有方法在城乡区域定位精度不足。
AI.method: 通过测量熵动态调整搜索区域，并根据数据关联结果调整信息矩阵，构建完整的自适应数据关联流程。
AI.result: 在德国卡尔斯鲁厄城乡场景的实测数据中，相较现有方法显著提升了定位精度，尤其在非城市区域表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 自适应数据关联方法有效缓解了地标稀疏场景下的定位歧义问题，为复杂环境地理定位提供了新思路。

authors_text: Junjun Pan,Michael K. Ng
title: Separable Quaternion Matrix Factorization for Polarization Images
title_zh: 偏振图像的可分离四元数矩阵分解
abstract: Polarization is a unique characteristic of transverse wave and is represented by Stokes parameters. Analysis of polarization states can reveal valuable information about the sources. In this paper, we propose a separable low-rank quaternion linear mixing model to polarized signals: we assume each column of the source factor matrix equals a column of polarized data matrix and refer to the corresponding problem as separable quaternion matrix factorization (SQMF). We discuss some properties of the matrix that can be decomposed by SQMF. To determine the source factor matrix in quaternion space, we propose a heuristic algorithm called quaternion successive projection algorithm (QSPA) inspired by the successive projection algorithm. To guarantee the effectiveness of QSPA, a new normalization operator is proposed for the quaternion matrix. We use a block coordinate descent algorithm to compute nonnegative factor activation matrix in real number space. We test our method on the applications of polarization image representation and spectro-polarimetric imaging unmixing to verify its effectiveness.
summary: Polarization is a unique characteristic of transverse wave and is represented by Stokes parameters. Analysis of polarization states can reveal valuable information about the sources. In this paper, we propose a separable low-rank quaternion linear mixing model to polarized signals: we assume each column of the source factor matrix equals a column of polarized data matrix and refer to the corresponding problem as separable quaternion matrix factorization (SQMF). We discuss some properties of the matrix that can be decomposed by SQMF. To determine the source factor matrix in quaternion space, we propose a heuristic algorithm called quaternion successive projection algorithm (QSPA) inspired by the successive projection algorithm. To guarantee the effectiveness of QSPA, a new normalization operator is proposed for the quaternion matrix. We use a block coordinate descent algorithm to compute nonnegative factor activation matrix in real number space. We test our method on the applications of polarization image representation and spectro-polarimetric imaging unmixing to verify its effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 偏振是横波独有的特性，用斯托克斯参数来表示。偏振态分析可以揭示有关光源的有价值的信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对偏振信号的可分离低秩四元数线性混合模型：我们假设源因子矩阵的每一列等于一列偏振数据矩阵，并将相应的问题称为可分离四元数矩阵分解（SQMF）。我们讨论可以由 SQMF 分解的矩阵的一些属性。为了确定四元数空间中的源因子矩阵，受连续投影算法的启发，我们提出了一种启发式算法，称为四元数连续投影算法（QSPA）。为了保证QSPA的有效性，提出了一种新的四元数矩阵归一化算子。我们使用块坐标下降算法来计算实数空间中的非负因子激活矩阵。我们在偏振图像表示和光谱偏振成像解混合的应用中测试了我们的方法，以验证其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可分离的四元数矩阵分解方法（SQMF），用于处理偏振图像的分解与分析。
AI.motivation: 偏振状态分析能揭示光源信息，但现有方法难以有效处理四元数形式的偏振数据，需建立更适应的数学模型。
AI.method: 构建基于四元数的低秩线性混合模型，提出四元数连续投影算法（QSPA）和归一化算子，并结合块坐标下降法求解非负因子矩阵。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在偏振图像表示和光谱偏振成像解混任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SQMF通过四元数分解有效捕捉偏振数据特性，为偏振信号分析提供了新方法。

authors_text: Adel Nikfarjam,Anh Viet Do,Frank Neumann
title: Analysis of Quality Diversity Algorithms for the Knapsack Problem
title_zh: 背包问题的质量多样性算法分析
abstract: Quality diversity (QD) algorithms have been shown to be very successful when dealing with problems in areas such as robotics, games and combinatorial optimization. They aim to maximize the quality of solutions for different regions of the so-called behavioural space of the underlying problem. In this paper, we apply the QD paradigm to simulate dynamic programming behaviours on knapsack problem, and provide a first runtime analysis of QD algorithms. We show that they are able to compute an optimal solution within expected pseudo-polynomial time, and reveal parameter settings that lead to a fully polynomial randomised approximation scheme (FPRAS). Our experimental investigations evaluate the different approaches on classical benchmark sets in terms of solutions constructed in the behavioural space as well as the runtime needed to obtain an optimal solution.
summary: Quality diversity (QD) algorithms have been shown to be very successful when dealing with problems in areas such as robotics, games and combinatorial optimization. They aim to maximize the quality of solutions for different regions of the so-called behavioural space of the underlying problem. In this paper, we apply the QD paradigm to simulate dynamic programming behaviours on knapsack problem, and provide a first runtime analysis of QD algorithms. We show that they are able to compute an optimal solution within expected pseudo-polynomial time, and reveal parameter settings that lead to a fully polynomial randomised approximation scheme (FPRAS). Our experimental investigations evaluate the different approaches on classical benchmark sets in terms of solutions constructed in the behavioural space as well as the runtime needed to obtain an optimal solution.
abstract_zh: 质量多样性 (QD) 算法已被证明在处理机器人、游戏和组合优化等领域的问题时非常成功。他们的目标是最大限度地提高潜在问题的所谓行为空间的不同区域的解决方案的质量。在本文中，我们应用QD范式来模拟背包问题的动态规划行为，并提供QD算法的首次运行时分析。我们表明，他们能够在预期的伪多项式时间内计算出最佳解决方案，并揭示导致完全多项式随机逼近方案（FPRAS）的参数设置。我们的实验研究根据行为空间中构建的解决方案以及获得最佳解决方案所需的运行时间来评估经典基准集上的不同方法。

AI.tldr: 将质量多样性（QD）算法应用于背包问题的动态规划行为模拟，并分析其运行时间。
AI.motivation: QD算法在机器人、游戏和组合优化等领域表现优异，但缺乏针对背包问题的理论分析，需验证其效率并探索参数设置。
AI.method: 应用QD算法模拟动态规划行为，进行运行时分析，并分析参数设置以实现完全多项式随机近似方案（FPRAS）。
AI.result: 证明QD算法可在伪多项式时间内求解最优解，并发现参数设置可实现FPRAS。
AI.conclusion: 实验验证QD算法在行为空间和运行时间上的有效性，为组合优化提供新思路。

search_text: Analysis of Quality Diversity Algorithms for the Knapsack Problem 背包问题的质量多样性算法分析 Quality diversity (QD) algorithms have been shown to be very successful when dealing with problems in areas such as robotics, games and combinatorial optimization. They aim to maximize the quality of solutions for different regions of the so-called behavioural space of the underlying problem. In this paper, we apply the QD paradigm to simulate dynamic programming behaviours on knapsack problem, and provide a first runtime analysis of QD algorithms. We show that they are able to compute an optimal solution within expected pseudo-polynomial time, and reveal parameter settings that lead to a fully polynomial randomised approximation scheme (FPRAS). Our experimental investigations evaluate the different approaches on classical benchmark sets in terms of solutions constructed in the behavioural space as well as the runtime needed to obtain an optimal solution. 质量多样性 (QD) 算法已被证明在处理机器人、游戏和组合优化等领域的问题时非常成功。他们的目标是最大限度地提高潜在问题的所谓行为空间的不同区域的解决方案的质量。在本文中，我们应用QD范式来模拟背包问题的动态规划行为，并提供QD算法的首次运行时分析。我们表明，他们能够在预期的伪多项式时间内计算出最佳解决方案，并揭示导致完全多项式随机逼近方案（FPRAS）的参数设置。我们的实验研究根据行为空间中构建的解决方案以及获得最佳解决方案所需的运行时间来评估经典基准集上的不同方法。 将质量多样性（QD）算法应用于背包问题的动态规划行为模拟，并分析其运行时间。 Adel Nikfarjam,Anh Viet Do,Frank Neumann cs.NE

authors_text: Adel Nikfarjam,Aneta Neumann,Jakob Bossek,Frank Neumann
title: Co-Evolutionary Diversity Optimisation for the Traveling Thief Problem
title_zh: 旅行小偷问题的协同进化多样性优化
abstract: Recently different evolutionary computation approaches have been developed that generate sets of high quality diverse solutions for a given optimisation problem. Many studies have considered diversity 1) as a mean to explore niches in behavioural space (quality diversity) or 2) to increase the structural differences of solutions (evolutionary diversity optimisation). In this study, we introduce a co-evolutionary algorithm to simultaneously explore the two spaces for the multi-component traveling thief problem. The results show the capability of the co-evolutionary algorithm to achieve significantly higher diversity compared to the baseline evolutionary diversity algorithms from the the literature.
summary: Recently different evolutionary computation approaches have been developed that generate sets of high quality diverse solutions for a given optimisation problem. Many studies have considered diversity 1) as a mean to explore niches in behavioural space (quality diversity) or 2) to increase the structural differences of solutions (evolutionary diversity optimisation). In this study, we introduce a co-evolutionary algorithm to simultaneously explore the two spaces for the multi-component traveling thief problem. The results show the capability of the co-evolutionary algorithm to achieve significantly higher diversity compared to the baseline evolutionary diversity algorithms from the the literature.
abstract_zh: 最近已经开发出不同的进化计算方法，可以为给定的优化问题生成多组高质量的多样化解决方案。许多研究都将多样性视为 1）作为探索行为空间中的利基（质量多样性）或 2）增加解决方案的结构差异（进化多样性优化）的手段。在本研究中，我们引入了一种协同进化算法来同时探索多分量旅行小偷问题的两个空间。结果表明，与文献中的基线进化多样性算法相比，协同进化算法能够实现显着更高的多样性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种协同进化算法，用于同时优化多组件旅行小偷问题的行为空间利基探索和解的结构多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将多样性优化分为行为空间探索和结构差异提升两个方向，但缺乏同时优化两者的算法，难以应对多组件问题的复杂性。
AI.method: 设计协同进化算法，通过并行进化机制同步优化行为空间利基和解的结构多样性，针对旅行小偷问题的多组件特性进行适应性调整。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在多样性指标上显著优于传统进化多样性优化方法，能生成更高质量的多目标解集。
AI.conclusion: 协同进化框架有效平衡了行为空间探索与结构多样性提升，为多组件优化问题提供了新的求解思路。

authors_text: Hao Shao,Letian Wang,RuoBing Chen,Hongsheng Li,Yu Liu
title: Safety-Enhanced Autonomous Driving Using Interpretable Sensor Fusion Transformer
title_zh: 使用可解释的传感器融合变压器增强安全性的自动驾驶
abstract: Large-scale deployment of autonomous vehicles has been continually delayed due to safety concerns. On the one hand, comprehensive scene understanding is indispensable, a lack of which would result in vulnerability to rare but complex traffic situations, such as the sudden emergence of unknown objects. However, reasoning from a global context requires access to sensors of multiple types and adequate fusion of multi-modal sensor signals, which is difficult to achieve. On the other hand, the lack of interpretability in learning models also hampers the safety with unverifiable failure causes. In this paper, we propose a safety-enhanced autonomous driving framework, named Interpretable Sensor Fusion Transformer(InterFuser), to fully process and fuse information from multi-modal multi-view sensors for achieving comprehensive scene understanding and adversarial event detection. Besides, intermediate interpretable features are generated from our framework, which provide more semantics and are exploited to better constrain actions to be within the safe sets. We conducted extensive experiments on CARLA benchmarks, where our model outperforms prior methods, ranking the first on the public CARLA Leaderboard. Our code will be made available at https://github.com/opendilab/InterFuser
summary: Large-scale deployment of autonomous vehicles has been continually delayed due to safety concerns. On the one hand, comprehensive scene understanding is indispensable, a lack of which would result in vulnerability to rare but complex traffic situations, such as the sudden emergence of unknown objects. However, reasoning from a global context requires access to sensors of multiple types and adequate fusion of multi-modal sensor signals, which is difficult to achieve. On the other hand, the lack of interpretability in learning models also hampers the safety with unverifiable failure causes. In this paper, we propose a safety-enhanced autonomous driving framework, named Interpretable Sensor Fusion Transformer(InterFuser), to fully process and fuse information from multi-modal multi-view sensors for achieving comprehensive scene understanding and adversarial event detection. Besides, intermediate interpretable features are generated from our framework, which provide more semantics and are exploited to better constrain actions to be within the safe sets. We conducted extensive experiments on CARLA benchmarks, where our model outperforms prior methods, ranking the first on the public CARLA Leaderboard. Our code will be made available at https://github.com/opendilab/InterFuser
abstract_zh: 由于安全问题，自动驾驶汽车的大规模部署一直被推迟。一方面，全面的场景理解是必不可少的，缺乏这种理解将导致在罕见但复杂的交通情况下变得脆弱，例如突然出现的未知物体。然而，从全局背景进行推理需要访问多种类型的传感器以及多模态传感器信号的充分融合，这是很难实现的。另一方面，学习模型缺乏可解释性也因无法验证的失败原因而阻碍了安全性。在本文中，我们提出了一种安全增强型自动驾驶框架，名为可解释传感器融合变压器（InterFuser），可以完全处理和融合来自多模态多视图传感器的信息，以实现全面的场景理解和对抗事件检测。此外，中间可解释的特征是从我们的框架生成的，它提供了更多的语义，并被用来更好地将动作限制在安全集中。我们对 CARLA 基准进行了广泛的实验，我们的模型优于之前的方法，在公共 CARLA 排行榜上排名第一。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/opendilab/InterFuser 提供

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为InterFuser的安全增强型自动驾驶框架，用于处理和融合多模态多视角传感器信息，以实现全面的场景理解和对抗事件检测。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆的大规模部署因安全问题而受到阻碍。全面的场景理解对于处理复杂交通状况至关重要，但多模态传感器信号的融合困难以及模型缺乏可解释性也影响了安全性。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种可解释的传感器融合Transformer（InterFuser）框架，用于处理和融合多模态多视角传感器信息，并生成中间可解释特征，以更好地约束动作在安全集内。
AI.result: 在CARLA基准测试中进行了广泛的实验，本文模型优于先前方法，并在公共CARLA排行榜上排名第一。
AI.conclusion: InterFuser框架通过融合多模态传感器信息并生成可解释特征，提高了自动驾驶的安全性和性能。

We conducted extensive experiments on CARLA benchmarks, where our model outperforms prior methods, ranking the first on the public CARLA Leaderboard. Our code will be made available at https://github.com/opendilab/InterFuser 由于安全问题，自动驾驶汽车的大规模部署一直被推迟。一方面，全面的场景理解是必不可少的，缺乏这种理解将导致在罕见但复杂的交通情况下变得脆弱，例如突然出现的未知物体。然而，从全局背景进行推理需要访问多种类型的传感器以及多模态传感器信号的充分融合，这是很难实现的。另一方面，学习模型缺乏可解释性也因无法验证的失败原因而阻碍了安全性。在本文中，我们提出了一种安全增强型自动驾驶框架，名为可解释传感器融合变压器（InterFuser），可以完全处理和融合来自多模态多视图传感器的信息，以实现全面的场景理解和对抗事件检测。此外，中间可解释的特征是从我们的框架生成的，它提供了更多的语义，并被用来更好地将动作限制在安全集中。我们对 CARLA 基准进行了广泛的实验，我们的模型优于之前的方法，在公共 CARLA 排行榜上排名第一。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/opendilab/InterFuser 提供 本文提出了一种名为InterFuser的安全增强型自动驾驶框架，用于处理和融合多模态多视角传感器信息，以实现全面的场景理解和对抗事件检测。 Hao Shao,Letian Wang,RuoBing Chen,Hongsheng Li,Yu Liu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Lei Ke,Henghui Ding,Martin Danelljan,Yu-Wing Tai,Chi-Keung Tang,Fisher Yu
title: Video Mask Transfiner for High-Quality Video Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 用于高质量视频实例分割的视频掩模传输器
comment: ECCV 2022; Project page: https://www.vis.xyz/pub/vmt; Dataset page: https://www.vis.xyz/data/hqvis
comments: ECCV 2022; Project page: https://www.vis.xyz/pub/vmt; Dataset page: https://www.vis.xyz/data/hqvis
abstract: While Video Instance Segmentation (VIS) has seen rapid progress, current approaches struggle to predict high-quality masks with accurate boundary details. Moreover, the predicted segmentations often fluctuate over time, suggesting that temporal consistency cues are neglected or not fully utilized. In this paper, we set out to tackle these issues, with the aim of achieving highly detailed and more temporally stable mask predictions for VIS. We first propose the Video Mask Transfiner (VMT) method, capable of leveraging fine-grained high-resolution features thanks to a highly efficient video transformer structure. Our VMT detects and groups sparse error-prone spatio-temporal regions of each tracklet in the video segment, which are then refined using both local and instance-level cues. Second, we identify that the coarse boundary annotations of the popular YouTube-VIS dataset constitute a major limiting factor. Based on our VMT architecture, we therefore design an automated annotation refinement approach by iterative training and self-correction. To benchmark high-quality mask predictions for VIS, we introduce the HQ-YTVIS dataset, consisting of a manually re-annotated test set and our automatically refined training data. We compare VMT with the most recent state-of-the-art methods on the HQ-YTVIS, as well as the Youtube-VIS, OVIS and BDD100K MOTS benchmarks. Experimental results clearly demonstrate the efficacy and effectiveness of our method on segmenting complex and dynamic objects, by capturing precise details.
summary: While Video Instance Segmentation (VIS) has seen rapid progress, current approaches struggle to predict high-quality masks with accurate boundary details. Moreover, the predicted segmentations often fluctuate over time, suggesting that temporal consistency cues are neglected or not fully utilized. In this paper, we set out to tackle these issues, with the aim of achieving highly detailed and more temporally stable mask predictions for VIS. We first propose the Video Mask Transfiner (VMT) method, capable of leveraging fine-grained high-resolution features thanks to a highly efficient video transformer structure. Our VMT detects and groups sparse error-prone spatio-temporal regions of each tracklet in the video segment, which are then refined using both local and instance-level cues. Second, we identify that the coarse boundary annotations of the popular YouTube-VIS dataset constitute a major limiting factor. Based on our VMT architecture, we therefore design an automated annotation refinement approach by iterative training and self-correction. To benchmark high-quality mask predictions for VIS, we introduce the HQ-YTVIS dataset, consisting of a manually re-annotated test set and our automatically refined training data. We compare VMT with the most recent state-of-the-art methods on the HQ-YTVIS, as well as the Youtube-VIS, OVIS and BDD100K MOTS benchmarks. Experimental results clearly demonstrate the efficacy and effectiveness of our method on segmenting complex and dynamic objects, by capturing precise details.
abstract_zh: 虽然视频实例分割 (VIS) 取得了快速进展，但当前的方法很难预测具有准确边界细节的高质量掩模。此外，预测的分割通常会随着时间的推移而波动，这表明时间一致性线索被忽略或没有得到充分利用。在本文中，我们着手解决这些问题，目的是为 VIS 实现高度详细且时间更稳定的掩模预测。我们首先提出了视频掩模变换器（VMT）方法，由于高效的视频变换器结构，该方法能够利用细粒度的高分辨率特征。我们的 VMT 检测并分组视频片段中每个轨迹的稀疏且容易出错的时空区域，然后使用本地和实例级线索对其进行细化。其次，我们发现流行的 YouTube-VIS 数据集的粗略边界注释构成了主要限制因素。因此，基于我们的 VMT 架构，我们通过迭代训练和自我修正设计了一种自动注释细化方法。为了对 VIS 的高质量掩模预测进行基准测试，我们引入了 HQ-YTVIS 数据集，其中包含手动重新注释的测试集和自动精炼的训练数据。我们将 VMT 与 HQ-YTVIS 上最新的最先进方法以及 Youtube-VIS、OVIS 和 BDD100K MOTS 基准进行比较。实验结果清楚地证明了我们的方法通过捕获精确的细节来分割复杂和动态对象的有效性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Video Mask Transfiner (VMT)的视频实例分割方法，旨在提升分割掩码的边界精度和时序稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频实例分割方法在边界细节精度和时序一致性方面存在不足，且常用数据集的粗略边界标注限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 设计高效视频变压器结构提取高分辨率特征，检测并修正轨迹中的错误时空区域；提出自动化标注优化方法，结合迭代训练与自校正机制，并构建HQ-YTVIS数据集。
AI.result: 在HQ-YTVIS、YouTube-VIS等基准测试中，VMT在复杂动态目标分割任务中展现出更高的边界精度和时序稳定性。
AI.conclusion: VMT通过精细化特征处理和标注优化，有效解决了视频实例分割中的边界模糊与时序波动问题，为高质量分割提供了新思路。

authors_text: Taeyoon Lee,Donghyun Sung,Kyoungyeon Choi,Choongin Lee,Changwoo Park,Keunjun Choi
title: Learning Dynamic Manipulation Skills from Haptic-Play
title_zh: 从触觉游戏中学习动态操作技能
abstract: In this paper, we propose a data-driven skill learning approach to solve highly dynamic manipulation tasks entirely from offline teleoperated play data. We use a bilateral teleoperation system to continuously collect a large set of dexterous and agile manipulation behaviors, which is enabled by providing direct force feedback to the operator. We jointly learn the state conditional latent skill distribution and skill decoder network in the form of goal-conditioned policy and skill conditional state transition dynamics using a two-stage generative modeling framework. This allows one to perform robust model-based planning, both online and offline planning methods, in the learned skill-space to accomplish any given downstream tasks at test time. We provide both simulated and real-world dual-arm box manipulation experiments showing that a sequence of force-controlled dynamic manipulation skills can be composed in real-time to successfully configure the box to the randomly selected target position and orientation; please refer to the supplementary video, https://youtu.be/LA5B236ILzM.
summary: In this paper, we propose a data-driven skill learning approach to solve highly dynamic manipulation tasks entirely from offline teleoperated play data. We use a bilateral teleoperation system to continuously collect a large set of dexterous and agile manipulation behaviors, which is enabled by providing direct force feedback to the operator. We jointly learn the state conditional latent skill distribution and skill decoder network in the form of goal-conditioned policy and skill conditional state transition dynamics using a two-stage generative modeling framework. This allows one to perform robust model-based planning, both online and offline planning methods, in the learned skill-space to accomplish any given downstream tasks at test time. We provide both simulated and real-world dual-arm box manipulation experiments showing that a sequence of force-controlled dynamic manipulation skills can be composed in real-time to successfully configure the box to the randomly selected target position and orientation; please refer to the supplementary video, https://youtu.be/LA5B236ILzM.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种数据驱动的技能学习方法，完全通过离线遥控游戏数据来解决高度动态的操作任务。我们使用双边远程操作系统来持续收集大量灵巧敏捷的操纵行为，这是通过向操作员提供直接力反馈来实现的。我们使用两阶段生成建模框架，以目标条件策略和技能条件状态转换动态的形式共同学习状态条件潜在技能分布和技能解码器网络。这使得人们能够在学习的技能空间中执行基于模型的稳健规划（在线和离线规划方法），以在测试时完成任何给定的下游任务。我们提供了模拟和真实的双臂盒子操纵实验，表明可以实时组合一系列力控动态操纵技能，以成功地将盒子配置到随机选择的目标位置和方向；请参阅补充视频，https://youtu.be/LA5B236ILzM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于触觉游戏数据的动态操作技能学习方法，通过离线遥操作数据实现复杂动态任务的技能学习。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以处理高度动态的操作任务，且缺乏从人类触觉交互中学习复杂技能的有效框架。
AI.method: 采用双侧遥操作系统收集操作数据，构建两阶段生成模型联合学习目标条件策略与技能条件状态转移动力学，实现基于模型的在线/离线规划。
AI.result: 在仿真与实物双臂操作实验中，系统可实时组合力控动态技能，将盒子配置到随机目标位置和方向。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过触觉反馈数据驱动的技能学习框架，有效解决了动态操作任务的实时规划与执行问题。

authors_text: A. Barış Özgüler,Joshua A. Job
title: Dynamics of qudit gates and effects of spectator modes on optimal control pulses
title_zh: Qudit 门的动态以及观众模式对最优控制脉冲的影响
comment: 6 pages, 1 figure. Published in Physical Review A
comments: 6 pages, 1 figure. Published in Physical Review A
abstract: Qudit gates for high-dimensional quantum computing can be synthesized with high precision using numerical quantum optimal control techniques. Large circuits are broken down into modules and the tailored pulses for each module can be used as primitives for a qudit compiler. Application of the pulses of each module in the presence of extra modes may decrease their effectiveness due to crosstalk. In this paper, we address this problem by simulating qudit dynamics for circuit quantum electrodynamics (cQED) systems. As a test case, we take pulses for single-qudit SWAP gates optimized in isolation and then apply them in the presence of spectator modes each of which are in Fock states. We provide an experimentally relevant scaling formula that can be used as a bound on the fidelity decay. Our results show that frequency shift from spectator mode populations has to be $\lesssim 0.1\%$ of the qudit's nonlinearity in order for high-fidelity single-qudit gates to be useful in the presence of occupied spectator modes.
summary: Qudit gates for high-dimensional quantum computing can be synthesized with high precision using numerical quantum optimal control techniques. Large circuits are broken down into modules and the tailored pulses for each module can be used as primitives for a qudit compiler. Application of the pulses of each module in the presence of extra modes may decrease their effectiveness due to crosstalk. In this paper, we address this problem by simulating qudit dynamics for circuit quantum electrodynamics (cQED) systems. As a test case, we take pulses for single-qudit SWAP gates optimized in isolation and then apply them in the presence of spectator modes each of which are in Fock states. We provide an experimentally relevant scaling formula that can be used as a bound on the fidelity decay. Our results show that frequency shift from spectator mode populations has to be $\lesssim 0.1\%$ of the qudit's nonlinearity in order for high-fidelity single-qudit gates to be useful in the presence of occupied spectator modes.
abstract_zh: 使用数值量子最优控制技术可以高精度地合成用于高维量子计算的 Qudit 门。大型电路被分解为模块，每个模块的定制脉冲可以用作 qudit 编译器的原语。在存在额外模式的情况下应用每个模块的脉冲可能会由于串扰而降低其有效性。在本文中，我们通过模拟电路量子电动力学 (cQED) 系统的 qdit 动力学来解决这个问题。作为测试用例，我们为单独优化的单量子交换门获取脉冲，然后在存在观众模式（每个模式均处于 Fock 状态）的情况下应用它们。我们提供了一个实验相关的缩放公式，可以用作保真度衰减的界限。我们的结果表明，观众模式群体的频率偏移必须为 qudit 非线性度的 $\lesssim 0.1\%$，以便高保真单 qudit 门在存在占用观众模式的情况下发挥作用。

AI.tldr: 研究高维量子计算中qudit门的动力学特性及旁观模式对最优控制脉冲的影响。
AI.motivation: 模块化量子电路中，旁观模式的存在可能通过串扰降低量子门保真度，需明确其影响机制并提出控制标准。
AI.method: 通过模拟超导量子电动力学系统（cQED）中的qudit动力学，测试隔离优化的单qudit SWAP门脉冲在旁观模式下的性能，并推导保真度衰减的标度公式。
AI.result: 旁观模式引起的频率偏移需小于等于qudit非线性度的0.1%，才能保证高保真度单qudit门在实际系统中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 旁观模式的频率偏移控制是实现高保真度qudit门的关键，为模块化量子电路设计提供实验约束条件。

authors_text: Robert Belfer,Ekaterina Kochmar,Iulian Vlad Serban
title: Raising Student Completion Rates with Adaptive Curriculum and Contextual Bandits
title_zh: 通过适应性课程和情境强盗提高学生完成率
comment: 6 pages, 1 figure, To appear in the Proceedings of the 23rd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education (AIED 2022)
comments: 6 pages, 1 figure, To appear in the Proceedings of the 23rd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education (AIED 2022)
abstract: We present an adaptive learning Intelligent Tutoring System, which uses model-based reinforcement learning in the form of contextual bandits to assign learning activities to students. The model is trained on the trajectories of thousands of students in order to maximize their exercise completion rates and continues to learn online, automatically adjusting itself to new activities. A randomized controlled trial with students shows that our model leads to superior completion rates and significantly improved student engagement when compared to other approaches. Our approach is fully-automated unlocking new opportunities for learning experience personalization.
summary: We present an adaptive learning Intelligent Tutoring System, which uses model-based reinforcement learning in the form of contextual bandits to assign learning activities to students. The model is trained on the trajectories of thousands of students in order to maximize their exercise completion rates and continues to learn online, automatically adjusting itself to new activities. A randomized controlled trial with students shows that our model leads to superior completion rates and significantly improved student engagement when compared to other approaches. Our approach is fully-automated unlocking new opportunities for learning experience personalization.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种自适应学习智能辅导系统，该系统使用基于模型的强化学习以上下文强盗的形式为学生分配学习活动。该模型根据数千名学生的轨迹进行训练，以最大限度地提高他们的练习完成率，并继续在线学习，自动调整自己以适应新的活动。一项针对学生的随机对照试验表明，与其他方法相比，我们的模型可以带来更高的完成率，并显着提高学生的参与度。我们的方法是全自动的，为学习体验个性化提供新的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文老虎机的自适应学习智能辅导系统，通过分析学生轨迹数据优化学习活动分配，以提高练习完成率和参与度。
AI.motivation: 传统教学方法难以有效提升学生练习完成率和参与度，需通过智能化手段实现个性化学习路径优化。
AI.method: 采用基于模型的强化学习框架（上下文老虎机），利用学生历史轨迹数据训练模型，并通过在线学习动态调整活动分配策略。
AI.result: 随机对照试验证明该方法显著提升学生完成率与参与度，且系统具备全自动适应新活动的能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于强化学习的自适应系统能有效提升学习效果，为个性化教育体验提供了可行的技术路径。

authors_text: Qiming Bao,Alex Yuxuan Peng,Tim Hartill,Neset Tan,Zhenyun Deng,Michael Witbrock,Jiamou Liu
title: Multi-Step Deductive Reasoning Over Natural Language: An Empirical Study on Out-of-Distribution Generalisation
title_zh: 自然语言的多步演绎推理：分布外泛化的实证研究
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, The 2nd International Joint Conference on Learning & Reasoning and 16th International Workshop on Neural-Symbolic Learning and Reasoning (IJCLR-NeSy 2022)
comments: 10 pages, 3 figures, The 2nd International Joint Conference on Learning & Reasoning and 16th International Workshop on Neural-Symbolic Learning and Reasoning (IJCLR-NeSy 2022)
abstract: Combining deep learning with symbolic logic reasoning aims to capitalize on the success of both fields and is drawing increasing attention. Inspired by DeepLogic, an end-to-end model trained to perform inference on logic programs, we introduce IMA-GloVe-GA, an iterative neural inference network for multi-step reasoning expressed in natural language. In our model, reasoning is performed using an iterative memory neural network based on RNN with a gated attention mechanism. We evaluate IMA-GloVe-GA on three datasets: PARARULES, CONCEPTRULES V1 and CONCEPTRULES V2. Experimental results show DeepLogic with gated attention can achieve higher test accuracy than DeepLogic and other RNN baseline models. Our model achieves better out-of-distribution generalisation than RoBERTa-Large when the rules have been shuffled. Furthermore, to address the issue of unbalanced distribution of reasoning depths in the current multi-step reasoning datasets, we develop PARARULE-Plus, a large dataset with more examples that require deeper reasoning steps. Experimental results show that the addition of PARARULE-Plus can increase the model's performance on examples requiring deeper reasoning depths. The source code and data are available at https://github.com/Strong-AI-Lab/Multi-Step-Deductive-Reasoning-Over-Natural-Language.
summary: Combining deep learning with symbolic logic reasoning aims to capitalize on the success of both fields and is drawing increasing attention. Inspired by DeepLogic, an end-to-end model trained to perform inference on logic programs, we introduce IMA-GloVe-GA, an iterative neural inference network for multi-step reasoning expressed in natural language. In our model, reasoning is performed using an iterative memory neural network based on RNN with a gated attention mechanism. We evaluate IMA-GloVe-GA on three datasets: PARARULES, CONCEPTRULES V1 and CONCEPTRULES V2. Experimental results show DeepLogic with gated attention can achieve higher test accuracy than DeepLogic and other RNN baseline models. Our model achieves better out-of-distribution generalisation than RoBERTa-Large when the rules have been shuffled. Furthermore, to address the issue of unbalanced distribution of reasoning depths in the current multi-step reasoning datasets, we develop PARARULE-Plus, a large dataset with more examples that require deeper reasoning steps. Experimental results show that the addition of PARARULE-Plus can increase the model's performance on examples requiring deeper reasoning depths. The source code and data are available at https://github.com/Strong-AI-Lab/Multi-Step-Deductive-Reasoning-Over-Natural-Language.
abstract_zh: 将深度学习与符号逻辑推理相结合旨在利用这两个领域的成功，并受到越来越多的关注。受 DeepLo​​gic（一种经过训练以对逻辑程序进行推理的端到端模型）的启发，我们引入了 IMA-GloVe-GA，一种迭代神经推理网络，用于以自然语言表达的多步骤推理。在我们的模型中，推理是使用基于 RNN 和门控注意力机制的迭代记忆神经网络来执行的。我们在三个数据集上评估 IMA-GloVe-GA：PARARULES、CONCEPTRULES V1 和 CONCEPTRULES V2。实验结果表明，具有门控注意力的 DeepLo​​gic 可以比 DeepLo​​gic 和其他 RNN 基线模型获得更高的测试精度。当规则被打乱时，我们的模型比 RoBERTa-Large 实现了更好的分布外泛化。此外，为了解决当前多步推理数据集中推理深度分布不平衡的问题，我们开发了 PARARULE-Plus，这是一个包含更多示例的大型数据集，需要更深入的推理步骤。实验结果表明，PARARULE-Plus的添加可以提高模型在需要更深推理深度的示例上的性能。源代码和数据可在 https://github.com/Strong-AI-Lab/Multi-Step-Deduction-Reasoning-Over-Natural-Language 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为IMA-GloVe-GA的迭代神经推理网络，用于解决自然语言中的多步演绎推理问题，并通过新构建的数据集提升模型的分布外泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 深度学习与符号逻辑推理的结合可发挥两者优势，但现有模型在处理自然语言多步推理和分布外数据时表现不足，且数据集中推理深度分布不均衡。
AI.method: 基于RNN的迭代记忆网络与门控注意力机制设计IMA-GloVe-GA模型，在PARARULES、CONCEPTRULES等数据集上进行评估，并构建包含更深层推理示例的PARARULE-Plus数据集。
AI.result: 模型在规则打乱场景下优于RoBERTa-Large，且PARARULE-Plus数据集使模型在深层推理任务上的表现显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 门控注意力机制有效提升多步推理性能，新数据集可缓解推理深度分布不均衡问题，为自然语言推理研究提供改进方向。

method: 基于RNN的迭代记忆网络与门控注意力机制设计IMA-GloVe-GA模型，在PARARULES、CONCEPTRULES等数据集上进行评估，并构建包含更深层推理示例的PARARULE-Plus数据集。
result: 模型在规则打乱场景下优于RoBERTa-Large，且PARARULE-Plus数据集使模型在深层推理任务上的表现显著提升。
conclusion: 门控注意力机制有效提升多步推理性能，新数据集可缓解推理深度分布不均衡问题，为自然语言推理研究提供改进方向。
search_text: Multi-Step Deductive Reasoning Over Natural Language: An Empirical Study on Out-of-Distribution Generalisation 自然语言的多步演绎推理：分布外泛化的实证研究 Combining deep learning with symbolic logic reasoning aims to capitalize on the success of both fields and is drawing increasing attention. Inspired by DeepLogic, an end-to-end model trained to perform inference on logic programs, we introduce IMA-GloVe-GA, an iterative neural inference network for multi-step reasoning expressed in natural language. In our model, reasoning is performed using an iterative memory neural network based on RNN with a gated attention mechanism. We evaluate IMA-GloVe-GA on three datasets: PARARULES, CONCEPTRULES V1 and CONCEPTRULES V2. Experimental results show DeepLogic with gated attention can achieve higher test accuracy than DeepLogic and other RNN baseline models. Our model achieves better out-of-distribution generalisation than RoBERTa-Large when the rules have been shuffled. Furthermore, to address the issue of unbalanced distribution of reasoning depths in the current multi-step reasoning datasets, we develop PARARULE-Plus, a large dataset with more examples that require deeper reasoning steps. Experimental results show that the addition of PARARULE-Plus can increase the model's performance on examples requiring deeper reasoning depths. The source code and data are available at https://github.com/Strong-AI-Lab/Multi-Step-Deductive-Reasoning-Over-Natural-Language. 将深度学习与符号逻辑推理相结合旨在利用这两个领域的成功，并受到越来越多的关注。受 DeepLo​​gic（一种经过训练以对逻辑程序进行推理的端到端模型）的启发，我们引入了 IMA-GloVe-GA，一种迭代神经推理网络，用于以自然语言表达的多步骤推理。在我们的模型中，推理是使用基于 RNN 和门控注意力机制的迭代记忆神经网络来执行的。我们在三个数据集上评估 IMA-GloVe-GA：PARARULES、CONCEPTRULES V1 和 CONCEPTRULES V2。实验结果表明，具有门控注意力的 DeepLo​​gic 可以比 DeepLo​​gic 和其他 RNN 基线模型获得更高的测试精度。当规则被打乱时，我们的模型比 RoBERTa-Large 实现了更好的分布外泛化。此外，为了解决当前多步推理数据集中推理深度分布不平衡的问题，我们开发了 PARARULE-Plus，这是一个包含更多示例的大型数据集，需要更深入的推理步骤。实验结果表明，PARARULE-Plus的添加可以提高模型在需要更深推理深度的示例上的性能。源代码和数据可在 https://github.com/Strong-AI-Lab/Multi-Step-Deduction-Reasoning-Over-Natural-Language 获取。 本文提出了一种名为IMA-GloVe-GA的迭代神经推理网络，用于解决自然语言中的多步演绎推理问题，并通过新构建的数据集提升模型的分布外泛化能力。 Qiming Bao,Alex Yuxuan Peng,Tim Hartill,Neset Tan,Zhenyun Deng,Michael Witbrock,Jiamou Liu cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.LO

authors_text: Alireza Madani,Pouya P. Niaz,Berk Guler,Yusuf Aydin,Cagatay Basdogan
title: Robot-Assisted Drilling on Curved Surfaces with Haptic Guidance under Adaptive Admittance Control
title_zh: 自适应导纳控制下采用触觉引导的机器人辅助曲面钻孔
abstract: Drilling a hole on a curved surface with a desired angle is prone to failure when done manually, due to the difficulties in drill alignment and also inherent instabilities of the task, potentially causing injury and fatigue to the workers. On the other hand, it can be impractical to fully automate such a task in real manufacturing environments because the parts arriving at an assembly line can have various complex shapes where drill point locations are not easily accessible, making automated path planning difficult. In this work, an adaptive admittance controller with 6 degrees of freedom is developed and deployed on a KUKA LBR iiwa 7 cobot such that the operator is able to manipulate a drill mounted on the robot with one hand comfortably and open holes on a curved surface with haptic guidance of the cobot and visual guidance provided through an AR interface. Real-time adaptation of the admittance damping provides more transparency when driving the robot in free space while ensuring stability during drilling. After the user brings the drill sufficiently close to the drill target and roughly aligns to the desired drilling angle, the haptic guidance module fine tunes the alignment first and then constrains the user movement to the drilling axis only, after which the operator simply pushes the drill into the workpiece with minimal effort. Two sets of experiments were conducted to investigate the potential benefits of the haptic guidance module quantitatively (Experiment I) and also the practical value of the proposed pHRI system for real manufacturing settings based on the subjective opinion of the participants (Experiment II).

On the other hand, it can be impractical to fully automate such a task in real manufacturing environments because the parts arriving at an assembly line can have various complex shapes where drill point locations are not easily accessible, making automated path planning difficult. In this work, an adaptive admittance controller with 6 degrees of freedom is developed and deployed on a KUKA LBR iiwa 7 cobot such that the operator is able to manipulate a drill mounted on the robot with one hand comfortably and open holes on a curved surface with haptic guidance of the cobot and visual guidance provided through an AR interface. Real-time adaptation of the admittance damping provides more transparency when driving the robot in free space while ensuring stability during drilling. After the user brings the drill sufficiently close to the drill target and roughly aligns to the desired drilling angle, the haptic guidance module fine tunes the alignment first and then constrains the user movement to the drilling axis only, after which the operator simply pushes the drill into the workpiece with minimal effort. Two sets of experiments were conducted to investigate the potential benefits of the haptic guidance module quantitatively (Experiment I) and also the practical value of the proposed pHRI system for real manufacturing settings based on the subjective opinion of the participants (Experiment II).
abstract_zh: 由于钻头对准困难以及任务固有的不稳定性，手动以所需角度在曲面上钻孔很容易失败，可能导致工人受伤和疲劳。另一方面，在实际制造环境中完全自动化此类任务可能是不切实际的，因为到达装配线的零件可能具有各种复杂的形状，其中钻孔点位置不易接近，从而使得自动路径规划变得困难。在这项工作中，开发了一种具有 6 个自由度的自适应导纳控制器，并将其部署在 KUKA LBR iiwa 7 协作机器人上，以便操作员能够用一只手舒适地操纵安装在机器人上的钻头，并通过协作机器人的触觉引导和通过 AR 界面提供的视觉引导在曲面上开孔。导纳阻尼的实时调整可在自由空间中驱动机器人时提供更高的透明度，同时确保钻孔过程中的稳定性。当用户将钻头充分靠近钻削目标并大致对准所需的钻孔角度后，触觉引导模块首先微调对准，然后将用户的移动限制在钻孔轴上，之后操作员只需以最小的力气将钻头推入工件即可。进行了两组实验，以定量研究触觉引导模块的潜在好处（实验 I），以及根据参与者的主观意见提出的 pHRI 系统对于实际制造环境的实用价值（实验 II）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应阻抗控制的触觉引导机器人钻孔系统，用于在曲面上精确钻孔。
AI.motivation: 手动钻曲面易出错且危险，而全自动钻孔因零件形状复杂难以实现，需开发半自动化人机协作方案。
AI.method: 开发6自由度自适应阻抗控制器，结合KUKA机械臂与AR视觉引导，通过实时调整阻尼参数实现触觉辅助对齐与钻孔约束。
AI.result: 实验验证触觉模块提升钻孔精度，主观评估显示系统在实际制造场景中具有较高实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 该人机协作系统有效结合触觉与视觉引导，解决了复杂曲面钻孔难题，适用于工业制造场景。

authors_text: Arik Ermshaus,Patrick Schäfer,Ulf Leser
title: ClaSP -- Parameter-free Time Series Segmentation
title_zh: ClaSP——无参数时间序列分割
abstract: The study of natural and human-made processes often results in long sequences of temporally-ordered values, aka time series (TS). Such processes often consist of multiple states, e.g. operating modes of a machine, such that state changes in the observed processes result in changes in the distribution of shape of the measured values. Time series segmentation (TSS) tries to find such changes in TS post-hoc to deduce changes in the data-generating process. TSS is typically approached as an unsupervised learning problem aiming at the identification of segments distinguishable by some statistical property. Current algorithms for TSS require domain-dependent hyper-parameters to be set by the user, make assumptions about the TS value distribution or the types of detectable changes which limits their applicability. Common hyperparameters are the measure of segment homogeneity and the number of change points, which are particularly hard to tune for each data set. We present ClaSP, a novel, highly accurate, hyper-parameter-free and domain-agnostic method for TSS. ClaSP hierarchically splits a TS into two parts. A change point is determined by training a binary TS classifier for each possible split point and selecting the one split that is best at identifying subsequences to be from either of the partitions. ClaSP learns its main two model-parameters from the data using two novel bespoke algorithms. In our experimental evaluation using a benchmark of 107 data sets, we show that ClaSP outperforms the state of the art in terms of accuracy and is fast and scalable. Furthermore, we highlight properties of ClaSP using several real-world case studies.
summary: The study of natural and human-made processes often results in long sequences of temporally-ordered values, aka time series (TS). Such processes often consist of multiple states, e.g. operating modes of a machine, such that state changes in the observed processes result in changes in the distribution of shape of the measured values. Time series segmentation (TSS) tries to find such changes in TS post-hoc to deduce changes in the data-generating process. TSS is typically approached as an unsupervised learning problem aiming at the identification of segments distinguishable by some statistical property. Current algorithms for TSS require domain-dependent hyper-parameters to be set by the user, make assumptions about the TS value distribution or the types of detectable changes which limits their applicability. Common hyperparameters are the measure of segment homogeneity and the number of change points, which are particularly hard to tune for each data set. We present ClaSP, a novel, highly accurate, hyper-parameter-free and domain-agnostic method for TSS. ClaSP hierarchically splits a TS into two parts. A change point is determined by training a binary TS classifier for each possible split point and selecting the one split that is best at identifying subsequences to be from either of the partitions. ClaSP learns its main two model-parameters from the data using two novel bespoke algorithms. In our experimental evaluation using a benchmark of 107 data sets, we show that ClaSP outperforms the state of the art in terms of accuracy and is fast and scalable. Furthermore, we highlight properties of ClaSP using several real-world case studies.
abstract_zh: 对自然和人造过程的研究通常会产生长序列的时间排序值，也称为时间序列 (TS)。这些过程通常由多个状态组成，例如机器的操作模式，使得观察过程中的状态变化导致测量值形状分布的变化。时间序列分割（TSS）试图事后发现 TS 中的此类变化，以推断数据生成过程中的变化。 TSS 通常被视为无监督学习问题，旨在识别可通过某些统计属性区分的片段。当前的 TSS 算法需要用户设置与域相关的超参数，对 TS 值分布或可检测变化的类型进行假设，这限制了其适用性。常见的超参数是分段同质性和变化点数量的度量，这对于每个数据集来说特别难以调整。我们提出了 ClaSP，一种新颖、高精度、无超参数且与领域无关的 TSS 方法。 ClaSP 将 TS 分层分为两部分。通过为每个可能的分割点训练二元 TS 分类器并选择最能识别来自任一分区的子序列的一个分割来确定变化点。 ClaSP 使用两种新颖的定制算法从数据中学习其主要的两个模型参数。在我们使用 107 个数据集的基准进行的实验评估中，我们表明 ClaSP 在准确性方面优于最先进的技术，并且速度快且可扩展。此外，我们使用几个现实案例研究来强调 ClaSP 的特性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ClaSP，一种无需超参数且领域无关的时间序列分割方法，通过分层分割和分类器选择最佳分割点以检测状态变化。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列分割方法依赖领域特定超参数或数据分布假设，导致适用性受限且调参困难，亟需一种自动化的通用解决方案。
AI.method: ClaSP通过分层分割时间序列，对每个分割点训练二分类分类器，选择区分度最高的分割点；采用两种定制算法从数据中自动学习核心参数。
AI.result: 在107个数据集的基准测试中，ClaSP在准确率、速度和可扩展性上优于现有方法，并通过多个实际案例验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: ClaSP为时间序列分割提供了高效、自动化且无需人工干预的通用框架，具有广泛的应用潜力。

search_text: ClaSP -- Parameter-free Time Series Segmentation ClaSP——无参数时间序列分割 The study of natural and human-made processes often results in long sequences of temporally-ordered values, aka time series (TS). Such processes often consist of multiple states, e.g. operating modes of a machine, such that state changes in the observed processes result in changes in the distribution of shape of the measured values. Time series segmentation (TSS) tries to find such changes in TS post-hoc to deduce changes in the data-generating process. TSS is typically approached as an unsupervised learning problem aiming at the identification of segments distinguishable by some statistical property. Current algorithms for TSS require domain-dependent hyper-parameters to be set by the user, make assumptions about the TS value distribution or the types of detectable changes which limits their applicability. Common hyperparameters are the measure of segment homogeneity and the number of change points, which are particularly hard to tune for each data set. We present ClaSP, a novel, highly accurate, hyper-parameter-free and domain-agnostic method for TSS. ClaSP hierarchically splits a TS into two parts. A change point is determined by training a binary TS classifier for each possible split point and selecting the one split that is best at identifying subsequences to be from either of the partitions. ClaSP learns its main two model-parameters from the data using two novel bespoke algorithms. In our experimental evaluation using a benchmark of 107 data sets, we show that ClaSP outperforms the state of the art in terms of accuracy and is fast and scalable. Furthermore, we highlight properties of ClaSP using several real-world case studies. 对自然和人造过程的研究通常会产生长序列的时间排序值，也称为时间序列 (TS)。这些过程通常由多个状态组成，例如机器的操作模式，使得观察过程中的状态变化导致测量值形状分布的变化。时间序列分割（TSS）试图事后发现 TS 中的此类变化，以推断数据生成过程中的变化。 TSS 通常被视为无监督学习问题，旨在识别可通过某些统计属性区分的片段。当前的 TSS 算法需要用户设置与域相关的超参数，对 TS 值分布或可检测变化的类型进行假设，这限制了其适用性。常见的超参数是分段同质性和变化点数量的度量，这对于每个数据集来说特别难以调整。我们提出了 ClaSP，一种新颖、高精度、无超参数且与领域无关的 TSS 方法。 ClaSP 将 TS 分层分为两部分。通过为每个可能的分割点训练二元 TS 分类器并选择最能识别来自任一分区的子序列的一个分割来确定变化点。 ClaSP 使用两种新颖的定制算法从数据中学习其主要的两个模型参数。在我们使用 107 个数据集的基准进行的实验评估中，我们表明 ClaSP 在准确性方面优于最先进的技术，并且速度快且可扩展。此外，我们使用几个现实案例研究来强调 ClaSP 的特性。 本文提出ClaSP，一种无需超参数且领域无关的时间序列分割方法，通过分层分割和分类器选择最佳分割点以检测状态变化。 Arik Ermshaus,Patrick Schäfer,Ulf Leser cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DB

authors_text: Song Tao,Zijian Wang,Tiantian Fan,Canjie Luo,Can Huang
title: Knowing Where and What: Unified Word Block Pretraining for Document Understanding
title_zh: 了解地点和内容：用于文档理解的统一词块预训练
abstract: Due to the complex layouts of documents, it is challenging to extract information for documents. Most previous studies develop multimodal pre-trained models in a self-supervised way. In this paper, we focus on the embedding learning of word blocks containing text and layout information, and propose UTel, a language model with Unified TExt and Layout pre-training. Specifically, we propose two pre-training tasks: Surrounding Word Prediction (SWP) for the layout learning, and Contrastive learning of Word Embeddings (CWE) for identifying different word blocks. Moreover, we replace the commonly used 1D position embedding with a 1D clipped relative position embedding. In this way, the joint training of Masked Layout-Language Modeling (MLLM) and two newly proposed tasks enables the interaction between semantic and spatial features in a unified way. Additionally, the proposed UTel can process arbitrary-length sequences by removing the 1D position embedding, while maintaining competitive performance. Extensive experimental results show UTel learns better joint representations and achieves superior performance than previous methods on various downstream tasks, though requiring no image modality. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/taosong2019/UTel}.
summary: Due to the complex layouts of documents, it is challenging to extract information for documents. Most previous studies develop multimodal pre-trained models in a self-supervised way. In this paper, we focus on the embedding learning of word blocks containing text and layout information, and propose UTel, a language model with Unified TExt and Layout pre-training. Specifically, we propose two pre-training tasks: Surrounding Word Prediction (SWP) for the layout learning, and Contrastive learning of Word Embeddings (CWE) for identifying different word blocks. Moreover, we replace the commonly used 1D position embedding with a 1D clipped relative position embedding. In this way, the joint training of Masked Layout-Language Modeling (MLLM) and two newly proposed tasks enables the interaction between semantic and spatial features in a unified way. Additionally, the proposed UTel can process arbitrary-length sequences by removing the 1D position embedding, while maintaining competitive performance. Extensive experimental results show UTel learns better joint representations and achieves superior performance than previous methods on various downstream tasks, though requiring no image modality. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/taosong2019/UTel}.
abstract_zh: 由于文档布局复杂，提取文档信息具有挑战性。之前的大多数研究都是以自我监督的方式开发多模态预训练模型。在本文中，我们专注于包含文本和布局信息的词块的嵌入学习，并提出了UTel，一种具有统一文本和布局预训练的语言模型。具体来说，我们提出了两个预训练任务：用于布局学习的周围词预测（SWP）和用于识别不同词块的词嵌入对比学习（CWE）。此外，我们将常用的一维位置嵌入替换为一维裁剪相对位置嵌入。这样，掩码布局语言建模（MLLM）和两个新提出的任务的联合训练使得语义和空间特征之间能够以统一的方式交互。此外，所提出的 UTel 可以通过删除一维位置嵌入来处理任意长度的序列，同时保持有竞争力的性能。大量的实验结果表明，尽管不需要图像模态，但 UTel 在各种下游任务上比以前的方法学习了更好的联合表示并取得了优越的性能。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/taosong2019/UTel} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的词块预训练方法UTel，用于文档理解，结合文本和布局信息进行联合建模。
AI.motivation: 现有文档信息提取方法难以处理复杂布局，且多依赖图像模态。本文旨在开发无需图像模态的文本-布局联合表示学习方法，提升文档理解效果。
AI.method: 设计两种预训练任务：布局学习的周围词预测（SWP）和词嵌入对比学习（CWE），并采用1D截断相对位置编码替代传统位置编码，实现任意长度序列处理。
AI.result: UTel在多个下游任务中优于现有方法，且无需图像模态即可获得竞争性性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一建模语义与空间特征，UTel为文档理解提供了高效且无需图像模态的解决方案。

authors_text: Tom Burgert,Mahdyar Ravanbakhsh,Begüm Demir
title: On the Effects of Different Types of Label Noise in Multi-Label Remote Sensing Image Classification
title_zh: 不同类型标签噪声对多标签遥感图像分类的影响
comment: Accepted at the IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
comments: Accepted at the IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
abstract: The development of accurate methods for multi-label classification (MLC) of remote sensing (RS) images is one of the most important research topics in RS. To address MLC problems, the use of deep neural networks that require a high number of reliable training images annotated by multiple land-cover class labels (multi-labels) has been found popular in RS. However, collecting such annotations is time-consuming and costly. A common procedure to obtain annotations at zero labeling cost is to rely on thematic products or crowdsourced labels. As a drawback, these procedures come with the risk of label noise that can distort the learning process of the MLC algorithms. In the literature, most label noise robust methods are designed for single-label classification (SLC) problems in computer vision (CV), where each image is annotated by a single label. Unlike SLC, label noise in MLC can be associated with: 1) subtractive label-noise (a land cover class label is not assigned to an image while that class is present in the image); 2) additive label-noise (a land cover class label is assigned to an image although that class is not present in the given image); and 3) mixed label-noise (a combination of both). In this paper, we investigate three different noise robust CV SLC methods and adapt them to be robust for multi-label noise scenarios in RS. During experiments, we study the effects of different types of multi-label noise and evaluate the adapted methods rigorously. To this end, we also introduce a synthetic multi-label noise injection strategy that is more adequate to simulate operational scenarios compared to the uniform label noise injection strategy, in which the labels of absent and present classes are flipped at uniform probability. Further, we study the relevance of different evaluation metrics in MLC problems under noisy multi-labels.

To address MLC problems, the use of deep neural networks that require a high number of reliable training images annotated by multiple land-cover class labels (multi-labels) has been found popular in RS. However, collecting such annotations is time-consuming and costly. A common procedure to obtain annotations at zero labeling cost is to rely on thematic products or crowdsourced labels. As a drawback, these procedures come with the risk of label noise that can distort the learning process of the MLC algorithms. In the literature, most label noise robust methods are designed for single-label classification (SLC) problems in computer vision (CV), where each image is annotated by a single label. Unlike SLC, label noise in MLC can be associated with: 1) subtractive label-noise (a land cover class label is not assigned to an image while that class is present in the image); 2) additive label-noise (a land cover class label is assigned to an image although that class is not present in the given image); and 3) mixed label-noise (a combination of both). In this paper, we investigate three different noise robust CV SLC methods and adapt them to be robust for multi-label noise scenarios in RS. During experiments, we study the effects of different types of multi-label noise and evaluate the adapted methods rigorously. To this end, we also introduce a synthetic multi-label noise injection strategy that is more adequate to simulate operational scenarios compared to the uniform label noise injection strategy, in which the labels of absent and present classes are flipped at uniform probability. Further, we study the relevance of different evaluation metrics in MLC problems under noisy multi-labels.
abstract_zh: 开发遥感（RS）图像多标签分类（MLC）的精确方法是遥感领域最重要的研究课题之一。为了解决 MLC 问题，深度神经网络的使用在 RS 中很流行，这种网络需要大量由多个土地覆盖类标签（多标签）注释的可靠训练图像。然而，收集此类注释既耗时又昂贵。以零标签成本获取注释的常见程序是依靠主题产品或众包标签。缺点是，这些过程存在标签噪声的风险，可能会扭曲 MLC 算法的学习过程。在文献中，大多数标签噪声稳健方法都是针对计算机视觉（CV）中的单标签分类（SLC）问题而设计的，其中每个图像都由单个标签进行注释。与 SLC 不同，MLC 中的标签噪声可能与以下因素相关： 1) 减法标签噪声（当图像中存在土地覆盖类标签时，该类标签不会分配给图像）； 2) 加性标签噪声（土地覆盖类别标签被分配给图像，尽管该类别不存在于给定图像中）； 3）混合标签噪声（两者的组合）。在本文中，我们研究了三种不同的噪声鲁棒 CV SLC 方法，并使它们对 RS 中的多标签噪声场景具有鲁棒性。在实验过程中，我们研究了不同类型的多标签噪声的影响，并严格评估所采用的方法。为此，我们还引入了一种合成的多标签噪声注入策略，与统一标签噪声注入策略相比，该策略更适合模拟操作场景，其中不存在类和存在类的标签以均匀概率翻转。此外，我们研究了噪声多标签下 MLC 问题中不同评估指标的相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多标签遥感图像分类中不同标签噪声的影响，并将单标签分类的噪声鲁棒方法适应于多标签场景。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像多标签分类依赖大量标注数据，但标注成本高且易引入噪声。现有单标签噪声鲁棒方法无法直接处理多标签场景中的减法、加法及混合噪声问题。
AI.method: 采用三种单标签噪声鲁棒方法并调整以适应多标签噪声，提出更贴近实际的合成噪声注入策略，同时评估不同评价指标在噪声环境下的相关性。
AI.result: 实验验证了调整后方法对多标签噪声的有效性，发现合成噪声策略优于均匀噪声注入，且不同评价指标在噪声场景下表现差异显著。
AI.conclusion: 单标签噪声鲁棒方法可迁移至多标签场景，合成噪声注入策略更实用，需根据噪声类型选择合适评价指标以提升模型鲁棒性。

As a drawback, these procedures come with the risk of label noise that can distort the learning process of the MLC algorithms. In the literature, most label noise robust methods are designed for single-label classification (SLC) problems in computer vision (CV), where each image is annotated by a single label. Unlike SLC, label noise in MLC can be associated with: 1) subtractive label-noise (a land cover class label is not assigned to an image while that class is present in the image); 2) additive label-noise (a land cover class label is assigned to an image although that class is not present in the given image); and 3) mixed label-noise (a combination of both). In this paper, we investigate three different noise robust CV SLC methods and adapt them to be robust for multi-label noise scenarios in RS. During experiments, we study the effects of different types of multi-label noise and evaluate the adapted methods rigorously. To this end, we also introduce a synthetic multi-label noise injection strategy that is more adequate to simulate operational scenarios compared to the uniform label noise injection strategy, in which the labels of absent and present classes are flipped at uniform probability. Further, we study the relevance of different evaluation metrics in MLC problems under noisy multi-labels. 开发遥感（RS）图像多标签分类（MLC）的精确方法是遥感领域最重要的研究课题之一。为了解决 MLC 问题，深度神经网络的使用在 RS 中很流行，这种网络需要大量由多个土地覆盖类标签（多标签）注释的可靠训练图像。然而，收集此类注释既耗时又昂贵。以零标签成本获取注释的常见程序是依靠主题产品或众包标签。缺点是，这些过程存在标签噪声的风险，可能会扭曲 MLC 算法的学习过程。在文献中，大多数标签噪声稳健方法都是针对计算机视觉（CV）中的单标签分类（SLC）问题而设计的，其中每个图像都由单个标签进行注释。与 SLC 不同，MLC 中的标签噪声可能与以下因素相关： 1) 减法标签噪声（当图像中存在土地覆盖类标签时，该类标签不会分配给图像）； 2) 加性标签噪声（土地覆盖类别标签被分配给图像，尽管该类别不存在于给定图像中）； 3）混合标签噪声（两者的组合）。在本文中，我们研究了三种不同的噪声鲁棒 CV SLC 方法，并使它们对 RS 中的多标签噪声场景具有鲁棒性。在实验过程中，我们研究了不同类型的多标签噪声的影响，并严格评估所采用的方法。为此，我们还引入了一种合成的多标签噪声注入策略，与统一标签噪声注入策略相比，该策略更适合模拟操作场景，其中不存在类和存在类的标签以均匀概率翻转。此外，我们研究了噪声多标签下 MLC 问题中不同评估指标的相关性。 本文研究多标签遥感图像分类中不同标签噪声的影响，并将单标签分类的噪声鲁棒方法适应于多标签场景。 Tom Burgert,Mahdyar Ravanbakhsh,Begüm Demir cs.CV

authors_text: John Dougrez-Lewis,Elena Kochkina,M. Arana-Catania,Maria Liakata,Yulan He
title: PHEMEPlus: Enriching Social Media Rumour Verification with External Evidence
title_zh: PHEMEPlus：利用外部证据丰富社交媒体谣言验证
comment: 10 pages, 1 figure, 5 tables, presented in the Fifth Fact Extraction and VERification Workshop (FEVER). 2022
comments: 10 pages, 1 figure, 5 tables, presented in the Fifth Fact Extraction and VERification Workshop (FEVER). 2022
abstract: Work on social media rumour verification utilises signals from posts, their propagation and users involved. Other lines of work target identifying and fact-checking claims based on information from Wikipedia, or trustworthy news articles without considering social media context. However works combining the information from social media with external evidence from the wider web are lacking. To facilitate research in this direction, we release a novel dataset, PHEMEPlus, an extension of the PHEME benchmark, which contains social media conversations as well as relevant external evidence for each rumour. We demonstrate the effectiveness of incorporating such evidence in improving rumour verification models. Additionally, as part of the evidence collection, we evaluate various ways of query formulation to identify the most effective method.
summary: Work on social media rumour verification utilises signals from posts, their propagation and users involved. Other lines of work target identifying and fact-checking claims based on information from Wikipedia, or trustworthy news articles without considering social media context. However works combining the information from social media with external evidence from the wider web are lacking. To facilitate research in this direction, we release a novel dataset, PHEMEPlus, an extension of the PHEME benchmark, which contains social media conversations as well as relevant external evidence for each rumour. We demonstrate the effectiveness of incorporating such evidence in improving rumour verification models. Additionally, as part of the evidence collection, we evaluate various ways of query formulation to identify the most effective method.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体谣言验证工作利用来自帖子、帖子传播和相关用户的信号。其他工作的目标是根据维基百科的信息或值得信赖的新闻文章来识别和事实核查声明，而不考虑社交媒体背景。然而，将社交媒体的信息与更广泛的网络的外部证据结合起来的工作却很缺乏。为了促进这个方向的研究，我们发布了一个新颖的数据集 PHEMEPlus，它是 PHEME 基准的扩展，其中包含社交媒体对话以及每个谣言的相关外部证据。我们证明了将这些证据纳入改进谣言验证模型的有效性。此外，作为证据收集的一部分，我们评估各种查询制定方式，以确定最有效的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PHEMEPlus数据集，通过结合社交媒体对话与外部证据提升谣言验证效果。
AI.motivation: 现有社交媒体谣言验证方法仅依赖社交数据或外部信息，缺乏两者的融合研究。
AI.method: 构建包含社交媒体对话及对应外部证据的PHEMEPlus数据集，并评估多种查询策略的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明引入外部证据可提升验证模型性能，同时确定了最优的证据检索方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合多源信息能有效增强谣言验证，PHEMEPlus为后续研究提供重要数据支持。

authors_text: Zvi Kons,Hagai Aronowitz,Edmilson Morais,Matheus Damasceno,Hong-Kwang Kuo,Samuel Thomas,George Saon
title: Extending RNN-T-based speech recognition systems with emotion and language classification
title_zh: 通过情感和语言分类扩展基于 RNN-T 的语音识别系统
abstract: Speech transcription, emotion recognition, and language identification are usually considered to be three different tasks. Each one requires a different model with a different architecture and training process. We propose using a recurrent neural network transducer (RNN-T)-based speech-to-text (STT) system as a common component that can be used for emotion recognition and language identification as well as for speech recognition. Our work extends the STT system for emotion classification through minimal changes, and shows successful results on the IEMOCAP and MELD datasets. In addition, we demonstrate that by adding a lightweight component to the RNN-T module, it can also be used for language identification. In our evaluations, this new classifier demonstrates state-of-the-art accuracy for the NIST-LRE-07 dataset.
summary: Speech transcription, emotion recognition, and language identification are usually considered to be three different tasks. Each one requires a different model with a different architecture and training process. We propose using a recurrent neural network transducer (RNN-T)-based speech-to-text (STT) system as a common component that can be used for emotion recognition and language identification as well as for speech recognition. Our work extends the STT system for emotion classification through minimal changes, and shows successful results on the IEMOCAP and MELD datasets. In addition, we demonstrate that by adding a lightweight component to the RNN-T module, it can also be used for language identification. In our evaluations, this new classifier demonstrates state-of-the-art accuracy for the NIST-LRE-07 dataset.
abstract_zh: 语音转录、情感识别和语言识别通常被认为是三个不同的任务。每个模型都需要具有不同架构和训练过程的不同模型。我们建议使用基于循环神经网络换能器（RNN-T）的语音到文本（STT）系统作为通用组件，可用于情感识别、语言识别以及语音识别。我们的工作通过最小的改变扩展了用于情绪分类的 STT 系统，并在 IEMOCAP 和 MELD 数据集上展示了成功的结果。此外，我们证明通过向 RNN-T 模块添加轻量级组件，它也可以用于语言识别。在我们的评估中，这个新的分类器展示了 NIST-LRE-07 数据集最先进的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过扩展基于RNN-T的语音识别系统，使其能够同时进行情感分类和语言识别，从而整合多个语音处理任务。
AI.motivation: 传统上语音转录、情感识别和语言识别需要独立模型，导致资源冗余和效率低下。本文旨在通过统一框架降低复杂性并提升多任务处理能力。
AI.method: 以RNN-T为基础，通过最小架构修改实现情感分类，并添加轻量级模块实现语言识别，无需重新设计模型。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP和MELD数据集上情感分类表现优异，在NIST-LRE-07数据集上语言识别准确率达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: RNN-T框架可通过扩展支持多任务处理，验证了统一模型在语音处理中的有效性与可行性。
