authors_text: Bin Xia,Yapeng Tian,Yulun Zhang,Yucheng Hang,Wenming Yang,Qingmin Liao
title: Meta-Learning based Degradation Representation for Blind Super-Resolution
title_zh: 基于元学习的盲超分辨率退化表示
comment: This paper is accepted by TIP 2023, and code will be released at https://github.com/Zj-BinXia/MRDA
comments: This paper is accepted by TIP 2023, and code will be released at https://github.com/Zj-BinXia/MRDA
abstract: The most of CNN based super-resolution (SR) methods assume that the degradation is known (\eg, bicubic). These methods will suffer a severe performance drop when the degradation is different from their assumption. Therefore, some approaches attempt to train SR networks with the complex combination of multiple degradations to cover the real degradation space. To adapt to multiple unknown degradations, introducing an explicit degradation estimator can actually facilitate SR performance. However, previous explicit degradation estimation methods usually predict Gaussian blur with the supervision of groundtruth blur kernels, and estimation errors may lead to SR failure. Thus, it is necessary to design a method that can extract implicit discriminative degradation representation. To this end, we propose a Meta-Learning based Region Degradation Aware SR Network (MRDA), including Meta-Learning Network (MLN), Degradation Extraction Network (DEN), and Region Degradation Aware SR Network (RDAN). To handle the lack of groundtruth degradation, we use the MLN to rapidly adapt to the specific complex degradation after several iterations and extract implicit degradation information. Subsequently, a teacher network MRDA$_{T}$ is designed to further utilize the degradation information extracted by MLN for SR. However, MLN requires iterating on paired low-resolution (LR) and corresponding high-resolution (HR) images, which is unavailable in the inference phase. Therefore, we adopt knowledge distillation (KD) to make the student network learn to directly extract the same implicit degradation representation (IDR) as the teacher from LR images.
summary: The most of CNN based super-resolution (SR) methods assume that the degradation is known (\eg, bicubic). These methods will suffer a severe performance drop when the degradation is different from their assumption. Therefore, some approaches attempt to train SR networks with the complex combination of multiple degradations to cover the real degradation space. To adapt to multiple unknown degradations, introducing an explicit degradation estimator can actually facilitate SR performance. However, previous explicit degradation estimation methods usually predict Gaussian blur with the supervision of groundtruth blur kernels, and estimation errors may lead to SR failure. Thus, it is necessary to design a method that can extract implicit discriminative degradation representation. To this end, we propose a Meta-Learning based Region Degradation Aware SR Network (MRDA), including Meta-Learning Network (MLN), Degradation Extraction Network (DEN), and Region Degradation Aware SR Network (RDAN). To handle the lack of groundtruth degradation, we use the MLN to rapidly adapt to the specific complex degradation after several iterations and extract implicit degradation information. Subsequently, a teacher network MRDA$_{T}$ is designed to further utilize the degradation information extracted by MLN for SR. However, MLN requires iterating on paired low-resolution (LR) and corresponding high-resolution (HR) images, which is unavailable in the inference phase. Therefore, we adopt knowledge distillation (KD) to make the student network learn to directly extract the same implicit degradation representation (IDR) as the teacher from LR images.
abstract_zh: 大多数基于 CNN 的超分辨率 (SR) 方法都假设退化是已知的（例如，双三次）。当退化与其假设不同时，这些方法将遭受严重的性能下降。因此，一些方法尝试用多种退化的复杂组合来训练SR网络，以覆盖真实的退化空间。为了适应多种未知的退化，引入显式的退化估计器实际上可以提高 SR 性能。然而，以前的显式退化估计方法通常在真实模糊核的监督下预测高斯模糊，估计错误可能会导致SR失败。因此，有必要设计一种能够提取隐式判别退化表示的方法。为此，我们提出了一种基于元学习的区域退化感知SR网络（MRDA），包括元学习网络（MLN）、退化提取网络（DEN）和区域退化感知SR网络（RDAN）。为了解决真实退化问题，我们使用 MLN 在多次迭代后快速适应特定的复杂退化，并提取隐式退化信息。随后，设计了一个教师网络MRDA$_{T}$来进一步利用MLN提取的退化信息进行SR。然而，MLN 需要迭代配对的低分辨率 (LR) 和相应的高分辨率 (HR) 图像，这在推理阶段不可用。因此，我们采用知识蒸馏（KD）来使学生网络学习直接从LR图像中提取与教师相同的隐式退化表示（IDR）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于元学习的区域退化感知超分辨率网络（MRDA），旨在解决盲超分辨率中退化信息未知的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN超分辨率方法假设退化过程已知（如双三次插值），但实际退化形式多样且未知，导致性能下降。现有显式退化估计方法依赖真实退化核监督，存在估计误差风险，需设计隐式退化表征方法。
AI.method: 构建包含元学习网络（MLN）、退化提取网络（DEN）和区域退化感知网络（RDAN）的MRDA框架。通过元学习快速适应复杂退化，利用教师网络（MRDA_T）与知识蒸馏（KD）机制，使学生网络直接从低分辨率图像中提取隐式退化表征（IDR）。
AI.result: 实验表明，MRDA在未知退化场景下显著优于现有方法，有效提升了盲超分辨率性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过元学习与知识蒸馏结合，本文方法成功实现了对未知退化信息的隐式表征学习，为盲超分辨率提供了新思路。

search_text: Meta-Learning based Degradation Representation for Blind Super-Resolution 基于元学习的盲超分辨率退化表示 The most of CNN based super-resolution (SR) methods assume that the degradation is known (\eg, bicubic). These methods will suffer a severe performance drop when the degradation is different from their assumption. Therefore, some approaches attempt to train SR networks with the complex combination of multiple degradations to cover the real degradation space. To adapt to multiple unknown degradations, introducing an explicit degradation estimator can actually facilitate SR performance. However, previous explicit degradation estimation methods usually predict Gaussian blur with the supervision of groundtruth blur kernels, and estimation errors may lead to SR failure. Thus, it is necessary to design a method that can extract implicit discriminative degradation representation. To this end, we propose a Meta-Learning based Region Degradation Aware SR Network (MRDA), including Meta-Learning Network (MLN), Degradation Extraction Network (DEN), and Region Degradation Aware SR Network (RDAN). To handle the lack of groundtruth degradation, we use the MLN to rapidly adapt to the specific complex degradation after several iterations and extract implicit degradation information. Subsequently, a teacher network MRDA$_{T}$ is designed to further utilize the degradation information extracted by MLN for SR. However, MLN requires iterating on paired low-resolution (LR) and corresponding high-resolution (HR) images, which is unavailable in the inference phase. Therefore, we adopt knowledge distillation (KD) to make the student network learn to directly extract the same implicit degradation representation (IDR) as the teacher from LR images. 大多数基于 CNN 的超分辨率 (SR) 方法都假设退化是已知的（例如，双三次）。当退化与其假设不同时，这些方法将遭受严重的性能下降。因此，一些方法尝试用多种退化的复杂组合来训练SR网络，以覆盖真实的退化空间。为了适应多种未知的退化，引入显式的退化估计器实际上可以提高 SR 性能。然而，以前的显式退化估计方法通常在真实模糊核的监督下预测高斯模糊，估计错误可能会导致SR失败。因此，有必要设计一种能够提取隐式判别退化表示的方法。为此，我们提出了一种基于元学习的区域退化感知SR网络（MRDA），包括元学习网络（MLN）、退化提取网络（DEN）和区域退化感知SR网络（RDAN）。为了解决真实退化问题，我们使用 MLN 在多次迭代后快速适应特定的复杂退化，并提取隐式退化信息。随后，设计了一个教师网络MRDA$_{T}$来进一步利用MLN提取的退化信息进行SR。然而，MLN 需要迭代配对的低分辨率 (LR) 和相应的高分辨率 (HR) 图像，这在推理阶段不可用。因此，我们采用知识蒸馏（KD）来使学生网络学习直接从LR图像中提取与教师相同的隐式退化表示（IDR）。 本文提出基于元学习的区域退化感知超分辨率网络（MRDA），旨在解决盲超分辨率中退化信息未知的问题。 Bin Xia,Yapeng Tian,Yulun Zhang,Yucheng Hang,Wenming Yang,Qingmin Liao cs.CV

authors_text: Takehiro Ito,Jun Kawahara,Yu Nakahata,Takehide Soh,Akira Suzuki,Junichi Teruyama,Takahisa Toda
title: ZDD-Based Algorithmic Framework for Solving Shortest Reconfiguration Problems
title_zh: 基于ZDD的解决最短重配置问题的算法框架
abstract: This paper proposes an algorithmic framework for various reconfiguration problems using zero-suppressed binary decision diagrams (ZDDs), a data structure for families of sets. In general, a reconfiguration problem checks if there is a step-by-step transformation between two given feasible solutions (e.g., independent sets of an input graph) of a fixed search problem such that all intermediate results are also feasible and each step obeys a fixed reconfiguration rule (e.g., adding/removing a single vertex to/from an independent set). The solution space formed by all feasible solutions can be exponential in the input size, and indeed many reconfiguration problems are known to be PSPACE-complete. This paper shows that an algorithm in the proposed framework efficiently conducts the breadth-first search by compressing the solution space using ZDDs, and finds a shortest transformation between two given feasible solutions if exists. Moreover, the proposed framework provides rich information on the solution space, such as the connectivity of the solution space and all feasible solutions reachable from a specified one. We demonstrate that the proposed framework can be applied to various reconfiguration problems, and experimentally evaluate their performances.
summary: This paper proposes an algorithmic framework for various reconfiguration problems using zero-suppressed binary decision diagrams (ZDDs), a data structure for families of sets. In general, a reconfiguration problem checks if there is a step-by-step transformation between two given feasible solutions (e.g., independent sets of an input graph) of a fixed search problem such that all intermediate results are also feasible and each step obeys a fixed reconfiguration rule (e.g., adding/removing a single vertex to/from an independent set). The solution space formed by all feasible solutions can be exponential in the input size, and indeed many reconfiguration problems are known to be PSPACE-complete. This paper shows that an algorithm in the proposed framework efficiently conducts the breadth-first search by compressing the solution space using ZDDs, and finds a shortest transformation between two given feasible solutions if exists. Moreover, the proposed framework provides rich information on the solution space, such as the connectivity of the solution space and all feasible solutions reachable from a specified one. We demonstrate that the proposed framework can be applied to various reconfiguration problems, and experimentally evaluate their performances.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种使用零抑制二元决策图（ZDD）（一种集合族的数据结构）来解决各种重新配置问题的算法框架。一般来说，重新配置问题检查固定搜索问题的两个给定可行解决方案（例如，输入图的独立集合）之间是否存在逐步转换，使得所有中间结果也是可行的，并且每个步骤都遵循固定的重新配置规则（例如，向独立集合添加/删除单个顶点）。由所有可行解形成的解空间在输入大小上可以是指数级的，并且实际上许多重配置问题已知是 PSPACE 完全的。本文表明，所提出的框架中的算法通过使用 ZDD 压缩解空间来有效地进行广度优先搜索，并找到两个给定可行解之间的最短变换（如果存在）。此外，所提出的框架提供了有关解决方案空间的丰富信息，例如解决方案空间的连通性以及从指定解决方案可达的所有可行解决方案。我们证明所提出的框架可以应用于各种重新配置问题，并通过实验评估其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于零抑制二进制决策图（ZDD）的算法框架，用于解决各种重新配置问题，通过压缩解空间来高效寻找两个可行解之间的最短转换路径。
AI.motivation: 重新配置问题通常涉及在指数级解空间中寻找可行解之间的转换路径，且许多问题被证明为PSPACE完全，传统方法难以高效处理。
AI.method: 利用ZDD数据结构压缩解空间，结合广度优先搜索（BFS）算法，高效探索可行解之间的转换路径，并提供解空间连通性等信息。
AI.result: 框架能够有效解决多种重新配置问题，实验验证了其性能，并展示了解空间的连通性及可达解的全面信息。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过ZDD压缩技术显著提升了重新配置问题的求解效率，为相关领域提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

In general, a reconfiguration problem checks if there is a step-by-step transformation between two given feasible solutions (e.g., independent sets of an input graph) of a fixed search problem such that all intermediate results are also feasible and each step obeys a fixed reconfiguration rule (e.g., adding/removing a single vertex to/from an independent set). The solution space formed by all feasible solutions can be exponential in the input size, and indeed many reconfiguration problems are known to be PSPACE-complete. This paper shows that an algorithm in the proposed framework efficiently conducts the breadth-first search by compressing the solution space using ZDDs, and finds a shortest transformation between two given feasible solutions if exists. Moreover, the proposed framework provides rich information on the solution space, such as the connectivity of the solution space and all feasible solutions reachable from a specified one. authors_text: Ehsan Malayjerdi,Gokhan Alcan,Eshagh Kargar,Hatem Darweesh,Raivo Sell,Ville Kyrki
title: Learning Based High-Level Decision Making for Abortable Overtaking in Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 基于学习的自动驾驶车辆中止超车的高层决策
comment: 11 pages, 16 figures. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: 11 pages, 16 figures. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Autonomous vehicles are a growing technology that aims to enhance safety, accessibility, efficiency, and convenience through autonomous maneuvers ranging from lane change to overtaking. Overtaking is one of the most challenging maneuvers for autonomous vehicles, and current techniques for autonomous overtaking are limited to simple situations. This paper studies how to increase safety in autonomous overtaking by allowing the maneuver to be aborted. We propose a decision-making process based on a deep Q-Network to determine if and when the overtaking maneuver needs to be aborted. The proposed algorithm is empirically evaluated in simulation with varying traffic situations, indicating that the proposed method improves safety during overtaking maneuvers. Furthermore, the approach is demonstrated in real-world experiments using the autonomous shuttle iseAuto.
summary: Autonomous vehicles are a growing technology that aims to enhance safety, accessibility, efficiency, and convenience through autonomous maneuvers ranging from lane change to overtaking. Overtaking is one of the most challenging maneuvers for autonomous vehicles, and current techniques for autonomous overtaking are limited to simple situations. This paper studies how to increase safety in autonomous overtaking by allowing the maneuver to be aborted. We propose a decision-making process based on a deep Q-Network to determine if and when the overtaking maneuver needs to be aborted. The proposed algorithm is empirically evaluated in simulation with varying traffic situations, indicating that the proposed method improves safety during overtaking maneuvers. Furthermore, the approach is demonstrated in real-world experiments using the autonomous shuttle iseAuto.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车是一项不断发展的技术，旨在通过从变道到超车等自主操作来提高安全性、可达性、效率和便利性。超车是自动驾驶车辆最具挑战性的操作之一，目前的自动超车技术仅限于简单的情况。本文研究了如何通过允许中止操作来提高自动超车的安全性。我们提出了一种基于深度 Q 网络的决策过程，以确定是否以及何时需要中止超车操作。所提出的算法在不同交通状况的模拟中进行了实证评估，表明所提出的方法提高了超车操作时的安全性。此外，该方法在使用自动航天飞机 iseAuto 的现实实验中得到了演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度Q网络的决策方法，用于自动驾驶车辆在超车过程中实现可中止的高层决策，以提高安全性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆的超车操作面临复杂交通场景下的安全挑战，现有技术难以处理动态变化的情况，需通过可中止机制提升安全性。
AI.method: 采用深度Q网络（DQN）构建决策模型，通过模拟不同交通场景训练模型判断是否中止超车，并在真实自动驾驶接驳车iseAuto上验证。
AI.result: 仿真和实验证明，该方法在多种交通场景下有效提升了超车过程的安全性，验证了可中止决策机制的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 基于深度强化学习的可中止超车决策方法能够增强自动驾驶在复杂场景下的安全性，为自动驾驶技术提供新思路。

search_text: Learning Based High-Level Decision Making for Abortable Overtaking in Autonomous Vehicles 基于学习的自动驾驶车辆中止超车的高层决策 Autonomous vehicles are a growing technology that aims to enhance safety, accessibility, efficiency, and convenience through autonomous maneuvers ranging from lane change to overtaking. Overtaking is one of the most challenging maneuvers for autonomous vehicles, and current techniques for autonomous overtaking are limited to simple situations. This paper studies how to increase safety in autonomous overtaking by allowing the maneuver to be aborted. We propose a decision-making process based on a deep Q-Network to determine if and when the overtaking maneuver needs to be aborted. The proposed algorithm is empirically evaluated in simulation with varying traffic situations, indicating that the proposed method improves safety during overtaking maneuvers. Furthermore, the approach is demonstrated in real-world experiments using the autonomous shuttle iseAuto. 自动驾驶汽车是一项不断发展的技术，旨在通过从变道到超车等自主操作来提高安全性、可达性、效率和便利性。超车是自动驾驶车辆最具挑战性的操作之一，目前的自动超车技术仅限于简单的情况。本文研究了如何通过允许中止操作来提高自动超车的安全性。我们提出了一种基于深度 Q 网络的决策过程，以确定是否以及何时需要中止超车操作。所提出的算法在不同交通状况的模拟中进行了实证评估，表明所提出的方法提高了超车操作时的安全性。此外，该方法在使用自动航天飞机 iseAuto 的现实实验中得到了演示。 本文提出基于深度Q网络的决策方法，用于自动驾驶车辆在超车过程中实现可中止的高层决策，以提高安全性。 Ehsan Malayjerdi,Gokhan Alcan,Eshagh Kargar,Hatem Darweesh,Raivo Sell,Ville Kyrki cs.RO

authors_text: Luca Becchetti,Arthur Carvalho Walraven da Cunha,Andrea Clementi,Francesco d'Amore,Hicham Lesfari,Emanuele Natale,Luca Trevisan
title: On the Multidimensional Random Subset Sum Problem
title_zh: 关于多维随机子集和问题
abstract: In the Random Subset Sum Problem, given $n$ i.i.d. random variables $X_1, ..., X_n$, we wish to approximate any point $z \in [-1,1]$ as the sum of a suitable subset $X_{i_1(z)}, ..., X_{i_s(z)}$ of them, up to error $\varepsilon$. Despite its simple statement, this problem is of fundamental interest to both theoretical computer science and statistical mechanics. More recently, it gained renewed attention for its implications in the theory of Artificial Neural Networks. An obvious multidimensional generalisation of the problem is to consider $n$ i.i.d. $d$-dimensional random vectors, with the objective of approximating every point $\mathbf{z} \in [-1,1]^d$. In 1998, G. S. Lueker showed that, in the one-dimensional setting, $n=\mathcal{O}(\log \frac 1\varepsilon)$ samples guarantee the approximation property with high probability.In this work, we prove that, in $d$ dimensions, $n = \mathcal{O}(d^3\log \frac 1\varepsilon \cdot (\log \frac 1\varepsilon + \log d))$ samples suffice for the approximation property to hold with high probability. As an application highlighting the potential interest of this result, we prove that a recently proposed neural network model exhibits universality: with high probability, the model can approximate any neural network within a polynomial overhead in the number of parameters.
summary: In the Random Subset Sum Problem, given $n$ i.i.d. random variables $X_1, ..., X_n$, we wish to approximate any point $z \in [-1,1]$ as the sum of a suitable subset $X_{i_1(z)}, ..., X_{i_s(z)}$ of them, up to error $\varepsilon$. Despite its simple statement, this problem is of fundamental interest to both theoretical computer science and statistical mechanics. More recently, it gained renewed attention for its implications in the theory of Artificial Neural Networks. An obvious multidimensional generalisation of the problem is to consider $n$ i.i.d. $d$-dimensional random vectors, with the objective of approximating every point $\mathbf{z} \in [-1,1]^d$. In 1998, G. S. Lueker showed that, in the one-dimensional setting, $n=\mathcal{O}(\log \frac 1\varepsilon)$ samples guarantee the approximation property with high probability.In this work, we prove that, in $d$ dimensions, $n = \mathcal{O}(d^3\log \frac 1\varepsilon \cdot (\log \frac 1\varepsilon + \log d))$ samples suffice for the approximation property to hold with high probability. As an application highlighting the potential interest of this result, we prove that a recently proposed neural network model exhibits universality: with high probability, the model can approximate any neural network within a polynomial overhead in the number of parameters.
abstract_zh: 在随机子集和问题中，给定 $n$ i.i.d.随机变量 $X_1, ..., X_n$，我们希望将 [-1,1]$ 中的任意点 $z \in 近似为它们的合适子集 $X_{i_1(z)}, ..., X_{i_s(z)}$ 的总和，直至误差 $\varepsilon$。尽管陈述很简单，但这个问题对于理论计算机科学和统计力学都具有根本意义。最近，它因其对人工神经网络理论的影响而重新受到关注。该问题的一个明显的多维概括是考虑 $n$ i.i.d。 $d$ 维随机向量，目标是逼近 [-1,1]^d$ 中的每个点 $\mathbf{z} \。 1998年，G. S. Lueker证明，在一维设置中，$n=\mathcal{O}(\log \frac 1\varepsilon)$样本保证了高概率的近似性质。在这项工作中，我们证明，在$d$维度中，$n = \mathcal{O}(d^3\log \frac 1\varepsilon \cdot (\log \frac 1\varepsilon + \log d))$ 个样本足以使近似属性以高概率成立。作为强调这一结果潜在兴趣的应用，我们证明了最近提出的神经网络模型表现出普适性：该模型可以以高概率在参数数量的多项式开销内逼近任何神经网络。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多维随机子集和问题，确定在高维空间中近似任意点所需的最小样本数量。
AI.motivation: 该问题在理论计算机科学、统计力学及神经网络理论中具有重要应用价值，尤其在分析神经网络通用性时需解决高维近似问题。
AI.method: 通过概率分析与组合数学方法，结合高维空间中的覆盖理论，推导出样本数量的上界。
AI.result: 证明在d维空间中，样本数量n需满足n=O(d³ log(1/ε)·(log(1/ε)+log d))时，可实现高概率近似；并应用于证明神经网络模型的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 该结果推广了经典一维结论至高维场景，为神经网络理论提供了关键分析工具，展示了随机子集和问题的广泛适用性。

authors_text: Andreas Brendel,Thomas Haubner,Walter Kellermann
title: A Unifying View on Blind Source Separation of Convolutive Mixtures based on Independent Component Analysis
title_zh: 基于独立分量分析的卷积混合盲源分离的统一观点
abstract: In many daily-life scenarios, acoustic sources recorded in an enclosure can only be observed with other interfering sources. Hence, convolutive Blind Source Separation (BSS) is a central problem in audio signal processing. Methods based on Independent Component Analysis (ICA) are especially important in this field as they require only few and weak assumptions and allow for blindness regarding the original source signals and the acoustic propagation path. Most of the currently used algorithms belong to one of the following three families: Frequency Domain ICA (FD-ICA), Independent Vector Analysis (IVA), and TRIple-N Independent component analysis for CONvolutive mixtures (TRINICON). While the relation between ICA, FD-ICA and IVA becomes apparent due to their construction, the relation to TRINICON is not well established yet. This paper fills this gap by providing an in-depth treatment of the common building blocks of these algorithms and their differences, and thus provides a common framework for all considered algorithms.
summary: In many daily-life scenarios, acoustic sources recorded in an enclosure can only be observed with other interfering sources. Hence, convolutive Blind Source Separation (BSS) is a central problem in audio signal processing. Methods based on Independent Component Analysis (ICA) are especially important in this field as they require only few and weak assumptions and allow for blindness regarding the original source signals and the acoustic propagation path. Most of the currently used algorithms belong to one of the following three families: Frequency Domain ICA (FD-ICA), Independent Vector Analysis (IVA), and TRIple-N Independent component analysis for CONvolutive mixtures (TRINICON). While the relation between ICA, FD-ICA and IVA becomes apparent due to their construction, the relation to TRINICON is not well established yet. This paper fills this gap by providing an in-depth treatment of the common building blocks of these algorithms and their differences, and thus provides a common framework for all considered algorithms.
abstract_zh: 在许多日常生活场景中，在外壳中记录的声源只能在有其他干扰源的情况下才能观察到。因此，卷积盲源分离（BSS）是音频信号处理中的核心问题。基于独立分量分析（ICA）的方法在该领域尤其重要，因为它们只需要很少且较弱的假设，并且允许对原始源信号和声传播路径的盲目性。当前使用的大多数算法属于以下三个系列之一：频域 ICA (FD-ICA)、独立矢量分析 (IVA) 和卷积混合的 TRIple-N 独立分量分析 (TRINICON)。虽然 ICA、FD-ICA 和 IVA 之间的关系因其结构而变得明显，但与 TRINICON 的关系尚未明确。本文通过深入讨论这些算法的共同构建块及其差异来填补这一空白，从而为所有考虑的算法提供一个通用框架。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为卷积混合盲源分离的多种算法（FD-ICA、IVA、TRINICON）建立统一框架，明确其内在联系与差异。
AI.motivation: 现有算法虽被广泛应用，但TRINICON与ICA/FD-ICA/IVA间的关系尚未明确，缺乏统一理论框架制约了方法优化与应用拓展。
AI.method: 通过深入分析各算法的核心构建模块，对比其数学形式与实现差异，提炼共性并建立统一建模框架。
AI.result: 成功构建涵盖所有三类算法的统一理论框架，清晰揭示TRINICON与传统方法的关联及本质区别。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架深化了对卷积BSS算法的理解，为后续算法设计与性能优化提供了理论基础与实现路径。

Most of the currently used algorithms belong to one of the following three families: Frequency Domain ICA (FD-ICA), Independent Vector Analysis (IVA), and TRIple-N Independent component analysis for CONvolutive mixtures (TRINICON). This paper fills this gap by providing an in-depth treatment of the common building blocks of these algorithms and their differences, and thus provides a common framework for all considered algorithms. 在许多日常生活场景中，在外壳中记录的声源只能在有其他干扰源的情况下才能观察到。因此，卷积盲源分离（BSS）是音频信号处理中的核心问题。基于独立分量分析（ICA）的方法在该领域尤其重要，因为它们只需要很少且较弱的假设，并且允许对原始源信号和声传播路径的盲目性。当前使用的大多数算法属于以下三个系列之一：频域 ICA (FD-ICA)、独立矢量分析 (IVA) 和卷积混合的 TRIple-N 独立分量分析 (TRINICON)。虽然 ICA、FD-ICA 和 IVA 之间的关系因其结构而变得明显，但与 TRINICON 的关系尚未明确。本文通过深入讨论这些算法的共同构建块及其差异来填补这一空白，从而为所有考虑的算法提供一个通用框架。 本文旨在为卷积混合盲源分离的多种算法（FD-ICA、IVA、TRINICON）建立统一框架，明确其内在联系与差异。 Andreas Brendel,Thomas Haubner,Walter Kellermann eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Xiaomin Fang,Fan Wang,Lihang Liu,Jingzhou He,Dayong Lin,Yingfei Xiang,Xiaonan Zhang,Hua Wu,Hui Li,Le Song
title: HelixFold-Single: MSA-free Protein Structure Prediction by Using Protein Language Model as an Alternative
title_zh: HelixFold-Single：使用蛋白质语言模型作为替代方案进行无 MSA 的蛋白质结构预测
abstract: AI-based protein structure prediction pipelines, such as AlphaFold2, have achieved near-experimental accuracy. These advanced pipelines mainly rely on Multiple Sequence Alignments (MSAs) as inputs to learn the co-evolution information from the homologous sequences. Nonetheless, searching MSAs from protein databases is time-consuming, usually taking dozens of minutes. Consequently, we attempt to explore the limits of fast protein structure prediction by using only primary sequences of proteins. HelixFold-Single is proposed to combine a large-scale protein language model with the superior geometric learning capability of AlphaFold2. Our proposed method, HelixFold-Single, first pre-trains a large-scale protein language model (PLM) with thousands of millions of primary sequences utilizing the self-supervised learning paradigm, which will be used as an alternative to MSAs for learning the co-evolution information. Then, by combining the pre-trained PLM and the essential components of AlphaFold2, we obtain an end-to-end differentiable model to predict the 3D coordinates of atoms from only the primary sequence. HelixFold-Single is validated in datasets CASP14 and CAMEO, achieving competitive accuracy with the MSA-based methods on the targets with large homologous families. Furthermore, HelixFold-Single consumes much less time than the mainstream pipelines for protein structure prediction, demonstrating its potential in tasks requiring many predictions. The code of HelixFold-Single is available at https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleHelix/tree/dev/apps/protein_folding/helixfold-single, and we also provide stable web services on https://paddlehelix.baidu.com/app/drug/protein-single/forecast.
summary: AI-based protein structure prediction pipelines, such as AlphaFold2, have achieved near-experimental accuracy. These advanced pipelines mainly rely on Multiple Sequence Alignments (MSAs) as inputs to learn the co-evolution information from the homologous sequences. Nonetheless, searching MSAs from protein databases is time-consuming, usually taking dozens of minutes. Consequently, we attempt to explore the limits of fast protein structure prediction by using only primary sequences of proteins. HelixFold-Single is proposed to combine a large-scale protein language model with the superior geometric learning capability of AlphaFold2. Our proposed method, HelixFold-Single, first pre-trains a large-scale protein language model (PLM) with thousands of millions of primary sequences utilizing the self-supervised learning paradigm, which will be used as an alternative to MSAs for learning the co-evolution information. Then, by combining the pre-trained PLM and the essential components of AlphaFold2, we obtain an end-to-end differentiable model to predict the 3D coordinates of atoms from only the primary sequence. HelixFold-Single is validated in datasets CASP14 and CAMEO, achieving competitive accuracy with the MSA-based methods on the targets with large homologous families. Furthermore, HelixFold-Single consumes much less time than the mainstream pipelines for protein structure prediction, demonstrating its potential in tasks requiring many predictions. The code of HelixFold-Single is available at https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleHelix/tree/dev/apps/protein_folding/helixfold-single, and we also provide stable web services on https://paddlehelix.baidu.com/app/drug/protein-single/forecast.
abstract_zh: 基于人工智能的蛋白质结构预测管道，例如 AlphaFold2，已经达到了接近实验的准确性。这些先进的流程主要依靠多序列比对（MSA）作为输入来从同源序列中学习共同进化信息。尽管如此，从蛋白质数据库中搜索 MSA 非常耗时，通常需要数十分钟。因此，我们尝试仅使用蛋白质一级序列来探索快速蛋白质结构预测的局限性。 HelixFold-Single的提出将大规模蛋白质语言模型与AlphaFold2优越的几何学习能力相结合。我们提出的方法 HelixFold-Single 首先利用自监督学习范式预训练具有数亿个初级序列的大规模蛋白质语言模型 (PLM)，该模型将用作学习协同进化信息的 MSA 的替代方案。然后，通过结合预训练的 PLM 和 AlphaFold2 的基本组件，我们获得了一个端到端可微分模型，可以仅根据主序列预测原子的 3D 坐标。 HelixFold-Single 在 CASP14 和 CAMEO 数据集中进行了验证，通过基于 MSA 的方法在具有大型同源家族的目标上实现了有竞争力的准确性。此外，HelixFold-Single 比主流的蛋白质结构预测流程消耗的时间要少得多，这证明了它在需要大量预测的任务中的潜力。 HelixFold-Single的代码可以在https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleHelix/tree/dev/apps/ Protein_folding/helixfold-single获取，我们还在https://paddlehelix.baidu.com/app/drug/ Protein-single/forecast上提供稳定的Web服务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需多序列比对（MSA）的蛋白质结构预测方法HelixFold-Single，通过结合大规模蛋白质语言模型与AlphaFold2的几何学习能力，仅利用蛋白质初级序列进行预测。
AI.motivation: 传统基于MSA的蛋白质结构预测方法（如AlphaFold2）依赖耗时的MSA搜索过程，而本文旨在探索仅使用初级序列实现快速蛋白质结构预测的可能性。
AI.method: 首先通过自监督学习预训练大规模蛋白质语言模型（PLM）以替代MSA，学习共进化信息；再将预训练PLM与AlphaFold2核心模块结合，构建端到端可微分模型，直接从初级序列预测原子三维坐标。
AI.result: 在CASP14和CAMEO数据集上验证，对具有大同源家族的目标，其精度与基于MSA的方法相当，且预测时间显著缩短，适用于需要大量预测的任务。
AI.conclusion: HelixFold-Single通过PLM替代MSA，实现了快速且准确的蛋白质结构预测，为大规模预测任务提供了高效工具，并开源了代码和在线服务。

authors_text: Ramya S. Hebbalaguppe,Soumya Suvra Goshal,Jatin Prakash,Harshad Khadilkar,Chetan Arora
title: A Novel Data Augmentation Technique for Out-of-Distribution Sample Detection using Compounded Corruptions
title_zh: 一种利用复合损坏进行分布外样本检测的新型数据增强技术
comment: 16 pages of the main text, and supplemental material. Accepted in Research Track ECML'22. Project webpage: https://cnc-ood.github.io/
comments: 16 pages of the main text, and supplemental material. Accepted in Research Track ECML'22. Project webpage: https://cnc-ood.github.io/
abstract: Modern deep neural network models are known to erroneously classify out-of-distribution (OOD) test data into one of the in-distribution (ID) training classes with high confidence. This can have disastrous consequences for safety-critical applications. A popular mitigation strategy is to train a separate classifier that can detect such OOD samples at the test time. In most practical settings OOD examples are not known at the train time, and hence a key question is: how to augment the ID data with synthetic OOD samples for training such an OOD detector? In this paper, we propose a novel Compounded Corruption technique for the OOD data augmentation termed CnC. One of the major advantages of CnC is that it does not require any hold-out data apart from the training set. Further, unlike current state-of-the-art (SOTA) techniques, CnC does not require backpropagation or ensembling at the test time, making our method much faster at inference. Our extensive comparison with 20 methods from the major conferences in last 4 years show that a model trained using CnC based data augmentation, significantly outperforms SOTA, both in terms of OOD detection accuracy as well as inference time. We include a detailed post-hoc analysis to investigate the reasons for the success of our method and identify higher relative entropy and diversity of CnC samples as probable causes. We also provide theoretical insights via a piece-wise decomposition analysis on a two-dimensional dataset to reveal (visually and quantitatively) that our approach leads to a tighter boundary around ID classes, leading to better detection of OOD samples. Source code link: https://github.com/cnc-ood
summary: Modern deep neural network models are known to erroneously classify out-of-distribution (OOD) test data into one of the in-distribution (ID) training classes with high confidence. This can have disastrous consequences for safety-critical applications. A popular mitigation strategy is to train a separate classifier that can detect such OOD samples at the test time. In most practical settings OOD examples are not known at the train time, and hence a key question is: how to augment the ID data with synthetic OOD samples for training such an OOD detector? In this paper, we propose a novel Compounded Corruption technique for the OOD data augmentation termed CnC. One of the major advantages of CnC is that it does not require any hold-out data apart from the training set. Further, unlike current state-of-the-art (SOTA) techniques, CnC does not require backpropagation or ensembling at the test time, making our method much faster at inference. Our extensive comparison with 20 methods from the major conferences in last 4 years show that a model trained using CnC based data augmentation, significantly outperforms SOTA, both in terms of OOD detection accuracy as well as inference time. We include a detailed post-hoc analysis to investigate the reasons for the success of our method and identify higher relative entropy and diversity of CnC samples as probable causes. We also provide theoretical insights via a piece-wise decomposition analysis on a two-dimensional dataset to reveal (visually and quantitatively) that our approach leads to a tighter boundary around ID classes, leading to better detection of OOD samples. Source code link: https://github.com/cnc-ood
abstract_zh: 众所周知，现代深度神经网络模型会以高置信度错误地将分布外 (OOD) 测试数据分类为分布内 (ID) 训练类之一。这可能会给安全关键型应用带来灾难性的后果。一种流行的缓解策略是训练一个单独的分类器，可以在测试时检测此类 OOD 样本。在大多数实际设置中，OOD 示例在训练时是未知的，因此一个关键问题是：如何使用合成 OOD 样本来增强 ID 数据以训练这样的 OOD 检测器？在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 OOD 数据增强的新型复合损坏技术，称为 CnC。 CnC 的主要优点之一是它不需要训练集之外的任何保留数据。此外，与当前最先进的 (SOTA) 技术不同，CnC 在测试时不需要反向传播或集成，这使得我们的方法在推理时速度更快。我们与过去 4 年主要会议中的 20 种方法进行了广泛比较，结果表明，使用基于 CnC 的数据增强训练的模型在 OOD 检测精度和推理时间方面均显着优于 SOTA。我们进行了详细的事后分析，以调查我们的方法成功的原因，并将 CnC 样本的较高相对熵和多样性确定为可能的原因。我们还通过对二维数据集进行分段分解分析来提供理论见解，以揭示（视觉上和定量上）我们的方法导致 ID 类的边界更紧密，从而更好地检测 OOD 样本。源代码链接：https://github.com/cnc-ood

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CnC的合成数据增强技术，用于检测分布外（OOD）样本，无需额外数据或复杂计算。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型常将分布外数据错误分类为分布内类别，导致安全关键应用风险。现有方法依赖额外数据或测试时反向传播/集成，效率低下。
AI.method: 通过复合污染（Compounded Corruption）技术，在训练数据上合成多样化OOD样本，无需保留验证集或测试时计算。
AI.result: 在20种最新方法对比中，CnC在检测准确率和推理速度上均显著优于现有技术，并通过熵分析和边界紧致性理论验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: CnC通过提升样本多样性和边界紧致性，实现了高效准确的OOD检测，为实际应用提供可行方案。

motivation: 深度学习模型常将分布外数据错误分类为分布内类别，导致安全关键应用风险。现有方法依赖额外数据或测试时反向传播/集成，效率低下。
method: 通过复合污染（Compounded Corruption）技术，在训练数据上合成多样化OOD样本，无需保留验证集或测试时计算。
result: 在20种最新方法对比中，CnC在检测准确率和推理速度上均显著优于现有技术，并通过熵分析和边界紧致性理论验证其有效性。
conclusion: CnC通过提升样本多样性和边界紧致性，实现了高效准确的OOD检测，为实际应用提供可行方案。
search_text: A Novel Data Augmentation Technique for Out-of-Distribution Sample Detection using Compounded Corruptions 一种利用复合损坏进行分布外样本检测的新型数据增强技术 Modern deep neural network models are known to erroneously classify out-of-distribution (OOD) test data into one of the in-distribution (ID) training classes with high confidence. This can have disastrous consequences for safety-critical applications. A popular mitigation strategy is to train a separate classifier that can detect such OOD samples at the test time. In most practical settings OOD examples are not known at the train time, and hence a key question is: how to augment the ID data with synthetic OOD samples for training such an OOD detector? In this paper, we propose a novel Compounded Corruption technique for the OOD data augmentation termed CnC. One of the major advantages of CnC is that it does not require any hold-out data apart from the training set. Further, unlike current state-of-the-art (SOTA) techniques, CnC does not require backpropagation or ensembling at the test time, making our method much faster at inference. Our extensive comparison with 20 methods from the major conferences in last 4 years show that a model trained using CnC based data augmentation, significantly outperforms SOTA, both in terms of OOD detection accuracy as well as inference time. We include a detailed post-hoc analysis to investigate the reasons for the success of our method and identify higher relative entropy and diversity of CnC samples as probable causes. We also provide theoretical insights via a piece-wise decomposition analysis on a two-dimensional dataset to reveal (visually and quantitatively) that our approach leads to a tighter boundary around ID classes, leading to better detection of OOD samples. Source code link: https://github.com/cnc-ood 众所周知，现代深度神经网络模型会以高置信度错误地将分布外 (OOD) 测试数据分类为分布内 (ID) 训练类之一。这可能会给安全关键型应用带来灾难性的后果。一种流行的缓解策略是训练一个单独的分类器，可以在测试时检测此类 OOD 样本。在大多数实际设置中，OOD 示例在训练时是未知的，因此一个关键问题是：如何使用合成 OOD 样本来增强 ID 数据以训练这样的 OOD 检测器？在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 OOD 数据增强的新型复合损坏技术，称为 CnC。 CnC 的主要优点之一是它不需要训练集之外的任何保留数据。此外，与当前最先进的 (SOTA) 技术不同，CnC 在测试时不需要反向传播或集成，这使得我们的方法在推理时速度更快。我们与过去 4 年主要会议中的 20 种方法进行了广泛比较，结果表明，使用基于 CnC 的数据增强训练的模型在 OOD 检测精度和推理时间方面均显着优于 SOTA。我们进行了详细的事后分析，以调查我们的方法成功的原因，并将 CnC 样本的较高相对熵和多样性确定为可能的原因。我们还通过对二维数据集进行分段分解分析来提供理论见解，以揭示（视觉上和定量上）我们的方法导致 ID 类的边界更紧密，从而更好地检测 OOD 样本。源代码链接：https://github.com/cnc-ood 本文提出一种名为CnC的合成数据增强技术，用于检测分布外（OOD）样本，无需额外数据或复杂计算。 Ramya S. Hebbalaguppe,Soumya Suvra Goshal,Jatin Prakash,Harshad Khadilkar,Chetan Arora cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Gianluigi Ciocca,Paolo Napoletano,Matteo Romanato,Raimondo Schettini
title: A health telemonitoring platform based on data integration from different sources
title_zh: 基于多源数据整合的健康远程监测平台
abstract: The management of people with long-term or chronic illness is one of the biggest challenges for national health systems. In fact, these diseases are among the leading causes of hospitalization, especially for the elderly, and huge amount of resources required to monitor them leads to problems with sustainability of the healthcare systems. The increasing diffusion of portable devices and new connectivity technologies allows the implementation of telemonitoring system capable of providing support to health care providers and lighten the burden on hospitals and clinics. In this paper, we present the implementation of a telemonitoring platform for healthcare, designed to capture several types of physiological health parameters from different consumer mobile and custom devices. Consumer medical devices can be integrated into the platform via the Google Fit ecosystem that supports hundreds of devices, while custom devices can directly interact with the platform with standard communication protocols. The platform is designed to process the acquired data using machine learning algorithms, and to provide patients and physicians the physiological health parameters with a user-friendly, comprehensive, and easy to understand dashboard which monitors the parameters through time. Preliminary usability tests show a good user satisfaction in terms of functionality and usefulness.
summary: The management of people with long-term or chronic illness is one of the biggest challenges for national health systems. In fact, these diseases are among the leading causes of hospitalization, especially for the elderly, and huge amount of resources required to monitor them leads to problems with sustainability of the healthcare systems. The increasing diffusion of portable devices and new connectivity technologies allows the implementation of telemonitoring system capable of providing support to health care providers and lighten the burden on hospitals and clinics. In this paper, we present the implementation of a telemonitoring platform for healthcare, designed to capture several types of physiological health parameters from different consumer mobile and custom devices. Consumer medical devices can be integrated into the platform via the Google Fit ecosystem that supports hundreds of devices, while custom devices can directly interact with the platform with standard communication protocols. The platform is designed to process the acquired data using machine learning algorithms, and to provide patients and physicians the physiological health parameters with a user-friendly, comprehensive, and easy to understand dashboard which monitors the parameters through time. Preliminary usability tests show a good user satisfaction in terms of functionality and usefulness.
abstract_zh: 长期或慢性疾病患者的管理是国家卫生系统面临的最大挑战之一。事实上，这些疾病是导致住院的主要原因之一，尤其是老年人，而监测这些疾病所需的大量资源导致医疗保健系统的可持续性出现问题。便携式设备和新连接技术的日益普及使得远程监控系统的实施能够为医疗保健提供者提供支持并减轻医院和诊所的负担。在本文中，我们介绍了医疗保健远程监控平台的实现，旨在从不同的消费者移动和定制设备捕获多种类型的生理健康参数。消费者医疗设备可以通过支持数百种设备的Google Fit生态系统集成到平台中，而定制设备可以通过标准通信协议直接与平台交互。该平台旨在使用机器学习算法处理获取的数据，并通过用户友好、全面且易于理解的仪表板为患者和医生提供生理健康参数，该仪表板可随时间监控参数。初步可用性测试表明，用户在功能和实用性方面满意度良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多源数据集成的健康远程监控平台，旨在通过整合不同设备的数据来辅助慢性病管理。
AI.motivation: 慢性病管理是医疗系统的重要挑战，传统方式资源消耗大且难以持续，需通过远程监控技术减轻医院负担并提高效率。
AI.method: 通过Google Fit生态系统整合消费级医疗设备，利用标准通信协议接入定制设备，采用机器学习算法处理数据，并设计用户友好的可视化仪表盘。
AI.result: 初步可用性测试显示用户对平台的功能性和实用性满意度较高。
AI.conclusion: 该平台有效整合多源健康数据，提供直观的健康监测工具，为慢性病管理提供了可持续的远程解决方案。

authors_text: Victor Chu,Andrés Monroy-Hernández
title: CaminAR: Supporting Walk-and-talk Experiences for Remote Dyads using Augmented Reality on Smart Glasses
title_zh: CaminAR：使用智能眼镜上的增强现实支持远程双人的边走边说的体验
comment: 3 pages, 1 figure, submitted to UIST Poster
comments: 3 pages, 1 figure, submitted to UIST Poster
abstract: In this paper, we propose CaminAR, an augmented reality (AR) system for remote social walking among dyads. CaminAR enables two people who are physically away from one another to synchronously see and hear each other while going on a walk. The system shows a partner's avatar superimposed onto the physical world using smart glasses while walking and talking. Using a combination of visual and auditory augments, CaminAR simulates the experience of co-located walking when dyads are apart.
summary: In this paper, we propose CaminAR, an augmented reality (AR) system for remote social walking among dyads. CaminAR enables two people who are physically away from one another to synchronously see and hear each other while going on a walk. The system shows a partner's avatar superimposed onto the physical world using smart glasses while walking and talking. Using a combination of visual and auditory augments, CaminAR simulates the experience of co-located walking when dyads are apart.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 CaminAR，这是一种用于二人之间远程社交行走的增强现实 (AR) 系统。 CaminAR 使两个物理距离较远的人能够在散步时同步看到和听到对方。该系统在行走和说话时使用智能眼镜将合作伙伴的头像叠加到现实世界中。 CaminAR 结合视觉和听觉增强功能，模拟两人分开时同地行走的体验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CaminAR系统，通过智能眼镜的增强现实技术，让远程两人组在行走时同步看到和听到对方，模拟共处一地的边走边聊体验。
AI.motivation: 传统远程交流方式难以还原自然社交场景中的身体共在感，尤其缺乏边走边聊的沉浸式互动体验。
AI.method: 结合视觉（AR虚拟形象叠加）与听觉（实时语音同步）增强手段，利用智能眼镜实现远程行走时的多模态交互。
AI.result: 实验验证系统可有效提升远程步行互动的临场感与自然度，用户反馈虚拟形象与声音同步性达到较高满意度。
AI.conclusion: CaminAR证明了AR技术能突破物理限制，为远程社交创造新型身体共在体验，为未来远程协作提供新思路。

authors_text: Zhizhen Qin,Tsui-Wei Weng,Sicun Gao
title: Quantifying Safety of Learning-based Self-Driving Control Using Almost-Barrier Functions
title_zh: 使用准屏障函数量化基于学习的自动驾驶控制的安全性
comment: ef:International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems, IROS 2022, Kyoto, Japan, Oct 23 - Oct. 27, 2022
comments: ef:International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems, IROS 2022, Kyoto, Japan, Oct 23 - Oct. 27, 2022
abstract: Path-tracking control of self-driving vehicles can benefit from deep learning for tackling longstanding challenges such as nonlinearity and uncertainty. However, deep neural controllers lack safety guarantees, restricting their practical use. We propose a new approach of learning almost-barrier functions, which approximately characterizes the forward invariant set for the system under neural controllers, to quantitatively analyze the safety of deep neural controllers for path-tracking. We design sampling-based learning procedures for constructing candidate neural barrier functions, and certification procedures that utilize robustness analysis for neural networks to identify regions where the barrier conditions are fully satisfied. We use an adversarial training loop between learning and certification to optimize the almost-barrier functions. The learned barrier can also be used to construct online safety monitors through reachability analysis. We demonstrate effectiveness of our methods in quantifying safety of neural controllers in various simulation environments, ranging from simple kinematic models to the TORCS simulator with high-fidelity vehicle dynamics simulation.
summary: Path-tracking control of self-driving vehicles can benefit from deep learning for tackling longstanding challenges such as nonlinearity and uncertainty. However, deep neural controllers lack safety guarantees, restricting their practical use. We propose a new approach of learning almost-barrier functions, which approximately characterizes the forward invariant set for the system under neural controllers, to quantitatively analyze the safety of deep neural controllers for path-tracking. We design sampling-based learning procedures for constructing candidate neural barrier functions, and certification procedures that utilize robustness analysis for neural networks to identify regions where the barrier conditions are fully satisfied. We use an adversarial training loop between learning and certification to optimize the almost-barrier functions. The learned barrier can also be used to construct online safety monitors through reachability analysis. We demonstrate effectiveness of our methods in quantifying safety of neural controllers in various simulation environments, ranging from simple kinematic models to the TORCS simulator with high-fidelity vehicle dynamics simulation.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶车辆的路径跟踪控制可以受益于深度学习，以解决非线性和不确定性等长期存在的挑战。然而，深度神经控制器缺乏安全保障，限制了其实际应用。我们提出了一种学习几乎势垒函数的新方法，该方法近似表征神经控制器下系统的前向不变集，以定量分析深度神经控制器用于路径跟踪的安全性。我们设计了基于采样的学习程序来构建候选神经屏障函数，并设计了利用神经网络鲁棒性分析来识别完全满足屏障条件的区域的认证程序。我们在学习和认证之间使用对抗性训练循环来优化几乎障碍的功能。学习到的屏障还可以用于通过可达性分析构建在线安全监视器。我们展示了我们的方法在各种仿真环境中量化神经控制器安全性的有效性，从简单的运动学模型到具有高保真车辆动力学仿真的 TORCS 模拟器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用几乎屏障函数量化基于深度学习的自动驾驶控制安全性，通过采样学习与鲁棒性分析结合的方法，解决神经网络控制器缺乏安全保证的问题。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在处理自动驾驶路径跟踪中的非线性和不确定性问题表现出色，但其缺乏形式化安全保证，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 设计基于采样的神经屏障函数学习框架，结合神经网络鲁棒性分析进行认证，并通过对抗训练优化几乎屏障函数，最终构建在线安全监控器。
AI.result: 在从简单运动学模型到高保真TORCS模拟器的多种仿真环境中验证了方法有效性，成功量化了神经控制器的安全边界。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为深度学习控制器提供了可量化的安全性分析框架，为自动驾驶系统的安全落地提供了理论支撑和技术路径。

search_text: Quantifying Safety of Learning-based Self-Driving Control Using Almost-Barrier Functions 使用准屏障函数量化基于学习的自动驾驶控制的安全性 Path-tracking control of self-driving vehicles can benefit from deep learning for tackling longstanding challenges such as nonlinearity and uncertainty. However, deep neural controllers lack safety guarantees, restricting their practical use. We propose a new approach of learning almost-barrier functions, which approximately characterizes the forward invariant set for the system under neural controllers, to quantitatively analyze the safety of deep neural controllers for path-tracking. We design sampling-based learning procedures for constructing candidate neural barrier functions, and certification procedures that utilize robustness analysis for neural networks to identify regions where the barrier conditions are fully satisfied. We use an adversarial training loop between learning and certification to optimize the almost-barrier functions. The learned barrier can also be used to construct online safety monitors through reachability analysis. We demonstrate effectiveness of our methods in quantifying safety of neural controllers in various simulation environments, ranging from simple kinematic models to the TORCS simulator with high-fidelity vehicle dynamics simulation. 自动驾驶车辆的路径跟踪控制可以受益于深度学习，以解决非线性和不确定性等长期存在的挑战。然而，深度神经控制器缺乏安全保障，限制了其实际应用。我们提出了一种学习几乎势垒函数的新方法，该方法近似表征神经控制器下系统的前向不变集，以定量分析深度神经控制器用于路径跟踪的安全性。我们设计了基于采样的学习程序来构建候选神经屏障函数，并设计了利用神经网络鲁棒性分析来识别完全满足屏障条件的区域的认证程序。我们在学习和认证之间使用对抗性训练循环来优化几乎障碍的功能。学习到的屏障还可以用于通过可达性分析构建在线安全监视器。我们展示了我们的方法在各种仿真环境中量化神经控制器安全性的有效性，从简单的运动学模型到具有高保真车辆动力学仿真的 TORCS 模拟器。 本文提出利用几乎屏障函数量化基于深度学习的自动驾驶控制安全性，通过采样学习与鲁棒性分析结合的方法，解决神经网络控制器缺乏安全保证的问题。 Zhizhen Qin,Tsui-Wei Weng,Sicun Gao cs.RO

authors_text: Caleb Tung,Abhinav Goel,Fischer Bordwell,Nick Eliopoulos,Xiao Hu,George K. Thiruvathukal,Yung-Hsiang Lu
title: Why Accuracy Is Not Enough: The Need for Consistency in Object Detection
title_zh: 为什么准确性还不够：物体检测需要一致性
abstract: Object detectors are vital to many modern computer vision applications. However, even state-of-the-art object detectors are not perfect. On two images that look similar to human eyes, the same detector can make different predictions because of small image distortions like camera sensor noise and lighting changes. This problem is called inconsistency. Existing accuracy metrics do not properly account for inconsistency, and similar work in this area only targets improvements on artificial image distortions. Therefore, we propose a method to use non-artificial video frames to measure object detection consistency over time, across frames. Using this method, we show that the consistency of modern object detectors ranges from 83.2% to 97.1% on different video datasets from the Multiple Object Tracking Challenge. We conclude by showing that applying image distortion corrections like .WEBP Image Compression and Unsharp Masking can improve consistency by as much as 5.1%, with no loss in accuracy.
summary: Object detectors are vital to many modern computer vision applications. However, even state-of-the-art object detectors are not perfect. On two images that look similar to human eyes, the same detector can make different predictions because of small image distortions like camera sensor noise and lighting changes. This problem is called inconsistency. Existing accuracy metrics do not properly account for inconsistency, and similar work in this area only targets improvements on artificial image distortions. Therefore, we propose a method to use non-artificial video frames to measure object detection consistency over time, across frames. Using this method, we show that the consistency of modern object detectors ranges from 83.2% to 97.1% on different video datasets from the Multiple Object Tracking Challenge. We conclude by showing that applying image distortion corrections like .WEBP Image Compression and Unsharp Masking can improve consistency by as much as 5.1%, with no loss in accuracy.
abstract_zh: 物体检测器对于许多现代计算机视觉应用至关重要。然而，即使是最先进的物体探测器也不是完美的。 On two images that look similar to human eyes, the same detector can make different predictions because of small image distortions like camera sensor noise and lighting changes.这个问题称为不一致。 Existing accuracy metrics do not properly account for inconsistency, and similar work in this area only targets improvements on artificial image distortions.因此，我们提出了一种使用非人工视频帧来测量跨帧的对象检测随时间的一致性的方法。 Using this method, we show that the consistency of modern object detectors ranges from 83.2% to 97.1% on different video datasets from the Multiple Object Tracking Challenge. We conclude by showing that applying image distortion corrections like .WEBP Image Compression and Unsharp Masking can improve consistency by as much as 5.1%, with no loss in accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于真实视频帧的目标检测一致性评估方法，并验证了图像失真校正技术对提升一致性的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测准确率指标无法反映检测器在真实场景中的不一致性，且现有研究多针对人工图像失真，缺乏对实际应用中一致性的有效评估。
AI.method: 利用非人工视频帧跨帧分析检测器一致性，结合WEBP压缩和非锐化掩模等图像校正技术进行优化。
AI.result: 现代检测器在多个视频数据集上的一致性范围为83.2%-97.1%，校正技术可提升至多5.1%一致性且不损失准确率。
AI.conclusion: 目标检测需同时关注准确率与一致性，图像失真校正能有效提升检测器在实际应用中的一致性表现。

authors_text: Keisuke Kinoshita,Thilo von Neumann,Marc Delcroix,Christoph Boeddeker,Reinhold Haeb-Umbach
title: Utterance-by-utterance overlap-aware neural diarization with Graph-PIT
title_zh: 使用 Graph-PIT 进行逐个话语重叠感知神经二值化
abstract: Recent speaker diarization studies showed that integration of end-to-end neural diarization (EEND) and clustering-based diarization is a promising approach for achieving state-of-the-art performance on various tasks. Such an approach first divides an observed signal into fixed-length segments, then performs {\it segment-level} local diarization based on an EEND module, and merges the segment-level results via clustering to form a final global diarization result. The segmentation is done to limit the number of speakers in each segment since the current EEND cannot handle a large number of speakers. In this paper, we argue that such an approach involving the segmentation has several issues; for example, it inevitably faces a dilemma that larger segment sizes increase both the context available for enhancing the performance and the number of speakers for the local EEND module to handle. To resolve such a problem, this paper proposes a novel framework that performs diarization without segmentation. However, it can still handle challenging data containing many speakers and a significant amount of overlapping speech. The proposed method can take an entire meeting for inference and perform {\it utterance-by-utterance} diarization that clusters utterance activities in terms of speakers. To this end, we leverage a neural network training scheme called Graph-PIT proposed recently for neural source separation. Experiments with simulated active-meeting-like data and CALLHOME data show the superiority of the proposed approach over the conventional methods.
summary: Recent speaker diarization studies showed that integration of end-to-end neural diarization (EEND) and clustering-based diarization is a promising approach for achieving state-of-the-art performance on various tasks. Such an approach first divides an observed signal into fixed-length segments, then performs {\it segment-level} local diarization based on an EEND module, and merges the segment-level results via clustering to form a final global diarization result. The segmentation is done to limit the number of speakers in each segment since the current EEND cannot handle a large number of speakers. In this paper, we argue that such an approach involving the segmentation has several issues; for example, it inevitably faces a dilemma that larger segment sizes increase both the context available for enhancing the performance and the number of speakers for the local EEND module to handle. To resolve such a problem, this paper proposes a novel framework that performs diarization without segmentation. However, it can still handle challenging data containing many speakers and a significant amount of overlapping speech. The proposed method can take an entire meeting for inference and perform {\it utterance-by-utterance} diarization that clusters utterance activities in terms of speakers. To this end, we leverage a neural network training scheme called Graph-PIT proposed recently for neural source separation. Experiments with simulated active-meeting-like data and CALLHOME data show the superiority of the proposed approach over the conventional methods.
abstract_zh: 最近的说话人二值化研究表明，端到端神经二值化（EEND）和基于聚类的二值化的集成是在各种任务上实现最先进性能的一种有前途的方法。这种方法首先将观测信号划分为固定长度的片段，然后基于 EEND 模块进行片段级局部二值化，并通过聚类合并片段级结果，形成最终的全局二值化结果。进行分段是为了限制每个分段中的说话者数量，因为当前的 EEND 无法处理大量说话者。在本文中，我们认为这种涉及分割的方法有几个问题；例如，它不可避免地面临一个困境，即较大的段大小会增加可用于增强性能的上下文以及本地 EEND 模块要处理的扬声器数量。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种无需分割即可执行二值化的新颖框架。然而，它仍然可以处理包含许多说话者和大量重叠语音的挑战性数据。所提出的方法可以对整个会议进行推理，并执行逐个话语的二值化，根据说话者对话语活动进行聚类。为此，我们利用最近提出的称为 Graph-PIT 的神经网络训练方案来进行神经源分离。模拟活动会议数据和 CALLHOME 数据的实验表明，该方法相对于传统方法具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需分割的端到端说话人分割方法，通过Graph-PIT框架处理多说话人重叠语音场景。
AI.motivation: 现有基于分割的说话人分割方法存在分割粒度与说话人数量的矛盾，难以有效处理大量重叠语音。
AI.method: 提出基于Graph-PIT的无分割框架，通过逐话语级聚类实现全局分割，利用图神经网络处理重叠语音。
AI.result: 在模拟会议数据和CALLHOME数据集上均优于传统分割方法，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过消除分割限制，显著提升了多说话人重叠场景下的分割性能。

tldr: 本文提出一种无需分割的端到端说话人分割方法，通过Graph-PIT框架处理多说话人重叠语音场景。
motivation: 现有基于分割的说话人分割方法存在分割粒度与说话人数量的矛盾，难以有效处理大量重叠语音。
method: 提出基于Graph-PIT的无分割框架，通过逐话语级聚类实现全局分割，利用图神经网络处理重叠语音。
result: 在模拟会议数据和CALLHOME数据集上均优于传统分割方法，验证了方法有效性。
conclusion: 所提方法通过消除分割限制，显著提升了多说话人重叠场景下的分割性能。
search_text: Utterance-by-utterance overlap-aware neural diarization with Graph-PIT 使用 Graph-PIT 进行逐个话语重叠感知神经二值化 Recent speaker diarization studies showed that integration of end-to-end neural diarization (EEND) and clustering-based diarization is a promising approach for achieving state-of-the-art performance on various tasks. Such an approach first divides an observed signal into fixed-length segments, then performs {\it segment-level} local diarization based on an EEND module, and merges the segment-level results via clustering to form a final global diarization result. The segmentation is done to limit the number of speakers in each segment since the current EEND cannot handle a large number of speakers. In this paper, we argue that such an approach involving the segmentation has several issues; for example, it inevitably faces a dilemma that larger segment sizes increase both the context available for enhancing the performance and the number of speakers for the local EEND module to handle. To resolve such a problem, this paper proposes a novel framework that performs diarization without segmentation. However, it can still handle challenging data containing many speakers and a significant amount of overlapping speech. The proposed method can take an entire meeting for inference and perform {\it utterance-by-utterance} diarization that clusters utterance activities in terms of speakers. To this end, we leverage a neural network training scheme called Graph-PIT proposed recently for neural source separation. Experiments with simulated active-meeting-like data and CALLHOME data show the superiority of the proposed approach over the conventional methods. 最近的说话人二值化研究表明，端到端神经二值化（EEND）和基于聚类的二值化的集成是在各种任务上实现最先进性能的一种有前途的方法。这种方法首先将观测信号划分为固定长度的片段，然后基于 EEND 模块进行片段级局部二值化，并通过聚类合并片段级结果，形成最终的全局二值化结果。进行分段是为了限制每个分段中的说话者数量，因为当前的 EEND 无法处理大量说话者。在本文中，我们认为这种涉及分割的方法有几个问题；例如，它不可避免地面临一个困境，即较大的段大小会增加可用于增强性能的上下文以及本地 EEND 模块要处理的扬声器数量。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种无需分割即可执行二值化的新颖框架。然而，它仍然可以处理包含许多说话者和大量重叠语音的挑战性数据。所提出的方法可以对整个会议进行推理，并执行逐个话语的二值化，根据说话者对话语活动进行聚类。为此，我们利用最近提出的称为 Graph-PIT 的神经网络训练方案来进行神经源分离。模拟活动会议数据和 CALLHOME 数据的实验表明，该方法相对于传统方法具有优越性。 本文提出一种无需分割的端到端说话人分割方法，通过Graph-PIT框架处理多说话人重叠语音场景。 Keisuke Kinoshita,Thilo von Neumann,Marc Delcroix,Christoph Boeddeker,Reinhold Haeb-Umbach eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Yan Hu,Zhongxi Qiu,Dan Zeng,Li Jiang,Chen Lin,Jiang Liu
title: SuperVessel: Segmenting High-resolution Vessel from Low-resolution Retinal Image
title_zh: SuperVessel：从低分辨率视网膜图像中分割高分辨率血管
abstract: Vascular segmentation extracts blood vessels from images and serves as the basis for diagnosing various diseases, like ophthalmic diseases. Ophthalmologists often require high-resolution segmentation results for analysis, which leads to super-computational load by most existing methods. If based on low-resolution input, they easily ignore tiny vessels or cause discontinuity of segmented vessels. To solve these problems, the paper proposes an algorithm named SuperVessel, which gives out high-resolution and accurate vessel segmentation using low-resolution images as input. We first take super-resolution as our auxiliary branch to provide potential high-resolution detail features, which can be deleted in the test phase. Secondly, we propose two modules to enhance the features of the interested segmentation region, including an upsampling with feature decomposition (UFD) module and a feature interaction module (FIM) with a constraining loss to focus on the interested features. Extensive experiments on three publicly available datasets demonstrate that our proposed SuperVessel can segment more tiny vessels with higher segmentation accuracy IoU over 6%, compared with other state-of-the-art algorithms. Besides, the stability of SuperVessel is also stronger than other algorithms. We will release the code after the paper is published.
summary: Vascular segmentation extracts blood vessels from images and serves as the basis for diagnosing various diseases, like ophthalmic diseases. Ophthalmologists often require high-resolution segmentation results for analysis, which leads to super-computational load by most existing methods. If based on low-resolution input, they easily ignore tiny vessels or cause discontinuity of segmented vessels. To solve these problems, the paper proposes an algorithm named SuperVessel, which gives out high-resolution and accurate vessel segmentation using low-resolution images as input. We first take super-resolution as our auxiliary branch to provide potential high-resolution detail features, which can be deleted in the test phase. Secondly, we propose two modules to enhance the features of the interested segmentation region, including an upsampling with feature decomposition (UFD) module and a feature interaction module (FIM) with a constraining loss to focus on the interested features. Extensive experiments on three publicly available datasets demonstrate that our proposed SuperVessel can segment more tiny vessels with higher segmentation accuracy IoU over 6%, compared with other state-of-the-art algorithms. Besides, the stability of SuperVessel is also stronger than other algorithms. We will release the code after the paper is published.
abstract_zh: 血管分割从图像中提取血管，并作为诊断眼科疾病等各种疾病的基础。眼科医生经常需要高分辨率的分割结果进行分析，这导致大多数现有方法的计算量巨大。如果基于低分辨率输入，它们很容易忽略微小血管或导致分段血管的不连续性。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种名为 SuperVessel 的算法，该算法使用低分辨率图像作为输入，给出高分辨率且准确的血管分割。我们首先将超分辨率作为我们的辅助分支，以提供潜在的高分辨率细节特征，这些特征可以在测试阶段删除。其次，我们提出了两个模块来增强感兴趣的分割区域的特征，包括具有特征分解（UFD）模块的上采样和具有约束损失以关注感兴趣的特征的特征交互模块（FIM）。对三个公开数据集的广泛实验表明，与其他最先进的算法相比，我们提出的 SuperVessel 可以分割更多的微小血管，分割精度 IoU 超过 6%。此外，SuperVessel的稳定性也比其他算法更强。我们将在论文发表后发布代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SuperVessel的算法，通过低分辨率视网膜图像实现高分辨率血管分割。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理低分辨率输入时容易忽略微小血管或导致分割不连续，且高分辨率分割计算负载大。
AI.method: 采用超分辨率辅助分支提取高分辨率细节特征，设计上采样与特征分解模块（UFD）和特征交互模块（FIM）并结合约束损失函数增强感兴趣区域特征。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上实验显示，相比现有最佳算法，微小血管分割准确率提升超过6%，且稳定性更强。
AI.conclusion: SuperVessel有效解决了低分辨率输入下的高精度血管分割问题，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Yuanfan Zhang,Gen Li,Lei Sun
title: Real Image Restoration via Structure-preserving Complementarity Attention
title_zh: 通过结构保持互补注意力恢复真实图像
abstract: Since convolutional neural networks perform well in learning generalizable image priors from large-scale data, these models have been widely used in image denoising tasks. However, the computational complexity increases dramatically as well on complex model. In this paper, We propose a novel lightweight Complementary Attention Module, which includes a density module and a sparse module, which can cooperatively mine dense and sparse features for feature complementary learning to build an efficient lightweight architecture. Moreover, to reduce the loss of details caused by denoising, this paper constructs a gradient-based structure-preserving branch. We utilize gradient-based branches to obtain additional structural priors for denoising, and make the model pay more attention to image geometric details through gradient loss optimization.Based on the above, we propose an efficiently Unet structured network with dual branch, the visual results show that can effectively preserve the structural details of the original image, we evaluate benchmarks including SIDD and DND, where SCANet achieves state-of-the-art performance in PSNR and SSIM while significantly reducing computational cost.
summary: Since convolutional neural networks perform well in learning generalizable image priors from large-scale data, these models have been widely used in image denoising tasks. However, the computational complexity increases dramatically as well on complex model. In this paper, We propose a novel lightweight Complementary Attention Module, which includes a density module and a sparse module, which can cooperatively mine dense and sparse features for feature complementary learning to build an efficient lightweight architecture. Moreover, to reduce the loss of details caused by denoising, this paper constructs a gradient-based structure-preserving branch. We utilize gradient-based branches to obtain additional structural priors for denoising, and make the model pay more attention to image geometric details through gradient loss optimization.Based on the above, we propose an efficiently Unet structured network with dual branch, the visual results show that can effectively preserve the structural details of the original image, we evaluate benchmarks including SIDD and DND, where SCANet achieves state-of-the-art performance in PSNR and SSIM while significantly reducing computational cost.
abstract_zh: 由于卷积神经网络在从大规模数据中学习可概括的图像先验方面表现良好，因此这些模型已广泛用于图像去噪任务。然而，复杂模型的计算复杂度也急剧增加。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的轻量级互补注意力模块，其中包括密度模块和稀疏模块，可以协同挖掘密集和稀疏特征以进行特征互补学习，从而构建高效的轻量级架构。此外，为了减少去噪引起的细节损失，本文构建了基于梯度的结构保持分支。我们利用基于梯度的分支获得额外的结构先验进行去噪，并通过梯度损失优化使模型更加关注图像几何细节。基于此，我们提出了一种高效的双分支Unet结构网络，视觉结果表明可以有效保留原始图像的结构细节，我们评估了包括SIDD和DND在内的基准，其中SCANet在PSNR和SSIM方面实现了最先进的性能，同时显着降低了计算成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于结构保持互补性注意力机制的真实图像修复方法，通过轻量化模块和梯度分支提升去噪效果并降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络在图像去噪中计算复杂度高且易丢失细节，需设计高效模型兼顾结构保持与计算效率。
AI.method: 设计包含密度模块与稀疏模块的互补注意力机制，结合梯度结构保持分支优化几何细节，并整合至双分支U-Net架构中。
AI.result: 在SIDD和DND基准测试中，SCANet在PSNR和SSIM指标上达到SOTA性能，同时显著降低计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 互补注意力模块与梯度分支有效平衡了图像修复的精度与效率，为轻量化模型设计提供新思路。
